17.22: Aba akuwanine mu Galileya, Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Omwana no munu kame sa betekiwe, abiwe mu maoko no aanu
17.23: mi kame sa mwiibae, kono mu liywaa no waatu, mba inguka.” Cwale aiyetwa sebeli aena onene. Okutelela Ekeleke.
17.24: Cwale aba ana kukeela mu kapenauma, asiku telisa aanu amali no keleke sebeli aiya kwa Pitolosi, sebeli amba kwa yonyene nji, “Ninji omwiyeti wenu ka tele omutelo no Ndoo ya Nyambe?”
17.25: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli otambula nji, “Ee,” kame atelanga. Cwale Pitolosi aba ana kwingena mu ndoo, yo kasamba kale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Iikene onahana Simoni? Kana ambumu no litunga kame ashimbanga omutelo kwanoo, nji kwa njili feela?”
17.26: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli otambula nji, “Kwaanu feela,” Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa Pitolosi nji, “Aana kandi kame alukuluhile.
17.27: Nji cwale tulese okwafoseza, ote ku liwate, okakondele akashuto mu meyi, mi oshimbe ondi so leme oweli, aba omuyaamisa mu kanwa, kame so wane amali no muwayawaya. Wa shimbe mi waabe wo, otenda omutelo wange ni wowe.

18.1: Mu nako eyo aiyetwa sebeli aiya kwa Jesu ni kumwibanguta nji, “Uyu no kuneneba luli mu mubuso naku wilu anyine?”
18.2: Jesu sebeli oisana omwanukana, niku mu beeka bakaci koo
18.3: ni kwamba nji, “Niti luli kame ni myambela, nji kamufutuka okufeka kanyi mwanukana, kamu tamba okwingena mu mubuso naku wilu.
18.4: Cwale abo omunu yonje so kushuwa kanyi omwanukana wuyo, yo munene mu mubuso naku wilu.
18.5: Mi woyo otambula omwanukana kanyi wuyo mu litina lyange, kame ani tambula. Emiliko ku Sibi (Maleka9.42-48; Luka17.1-2)
18.6: Kono woyo so sitatalisa omunjili kwa nukana awo apumena kwa mene, esi no kuwaba kwa yonyene nikumu nungelela eliwee no kuneneba mu ndingo mi akondelwe aba no kutunga no liwate.
18.7: Oumai ku litunga, mulibaka no inu eyo yasitatalisa, einu eyi isitatalisa aanu mbai iyi, kono oumai niwa woyo otendisa aanu okutenda esibi.
18.8: Nji elyoko lyowe simba elikondo, kame liku sitatalisa, oli patule mi oli kondele okuno kuleba. Esiwa kwa wene ninji oingene mu mooyo ni lyoko limweya, simba elikondo limweya, kasa wokwite amaoko ayili, simba amakondo ayili ni kukondelwa mu mulilo no kwa tima.
18.9: Mi elitiyo lyowe aba liku sitatalisa, oli tundisemo, olikondele oku no kuleba. Esiwa kwa wene naba so ingene mu mooyo me oli ni litiyo limweya, kasa okwikala ni miyo ayili niku kondelwa mu mulilo no lihele. Enguli no Mukoko no Kutauka (Luka5.3-7)
18.10: Mu tokomele, mulese okunyefula mumweya kwa nukana awo, kakuli kame namba kwaanyi nji ku wilu amangeloi oo kame a mona mu nako yonje olubala lwa sitange woyo oli ku wilu.
18.11: Kame namba ngesi kakuli Omwana no munu neeyi muku yoyisa esi si taukile.
18.12: Omu mu yambutela ni ngaibi? Nji omunu kame akwite emikoko no kukwana omwanda (100), mi sebeli kutauke mumweya, kana katwese okusiya ba malundu eyi no kukwana makumi mutanu naanee ni mutanu ni tunee. (99) nji aka saele owo ona tauka?
18.13: Niti luli kaama ni myambela nji, aba sauwane kame sa wabelelwe onene mwa yonyene okubita eyo no kukwana makumi mutanu naane ni makumi mutanu ni tunee (99).
18.14: Mu ndila imweya kasa omwasingela Sitenu woyo oli ku wilu nji ku tauke omunjili kwa anukana awo. Omunjili Aba Atenda Esibi
18.15: Nji omukowe naku foseze, ote kwa yonyene oka mwambele yoikalile yomboci. Aba sa kuyupe, naumuusu okutenda omukowe.
18.16: Kono nji kaku yupu, oshimbe kame mumweya simba ayili ni wene, nji etaba yonje ipakiwe kwaanu ayili simba aatu.
18.17: Cwale nji ka yupu awo, wambele ekeleke mi aba akana okuyupa simba ekeleke, atende kwa wene kanyi omunu no kwa limuka Nyambe simba omutelisi. Okununga ni Kulukulula.
18.18: Niti luli kame ni myambela nji, eyi sa mununge yonje mu litunga, kame sa inungiwe ku liwilu, mi eyi sa mu lukulule yonje mu litunga, mbai lukululwa mu liwilu.
18.19: Kame nisi myambela nji ayiili kwaanyi aba akuyupa banji einu yonje eyi akumbela, kame sabiwe kwa Sitange naku liwilu.
18.20: Kame namba eyi kakuli omo kuli ayiili simba aatu aa aku wanine mu litina lyange, kame nili noo mukaci koo. Enguli no Mubika nokwa Lemena
18.21: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli oiya kwa Jesu ni kwamba nji, “Mbumu, omwabange aba ani foseza, kame sa ni mu lemene tunjinga? Ninji ku tende mutanu ni twiili (7)?”
18.22: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Kani kwambele oku lemena mutanu ni twiili (7), kono makumi mutanu na yiili (70) aba itaimisiwa mutanu ni twiili (7).
18.23: Mulibaka elyo, omubuso naku wilu kame ufekile kanyi abo Ombumu aba asinga nji abika aye amuteneke amali aye.
18.24: Aba na tateka okushimba amali, sebeli alita omunjili ona kumu kolotela amasaka no mali akwana olule no mali no kupula.
18.25: Omubika owo kame ana kuulwa esi sa teneke, ombumu waye sebeli olaela nji aulisiwe, bamweya ni mukatayaye naa naye, neyi akwite yonje nji ateneke esikoloti.
18.26: Omubika sebeli omu kubamena balubala lwaye ni kwamba nji, ‘Mbumu, oni tende esishemo,’ mi mba ni ku usete esikoloti sowe sonje.’
18.27: Ombumu sebeli omu yupela amakeke ni kumu lukulula, mi sebeli omu lemena esikoloti.
18.28: “Kono omubika woyo aba ana ku tunda abo, sebeli okuwana ni mukwaye mubika woyo ana ku luwiwa naye, ona ku mu kolotela amali no kucaniba. Sebeli omu lema niku moowa yoamba nji, ‘Oniteneke esikoloti sange.”
18.29: Cwale woyo omukwaye mubika no sikoloti saye sebeli okwa ni manwi, ni kumu kumbela nji, ‘Onifele amakeke mba ni kuteneke esikoloti sowe!’
18.30: Kono sebeli okana niku mwingenyeka mu tolongo oku twala ba nako saka tenekele esikoloti.
18.31: Cwale akwaye abika aba ana kumona esi ana kutenda, sebeli aena onene, nukambela ombumu woo eyi ina tendahala yonje.
18.32: Cwale ombumu waye, sebeli omu tumena aanu okamwisana ni kumwambela nji, ‘Wene omubika no kwiiba, kame nina kuleselele esikoloti sowe sonje kakuli kame ona kuni kumbela.
18.33: Kame ona fanene okuyupela omukowe amakeke kanyi omo nina kuku yupelela amakeke.
18.34: Cwale mu kutina onene ombumu waye sebeli omuba mu maata no atukufazi no tolongo nji amu yandise oku twala ba nako saka tenekele esikoloti sonje.
18.35: Eyo yasatende Sitange naku wilu ku munu ni munu woyo oulwa oku lemena omwabaye etifoso taye, okutundelela kunji no mucima waye wonje.

19.1: Cwale Jesu aba ana kumana okwamba amaywi aa, sebeli otunda mu Galileya mi sebeli oiya mu tolopo no Judeya, eyi ili mu linjaliya no Jodani.
19.2: Aanu no kupula onene sebeli amukon̄a, mi sebeli waa balisa oko.
19.3: Afalisi nonyene sebeli aiya kwa Jesu muku mweteka okwamba nji, “Ninji omulume na pumenenwe okulukulula mukataye, mulibaka no mubonda wonje?”
19.4: Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Kamusibala mu man̄olo nji ku simuluho omuumbi kame ana kutenda aanu omulume ni mukati?
19.5: Mi Nyambe sebeli wamba nji, ‘Mulibaka eli, omulume mba siyi sitaye ni inawaye, akumalele mukataye, mi ayili mba tende enyama imweya.’
19.6: Cwale kasa ayili, kono sebeli nyama imweya feela. Cwalehe, Nyambe eyi ana waneke bamweya, omunu alese okwitaba.”
19.7: Afalisi sebeli amba kwa yonyene nji, “Cwale iikene Mushe aba ana kutu laela okuba omukati elin̄olo no kulukulula ni ku mulukulula?
19.8: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Neli mulibaka no koongola emicima kwenu, nji mane Mushe sebeli omipumenena okulukulula akatenu. Kono ku simuluho kakwasi ku tendiwangwa ngeeso.
19.9: Mi kame namba kwaanyi nji, “Woyo yonje so lukulula omukataye ni kukwata mundina kame abuka. Omulume kame atwesa okulukulula mukataye nji kame na waniwa yo tenda ouhule.”
19.10: Aiyetwa aye sebeli amba kwa yonyene nji, “Cwale nji mokwikalele ngeso omulume kwa mukataye, ouwa ni kwaa kwata.”
19.11: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Kasa aanu onje aa atwesa oku tambula etuto eyi, kono konji feela kwaawo ana pumenenwe kwa Nyambe okutambula.
19.12: Kame kuli amabaka no kupula abo alume anjili katwese okukwata. Alume anjili kame ana kuleiwa yongeso nambulwa okwikala naana. Anjili kame ana kutendiwa ngeso kwakoo aanu, mi alume anjili kaakwata mulibaka no mubuso naku wilu. Woyo otwesa yonje atambule etuto eyi.” Jesu Yofuyola Anuke Anyonyo (Maleka10.13-16; Luka18.15-17)
19.13: Cwale aanu sebeli alita aanuke anyonyo kwa Jesu nji aabeeke amaoko, mi aa lapelele. Aiyetwa aye sebeli aayuta ana kwa lita.
19.14: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mulesele anukana aiye kwa mene mi mulese okwa kanisa okwiiya kwa mene, kakuli Omubuso naku wilu, kame oli kwaanu akufekile kanyi aa anuke.”
19.15: Cwale Jesu sebeli waa beeka amaoko nuukutela. Ondumbana no Mufumi (Maleka10.17-31; Luka18.18-30)
19.16: Cwale omulume munjili sebeli oiya kwa Jesu ni kwamba kwa yonyene nji, “Mwiyeti, esiwa sani tende ni sibine nji nika wane omooyo no kwaabwa?”
19.17: Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Iikene oni ibanguteta eyi no uwa? Omuwa ni Nyambe mumweya feela. Nji kame osinga okwingena mu mooyo, omamele emilawo.”
19.18: Ondumbana woyo sebeli oibanguta Jesu nji, “Ibine emilawo eyo?” Jesu sebeli wamba nji, “Olese kwibaa, Olese kubuka, Olese kwiita, Olese ku paka eyi no mapwa,
19.19: okuteke sitowe ni inaowe, mi osinge omukowe kanyi omo ukusingela wenyene.”
19.20: Ondumbana sebeli wamba kwa Jesu nji, “Eyo yonje kame ni imamele, iikene nisi ulwile?”
19.21: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, aba usinga okutenda woyo no kupetahala, ote mi okaulise eyi oluwile yonje, mi otabele afuzana amali, mi mbuikala ni ufumu naku wilu. Cwale oiye oni kon̄e.
19.22: Cwale ondumbana aba ana kuyupa ngeeso, sebeli okutela yo enine, kakuli kame ana kuluwa eyi no kupula onene.
19.23: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa iyetwa aye nji, “Niti luli kame ni myambela nji, mba kubambaba onene omunu no kuluwa okuingena mu mubuso na kuwilu.
19.24: Kame nisi myambela nji, nikwa kwakotoba ekamele aba saiingene mu litiyo no ndonga, okubita osi kuluwa akaingene mu mubuso wa Nyambe.”
19.25: Cwale aiyetwa aba ana kuyupa ngeeso sebeli akomoka onene ni kwamba nji, “Nji mokwikalele ngeesi cwale anyine soka yoyisiwa?”
19.26: Jesu sebeli waaliketa ni kwamba nji, “Kwaanu kame kukwangwiwa, kono kwa Nyambe einu yonje kame itwisahala.”
19.27: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli omu tambula nji, “Omone aci natu lesele einu yonje mi natuku kon̄o. Cwale iikene satuwane aci?”
19.28: Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Niti luli kame ni myambela nji, “Cwale elitunga aba salitendiwe oubya, cwale Omwana no munu aba saikale ba lubona no kanya yaye, anyi muna nikon̄o kame sa mwikale naanyi ba mabona likumi na yiili (12), mi mu atule amasika no Isilaele likumi na yiili (12).
19.29: Cwale omunu yonje woyo onasiyi etindoo, simba amandaye, simba inawaye, simba sitaye simba aana ni matema aye mulibaka no litina lyange, kame sa tambule onene oku bitelela omwanda, mi kame salye esanda no mooyo no kwaabwa.
19.30: Kono ano kupula ali ku lubala, mba tende aa na munyima, mi aa na munyima asatende aa na ku lubala.

20.1: Jesu sebeli otwalelela okwamba omo wikalele omubuso naku wilu nji, “Eliywaa linjili amasiku omulume sebeli ota mukwisanena abeleki mu litema lyaye.
20.2: Munyima no kulumelelana nabeleki okwabaanga etifo no baliywaa, mi sebeli waa tuma mu litema lyaye no beine oka sebeza.
20.3: Cwale sebeli ota kame ba musika amasiku enako aba ina kutenda mutanu ni tunee (09:00) mi sebeli omona anjili aimanine feela nambulwa omusebezi,
20.4: mi sebeli wamba kwa onjene nji, “Mute naanyi mu litema no beine muka sebeze, mi mbani mibi esi silukele.”
20.5: Cwale sebeli ata. Mi aba ana kuuka kame ku musika mu nako no munji eliywaa elili ba kaci no mutwi ni mangolwaa kuma 3 okoloko (15:00) sebeli otenda yongeso.
20.6: Mi aba ina kusinga okwana 5 okoloko (17:00) sebeli ouka ku musika nuukawana anjili aimanine, mi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, ‘Iikene mwimanene bano eliywaa lyonje nambulwa esi mutenda?’
20.7: Cwale aanu sebeli amba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Kakuli kakwisa woyo ona tubi omusebezi. Mi sebeli waambela nji, ‘Mute naanyi mu litema lyange no beine muka sebeze.’
20.8: “Enako no mangolwaa aba ina kukeela, omunya litema no beine, sebeli wamba ku mwendisi no musebezi waye nji, ‘Oisane abeleki, mi waabe etituwelo too, otangise kwaa ana ingene munyima, otwale kwaa ana ingene ba weli.’
20.9: Cwale awo ana kwingena omusebezi, aba ina kukwana enako no 5 okoloko (17:00), omunjili ni munjili sebeli otambula etuwelo yaye eyi no ba liywaa.
20.10: Cwale awo ana kwingena ba weli aba ana kwiiya, kame ana ku yambuta nji kame sa biwe onene, kono nonyene sebeli abiwa kanyi akoo.
20.11: Cwale aba ana kumana okutambula, sebeli ahalala ku munya litema no beine.
20.12: Cwale aanu awo sebeli amba nji, ‘Aa ana ingene munyima, kame ana sebeze ehola imweya feela, mi nwaabi kanyi aci tuna shimbi okulema ni liywaa ni kubya kwa lyo.’
20.13: Kono omunya litema sebeli otambula omunjili no kwawo nji, ‘Mulikani, kani sikoonga, ninji kawa siku kuyupa ni mene nji mbubelekele amali no ba liywaa limweya?
20.14: Oshimbe sowe esi sikulukele mi okutele. Meene kame ni keta okuba woyo ona kwisaniwa munyima kanyi omo nina bele wene.
20.15: Kana kani sipumenenwa okutenda eso nisinga okutenda ku mali ange? Nji kame oyupa omuna kakuli kame nili ni lyoko no koloka eli liba?’
20.16: Mumukwanongeso, “Aa na munyima mba tende aa na ku lubala, mi aa na ku lubala mba tende aa na munyima.” Jesu Yoamba Eyi no Lifu Lyaye aka no Waatu (Maleka10.32-34; Luka18.31-34)
20.17: Cwale Jesu yota ku Jelusalema, sebeli oshimbela kunyonga aiyetwa no kukwana likumi na yiili (12), mi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji,
20.18: “Komu mone, kame tu katile ku Jelusalema, mi Omwana no munu kame sa biwe mu maata no apulisita akulu, na iyeti no mulawo mi mba mwa tulele elifu,
20.19: mi mba beekiwa mu maoko no macaba nji mu shubule, amushape ni kumu ngongotela ba sifapano, mi mba ingulwa ba liywaa no waatu.” Oku Kumbela kwa Inawoo (Maleka10.35-45)
20.20: Cwale mukataye Zebedeya sebeli oiya kwa Jesu na naaye ayiili no andumbana, mi sebeli akubama niku kumbela simweya kwa yonyene.
20.21: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Iikene osaela?” Omukati sebeli wambela Jesu nji, “Oni sepise nji anange ayiili, akwikale omunjili kulyooko lyowe no silyo, omunjili kweli no simoo, mu mubuso owe.”
20.22: Kono Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Ka muyii esi mu kumbela.” Ninji kame mu twesa oku nwena mu komoki no mayando eyi ni tatelele oku nwena? Sebeli amba kwa yonyene nji, “Kame tutwesa.”
20.23: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Luli mba mu nwene mu komoki yange, kono oku niikala kweli no silyo, simba kweli no simoo, kasa mene woyo so keta awo saniikale ku lyoko no silyo simba kweli no simoo, kono eyo eibaka niyaawo ana lukisetwe ngeeso kwa sitange.”
20.24: Cwale anjili aiyetwa aye aba ana kuyupa eyo, sebeli atinena Jacobo ni minaye.
20.25: Kono Jesu sebeli waisanena kwa yonyene ni kwamba nji, “Kame muyii nji abusi no macaba kame akwite amaata beulu yoo, mi awo ali mu itulo no kuneneba kame abusa mu kutweba.
20.26: Kono kaku fanene okwikala ngeeso mukaci kenu. Woyo yonje osinga oku tenda woyo no kuneneba mukaci kenu, atende omubika kwaanyi moonje,
20.27: mi woyo yonje osinga okutenda woyo no weli, atende omubika kwaanyi,
20.28: kanyi Omwana no munu kasiiya nji abelekelwe, kono abelekele aanu, ni kuba omooyo waye nji aanu no kupula aliululwe.” Jesu aba ana Kubalisa Eibofu Yiili (Maleka10.46-52; Luka18.35-43)
20.29: Ababo Jesu na iyetwa aye aatunda mu Jeliko, aanu no kupula-pula sebeli amu kon̄a.
20.30: Eibofu yiili kame ina kwikalanga kunyonga no ndila. Aba ina kuyupa nji Jesu kame abita, sebeli ikuwa nji, “Mbumu, mwana Dabida, otu yupele amakeke!.”
20.31: Ano kupula sebeli aayuta nji aondoke, kono onyene sebeli aekeza okukuwa nji, “Mbumu, Mwana Dabida, otu yupele amakeke!”
20.32: Jesu sebeli oimana, nikwaisana, mi sebeli waibanguta nji, “Siikene musaela nji nimi tendele?”
20.33: Eibofu sebeli itambula Jesu nji, “Mbumu amiyo etu amone!”
20.34: Jesu sebeli waa yupela amakeke ni kwalema ba miyo oo. Mi mu wangu-wangu sebeli amona niku mukon̄a.

21.1: Cwale aba ana kukeela kunyonga no Jelusalema, sebeli aiya ku Betefage, ba lilundu no itondo no olibe, Jesu sebeli otuma aiyetwa aye ayiili,
21.2: ni kwaambela nji, “Mute mu mundi ou mwa likete, mi mu muwanguwangu mba mu wana embongolo ina fungiwa ni mwana yo, mutu fungulule, mi muni litele to.
21.3: Nji omunu yonje kame sa miibanguta, mu mwambele nji, ‘Ombumu kame atusaela, mi mu wangu mba mi pumenene okutu lita kwa mene.”
21.4: Etaba eyo na kame ina kutendiwa nji ku tendahale esi sina kwambiwa kwa munuhi wa Nyambe Isaya nji,
21.5: “Mwambele omulenen̄i no Sione nji, Omone, Ombumu wowe uno, Uyu okukokobelize yo ikalile ba mbongolo akana no kambongolo.”
21.6: Aiyetwa aye sebeli ata, nuu katenda eso ana kwaambela Jesu.
21.7: Sebeli a lita akambongolo ni mwana ko, sebeli ayala eikumango yoo ba tonyene, mi Jesu sebeli otinabo.
21.8: Cwale aanu no kupula sebeli ayala eikumango yoo mu ndila, anjili sebeli atema emitayi no itondo ni kwiiyala mu ndila.
21.9: Cwale aanu no kupula ana kwenda ku lubala, nawo ana kumu kon̄anga, sebeli akuweleza nji, “Hosanna kwa Mwana Dabida! Ku lumbekwe woyo oiya mulitina lya Mbumu! Etumbo ikale ku mawilu naku liwilu!”
21.10: Cwale Jesu aba ana kwingena mu Jelusalema, omundi onje sebeli wimana amaefe-efe, mi sebeli aibanguta nji, “Anyine wuyu?”
21.11: Cwale aanu no kupula sebeli amba nji, “Ya Jesu, omunuhi wa Nyambe mi kame atunda mu Nazaleta no Ngalilea.” Jesu yo kanena aanu Emiulo yoo mu Lilapa no Ndoo ya Nyambe (Maleka11.15-19; Luka19.45-48; Jowani2.13-22)
21.12: Jesu sebeli wingena mu lilapa no ndoo ya Nyambe, mi sebeli ocitela kundee aanu onje ana kuulisetangamo ni kuula, sebeli okwisa etitafule ta siku cinca amali, ni ipula no awo asi kuulisa otunkwilimba.
21.13: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Kame kuna n̄oliwa mu man̄olo nji,‘Endoo yange mba iisanwa endoo no milapelo,’ kandi anyi na mwitende amakundamo no ambuyi!”
21.14: Cwale sebeli kwiiya kwa yonyene mu lilapa no Ndoo ya Nyambe eibofu ni iyanga, mi sebeli waabalisa.
21.15: Kono apulisita no akulu na iyeti no milawo, aba ana kumone eyi no kukomokisa eyi ana kutenda, naana alemine oku kuwa mu lilapa no Ndoo ya Nyambe amba nji, “Hosanna kwa Mwana Dabida!” Mi sebeli atina onene.
21.16: Cwale sebeli amba kwa Jesu nji, “Ninji kame oyupa eyamba aamba?” Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Ee, anyi kamusi kubala mu man̄olo nji, namwiyete aana nawo ayamwa okumiba emilumbeko?”
21.17: Cwale Jesu sebeli waasiya okutunda mu mulenen̄i nikuta ku Beteni, mi sebeli oka langanamo. Jesu aba anaku Kuta Esitondo no Feiga (Maleka11.12-14; Maleka11.20-24)
21.18: Amasiku Jesu youka ku mulenen̄i, sebeli oyomba.
21.19: Cwale aba ana kumona esitondo no feiga ku nyonga no ndila, sebeli otako ku sitondo, kono kasiku wanako eyi no kulya, konji amamuna feela. Sebeli wamba ku sitondoo nji, “Ku lese oku monahala efeiga kwa wene, okuta oku no kwabwa!” Ababo esitondo no Feiga sebeli si kukuta.
21.20: Aaiyetwa aye aba ana ku mona ngeeso, sebeli akomoka ni kwibanguta nji, “Esi sitondo no Feiga ngasibine sina kukuta mu wangu-wangu?”
21.21: Cwale Jesu sebeli waa tambula nji, “Niti luli kame ni myambela nji, “Kambe kame muli ni tumelo no kwiyala, kambe kame mutwesa okutenda kanyi omo nina tendele ku sitondo eso mane ni kubitelela. Kambe simba aba mwambela elilundu eli nji, “Otunde aba, okaku kondele mu liwate, kambe mbaku tendahala ngeseo.”
21.22: Mi einu yonje eyi sa mu kumbele mu tapelo, aba muli ni tumelo, kame sa mwi biwe. Epuzo Mulibaka no Tukelo ya Jesu (Maleka11.27-33; Luka20.1-8)
21.23: Cwale Jesu aba ana kwingena mu lilapa no Ndoo ya Nyambe ni kutangisa okwiyeta, apulisita akulu na kulu no sicaba, sebeli aiya kwa yonyene ni ku mwibanguta nji, “Otwambele oko itunda etukelo eyi okutusisa okutenda einu eyi? Mi anyine ona kubi etukelo eyi?”
21.24: Jesu sebeli waa tambula nji, “Ni mene mba nimi ibanguta, aba samuni tambule, ni mene, mba ni myambele oko itunda etukelo eyi nikutusisa okutenda einu eyi.
21.25: Kubine ana kuwana Jowani etukelo no kukolobeza, kwa Nyambe nji kwaanu? Sebeli akukananisa mukaci koo nji, “Iikene sa twambe?” Cwale aba satu tambule nji, Kame itunda kwa Nyambe, yonyene kame sambe nji, cwale iikene aba ka mu siku pumena Jowani?”
21.26: Kono aba sa twambe nji, ‘Kame ina kutunda kwaanu, kame tu cila anu no kupula, kakuli onje kame ana kolwa nji Jowani neli munuhi wa Nyambe.”
21.27: Cwale sebeli atambula Jesu nji, “Aci katu yii.” Mi ni yonyene sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Ni mene, ka nitamba ku myambela mu tukelo yanyine eyo nikutusisa okutenda einu eyi. Enguli no Aana Ayili no Andumbana
21.28: “Cwale iikene muyambuta okukumanenna neyi enguli? Omulume kame ana kwikalanga naana ayiili, sebeli wiiya ku woyo no weli ni ku mwambela nji, Mwanange, ote oka sebeze mu litema lyange no beine balelo.’
21.29: Cwale woyo sebeli otambula nji, “Sisingi.” Kono munyima nokukana sebeli obaka ni kuta.
21.30: Cwale sitoo sebeli ota ku mwanaye omunjili sebeli oamba esinu simweya. Mi woyo sebeli otambula nji, ‘Kame nita Sitange,’ kono ka sikuta.
21.31: Kwaa ayiili, woyo ona tende esi ana ku singa sitaye ubine? Sebeli amba nji, “Woyo no weli.” Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyenenji nji, “Niti luli, kame ni myambela nji, Asikutelisa naa kati no mahule mbaingene mu mubuso wa Nyambe okusiya anyi munyima.
21.32: Kame namba ngeesi kakuli Jowani nakwiya kwanyi mukumimonisa omo mufanena okwikalela ano kuluka, kono ka mwa siku mupumena, kono asikutelisa ni mahule nwa kati naa ku mupumena, kono anyi simba aba muna kumona ngeeso, ka mwa sikubaka nikumu pumena. Enguli no Abeleki mu Litema no Beine (Maleka12.1-12; Luka20.9-19)
21.33: “Komu yupe enguli injili,” Kame kuna kwikalanga omunyaa litema woyo ona ku kuna elitema no beine mi sebeli oli sileleza ni lukwakwa, mi kame sebeli otombolamo elisima omo kuna kukamunenwanga eino okutunda kuitolwana, niku yaka etawala no mumameli. Sebeli olibeeka mu pabalelo nwo alimi, mi sebeli ota mu naha indina.
21.34: Enako no ku kutula aba ina kusheteta, sebeli otumena abika aye kwasi kulima nji aka mushimbele etuwelo yaye no kutulo,
21.35: kono asi kulima sebeli alema abika aye nikufulabo mumweya ni kwibaabo omunjili, mi woyo no waatu kame sebeli amu pobaula ni mawee ni kumwibaa.
21.36: Kame sebeli otuma anjili abika, aa na ku bitelela aa no weli ku kupula, mi asikulima sebeli aatenda kanyi akoo aya no weli.
21.37: Ku mamaneneno sebeli otumako mwanaye kwa onyene, ni kwamba nji, “Mwanange mbaka mukuteke.”
21.38: Kono asikulima aba ana ku mono mwanaye, sebeli akwambela nji, ‘Uno yokame oshwana, twendenyi tu ka mwibaye, mi mbatu yolo esanda saye.’
21.39: Sebeli amu lema, ni ku mu kondela ku ndee no litema no bine, mi sebeli a mwibaa.
21.40: Cwalehe, omunya litema no beine aba asa iye, asikulima awo ngaibi omu saatendele?
21.41: Sebeli amba kwa yonyene nji, “Kame sa aibae ouyi aanu awo no lunya, mi elitema no beine kame saa libeeke mu pabalelo ya sikulima andina, awo asa mube etuwelo yaye no kutulo.”
21.42: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Kamu sibala mu man̄olo awo amba nji, ‘Eliwee ana yumbu asikuyaka, lokame eli lina futuka eli lyongotite elilulu no ndoo. Kame lina tendiwa ngeeso kwa Mbumu, Mm eyi mu miyo etu kame ikomokisa.
21.43: Mulibaka eli, kame namba kwaanyi nji, “Mba mu byanguliwa omubuso wa Nyambe, mi kame saubiwe esicaba sindina, esi sasi beeke embuya yaso.”
21.44: Woyo so kwela ba liwee elyo, kame sa coke mi kame sa li pyate woyo sali kwele beulu.
21.45: Apulisita akulu na falisi aba ana yupu etinguli eto, sebeli alimuka nji kame ti yuleka onyene,
21.46: Kame ana kusinga okumuleme, kono sebeli acila aanu nokupula, kakuli kame ana kupumena nji, Jesu kame atendile omunuhi wa Nyambe.

22.1: Jesu kame sebeli otwalelela okwamba kwa kulu no mulawo naakulu no macaba mu tinguli nji,
22.2: “Omubuso na kuwilu kame uku fekile kanyi eso sina kutendahala abo ombumu aba ana kutendele mwanaye no mulume omukiti no makwala.
22.3: Sebeli otuma abika aye nji aka isana awo ana kwisanenwa ku mukiti no makwala, kono sebeli akana okwiiyako.
22.4: Kame kabana tumako anjili abika nji, ‘Mukaambele ana kwisaniwa nji, “Nakulukisiwa omulalelo. Mi amapulu ange ni tingombe etinjili no kusuwa nati ibaiwa, mi einu yonje nai lukisiwa mwiye ku mukiti no makwala.”
22.5: Kono kasitwalako etingana sebeli akutele ku misebezi yoo, omunjili ku matema aye omunjili ku miulo yaye.
22.6: Mianjili sebeli alema abika aye okwa yandisa ni kwaibaa.
22.7: Ombumu sebeli otina mane ni ku tuma etimpi taye no masole nji aka yundise aanu no kwiiba nu ka cin̄a omulenen̄i woo.
22.8: Cwale sebeli wamba kwabika aye nji, ‘Omukiti no makwala nau lukisiwa kono aanu nina isana kawaafanene.
22.9: Cwale mute ba mangana ndila mi mwambele omunu yonje sa muwane aiye ku mukiti no makwala.’
22.10: Abika awo sebeli ata mu tindila, mi sebeli aungeka aanu onje awo ana kuwana, ano kwiiba naa no kuwaba mi endoo no mukiti sebeli iiyala no angenda.
22.11: “Kono cwale ombumu aba anaingena okamona ana memiwa ku mukiti, sebeli olemuha omulume nokwa ku manga olwambi no mukiti no makwala.
22.12: Mi sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Mulikani! ngaibi ona ingene muno me oulwile olwambi no mukiti?’ Kono omulume kakwisa eyi ana kwamba.
22.13: Cwale ombumu sebeli wamba kwa beleki aye nji, ‘Mumu nunge ku makondo ni ku makaa, mumu kondele ku uwi na ku ndee, oko sakwikale okulila ni ku kweca amaeo.’ ”
22.14: Jesu sebeli omanenena okwamba nji, “Aa no kupula naisaniwa, kono aa naketiwa na cana.” Epuzo Mulibaka no Kuneka Omutelo (Maleka12.13-17; Luka20.20-26)
22.15: Cwale afaisi sebeli ata oka kuwana oku lela omo samu swaseze mu maywi aye.
22.16: Cwale sebeli atuma aiyetwa awo kwa yonyene, naanu a Heloda, sebeli amba nji, “Mwiyeti, kame tu limukile nji weene kame uli wa niti, mi kame wiiyeta endila ya Nyambe okuta mu niti yayo, mi kaubilaele neyo amba aanu mi kumonisa esaluluti kwaanu.
22.17: Otwambele, omo uyambuteta? Kana, kame ku lukela oku tundiseta Sezale omutelo nji kakulukele?”
22.18: Kono Jesu muku limuka eminahano yoo no kwiiba, sebeli wamba nji, “Anyi asikukuba! iikene munetekela?
22.19: Muni monise omuwayawaya mutenekanga ku mutelo.” Sebeli amu litela wo.
22.20: Mi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Esifateho ni litina ilibo yaanyine?”
22.21: Sebeli atambula nji, “Ya Sesale.” Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Cwalehe, mube Sesale esi sili sa Sesale, mi mube Nyambe esi sili sa Nyambe.”
22.22: Cwale aba ana kuyupu ngeeso, sebeli akomoka niku musiya nuu kutela. Epuzo Mulibaka no Kwinguka Kwaafu (Maleka12.18-27; Luka20.27-40)
22.23: Kusili mu liywaa elyo Asaduki awo amba nji kakwisa okwinguka nwaafu, sebeli aiya kwa Jesu niku mwibanguta nji,
22.24: “Mwiyeti, Mushe kame ana kwamba nji, ‘Omulume aba afa yoka kwite aana, minaye simba mukulwaye kame twesa oku kwata ombelwa, aleyeleko aana nji alitele omwabaye olusika.’
22.25: Kwaaci naku kwikala aana no andumbana ana ku kwana mutanu na yiili (7), woyo no weli sebeli okwata nikufa yo kakwite omwana, mi woyo nomu kon̄elela munyima sebeli okwata ombelwa.
22.26: Cwale sebeli kutendahala ngeeso nikwa woyo no wiili, nikwa woyo no waatu okutwala mane nikwa woyo no mutanu ni twiili (7).
22.27: Munyima yoo onje, omukati ni yonyene sebeli ofa.
22.28: Cwalehe, ba nako no kwinguka nwafu, omukati woyo kame sa tende waanyine kwawo noku kwana mutanu ni twiili (7) kakuli onje kame ana kumu kwatanga.”
22.29: Jesu sebeli waatambula nji, “Kame mu fosa, kakuli kamu limukile aman̄olo, simba amaata a Nyambe.
22.30: Cwale Nyambe aba saingule aafu, kakwisa woyo so kwata, simba oku kwaliwa, kono kame sa tende kanyi amageloi naku wilu.
22.31: Mi kweyi no kwinguka nwaafu, kamwa sikubala esi anaku myambela Nyambe nji,
22.32: ‘Time, Nyambe wa Abulahama, Nyambe wa Isaka, Nyambe wa Jakobo?’ Kasa Nyambe waa no kufa, kono wawo no kuyoya.”
22.33: Mi enyangela aba ina kuyupa ngeeso, sebeli akomokiswa ku tuto yaye. Omulawo Munene (Maleka12.28-34; Luka10.25-28)
22.34: Cwale Afalisi aba ana kuyupa nji Jesu kame ana ondokisa Asaduki, sebeli akuwana onje.
22.35: Cwale omunjili kwa onyene omwiiyeti no mulawo sebeli omweteka niku mwibanguta nji,
22.36: “Mwiyeti, kandi etaelo inene mu milawo, ibine?”
22.37: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Osinge Ombumu Nyambe wowe ni mucima wowe wonje, ni mooyo wowe wonje mane ni muku yupisisa kowe konje.’
22.38: Eyi etaelo inene neyi no weli.
22.39: Ou no wiili nou, owo ukufekile kanyi wonyene mi kame wamba nji, ‘Osinge omwabowe kanyi omo uku singela wenyene.’
22.40: Ku titaelo eto timbili, oku beekilwe emilawo ya Mushe yonje ni tituto tonje no anuhi a Nyambe.” Epuzo ya Jesu Mulibaka lya Kilesite (Maleka12.28-34; Luka10.25-28)
22.41: Afalisi aba ano kuwana, Jesu sebeli waa ibanguta nji,
22.42: “Anyi ikene munahana kweyi ya Kilesite? Wa lusika lwa anyine? Sebeli amba kwa yonyene nji, “Kame ali wa lusika lwa Dabida.”
22.43: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Cwale iikene Dabida aba amwisana nji Mbumu? Dabida kame ana kwambanga ni mebo aba ana kwamba nji,
22.44: “Ombumu Nyambe kame anamba kwa Mbumu wange nji oikale ku lyoko lyange no silyo, okutwala aba sa ni kabeekele eila yowe kunji no makondo owe.’
22.45: Nji Dabida kame aisana Kilesite nji Mbumu, cwale ngasibine satendele nji Kilesite wa lusika lwa Dabida?”
22.46: Kakwisa simba mumweya woyo ona kutwesa oku mutambula, simba okutunda ba liywaa elyo kakwisa woyo ona kwikala ni undume noku mwibanguta.

23.1: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwaanu no kupula ni kwa iyetwa aye nji,
23.2: “Aiyeti no mulawo na Falisi kame ali mu situlo sa Mushe.
23.3: Cwalehe mu tende ni kumamela eyi amiyeta, kono mulese okutenda kanyi omwatendela onyene, kakuli katende eyi aiyeta.
23.4: Kame abeeka emishimbo no kulema ba mafuti no anu eyo no kubambaba okwishimba. Kono onyene katende esinjili okwaatusa okushimba emitiyo eyo.
23.5: Kame atenda eyoo yonje nji imoniwe kwaanu. Mi kame atenda eikwama no man̄olo inyonyo ni kwinunga mu lubala ni ba maoko ni kwitenda inene. Mi kame atenda amashamba no kuleba ku mikanjo yoo eyi akumanganga aba alapela nji amoniwe kwaanu.
23.6: Kame asinga eibaka no kukutekeha ba mikiti ni ipula eyi ili ku lubala mu tindoo no milapelo.
23.7: Kame asinga oku keetiwa mu likute mu misika ni ku isaniwa kwaanu nji ‘Mwiyeti.’
23.8: Kono anyi mule kupumena oku miisana nji ‘Mwiyeti,’ kakuli omwiyeti wenu ni mumweya feela, mi moonje kame muli aiyetwa.
23.9: Mi mulese kwisana omunu bano banji nji ‘Sitenu,’ kakuli Sitenu ni mumweya feela, woyo oli ku wilu.
23.10: Mi mulese okupumena oku miisana nji ‘Omwendisi,’ kakuli kame mukwite omwendisi wenu mumweya feela, yonyene Kilesite.
23.11: Woyo no kuneneba onene mwaanyi, yosotende omubika wenu.
23.12: Awo onje aku nuneka kame sa kokobeziwe mi awo aku kokobeza kame sa nunekiwe. Jesu yo Nyaza Asikukuba, Aendisi no Majuda (Maleka12.40; Luka11.39-42; 20.47)
23.13: “Kono oumai ni wenu aiyeti no mulawo na Falisi, anyi asikukuba! Kame mu yatilela aanu omubuso naku wilu. Anyi ka mwingene, mi kamu pumenene awo asinga okwingenamo.
23.14: Oumai ni wenu Aiyeti no mulawo na Falisi, anyi asikukuba! Kame moonga etimbelwa ni kwaitela etindoo too. Cwale kame mulapela etitapelo no kuleba oku wabelisa aanu. Cwaleabo ekoto yenu mbaitende eyi no kuneneba ni kubitelela akwenu.
23.15: “Oumai ni wenu, Aiyeti no mulawo na Falisi, anyi asikukuba! Kame mweenda memu mana elitunga ni komboka amawate, nji mu wane omunu mumweya mi aba mu muwana, kame mu mufutula okutenda omwana lihele twiili kanyi anyi.
23.16: Oumai ni wenu anyi aendisi no kufa miyo, anyi mwamba nji, “Omunu aba aeta ni ndoo ya Nyambe kakwisa etuso, kono aba aeta ni gauda no ndoo ya Nyambe, na nungiwa mu kweeta kwaye.”
23.17: Anyi aelo no ibofu, esinene ni sibine? egauda nji endoo ya Nyambe eyo ina kenisa egauda?
23.18: Mi kame mwamba nji, “Omunu aba aeta ni aletale kakwisa etuso, kono aba aeta ni mpo eyi ili ba aletale kame anungilwe mu kweeta kwaye.”
23.19: Anyi alume no ibofu! cwale esinene ni sibine, empo nji ni aletale, eyo itenda empo okukena?
23.20: Cwale omunu yonje aba aeta ni aletale, kame aeta mu yonyene neyo ili ba aletale yonje,
23.21: mi woyo yonje oeta ni ndoo ya Nyambe, kame aeta kame ni Nyambe woyo oyoyamo.
23.22: Mi woyo oeta ni liwilu, kame aeta ni lubona lwa Nyambe, ni kwa woyo oikalilebo.
23.23: “Oumai ni wenu aiyeti no mulawo na Falisi, anyi asikukuba! Kame muba simweya kweyi itenda likumi eimena eyi itendisa eilya okumamata mi ka mu kwite taba ni inene namu mulawo, okuluka, amakeke ni usepahali. Eyi yokame mufanena okutenda nambulwa ketululo kwaa kwenu.
23.24: Anyi aendisi no kufa miyo, kame mutundisa otumbulumbulu mu ino yenu, kono kame mumina Ekamele.
23.25: “Oumai ni wemu aiyeti no mulawo na Falisi, anyi asikukuba! Kame muyowisa ekomoki ni siwana bandee, mi mukaci kame kwiyalile einu munawana mu umbuyi ni ulyangelino.
23.26: Wene Omufalisi no sibofu, oyowise ekomoki ni siwana mukaci oweli, cwale ni bandee mbakukene ngeeso!
23.27: “Oumai ni wenu aiyeti no mulawo na Falisi, anyi asikukuba! Kame mu fekile kanyi amabita noku basiwa elikena, amonahala okutenda ano kuwaba bandee, kono mukaci kame aiyalile eifuba no aanu no kufa neyi no kwiiba yonje.
23.28: Naanyi kame muli ngeso, bandee kame mu monahala okuluka kwaanu, kono mukaci kenu kame mwiyalile omwiipo ni ibi. Jesu yo Amba eyi no Koto no Aendisi no Majuda (Luka11.47-51)
23.29: “Oumai ni wenu aiyeti no mulawo na Falisi, anyi asikukuba! Kame mu yaka amabita no anuhi a Nyanbe, mi kame mu kabisa awo asikuluka,
23.30: mi kame mwamba nji, ‘Kambe natu kuyoya mu maywaa no anjekulyetu, kambe katwa siku kuwana noo mu kwiita ounyinga no anuhi a Nyambe.
23.31: Mukwamba eyi kame mukupaka mwenyene nji kame muli asilusika lwawo ana kwiibaa anuhi a Nyambe.
23.32: Cwale mutwalelele okumanenena eyo anaku tateka anjekulyenu.
23.33: Anyi etinyoka, aana no imili, ngasibine samu picuke ekatulo no lyangalilo?
23.34: Cwalehe kame nimi tumena anuhi wa Nyambe, nawo no kushangama, na iyeti no mulawo, anjili kame sa mwaibae ni kwa ngongotela, anjili mba mwa fulu mu tindoo no milapelo ni kwacita okutunda mu tolopo injili nikuta kwiinjili.
23.35: Cwale abo ounyinga wao ano kuluka onje mbau saelelwe ba mitwi yenu, okutunda ba unyinga wa woyo osikuluka Abele okutwala ku unyinga wa Zakaliya mwanaye Balakiya, woyo muna kwibaa mukaci no ndoo ya Nyambe ni aletale.
23.36: Niti luli kame ni myambela nji, anyi aanu muyoya muno mu nako mbamu wana ekoto ku inu eyi yonje! Jesu yo Lilela Aanu no Jelusalema (Luka13.34-35)
23.37: “Jelusalema, Jelusalema, omulenen̄i onaibaa anuhi a Nyambe, nikwibaa ni mawee awo ana tumiwa kwa wene! Tunjinga ni lakazanga okuwaneka anowe bamweya kanyi on̄uku no seke aba awanekanga anaye munji no maando, kono kawa sisinga!
23.38: Komone, endoo yowe nai siyala kwa wene kanyi matota.
23.39: Cwale kame ni myambela nji, “Ka mutamba kuni mona kame, konji aba sa mwambe nji, ‘Ku lumbekwe woyo oiya mu litina lya Mbumu.’ ”

24.1: Jesu sebeli otunda mu lilapa no ndoo ya Nyambe nukutela kundina, ababo aiyetwa aye sebeli aiya kwa yonyene ni kumu yulekela emiyako no tindoo ta Nyambe.
24.2: Kono sebeli waatambula nji, “Mumone eyi yonje, mwimwine? Niti luli, kame ni myambela nji, “Ka kwisa eliwee simba limweya elyo sali siyale bano, eli lilemine ba liwee elinjili, elyo sa liulwe okukwisetwa banji.” Outata ni Kuyandisiwa (Maleka13.3-13; Luka21.7-19)
24.3: Cwale Jesu yoikala ba lilundu no itondo no Olibe, aiyetwa aye sebeli aiya kwa yonyene kumukunda, ni kwamba nji, “Otwambele eyo abo saika monahalele, nesi sasi tusimwete okwiiya kowe ni kubwa kwa litunga.”
24.4: Cwale Jesu sebeli waatambula nji, “Mu mamele nji omunu alese okumiyembulula
24.5: kakuli aanu no kupula kame saiye mu litina lyange ni kwamba nji, ‘Mene time Kilesite,’ mi kame sayembulule ano kupula.
24.6: Mi kame sa mu upe etindwaa ni mabulwati no tindwaa, kono mu mone nji mulese kucila, kakuli einu eyo kame ifanene okwiiya, kono abo amamaneneno kasi tendahala kale.
24.7: Esicaba kame sasi lwise esicaba sinjili, omubuso olwise omubuso munjili, mi olukupwe kame sa luikaleko ni tizikinyeho mu ibaka no kupula.
24.8: Kono eyo yonje kame sa itende feela amatatekelo no mayando.
24.9: “Cwale kame saminunge oku mitwala oka yandisiwa ni kumiibaa. Mi kame samu timbiwe ku matunga onje mu litina lyange.
24.10: Mi cwale aanu no kupula kame sa sitatale, mi kame sa betekane, mane nuukutimba.
24.11: Mi cwale anuhi no mapwa no kupula mba iiyi, mi kame sayembulule aanu no kupula.
24.12: Cwale kakuli ouyi kame sau ekezehe onene, elilato no aanu no kupula mba libwi.
24.13: Kono woyo so tundamena okutwala ku mamaneneno, yokame soka yoyisiwa.
24.14: Mi eliywi eli no kuwaba eli no mubuso kame sa lyambiwe mu litunga lyonje, cwale nji litende oupaki ku macaba onje, ba sakwiiye amamaneneno. Okwiiya kwa Mwana no munu (Maleka13.24-27; Luka21.25-28)
24.15: Daniele omunuhi wa Nyambe na kwamba eyi nji, ‘Esinu no kwiiba eso sisilafaza endoo ya Nyambe ni kusilokiwa. Mbamu mono ouyi oimanine mu sibaka no kukena.” (Osi ku bala alemuhe).
24.16: Cwale awo ali mu Judeya acilele ku malundu.
24.17: Mi woyo oli ba situwa no ndoo, alese ku shotokela mu ndoo akashimba esinu.
24.18: Mi woyo oli mu matema, alese okuukela ku mundi oka shimba olwambi.
24.19: Oumayi ni waawo akati sawaniwe akushimbile nawo sawaniwe ayamwisa mu maywaa awo!
24.20: Mu lapele nji mule okashotoka mu nako no mubebo simba mu liywaa eli no Sabata,
24.21: kakuli ba nako eyo, amayando mbatende ano kuneneba, awo kaa sitendahala kale simba okutunda ku matakelo no litunga ku lita bano, mi kame kakutamba ku tendahala ngeeso.
24.22: Mi cwale nji amaywaa awo ka kusufaziwa, kakwisa simba mumweya woyo so yoyisiwa. Kono cwale mulibaka lyaawo ana ketiwa, amaywaa awo mba kusufaziwa.
24.23: Cwale nji omunu kame amba kwa wene nji, ‘Omone, uno ya Kilesite!’ simba uya yokame!’ mulese kupumena.
24.24: Kame namba eyi kakuli asi konga nji aonyene asi Kilesite na nuhi no mapwa kame samonahale ni kumonisa eisupo inene ni timakazo nji kutwesahala, alyanganise simba awo ana kuketiwa.
24.25: Kono mumamele! Kame nina myambele oweli.
24.26: “Cwale, simba naba sa myambele nji, ‘Mumone, kame ali mu mushitu, mulese kutako, simba aba saambe nji, ‘Mumone, kame ali mu misusu no ndoo, mulese ku pumena,
24.27: kakuli kanyi olumonyi aba lweesa okutunda mu upa nikuka esela mu wiko, mwasa iyele ni Mwana no munu.
24.28: Mba kumonahala ngeeso kanyi amanon̄u aba aungana, aanu kame alimuka nji kame kuli esitupu.
24.29: “Ababo kusibwa feela en̄alelwa no maywaa awo, eliywaa kame sa li ilole, okweti kame sa ulwe eliseli mi etitungweti kame sa tikwe ku wilu, amaata na ku liwilu kame sa nyanganye.
24.30: Cwale esisupo no Mwana no munu mbasi monahala mu wilu aanu onje noba litunga kame sa lile. Mi kame sa mone Omwana no munu yokeyile mu makumbi no liwilu mu maata ni mu kanya inene.
24.31: Cwale kame sa tume amangeloi aye ni titolombita no mulumo no kuneneba, mi kame sa ungeke aketwa aye mu maneku anee okutunda ku mamaneneno no litunga linjili okuta ku linjili. Enguli no Sitondo no Mukuyu (Maleka13.28-31; Luka21.29-33)
24.32: “Mu kwiyete ku tuto okutunda ba sitondo no mukuyu, muwangu-wangu aba mumona nji emitai yaso aba yotoba mi kame ishoshela amamuna, mu limuke nji esilimwe kame sili beebi.
24.33: Mu ndila imweya, aba mu mona eyo yonje, mu limuke nji Omwana no munu sebeli oli beebi mi kame ali ba mwelo.
24.34: Niti luli kame ni myambela nji, lusika luno no balelo ka lu tamba okubwa, konji eyo naitendahala oweli.
24.35: Eliwilu ni litunga mbaibwe, kono amaywi ange ka tamba okubwa. Kakwisa Woyo Olimukile Eliywaa simba Enako (Maleka13.32-37; Luka17.26-30; 24.34-36)
24.36: “Kono eyi no liywaa ni nako eyo, kakwisa woyo wi limukile, simba amangeloi naku wilu kayii, simba Omwana, konji Sitange.
24.37: Omo kuna kwikalela mu maywaa a Nuwe, kame sa kwikale ngeeso ni mu kwiiya kwa Mwana no munu.
24.38: Mu maywaa awo omunda kawasiiya kale, aanu kame ana ku lya, oku nwa, oku kwata, oku kwalisa, konji eliywaa ana kwingena Nuwe mu Aleka.
24.39: Mi kasiku limuka esinjili konji omunda aba ona kwiiya mukwayundisa. Mi mosa kwikalele yongeso aba saiye Omwana no munu.
24.40: Ba nako eyo kwa alume ayiili aa saikale mu litema, omunjili mba shimbiwa, omunjili mba siyala.
24.41: Akati ayiili asa silange oubeeke, mumweya mba shimbiwa, omunjili mba siyala.
24.42: Cwale abo mutone, kakuli ka muyii eliywaa elyo saiye Ombumu wenu.
24.43: Kono mu limuke eyi, nji omunya ndoo kambe mba limuka enako no usiku aba saiye ombuyi, kambe kame satone mi kambe kaleselela ombuyi okucuula endoo yaye.
24.44: Cwalehe naanyi muku tukise, kakuli Omwana no munu kame saiye mu nako eyo mwa limukile. Omubika no Kusepahala ni Woyo Nokwa Sepahala (Luka12.41-48)
24.45: “Anyine cwale omubika no ku sepahala, ni kushangama, woyo sa beeke Ombumu okwendisa abika aye, okwaba eyi no kulya mu nako eyi ilukeele?
24.46: Embuyoti niya woyo omubika sawane Ombumu yo tenda omusebezi owo aba saiye.
24.47: Niti luli kame ni myambela nji kame samu beeke okwendisa kweyo aluwile yonje.
24.48: Kono iikene saitendahale nji woyo omubika ni wakwiiba mi kame ayambuta nji ombumu waye katamba okwiiya wangu,
24.49: mba tateke oku fula akwaye abika, alye, awee na cakolwa.
24.50: Ombumu no mubika woyo kame saiye mu liywaa elyo sa ulwe oku mu tatelela, ni mu nako no kwa limuka.
24.51: Mi kame sa mupatole eibindi, ni kumu beeka na asikukuba, oko sa kwikale okulila ni kukweca amaewo.

25.1: Ba nako eyo omubuso naku wilu kame sokufeke kanyi eso sina kutendahala abo akatana noku kwana likumi aba ana ku shimba amaboni oo ni kuta oka waniketa omukwati.
25.2: Ana kukwana mutanu kwa onyene neli aelo, mi mutanu neli ano kushangama.
25.3: Cwale aelo no kukwana mutanu kasiku shimbela amaboni oo amaati no kupula,
25.4: kono ano kushangama kame ana ku shimba amaati mwishimbelo yoo, bamweya ni maboni oo.
25.5: Cwale kakuli omukwati kame ana ku liyeha bakwiiya, sebeli akosa onje ni ku langana.
25.6: Kono bakaci no usiku omuhuwo sebeli o yupahala nji, ‘Komumone, omukwati uno! Ko mwiiye mu mu wanikete!’
25.7: Cwale akatana awo sebeli ainguka onje ni kutateka oku lukisa amaboni oo.
25.8: Cwale ano kweluba sebeli amba kwaa ano kushangama nji, “Mu tube ku maati enu, kakuli amaboni etu kame atima.”
25.9: Kono ano kushangama sebeli aa tambula nji, “Ka ku twesahala! katamba ku tu kwana aci naanyi. Mute kwa aulisi nji mu ka ku ulele eenu.”
25.10: Mi cwale akatana no kweluba asita feela mukuula amaati, omukwati sebeli okeela, mi awo ana kuku tukiseta sebeli aingena naye mu mukiti no likwala, mi esaandi sebeli siyatiliwa.
25.11: Munyima nweyo, akatana anjili sebeli aiya nonyene ni kwamba nji, ‘Mbumu, Mbumu! otu yatulwele.’
25.12: Kono omukwati sebeli otambula nji, “Niti luli kame ni myambela nji, kani mi yii.”
25.13: Cwale mwikale anyi me mutona, kakuli kamu limuka eliywaa simba enako eyo saiye Omwana no munu. Enguli no Abika Aatu (Luka19.11-27)
25.14: Omubuso naku wilu kame okufekile kanyi eso sina kutendahala abo omulume aba ano kutukiseta okuta mu mwendo waye, sebeli oisana abika aye ni kwaambela nji ababalele ofumu waye.
25.15: Sebeli oba omunjili amasaka no mali noku kwana mutanu, omunjili sebeli omuba amasaka ayiili no mali, omunjili esaka no mali imweya, sebeli oba omunjili ni munjili oku faniketa nomo atwesela. Cwale sebeli okutela.
25.16: Cwale woyo ona ku biwa amasaka mutanu no mali, ababo sebeli oka belekisa ni ku wanenabo kame no kukwana mutanu.
25.17: Mi kame ni woyo ona kubiwa amasaka ayiili sebeli ota okabelekisa ni kuwanenabo kame amasaka ayiili.
25.18: Kono woyo ona kubiwa esaka iweya no mali sebeli ota, nuka tombola owina banji niku shweeka amali no molyaye.
25.19: Cwale aba kuna kubita amaywaa no kupula omolya abika awo sebeli oiya, mi sebeli waisana nji amone omo ana belekisete amali aye.
25.20: Cwale woyo ona kutambula amasaka mutanu no mali sebeli oiya kwa molyaye okulita amasaka no mali kame noku kwana mutanu ni kwamba nji, ‘Molyange kame ona kuniba amasaka mutanu no mali, komone, kame nina wanenebo kame masaka mutanu no mali beulu.’
25.21: Omolyaye sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Nu tende wino, mi uli mubika no kuwaba ni ku sepahala! Nu sepahala ku inu no kucaniba, mba niku beeke okubusa eyi no kupula. Wingene mu kuwabelwa kwa molyowe!’
25.22: Mi ni woyo ona kubiwa amasaka ayiili no mali, sebeli oiya kwa molyaye ni kwamba nji, ‘Molyange, kame ona kuniba amasaka ayiili no mali, Omone! kame nina wanenebo kame amasaka ayiili no mali.’
25.23: Omolyaye sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Nu tende wino, wene omubika no kuwaba niku sepahala, nu twese oku sepahala mu inu no kucaniba, mba niku beeke okubusa eyi no kupula, wingene mu kuwabelwa kwa molyowe!’
25.24: Cwale ni woyo ona kubiwa esaka imweya no mali, ni yonyene sebeli oiya ni kwamba nji, “Molyange, kame niku limukile nji wene uli mulume noku bambaba, woyo ukutula omu wasi kuna, mi kame uungeka omu kausi kwaa embuto.
25.25: Cwale kakuli kame nina kucila, sebeli nita okatombola owina banji niku pumbeka esaka yowe no mali mu mumbu. Esinu sowe sino sokame.”
25.26: Kono omolyaye sebeli omu tambula nji, ‘Wene omubika no kwiiba ni kububa! Kame wamba nji kame olimukile nji kame ni kutula omo kanisi kuna, mi kame ni ungeka omo kanasi kwaa embuto.
25.27: Cwale kame onaku fanena nji obeeke amali ange mu Panga, mi aba ni nauku kambe nonu sete amali ange niku beekelabo en̄ambekelo.
25.28: Cwale mu mu biangule esaka no mali, mi mube kwa woyo okwite amasaka likumi no mali.
25.29: Kwaawo akwite, mba beekelwa, mi mba ikala neyi nokupula, kono kwaawo aulwile mane kame sa byanguliwe neyo akwite.
25.30: Kanyi kwa woyo omubika nambulwa tuso, mu mu kondele ku uwi, oko salila ni kukweca amaeo. Eliywaa no Katulo
25.31: “Cwale omwana no munu aba saiye mu kanya yaye, yoli ni Mangeloi aye onje, kame saikale ba lubona no kanya yaye.
25.32: Mba ku ungana ba lubala lwaye amacaba onje, mi mba kete aanu anjili kwaa njili, kanyi omulisana aba ataba omukoko mu tupuli.
25.33: Mi kame sa beeke omukoko ku lyoko lyaye no silyo, mi abeeke otupuli kweli no simoo.
25.34: Cwale molyoo kame saambe kwaawo ali ku lyoko lyaye no silyo nji, ‘Komwiye! anyi muna fuyolwa kwa Sitange! Mu yole omubuso ona ku lukisetwa anyi okutunda ku matatekelo no litunga.
25.35: Ni wenu kakuli kame nina ku yomba, mi sebeli muniba esi no kulya, mi kame nina kufa elinyotwa, mi sebeli muniba esi no kunwa, kame nina kutenda ongenda, mi sebeli muni tambula,
25.36: kame nina kuulwa esikumango, mi sebeli muniba esi no ukumanga, kame nina kutoma, mi sebeli muni babalela, kame nina kwikala mu tolongo, mi sebeli mwiiya mukunilekula.
25.37: Cwale ano kuluka kame sa mu tambule nji, ‘Molyetu, ka mwaka tuna ku kumona wo yombile, mi sebeli tu kuba esi no kulya, simba wofile elilyotwa ni kukuba esi no kunwa?
25.38: Mi cwale ka mwaka aba tuna kuku mona o endile ongenda, mi sebeli tuku tambula, simba oulwile esikumango, mi sebeli tu kuba esi no kukufuka?
25.39: Mi cwale ka mwaka tu naku ku mona me u tomine, simba ouli mu tolongo, mi sebeli twiiya kwa wene mu kukupotela?
25.40: Mi molyowo mba atambula nji, ‘Niti luli kame ni myambela nji kwawo abange acana muna kutendela ngeeso, yamene muna kutenda ngeeso!’
25.41: Cwale kame saambe kwawo ali ku lyoko no simoo nji, ‘Anyi mu kutilwe kwa Nyambe, mutunde kwa mene, mute mu mulilo no kwaabwa, ou u lukisetwe Diabulosi ni mangeloi aye!
25.42: Kame ni tenda ngeesi kwaanyi kakuli kame ni naku yomba, mi ka mwasiku niba esi no kulya, kame nina kufa elinyotwa mi kamwasikuniba esi no kunwa.
25.43: Kame nina kutenda ongenda, mi ka mwasikuni tambula, kame nina kuulwa esikumango, mi ka mwasi kuni fuka, kame nina kukola, ni kwikala mu tolongo, mi ka mwasi kwiiya mu kuni lekula.
25.44: Cwale nonyene kame samu tambule nji, ‘Molyetu, ka mwaka tuna kuku mona woyombile, simba wofile elinyotwa, simba wotendile ongenda, simba wo ulwile esikumango, simba wotomine, simba mu tolongo, mi sebeli tu kwangwa oku kubabalela?’
25.45: Cwale kame saatambule nji, “Niti luli kame ni myambela nji aba muna kukwangwa oku babalela omunjili kwaa acana ngeeso, yamene muna kukwangwa oku babalela ngeeso.”
25.46: Mi awo kame saate mu koto no kwaabwa, kono awo no kuluka kame saate mu mooyo no kwaabwa.

26.1: Cwale Jesu aba ana kumana okwamba eyi yonje, sebeli wamba kwa iyetwa aye nji,
26.2: “Kanyi omo mulimuukele nji, omukiti no paseka kwasiyala kale amaywaa ayiili nji otendahale, mi cwale Omwana no munu mba beekiwa mu maoko no aanu okumu ngongotela.”
26.3: Cwale apulisita akulu na akulu sebeli akuwana mu ndoo no mupulisita no mukulu woyo elitina lyaye neli Kefasi.
26.4: Mi sebeli ata oka lelisana omo salemene Jesu muku shangama mane ni kumwibaa.
26.5: Kono sebeli amba nji, “Kuleswe oku tendahala mu nako no mukiti, mwendi esicaba mba sitende omufilili.” Jesu Yo Waiwa Amaati ku Betani (Maleka14.3-9; Jowani12.1-8)
26.6: Jesu kame ana kwikalanga ku Betani mu ndoo ya Simoni, ona kutomanga kunyima oweti no mbingwa.
26.7: Cwale omukati sebeli oiya kwa yonyene ni komoki no alabasita no maati no kutula, mi sebeli waitela ku mutwi wa Jesu abo yolemine okulya ku tafule.
26.8: Kono cwale aiyetwa aba ana kumona ngeso, sebeli atina ni kwamba nji, “Iikene akandakandelwa aa maati?
26.9: Amaati awo kame ana lukele oku ulisiwa amali no kupula, nji abiwe kwaa ashebile.”
26.10: Kono Jesu sebeli olemuha eyo ana kwambanga, ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, “Iikene esi muyandiseta omukati woyo? Kame ana tende ekezo no kuwaba kwa mene.
26.11: Ano kusheba mba mwikala noo enako yonje, kono mene ka mu tamba okwikala nange enako yonje.
26.12: Na itele amaati awo ba lutu lwange okulukisa okuteulwa kwange.
26.13: Niti luli kame ni myambela nji, oko konje sa likutaziwe eliywi eli no kuwaba mu litunga lyonje, kame sa kwambiwe nesi ana tende, sitende eso sa pulukiwe naso.” Judasi Yo Pumena Okubeteka Jesu (Maleka14.3-9; Jowani12.1-8)
26.14: Cwale omunjili no aiyetwa no kukwana likumi na yiili woyo oisaniwa nji Judasi isikalyota, sebeli ota kwa pulisita akulu.
26.15: Sebeli wamba nji, “Iikene sa muniteneke aba sani beteke Jesu kwaanyi?” Sebeli amuteneka amali ana kukwana makumi aatu omuwayawaya no silibela.
26.16: Mi okutunda abo, Judasi sebeli osaela omukwa no kubeteka Jesu. Jesu Yolya Omulalelo no Paseka na Iyetwa Aye (Maleka14.12-21; Luka22.7-13; Jowani13.21-30)
26.17: Ba liywaa no matatekelo no mukiti ou no lin̄ende nambulwa omumena, aiyetwa sebeli aiya kwa Jesu ni kwamba nji, “Kubine usinga nji tukalukise nji ukalyeleko omukiti no paseka?”
26.18: Jesu sebeli wamba nji, “Mute mu tolopo ku mulume munjili mi mu mwambele nji, ‘Omwiyeti namba nji enako yange kame ili beebi, mbanilyele omukiti no paseka na aiyetwa ange ku ndoo yowe.’ ”
26.19: Cwale aiyetwa aye sebeli atenda omo na kwaambelela Jesu oku lukisa omulalelo no mukiti no paseka.
26.20: Jesu kame ana kwikalanga ba tafule na iyetwa aye noku kwana likumi na yiili,
26.21: mi alemine okulya ngeeso, sebeli wamba nji, “Niti luli kame ni myambela nji, omunjili mwaanyi yosoni beteka.”
26.22: Mi sebeli aena onene luli mi sebeli atangisa oku mwibanguta, omunjili ni munjili nji, “Mwendi mene, Mbumu?”
26.23: Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Woyo ona ingenyeke elyoko bamweya ni mene mu siwana yosoni beteka.
26.24: Omwana no munu mbafu kanyi omo kun̄olelwe mu man̄olo, kono oumai ni woyo so beteka Omwana no munu! Esiwa ku munu woyo ni nji kambe ka siku leiwa!”
26.25: Judasi, woyo ona kumu beteka, sebeli otambula nji, “Mwendi mene, Mwiyeti?” Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Nwaamba.” Omulalelo wa Mbumu (Maleka14.22-26; Luka22.14-20; 1 Makolinte11.23-25)
26.26: Cwale abo alemine okulya ngeeso, Jesu sebeli oshimba esinkwa, mi munyima no okutumela, sebeli osi patola, nikuba aiyetwa aye, sebeli wamba nji, “Mu shimbe mi mulye, “Olu ni lutu lwange.”
26.27: Cwale sebeli oshimba ekomoki nuuku tumela, ni kwaaba ni kwamba nji, “Mu nwemo moonje,”
26.28: “Kakuli ou ni unyinga wange no ulikani ona itekele ano kupula, mulibaka no kulemeniwa eibi.
26.29: Mi kame namba kwaanyi nji, ku tunda bano, kani tamba kunwa kwesi si bekilwe ku sitondo no beine, mane kubitela kame ba liywaa elyo sani nwe naanyi, konji esi tendile esi no ubya mu mubuso wa Sitange.”
26.30: Cwale sebeli aimba olusimo, nukutela ba lilundu no Olibe. Jesu yo Nuha nji Pitolosi mba Mukana (Maleka14.27-31; Luka22.31-34; Jowani13.36-38)
26.31: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Anyi moonje mba munishotoka mulibaka lyange uno usiku, kakuli na ku n̄oliwa nji, ‘Kame sani fule omulisana, mi omulaka no mikoko kame so hasane.’
26.32: Kono aba sani inguke kwaafu, mba niku tangete kulubala lwenu okuta ku Galileya.”
26.33: Pitolosi sebeli omu tambula nji, “Simba nji onje kame saku shotoke mulibaka lyowe, “Mene, kani tamba oku kushotoka.”
26.34: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Niti luli kame ni kwambela nji, ouno ousiku omukombwe owasilila kale, kame soni latule twaatu.”
26.35: Pitolosi sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Naaba sani fanene okufa ni wene, ka nitamba okuku latula!” Mi na iyetwa aye anjili onje sebeli amba ngeeso. Jesu yo Lapela mu Litema no Gesemani (Maleka14.32-42; Luka22.39-46)
26.36: Cwale Jesu sebeli ota noo ku sibaka siisaniwa Gesemani, mi sebeli wambela aiyetwa aye nji, “Mwikale bano, mene abani sita kuya oka lapela.”
26.37: Mi sebeli oshimba Pitolosi naana ayiili a Zebedeya Jowani ni Jokobo, mi sebeli otangisa okweena onene nu uku kalelwa.
26.38: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Emebo yange sebeli ili beebi ni kufa mulibaka no likenyi. Mu siyale bano, mi mutone ni mene.”
26.39: Mi sebeli ota ba lubala mbicana, sebeli okwela banji ni kulapela nji, “Sitange, nji kame ku twesahala, kambe esinweno no mayando ni lufu ibitele aba no kuleba ni mene! Kono kulese kutendahala omo ni singela, ku tendiwe omo usingela wene.”
26.40: Cwale Jesu sebeli oiya kwa iyetwa aye mi sebeli waa wana alanganine batulo, sebeli wamba kwa Pitolosi nji, “Kandi kamu twesa oku tona ni mene muhola imweya?
26.41: Mutone, mi mu lapele nji mulese kwingena mu muliko. Emebo yonyene kame isinga, kono olutu kame lufokola.”
26.42: Kame sebeli ota aka no wili oka lapela nji, “Sitange, nji esinweno esi no mayando ni lufu kasi twesahala okutunda konji aba sani nwemo, ku tendahale esisi singwa kwa wene.”
26.43: Mi kame sebeli oiya kwa onyene ni kwaa wana alanganine, kakuli amiyo oo kame ana kuyupahala okulema.
26.44: Cwale sebeli waasiya kame oka lapela aka no waatu, ni kwamba amaywi kanyi aa ana kwamba ba weli.
26.45: Cwale sebeli ouka kwa iyetwa aye kame, mi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mu silanganine nuku katulusa? Komumone! enako ya keela kale eyo Omwana no munu kame abekiwa mu makaa no asikutenda ouyi.
26.46: Ko mwimane tute. Komumone, woyo osi kuni beteka wakeela kale!” Okunungiwa kwa Jesu (Maleka14.43-50; Luka22.47-53; Jowani18.3-12)
26.47: Ababo yosi lemine okwamba ngeeso, Judasi omumweya kwawo noku kwana elikumi na yiili sebeli okeela naanu no kupula ashimbile etisabule ni milamu. Kame ana kutumiwa kwaa pulisita no akulu ni manduna no sicaba.
26.48: Cwale omubeteki na kwaaba esisupo, okwamba nji, “Woyo sani tubete yokame, mu mununge!”
26.49: Muwangu sebeli osheeteta kwa Jesu ni kwamba nji, “Olumele Mwiyeti,” mi sebeli omu tubeta.
26.50: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Mulikani, otenda eso ona iyele mukutenda!” Cwale sebeli aiya mukumulema ni kumununga.
26.51: Ababo kwaawo ali kwa Jesu, omunjili sebeli oshomona omukwale waye ni kupatula elitwi no mubika no mupulisita no mukulu.
26.52: Cwale Jesu sebeli omwambela nji, “Ouse emukwale wowe mu sipusu sawo, kakuli awo onje akutusisa emikwale mbaafi ku mikwale.
26.53: Kame oyambuta nji kani twese okwisana kwa sitange, mi mu nako imweya feela kame twesa okulita etimpi no mangeloi likumi ni ayiili?
26.54: Kono ba kutenda ngeeso, Aman̄olo ngasibine sa iyatetetwe aa amba nji, Naku fanene oku tendahala ngeeso?”
26.55: Ba nako eyo Jesu sebeli wamba kwaanu nji, “Na mwiiyi ni mikwale ni milamu muku nilema, kanyi mbili sikebenga? Amaywaa onje nani kwikalanga mu ndoo no milapelo okwiyeta, mi ka mwa siku nilema.
26.56: Kono eyi yonje na itendahala nji eyi ina n̄oliwa kwa nuhi a Nyambe iiyatetetwe.” Cwale aiyetwa onje sebeli amusiya ni kumu shotoka. Jesu Yoli mu Kuta Inene no Majuda (Maleka14.53-65; Luka22.54-55; 22.63-71; Jowani18.13-14; 18.19-24)
26.57: Awo ana kulema Jesu sebeli amutwala ku ndoo ya Kayafa, omukulu no apulisita, oko ana kuku wanena aiyeti no mulawo naa kulu.
26.58: Kono Pitolosi kame ana ku mukon̄anga munyima aba no kuleba, sebeli oka keela ku lilapa no mupulisita omukulu. Sebeli oingenamo mi sebeli oikala na tateleli nji amone etaba omo saibwele.
26.59: Cwale apulisita akulu nasi kuta onje sebeli asaela oupaki no mapwa nji amwibae,
26.60: kono kasi kuuwana, simba naba ana kwiiya apaki no mapwa no kupula. Ku mamaneneno sebeli kwiiya ayiili
26.61: ni kwamba nji, “Uyu mulume nakwamba nji, kame ni twesa oku kwisa endoo ya Nyambe, ni kwiyaka kame mu maywaa aatu.’ ”
26.62: Omupulisita omukulu sebeli oimana ni kwambela Jesu nji, “Kukwite ekalabo otwesa oku tambula? Kweyo alemine ooku kandimeka?”
26.63: Kono Jesu kame ana koondoka. Cwale omupulisita omukulu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Kame weeta ni Nyambe no kuyoya, otwambele nji ya wene Kilesite Mwanaye Nyambe.”
26.64: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Nwamba. Kono kame ni myambela nji, oku tunda abano kame sa mu mone Omwana no munu yoikale ku lyoko no silyo lya Nyambe no Maata, mi yokeile mu makumbi no liwilu!”
26.65: Cwale omukulu no mupulisita sebeli otina onene ni kukaula eikumango yaye ni kwamba nji, “Na nyefula! Iikene aba tusi saelela oupaki? Na mu yupu akashwau kaye!
26.66: Anyi ekatulo yenu niibine?” Sebeli atambula nji, “Kame afanena okufa.”
26.67: Cwale sebeli amusibwela amate ba lubala niku mufula efaindi, niku mufula olubaka
26.68: amba nji, Kilesite! otu nuhe, Anyine woyo ona kufulu?” Pitolosi Yokana Jesu (Maleka14.66-72; Luka22.56-62; Jowani18.15-18,25-27)
26.69: Ba nako imweya Pitolosi kame ana ikalanga ku ndee no lilapa no kuta. Omubika no mukatana sebeli oiya kwa yonyene ni kwamba nji, “Ni wene nau kwikalanga ni Jesu Omugalileya.”
26.70: Kono yonyene sebeli okana ba lubala no aanu onje ni kwamba nji, “Silimukile eso otalusa.”
26.71: Cwale abana iya ku mwelo, omubika munjili no muskatana sebeli omumona ni kwamba kwaawo ana kwikalangamo nji, “Ni woyo kame ana kwikalanga ni Jesu no Nazaleta.”
26.72: Mi kame sebeli okana ni kweeta nji, “Mene kani mulimukile woyo mulume!”
26.73: Munyima no nako icana, awo ana kwimana omo sebeli aiya ni kwambela Pitolosi nji, “Niti luli ni wene kame oli mumweya kwawo ana kwikalanga ni Jesu, kakuli omwambelo wowe kame uku limukisa kanyi omugalileya!”
26.74: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli kweeta nji, “Nikukaule bakaci, kani mu limukile omunu woyo!” Mi ababo omukombwe sebeli okuwa.
26.75: Cwale ababo Pitolosi sebeli opuluka eyo anaku mwambela Jesu nji, “Omukombwe owasikuwa kale mbunikana twaatu.” Ababo sebeli ota bandee nuuka lila onene.

27.1: Kusili amasikusiku akulu no apulisita onje na kulu no mulawo sebeli atenda omulelo woo omo saibaele Jesu.
27.2: Mi sebeli amu nunga ku maoko ni ku mutwala, nuuka mubeeka mu maata a Pilato omubusisi no Maloma. Olufu lwa Judasi (Tikezo27.18-19)
27.3: Cwale Judasi omubeteki, aba ana kumona nji Jesu na atulelwe olufu, sebeli okunyaza ni kuusa amali no silibela ana kukwana makumi aatu ano muwaya-waya kwa kulu no apulisita ni kwa kulu.
27.4: Sebeli wamba nji, “Kame nina tende ouyi aba nina beteke ounyinga nambulwa omubonda.” Kono sebeli amba nji, “Iikene eyo kwaaci? Eyo ni taba yowe!”
27.5: Cwale Judasi sebeli oyumbela amali awo no muwaya-waya mu ndoo ya Nyambe, mi sebeli okutela nuuka kunungelela yonyene.
27.6: Kono akulu no apulisita sebeli ashimba amali awo no muwaya-waya ni kwamba nji, “Ka ku fanene okwa beeka mu sitewelo no ndoo ya Nyambe, kakuli ni mali no unyinga.”
27.7: Munyima no kwambola onje, amali awo sebeli akutusisa okuula elitema lya muumbi no tucoo, esibaka no matutaeti no angenda.
27.8: Mulibaka eli, elitema elyo kame liisaniwa nji, “Elitema no unyinga” okulita ni balelo lino.
27.9: Cwale kame kuna kwiyatetetwa eyo ina kwambiwa kwa munuhi wa Nyambe Jelemiya, aba amba nji, “Mi kame ana shimbi amali no silibela ana kukwana makumi aatu, omuulo wamunu mumweya ona kusumiwa kwaana no Isilaele,
27.10: mi sebeli akutusisa amali awo okuula elitema no muumbi no tucoo, kanyi omo ana kuni laelela Mbumu.” Pilato Omubusisi no Maloma yo Ibanguta Jesu (Maleka15.2-5; Luka23.3-5; Jowani18.33-38)
27.11: Cwale Jesu sebeli oimana balubala no mubusisi, mi omubusisi sebeli omwibanguta nji, “Kana ya wene Ombumu no Majuda?” Jesu sebeli omutambula nji, “Nwamba.”
27.12: Kono naba ana ku nungelelwa eyambo kwa kulu no apulisita naakulu, kasi ku tambula.
27.13: Cwale Pilato sebeli wambela Jesu nji, “Kuyupile eyo yonje aku nungelela?”
27.14: Kono kasi kutambula simba simweya kweyo anaku munungelela yonje, mi omubusisi sebeli okomoka onene. Jesu Yo Atulelwa Elifu (Maleka15.6-15; Luka23.13-25; Jowani18.39; 19.16)
27.15: Cwale enako yonje ba mukiti no Paseka, omubusisi kame anaku lukulwelanga esicaba omunjili no mapantiti, woyo asinga aanu.
27.16: Mi cwale mu nako eyo, kame kuna kwikalanga elipantiti no sikebenga ona ku limukiwa onene, no litina lya Jesu Balabasi.
27.17: Cwale aanu aba ana kumana oukuwana, Pilato sebeli waaibanguta nji, “Anyine mu singa nji nimi lukulwele, Jesu Balabasi nji Jesu woyo oisaniwa nji Kilesite?”
27.18: Nakwaibanguta ngeeso kakuli naku lemuha nji ni mulibaka no muna aba ana muliti kwa yonyene.
27.19: Cwale ababo Pilato yoli ba situlo no katulo, mukataye sebeli omutumena amaywi nji, “O lese kutenda esinjili kwa woyo omulume nambulwa omubomda, kakuli balelo kame ni a yanda onene okulota mu libaka lyaye.”
27.20: Kono akulu no apulisita naakulu nwaanu sebeli asusuweza aanu nji akumbele okulukulula Balabasi, mi Jesu yonyene aibaiwe.
27.21: Omubusisi kame sebeli waaibanguta nji, “Kwaa ayili, ubine woyo mu singa nji ni i lukulwele?” Onyene sebeli atambula nji, “Balabasi!”
27.22: Pilato sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Cwale ngasibine sani tende kwa Jesu woyo oisaniwa Kilesite?” Oonje sebeli amba nji, “A ngongoteliwe!”
27.23: Cwale Pilato sebeli waibanguta nji, “Iikene? ubine ouyi ana tende?” Kono onje sebeli akuwa onene nji, “Angongoteliwe!”
27.24: Cwale Pilato aba ana kumona nji katwese okutenda esinjili, kono kame kutwesa okwiiya omufilifili, sebeli oku yowa ku maoko ni meyi balubala no aanu no kupula, ni kwamba nji, “Mene sikwite omubonda mu unyinga wa woyo omulume! Muku monene eyo ni taba yenu!”
27.25: Cwale esicaba sonje sebeli si tambula nji, “Ounyinga waye wikale beulu wetu na neetu!”
27.26: Cwale Pilato sebeli olukulula Balabasi kwa onyene. Munyima no kushapa Jesu, sebeli omuba mu maoko no masole nji amungongotele. Amasole abana Yandisa Jesu (Maleka15.16-20; Jowani19.2-3)
27.27: Cwale amasole no mubusisi sebeli atwala Jesu mu lilapa no mubusisi, mi esitopa no masole sonje sebeli simutinguluka.
27.28: Mi sebeli amutubula eikumango yaye ni kumu fuka olwambi no mucaa.
27.29: cwale sebeli amutingela en̄ata no myunguya nikumu fuka yo ku mutwi waye. Sebeli amulemisa olutaka ku lyooko no silyo ni kukubama okumusheka okwamba nji, “Yoshoo uyoye, wene Ombumu no Majuda!”
27.30: Cwale sebeli amusibwela amate ni kushimba olutaka ni kumufula mu mutwi.
27.31: Mi cwale aba ana kumana oku muyandisa, sebeli amutubula olwambi no mucaa ni kumufuka eikumango yaye. Cwale sebeli amutwala oka mungongotela. Jesu aba na Ngongotelwa (Maleka15.21-32; Luka23.26-43; Jowani19.17-27)
27.32: Amasole aba na taanga ngeso ni Jesu sebeli akuwana ni mulume oisaniwa Simoni, omunu no mulenen̄i no Silene, mi sebeli amukandimeka nji ashimbe esifapano sa Jesu.
27.33: Sebeli akeela ba sibaka siisaniwa Gologota, “Okutalusa nji esibaka no katendele.”
27.34: Sebeli atambeka Jesu ebeine ina ku wanekiwa ni nyoko nji anwe, kono aba na ku lupamo sebeli okana okwiinwa.
27.35: Mi cwale aba ana kumana okumu ngongotela sebeli akutabela eikumango yaye muku shebuluka.
27.36: Cwale sebeli aikala banji niku mu tatelela.
27.37: Cwale beulu no mutwi waye kame ana ku beekabo elin̄olo no mubonda waye eli lyamba nji, “Uyu ni Jesu Ombumu no Majuda.”
27.38: Cwale sebeli angongotela ni isinyi yiili ni yonye, esinjili ku lyoko lyaye no silyo ni sinjili kweli no simoo.
27.39: Mi awo ana ku bitanga na ku munyefula ni kunyunga emitwi yoo,
27.40: ni kwamba nji, “Wene woyo utwesa oku shandola endoo ya Nyambe ni kwiyaka kame mu maywaa aatu! Okuyoyise wenyene nji yawene Omwana Nyambe Otuluke ba sifapano wiiye banji!”
27.41: Mi noonyene apulisita akulu sebeli amuyandisa, ba mweya na iyeti no mulawo nakulu, aamba nji,
27.42: “Kame ana kuyoyisanga akwaye, kono katwese oukuyoyisa yonyene! Kame amba nji ni Mbumu no Isilaele. Nji kame sa kutulule ba sifapano mba tu pumene kwa yonyene!
27.43: Kame ana ku sepanga Nyambe, mulesele Nyambe amu lamulele cwale nji Nyambe kame asinga ngeeso, kakuli kame anamba nji, “Time Mwanaye Nyambe.”
27.44: Mi ni isinyi yiili ina ku ngongoteliwa ni yonyene ba sifapano sebeli imunyefula ngeeso. Olufu lwa Jesu (Maleka15.33-41; Luka23.44-49; Jowani19.28-30)
27.45: Oku tangisa mu nako no munji, ouwi sebeli ufuka elitunga lyonje mu tihola taatu.
27.46: Mi aba ina kukwana enako no 3 okoloko Jesu sebeli olila ni liywi no kuneneba ni kwamba nji, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabakatani?” Ninji, “Nyambe wange, Nyambe wange iikene ona ni leselele?”
27.47: Cwale anjili ana kwimana omo aba ana kuyupa eyo, sebeli amba nji, “Uyu mulume kame aisana Eliya!”
27.48: Ababo omunjili kwa onyene sebeli oituka oka shimba esiponji esi siiyalile ebenega, sebeli osi beeka ku lutaka ni kumu nwisa.
27.49: Kono anjili sebeli amba nji, “Tumusiye, tumone nji Eliya mba iyi muku muyoyisa!”
27.50: Cwale Jesu sebeli olila kame ni liywii no kuneneba, mi sebeli obwelwa Emebo.
27.51: Ba nako eyeyo olwambi namu Ndoo ya Nyambe sebeli lu kauka bakaci, oku tangisa ku wilu konji banji. Mi sebeli kwiiya ezikinyeho, amawee sebeli akaoka.
27.52: Cwale amabita sebeli ayatuluka mi eitupu no aanu no kupula a Nyambe ana kufa sebeli inguka.
27.53: Nakutunda mu mabita munyima ya Jesu okwinguka kwaafu, mi sebeli aingena mu mulenen̄i no kukena ni kumonahala kwaanu onje ano kupula.
27.54: Cwale omukulu no masole, nawo ana ku tatelela Jesu noo, aba ana kumona ezikinyeho neeyi ina kutendahala sebeli acila onene ni kwamba nji, “Niti luli, woyo mulume neli Mwanaa Nyambe!”
27.55: Akati no kupula mwa na kwikala omo, aalikete, aali aba no kuleba, okame ana kukon̄a Jesu aba ana kutunda ku Galileya, amu belekela.
27.56: Kwa onyene kame kuna kwikala omukati wisaniwa nji Maliya Magadalena, ni Malia inawaye Jakobo ni Josefa, ni mukataye Zebadeya. Okuteulwa kwa Jesu (Maleka15.42-47; Luka23.50-56; Jowani19.38-42)
27.57: Cwale mu nako no mangolwaa, sebeli kwiiya omulume ona kufuma, na ku Alimateya, ona kwiisanwa nji Josefa, mini yonyene neli omwiyetwa wa Jesu.
27.58: Sebeli ota kwa Pilato, nukakumbela olutu lwa Jesu, cwale Pilato sebeli olaela nji abiwe.
27.59: Cwale Josefa sebeli oshimba olutu, ni ku lupungela mu lwambi no kukena ni kuwaba,
27.60: Mi sebeli okabeeka esitupu mu libita lyaye eli no ubya, eli ana ku cakula mu liwee. Sebeli obeeka eliwee no kuneneba ba mwelo no libita mi sebeli okutela.
27.61: Maliya Magadalena ni mukwaye Maliya kame na ikalanga aalikete ku mwelo no libita. Asiku Tatelela ba Libita
27.62: Eliywaa lina kutatama elino Sabata, apulisita akulu na Falisi sebeli aka kuwanena kwa Pilato
27.63: sebeli amba nji, “Mbumu, tu si puluka nji omoongi woyo yo si yoya, kame ana kwamba nji, ‘Munyima no maywaa aatu, mba ni inguka kame.’
27.64: Cwalehe olaele nji elibita li tatelelwe onene, ku twala ba liywaa no waatu, mwendi aiyetwa aye mba fanene okwiiya mu kwiita olutu lwaye, aambele esicaba nji, ‘Na inguka kwaafu.’ Abo okoonga no mamaneneno kame sa kutende oku no kwiiba okubita ba weli.”
27.65: Pilato sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mushimbe atateleli no masole, mute mu ka tatelele omo mu tweseta monje.”
27.66: Sebeli ata na tateleli nu kabeeka esisupo ba liwee no ba libita nji cwale kakwisa omunu sotwesa okuli sheeta.

28.1: Munyima no liywaa no Sabata, elino matatekelo mu sunda amasikusiku aba lina kupa, Maliya Magadalena ni Maliya munjili, sebeli ata muku mona ku libita.
28.2: Ababo sebeli kwikala ezikinyeho inene luli, kakuli elingeloi no Mbumu na likutunda kuwilu ni kwiiya muku pikulusa eliwee ba libita, ni kwikala ba liwee.
28.3: Kame lina kumonahala kanyi olumonyi no mbula, ni ikumango yalyo no likena kanyi elitwaa.
28.4: Atateleli sebeli acila ni kukun̄a, mi sebeli amonahala kanyi omunu no kufa mulibaka no kumona elingeloi.
28.5: Elingeloi sebeli lyamba kwakati nji, “Mulese kucila,” “Kame ni limukile nji kame musaela Jesu onaku ngongotelwa ba sifapano.
28.6: Ka sako kuno, kakuli Nyambe na mwingula kwaafu, kanyi omu ana kwambela Jesu. Ko mwiye mumone mu sibaka ana ku langana.
28.7: Cwale mute mu lelube, mi mu kambele aiyetwa aye nji, ‘Nyambe namwingula kwaafu, mi kame akatile balubala lwenu okuta ku Galileya, okoko kwa samu ka mumone. Aa amaywi nineyele muku myambela.”
28.8: Cwale sebeli atunda muwangu ku libita acilile ni kuwabelwa onene, sebeli aituka nu kambela aiyetwa aye.
28.9: Cwale aba ana taanga mukwambela aiyetwa aye, Jesu sebeli okuwana noo ni kwa keeta mi sebeli aiya kwa yonyene, ni kumulema ku makondo ni kumulapela.
28.10: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mulese ku cila,” “Mute mukambele abaange nji ate ku Galileya kwasa kani mone.” Elin̄usa no Atateleli
28.11: Ababo akati akatile, atateleli anjiili sebeli ata mu mulenen̄i okabihela apulisita akulu eyi ina tendahala yonje.
28.12: Cwale apulisita akulu nakulu sebeli akuwana ni kulelisana. Sebeli aba amasole amali no kupula,
28.13: ni kwaambela nji, “Mwambe nji, aiyetwa aye kame aneyi ousiku, mi naiiti olutu lwaye, aci metu langanine.
28.14: Nji omubusisi aba sa yupe etaba eyo, mba tu mu kolwisa, ni kumi tundisa mu utata.”
28.15: Cwale sebeli ashimba amali ni kutenda kanyi omo anaku laelelwa. Mi etaba eyi nai kuhasana mukaci no Majuda mi isambiwa ni balelo lino. Jesu yo Kumonahaza kwa Iyetwa aye (Maleka16.14-18; Luka24.36-49; Jowani20.19-23; Tikezo1.6-8)
28.16: Cwale aiyetwa ana kukwana likumi ni mu mweya (11) sebeli ata ku Galileya, ku lilundu elyo ana kwasimweta Jesu.
28.17: Cwale aba ana kumu mona, sebeli amu kubamena, kono anjili alimbululile.
28.18: Cwale Jesu sebeli oiya kwa onyene ni kwaambela nji, “Etukelo yonje namu wilu ni mu litunga kame ina biwe kwa mene.
28.19: Mute cwale mu katende aiyeti no macaba onje, mwa kolobeze mu litina lya Sitange, ni lya Mwana, neli no Mebo No Kukena.
28.20: Mi mwaiyete oku mamela einu yonje nina milaelele. Mi mupuluke nji, kame nili nenu mu nako yonje, okutwala ku mamaneneno no litunga.”

1.1: Aa amaywi no Kuwaba a Jesu Kilesite Omwana Nyambe.
1.2: Kanyi omo ku n̄olelwe mu buka no omunuhi wa Nyambe Isaya nji, “Omone, ‘Kame ni tuma onumwana wange balubala no lubala lowe woyo so lukisa endila yowe,’
1.3: Eliywi lya woyo okuweleza mu lihalaupa, Mu lukise endila no Mbumu, mutende etindila no kooloka nji yonyene abitemo.”
1.4: Cwale Jowani omukolobezi sebeli omonahala mu lihalaupa, yo lemine okukutaza ekutazo no kubaka nji, “Mufutuke mi mu kolobeziwe cwale Nyambe mbami lemene ouyi wenu.”
1.5: Aanu no kupula ali mu tolopo no Judeya onje, naa ayakile mu mulenen̄i no Jelusalema onje, sebeli abanena kwa yonyene mukuteeteta, mi asimana okwamba etifoso too, sebeli akolobeziwa mu musindi wa Jodani kwa Jowani.
1.6: Jowani kame ano kufuka esikumango no woya no kamele, ni lukanda no situmba mu mbunda, mi kame ana kuyoya etimbimba ni uki mu mushitu.
1.7: Mi kame ana kwiiyeta aanu nji, “Mu nyima yange, kame kwiiya omunjili uyu unibita ku maata, mi kanilukela okwinama ni kunungutula etikwele no tinjatangwa taye.
1.8: Mene, kame ni mikolobeza ni meyi, kono yonyene kame sami kolobeze ni Mebo No Kukena.” Jesu Aba Ana Kukolobeziwa ni Kwetekiwa (Mateu3.3-4; 11; Luka3.21; 22; 4.1-13)
1.9: Ba nako eyo, Jesu sebeli otunda mu Nazaleta omundi na mu tolopo no Galileya, mi sebeli okolobeziwa kwa Jowani mu musindi no Jodani.
1.10: Ababo Jesu aba ana kukatunda mu meyi, sebeli omona eliwilu liyatuluka, mi Emebo No Kukena ifeka kanyi elikwici sebeli ishulumukela kwa yonyene.
1.11: Mi sebeli ku yupahala eliywi litundelela ku wilu, elyamba nji, “Wene yo mwana nge osingwa, uyu ni katelelwa onene.”
1.12: Ababo, Emebo No Kukena sebeli imutwala mu lihalaupa.
1.13: Jesu sebeli okaikala mu lihalaupa amaywaa makumi anee, yo etekiwa kwa Satani. Mi kame ana kwikalanga ni ibatana, mi amangeloi na ku mu babalela. Jesu yo Iyeta Eliywi no Kuwaba mu Galileya (Mateu4.12-17; Luka4.14,15; 5.1-11)
1.14: Cwale munyima no kunungiwa kwa Jowani ni kubeekiwa mu tolongo, Jesu sebeli oiya mu Galileya yo kutaza eliywi no kuwaba lya Nyambe.
1.15: Mi sebeli wamba nji, “Enako na ikwana, mi omubuso wa Nyambe kame uli beebi. Mubake, mi mu pumene ku liywi no kuwaba.” Jesu Yo Isana Ayambi Anee (Mateu 4.18-22, Luka 5.1-11)
1.16: Cwale Jesu aba na endanga ku munanga no lisa no Galileya, sebeli omona Simoni ni minaye Adiliyasi, ayamba otunyandi too mu liwate kakuli neli anduyi.
1.17: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Munikon̄e, mi kame sa ni mitende asiku yamba aanu.”
1.18: Mi ababo sebeli asiya otunyandi too ni kumukon̄a.
1.19: Aba ana kusheteta kuusombicani, sebeli omona Jakobo mwanaa Zebedeya ni Jowani minaye, nonyene kame ana kwikala mu wato, alemine okoongolola otunyandi too.
1.20: Mi ababo sebeli waaisana mu wangu, mi sebeli asiya sitoo Zebedeya mu wato nawo ana kuteneka okwatusa ni kumukon̄a. Omulume no Mebo no Kwiiba (Luka4.31-37)
1.21: Mi sebeli ata mu Kapenauma, mi ababo ba liywaa no Pumulo, Jesu sebeli oingena mu Ndoo no milapelo no Majuda ni kwiiyeta.
1.22: Aanu sebeli akomoka onene mulibaka no tuto yaye, kakuli kame ana kwiyeta kanyi omunu oli ni maata, kasa kanyi aiyeti no mulawo.
1.23: Ababo, aali mu Ndoo no milapelo omulume no mebo no kwakena, sebeli wiiya nikukuwa nji,
1.24: “Iikene usaela kwaaci wene Jesu no Nazaleta? Ninji kame oneeyi mu kutumana? Ni ku limukile nji tiwe anyine, tiwe Woyo no Kukena omutumiwa wa Nyambe.”
1.25: Kono Jesu sebeli oikalimela nji, “Ondoka! Otunde mwa yonyene.”
1.26: Cwale emebo no kwakena sebeli imukwiseta banji mu koongola, mi sebeli itunda mwa yonyene yokuwa ni liywi no ku neneba.
1.27: Mi aanu onje sebeli akomoka, sebeli akwambisa mukaci koo nji, “Esi ni siikene? Eyi ni tuto no ubya? Kame akwite amaata no kulaela emebo no kwiiba, mi kame imu kuteka!”
1.28: Ababo elibubo lyaye sebeli lita kule, mu tolopo yonje no Galileya. Jesu yo Balisa Aanu no Kupula (Mateu8.14-17; Luka4.38-41)
1.29: Cwale ababo Jesu aba natunda mu Ndoo no milapelo no Majuda, sebeli oingena mu ndoo ya Simoni ni Adiliyasi, yoli ni Jakobo ni Jowani.
1.30: Cwale onjemunwaa Simoni no mukati kame ana langananga, yotomine oweti no fibele eyi ingangamisa, ababo sebeli asimweta Jesu muwangu.
1.31: Cwale sebeli osheteteta kwa yonyene, niku mulema ku lyoko mi sebeli omwingula, sebeli obala kuweeti no fibele, mi sebeli waa sebeleza.
1.32: Amangolwaa, eliywaa aba lina kwiika, sebeli ku litwa kwa yonyene asi kutoma, naa aingenwe Emebo no kwiiba.
1.33: Aanu mu mulenen̄i wonje sebeli aungana ba mwelo waye.
1.34: Mi cwale sebeli obalisa aanu no kupula awo ana kutomanga ameeti no mifuta-futa, ni kucita Emebo no kwiiba no kupula, mi kasipumenena Emebo no kwiiba nji yaambe kakuli kame imulimukile. Jesu yo Iyeta mu Galileya (Luka4.42-44)
1.35: Amalungasiku, eliywaa elyakalisipa kale, Jesu sebeli oinguka, ni kuta ku sibaka no mbulwa aanu okuno kuleba yomboci oka lapela.
1.36: Cwale Simoni naa ana kwikala naye mu ndoo sebeli ata mu ku musaela.
1.37: Asimana oku muwana, sebeli amwambela nji, “Aanu onje kame aku saela.”
1.38: Cwale sebeli waatambula nji, “Twendeni kwibaka indina lili beebi ni mindi, ni ka kutazeko kame, kakuli omusebezi nina iyele.”
1.39: Mi sebeli ota ngeeso ni mu Galileya monje, yo kutaza mu tindoo no milapelo no Majuda, ni kucita Emebo no kwiiba. Jesu Yobalisa Omulume osi Mbingwa. (Mateu8.1-4; Luka5.12-16)
1.40: Cwale omulume osi mbingwa sebeli wiiya kwa Jesu ni ku mukubamena ni manwi okukumbela ni kumwambela nji, “Nji aba usinga, kame utwesa okunibalisa.”
1.41: Jesu sebeli omufela amakeke, ni kolola elyoko lyaye okumulema, ni ku mwambela nji, “Ni singa, mi okene.”
1.42: Cwale ababo embingwa sebeli ibwa kwa yonyene, ni kukenisiwa.
1.43: Cwale Jesu sebeli omulemusa mukongota, ni kumuusa muwangu,
1.44: ni ku mwambela nji, “Omone nji olese okwambela omunu esinjili, kono weende oka ku monahaze kwa mupulisita, obe esitabelo sowe mukukenisiwa kowe esi silaelwe kwa Mushe, kutendiwe oupaki kwaanu.”
1.45: Kono omulume woyo aba kuta sebeli otangisa okutalusa etaba eyo yolukuluhile, ni kwihasanya konje, mumukwanongeso Jesu sebeli okwangwa okwingena mu tolopo injili aanu amumwine, kono kame ana kwikalanga ku mukunda, mi aanu no kupula kame ana kutundanga mu mabaka onje, ni kwiiya kwa yonyene.

2.1: Munyima no maywaa acana Jesu abana ukela ku Kapenauma, aanu sebeli ayupa nji kame ali mu ndoo.
2.2: Cwale aanu no kupula sebeli aunganamo, mane sebeli akwangwa oku kwanamo konji ni ba mwelo, mi yonyene yokutaza eliywii kwa onyene,
2.3: cwale alume anee sebeli aiya kwa Jesu ashimbile omulume no ku kutela olun̄an̄ali.
2.4: Kono sebeli akwangwa okusheteta kwa Jesu mulibaka no aanu okupula, mi sebeli ashuula esituwa no ndoo abo ana kwikalela Jesu niku shulumukisetamo omuseme abo ana kulangana omulume osi kukukutela olun̄an̄ali.
2.5: Cwale Jesu aba ana kumona etumelo yoo, sebeli wamba kwa woyo osi kukutela olun̄an̄ali nji, “Mwana nge, eibi yowe na wilemenwe.”
2.6: Aiyeti anjili no mulawo ana kwikala omo, sebeli anahana mu micima yoo nji,
2.7: “Uyu mulume, ngaibi aba aamba ngeesi? Kame anyefula! Woyo otwesa okulemena eibi anyine konji Nyambe yomboci!”
2.8: Jesu sebeli olimuka mu wangu ni mebo yaye nji kame akengeela ngeeso, mi sebeli waambela nji, “Iikene mukengeela mu micima yenu?
2.9: Esi no kotoba ni sibine, okwambela osi kutoma olun̄an̄ali nji, ‘Eibi yowe nwilemenwe,’ ni ku mwambela nji, ‘Imana, oshimbe oulangano wowe, mi wende?’
2.10: Cwalehe nji mu limuke nji, Omwana no Munu kame ali ni maata bano banji no ku lemena eibi, sebeli wambela osi kukukutela olun̄an̄ali nji,
2.11: “Kame nikwaambela nji oimane, oshimbe oulangano wowe, mi okutele ku mundi wowe.”
2.12: Cwale woyo sebeli oimana, mi ababo niku shimba oulangano waye nuukutela yo monwa kwaanu onje, mi sebeli akomoka onje ni ku lumba Nyambe nji, “Asimbakwatanga, katu mono etaba no ngeesi!” Jesu Yoisana Lebi (Mateu9.9-13; Luka5.27-32)
2.13: Cwale Jesu sebeli ota kame ku munanga no lisa no Galileya, mi aanu no kupula onje sebeli sisheteta okuungana kwa yonyene, mi sebeli waaiyeta.
2.14: Mi yoenda mu ndila, sebeli omona Lebi omwana Alufeya, yo ikalile ba ofisi no mutelo, mi sebeli omwambela nji, “Onikon̄e.” Lebi sebeli oimana, niku mukon̄a.
2.15: Mi Jesu yo ikalile ba tafule mu ndoo ya Lebi, asikutelisa no kupula na sikutenda eibi sebeli aikala naye ba tafule na iyetwa aye, kakuli aanu no kupula kame ana ku mukon̄a.
2.16: Cwale aiyeti no mulawo no afalisi aba ana kumona Jesu yo lya na sikutelisa na sikutenda eibi, sebeli aibanguta aiyetwa aye nji, “Iikene Omolyenu aba alya ni kunwa naanu no ngeeso?”
2.17: Mi cwale Jesu aba na yupa eyo, sebeli waatambula nji, “Awo ayoya wino ka saele onganga, kono kame asaelwa kwaa tomine. Kani siiya nji ni isane awo alukile, kono asikutenda eibi.” Epuzo mulibaka no Oukuyumena Eilya (Mateu9.14-17; Luka5.33-39)
2.18: Cwale aiyetwa a Jowani na Falisi kame anooku yumenanga eilya, mi aanu sebeli aiya kwa Jesu niku mwibanguta nji, “Iikene aiyetwa a Jowani na Falisi aba aku yumenanga eilya, kono ikene aiyetwa owe abaka ku yumenanga eilya?”
2.19: Jesu sebeli waatambula nji, “Kana kame kutwesahala nji alikani no mukwati aku yumene eilya, omukwati yo sili kwa onyene? Omukwati yosili kwa onyene, kakutwesahala nji aku yumene eilya.
2.20: Kono enako kame iiya, eyo omukwati aba sa tundisiwe kwa onyene, abohe, kame sa kuyumene eilya mu liywaa elyo.
2.21: “Kakwisa omunu so beeka esimanahanyi no ubya ba sikumango no kukulubala, kakuli esimanahanyi no ubya mba sikaula esi no kukulubala, mane kwikezehe abono kukauka.
2.22: Kame kakwisa omunu so itela ewaine no ubya mu singumbuli no kupangiwa ba itumba no kukulubala, aba ku tendiwa ngeeso, ewaine no ubya kame ikaula esingumbuli sipangilwe ba situmba, mi ewaine kame isinyeha bamweya ni singumbuli sipangilwe ba situmba. Kono ewaine no ubya kame itelwa mu singumbuli sipangilwe ba situmba no ubya.” Epuzo mulibaka no Liywaa no Pumulo (Mateu12.1-8; Luka6.1-5)
2.23: Eliywaa linjili eli no Pumulo, Jesu yo bita mu matema no uloto na iyetwa aye alemine okucola ni kububula oubeke.
2.24: Cwale Afalisi sebeli amba kwa Jesu nji, “Komone, aiyetwa owe ikene aba atenda esi no kwapumenenwa mu liywaa no Pumulo?”
