15.39: Mi cwale omutateleli no musole ona kwimana ba nyonga ya Jesu aba na kumona omo ana fele, sebeli wamba nji, “Niti luli omulume uyu neli Mwana Nyambe!”
15.40: Akati ana kwimana oku no kuleba okumona, abo omunjili neli Maliya Magadalena, Maliya inawaye Jakobo omwanuke ni Jose okubeeka Salome.
15.41: Mu Galileya ana kwikalanga Jesu, akati kame ana kumu kon̄a ni kumu babalela. Nakati anjili ano kupula ana kumukon̄a oku tunda ku Jelusalema nonyene na kwikalako. Oku Pumbekiwa kwa Jesu. (Mateu27.57-61; Luka23.50-56; Jowani19.38-42)
15.42: Cwale aba ina kukwana enako no mangolwaa neli eliywaa nou kutukiseta eliywaa no pumulo,
15.43: Josefa no Alimateya omunjili no Kuta no Majuda, woyo neli omunjili wawo ana kutatelelanga okwiiya no mubuso wa Nyambe, mu undume sebeli ota kwa Pilato okamu kumbela olutu lwa Jesu.
15.44: Pilato sebeli okomoka abana kuyupa nji Jesu wafa kale. Sebeli oisana omutateleli, ni ku mwibanguta nji Jesu wafa kale?
15.45: Cwale aba na kuyupa kwa mutateleli nji mo kwikalele, sebeli oba olutu ku mukulu no masole.
15.46: Cwale Josefa sebeli oula olwambi, niku pungelamo Jesu niku mubeeka mu libita no liwee no kuchakuliwa. Sebeli opindumunenabo eliwee ba mwelo no libita,
15.47: Maliya Magadalena ni Maliya inawaye Jose kame ana kumona omo ana kumu langeka Jesu.

16.1: Mi cwale elino pumulo aba lina kubwa, Maliya Magadalena ni Maliya inawaye Jacobo, ni Salome, sebeli a ula amaati no kunuka wino, nji akawae olutu lwa Jesu.
16.2: Cwale amasiku luli ba liywa no weli mu sunda, sebeli ata ku libita abo eliywaa aba linakupa.
16.3: Mi sebeli akwambota mukaci koo nji, “Anyine osokatu tundiseta eliwee ba mwelo no libita?”
16.4: Kono aba ana kwaliketa, sebeli amona nji eliwee linene nali tundisiwabo ba libita.
16.5: Aba ana kwingena mu libita sebeli amona ondumbana yo kumangile olwambi no likena yoikalile ku silyo mi sebeli acila.
16.6: Mi sebeli waambela nji, “Mulese kucila, kame musaela Jesu no Nazaleta ona kungongotelwa. Na inguka! Kuno kasako. Mumone mu sibaka omo ana kumulangeka.
16.7: Kono mute, mukambele aiyetwa aye ni Pitolosi nji, ‘Kame akatile balubala lwenu okuta ku Galileya. Oko mbamu kamu mono kanyi omo ana ku myambelela.’ ”
16.8: Mi sebeli anjanjata ni ku komoko, cwale akati sebeli a tundako mukucila ku libita. Kasi kwamba esinjili kwaanu, kakuli kame ana kucila onene. Jesu abana Kumonahaza kwa Maliya Magadalena (Mateu28.9; 10; Jowani20.11-18)
16.9: Cwale Jesu aba ana kwinguka amasikusiku ba liywaa elino weli mu sunda, sebeli okumonahaza oweli kwa Maliya Magadalena, woyo ana kucita kwa yonyene Emebo no kwiiba mutanu ni twiili (7).
16.10: Sebeli ota nukambela awo ana kwikalanga ni Jesu, kakuli kame ana kwikala mu maswabi ni ku lila.
16.11: Kono abana kuyupa nji Jesu nainguka mi naamu mono, kasi kupumena. Jesu yoku Monahaza kwa Iyetwa Aye Ayiili (Mateu28.16-20; Luka24.36-49; Jowani20.19-23; Tikezo1.6-8)
16.12: Okutunda abo Jesu sebeli okumonahaza mumu monahalelo mundina kame kwa yiili. Eyi kame ina kutendahala aenda enda mu naha.
16.13: Awo ayiili aba ana kuuka sebeli ambela akoo, kono kaasi kwaa pumena. Jesu yoku Monahaza kwa Iyetwa aye no Kukwana Likumi ni Mumweya
16.14: Cwale okutunda abo Jesu sebeli okumonahaza kwa iyetwa likumi ni mumweya (11), aali ba tafule alemine okulya, sebeli waanyaza mu kuulwa okupumena koo, ni ku micima yoo no koongola, kakuli kasi kupumena kwaawo ana kumumona munyima no kwinguka kwaafu.
16.15: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mute mu litunga lyonje mwiyete eliywi no kuwaba ku munu yonje.
16.16: Omunu yonje woyo so pumena ni ku kolobeziwa mba yoyisiwa, kono omunu yonje woyo sokana okupumena mba biwi omubonda.
16.17: Eyi eyisupo no timakazo eto sate nato awo apumena, kame sa cite amadimona mu litina lyange. Kame saambe mu tipuwo no ubya.
16.18: Kame saleme etinyoka ni maoko oo. Mi naba sanwe omulyashinji, kautamba okwalemeka. Kame sabeeke amaoko kwasi kutoma mi aanu awo mbabala. Jesu yo Twaliwa ku Wilu (Luka24.50-53; Tikezo1.9-11)
16.19: Cwale Jesu aba na kumana okwamba noo, sebeli oshimbelwa ku wilu, ni ku kekala ku lyooko no silyo lya Nyambe.
16.20: Cwale aiyetwa sebeli ata muku kutaza mu litunga lyonje, abo Mbumu yo sebeza noo mukoongoteteta elin̄usa mu libaka no timakazo ana kutendanga.

1.1: Kanyi aka no kupula, Aanu no kupula naeteke okun̄ola etitaba no inu eyi inaku tendahala mukaci ketu.
1.2: Kanyi omo ana kutwambelela awo ana kwikalanga kumatatekelo ana kwimona mi aambi no liywi.
1.3: Kame imonahala wino kwa mene muku kon̄a einu wino mu nako ina kubwa, okun̄ola eliywi kwa wene no kutompeha Teufilasi.
1.4: Nji cwale olimuke ouniti okukumanena ni inu ona kwambeliwa. Okuleiwa kwa Jowani Omukolobezi aba kuna Kulimukisiwa
1.5: Mu tinako ta Heloda ombumu no Judeya, kame kuna kwikalanga omupulisita no litina lya Zakaliya, woyo noikalanga mu sikwata no mupulisita no Abija. Mukataye neli osilusika lwa Aloni, mi elitina lyaye neli Elizabeta.
1.6: Onje neli ano kuluka balubala lwa Nyambe, okuyoya oku nambulwa okunyazahala okukumanena ku titaelo tonje ni milawo ya Mbumu.
1.7: Kono kasi kwikalanga ni mwana kakuli Elizabeta neli muumba, mi onje naku kulubala.
1.8: Cwale yo sebeza kanyi mupulisata balubala lwa Nyambe abo esikwata saye esili ba nako no kusebeza.
1.9: Okukumanena ku sizo no upulisita, kame ana kuketiwa okwingena mu keleke ya Mbumu okacin̄a eisense.
1.10: Cwale aanu no kupula kame ana kulapelelanga bandee ba nako no kucin̄a einsense.
1.11: Ababo cwale sebeli kumonahala kwa yonyene elingeloi lya Nyambe, eli imanine ku silyo no aletale no insense.
1.12: Cwale Zakaliya kame ana kuziyeleha aba ana kumona elingeloi, sebeli okucila.
1.13: Kono elingeloi sebeli lyamba kwa yonyene nji, “Olese kucila Zakaliya! Kakuli etapelo yowe naiyupiwa, mi mukatowe Elizabeta mbaku leyele omwana no ndumbana mi mbomu tumbu elitina lya Jowani.
1.14: Mi mbu wabelelwa nuukutumela mi ano kupula mba wabelelwe ba kuleiwa kwaye!
1.15: Kakuli mbatende woyo no kuneneba balubala lwa Mbumu. Mi katamba okunwa ewaine simba amalopu cwale mba iyala ni Mebo No Kukena simba okutunda mu lipumo lya inawaye.
1.16: Mi mba usu aanu no kupula no Isilaele kwa Mbumu Nyambe woo,
1.17: mi mbati balubala lwaye mu mebo ni maata a Eliya okuusa emicima no ashemi kwaana ni awo nambulwa okukon̄a okushangama no kuluka, oku baakanya aanu ana kulukisetwa kwa Mbumu .”
1.18: Zakaliya sebeli wamba ku lingeloi nji, “Ngasibine sani limuke eyi? Kakuli mene nakulubala kale ni mukatange nakulubala ku myaka.”
1.19: Elingeloi sebeli limutambula nji, “Time Gabiliyele woyo oimanine mu sibaka sa Nyambe mi kame nina tumiwa okwamba kwa wene mane nuukulitela amaywi no kuwaba.
1.20: Cwale komone, kame sondoke ni kuulwa okwamba okutwala ba liywaa elyo aba saiyele einu eyi. Kakuli kawasi pumena amaywi ange awo saiyatetetwe mu nako yawo.”
1.21: Cwale aanu sebeli atatelela Zakaliya ni kukomoka okuliyeha kwaye mu keleke.
1.22: Cwale aba ana kubanena bandee kasi kutwesa okwamba kwa onyene, mi sebeli anahana nji namono epono mu keleke. Zakaiya sebeli wamba noo mu kuyuleka yooli esimumu.
1.23: Cwale Zakaliya enako yaye no kusebeza aba ina kubwa, sebeli ota ku ndoo yaye.
1.24: Munyima no maywaa awo mukataye Elizabeta sebeli oimana mu mundi (oukushimba) mi sebeli okushweeka mu ndoo ba tikweti no kukwana titanu ni kwamba nji,
1.25: “Eyi yokame ana tende Nyambe kwa mene mu maywaa ona likete, okutundisa elikenyi lyange mukaci no aanu!” Okulimukisiwa no Kuleiwa kwa Jesu
1.26: Mukweti no utanu ni kamweya elingeloi Gabiliyele sebeli litumiwa okutunda kwa Nyambe okuta ku mulenen̄i wisaniwa nji Nazaleta.
1.27: Kwa mukatana no naluleya woyo ona kubeleziwa ku mulume oisaniwa Josefa, no lusika lwa Dabida. Woyo naluleya elitina lyaye neli Maliya.
1.28: Mi selbeli oiya kwa yonyene ni kwamba nji, “Olumele, wene no kufuyaulwa! Nyambe kame ali ni wene!”
1.29: Kono kame ana komokisiwa ku maywi aye ni kumakala kumukwa no kuketiwa kwaye.
1.30: Cwale Elingeloi sebeli lyamba kwa yonyene nji, “Olese kucila, Maliya, kakuli nuwana omuhau kwa Nyambe.
1.31: Cwale komone kame sokushimbe mu lipumo lyowe ni kuleya omwana no ndumbana, mi mbumu tumbu elitina lya Jesu.
1.32: Mba tende wuyu no kuneneba mi mba isaniwa Omwana a Nyambe OMWAMBAKANI onene mane Ombumu Nyambe mba mubi olubona lwa nyakulyaye Dabida,
1.33: mba busu endoo ya Jakobo okuta oku no kwaabwa mane ni mubuso waye no kwaabwa!”
1.34: Maliya sebeli oibanguta elingeloi nji, “Ngasibine saitendahale eyi kakuli mene silimukile omulume?”
1.35: Elingeloi sebeli lyamba kwa yonyene nji, “Emebo No Kukena mba iiyi kwa wene, mi amaata a Nyambe OMWAMBAKANI mba kufuku. Cwale abo omwana woyo soleiwa mba isaniwa nji wa kukena Omwana Nyambe.
1.36: Cwale komone, mwabowe Elizabeta mu nako yaye no ku kulubala naku shimbi omwana no ndumbana, mi okweti uno sebeli ou no utanu ni kamweya, woyo ona kutoiwa nji muumba.
1.37: Kakuli kwa Nyambe kakwisa esi sikwangwiwa”
1.38: Cwale Maliya sebeli wamba nji, “Komone, mene uno, omubika wa Mbumu, “sitendiwe kwa mene okukumanena ni maywi owe.” Cwale elingeloi sebeli limusiya. Maliya yo Potela Elizabeta
1.39: Mu maywaa awo Maliya sebeli okutukiseta okuta mu naha no malundu mu mulenen̄i no Judeya.
1.40: Cwale sebeli okaingena mu ndoo ya Zakaliya niku keeta Elizabeta.
1.41: Cwale Elizabeta aba ana kuyupa okukeetiwa kwa Maliya, omwana sebeli weenda mu lipumo. Mi Elizabeta sebeli oiyala Emebo No Kukena
1.42: mi sebeli okuweleza ni liywi no kuneneba nji, “Nufuyolwa mukaci no akati onje, mi embuyoti nimbuya no lipumo lyowe.
1.43: Mi iikene eyi aba ina tendahala kwa mene, nji inawaye Mbumu wange aiye kwa mene?
1.44: Kakuli komone, abo eliywi lyowe no kuni keeta aba lina keela mu litwi lyange, ababo omwana oli mu lipumo lyange sebeli weenda mulibaka no kuwabelelwa.
1.45: Cwale embuyoti niya woyo opumena nji mba kwiyatetwe eso sina kwambiwa kwa yonyene okutunda kwa Mbumu.” Olusimo lwa Maliya no Milumbeko
1.46: Mi Maliya sebeli wamba nji, “Emebo yange kame ilumbeka Ombumu,
1.47: mi emebo yange kame iwabelelwa mwa Nyambe omuyoyisi wange,
1.48: kakuli nalikete oukushuwa no mubika waye! Komumone okutunda bano amasika onje mbani isana nji wuyu no kufuyolwa,
1.49: kakuli wuyu no kuneneba Nyambe nani tendele esinu sinene. Mi okukena lyokame elitina lyaye,
1.50: cwale amakeke aye kame ali kwaawo amucila okutunda ku lusika okuta ku lusika.
1.51: Namonisa amaata ni lyoko lyaye nahasanya oukuyeema koo mu mihupulo no micima yoo.
1.52: Natulula ano kuneneba ba mabona oo, mi natuleke awo no ukushuwa.
1.53: Naiyata ano kuyomba ni inu no kuwaba, ni kucita asikufuma oku nambulwa simweya.
1.54: Natusu omubika waye Isilaele, mu kupuluka amakeke aye.
1.55: Kanyi aba ana kwamba kwa njekulyetu kwa Abulahama ni ku masika aye okuta oku no kwabwa.”
1.56: Cwale Maliya aba ana kusiyalelwa etikweti tin̄atu sebeli ouka ku mundi waye. Okuleiwa kwa Jowani Omukolobezi
1.57: Cwale enako sebeli ikeela eyi no kuleya kwa Elizabeta, mane sebeli oleya omwana no ndumbana.
1.58: Cwale awo ayakile noo ku nyonga nabaaye aba ana kuyupa Ombumu namonisa amakeke no kuneneba kwa yonyene, sebeli awabelelwa naye.
1.59: Cwale ba liywaa no mutanu ni twaatu sebeli atwala olukeke ku mupato, mi kame ana kusinga nji amutumbe Zakaliya elitina lya sitaye.
1.60: Kono inawaye sebeli wamba nji, “Kokuulwa! mbaisaniwa nji Jowani.”
1.61: Cwale sebeli aamba kwa yonyene nji, “Kakwisa kwasi mukowa wowe oisaniwa ni litina eli!”
1.62: Cwale sebeli ambela sitaye ni tiponiso, nji aasimwete elitina elyo asinga okubeeka mwanaye.
1.63: Zakaliya sebeli okumbela akabala ni ku n̄olabo nji, “Elitina lyaye ni Jowani.” Mi onje sebeli akomoka!
1.64: Cwale ababo akanwa kaye sebeli kayatuluka ni lulimi lwaye sebeli lunungutuka, ni kwamba, oku lumbeka Nyambe.
1.65: Cwale awo onje ayakile amabapa noo sebeli alemiwa okucila, mi etaba eyo sebeli ihasana mu naha yonje no malundu no Judeya.
1.66: Cwale onje awo ana kwiyupa sebeli aiteula mu micima yoo ni kwamba nji, “Cwale uyu mwanukana kame sa kule oku tenda anyine?” Kakuli elyoko lya Mbumu kame lina kwikala ni yonyene. Ounuhi wa Zakaliya
1.67: Cwale Zakaliya sitaye sebeli oiyala ni Mebo No Kukena, ni kunuha okwamba nji,
1.68: “Ku lumbiwe Ombumu Nyambe no Isilaele! Kakuli na poto ni ku liulula aanu aye.
1.69: Mi na tulitele omuyoyisi no maata, mu ndoo ya mubika waye Dabida.
1.70: Kanyi omo ana kwambela ni tunwa no anuhi aye no kukena oku tunda ku kale
1.71: nji kame sa tuyoyisiwe ku ila yetu, ni mu maoko no awo atu timbile.
1.72: Oku monisa amakeke ana kusepisiwa kwa anjekulyetu ni ku puluka oulikani waye no kukena
1.73: oluci ana kweeta kwa sitetu Abulahama
1.74: na ku tusepisa nji aba tuna mana oku lamulelwa mu maoko no iila yetu, tu mu sebeleze mu kwaacila,
1.75: me tuli ano kukena ni kuluka balubala lwaye amaywaa onje no mooyo wetu.
1.76: Cale weene, olukeke, kame soisaniwe nji omunuhi wa Nyambe OMWAMBAKANI kakuli kame sote balubala lwa Mbumu okalukisa endila yaye,
1.77: okuba ezibo no kuyoya kwaanu aye mu ku lemenwa eibi yoo,
1.78: mulibaka no mukekecima wa Nyambe wetu. abo eliywaa aba saliiye beulu yetu okutunda ku wilu
1.79: okuba eliseli kwawo ali mu uwi ni mu mwiinda no lifu, oku simweta amakondo etu mu ndila no kozo.”
1.80: Cwale omwana sebeli okula ni koongola mu Mebo, mi kame ana kwikala mu lihalaupa okutwala ba liywaa elyo ana kumonahala mu Isilaele.

2.1: Mu tinako tiya sebeli kwiiya etaelo ya Sesale Augasitasi nji elitunga lyonje kutendiwe esipalo.
2.2: Esi neli esipalo no weli, abo Kuiliniyasi yoli omubusisi no Siliya.
2.3: Cwale onje sebeli ata okan̄oliwa, omunu ni munu mu mulenen̄i waye.
2.4: Josefa ni yonyene sebeli otunda mu Galileya, omulenen̄i na mu Nazaleta okuta ku Judeya, omulenen̄i wa Dabida ona kwiisanwa nji Betelehema, kakuli neli osindoo ni lusika lwa Dabida.
2.5: Sebeli oka n̄oliwa ni Maliya, woyo ana ku beeleza, woyo ona kwimananga mu mundi
2.6: mi asili omo, enako yaye no kuleya sebeli ikeela.
2.7: Cwale sebeli oleya mwanaye no mweeli, ni ku mufuka eikumango no ukeke niku mu langeka mu silyelo, kakuli naku kuulwa esibaka soo mu ndoo no angenda. Alisana ni Mangeloi
2.8: Cwale mu sibaka omo kame kuna kwikala alisana mu matema oo, ana ku tonenanga emilaka no mitapi yoo ousiku.
2.9: Cwale elingeloi lya Mbumu sebeli liku monahaza kwa onyene, mi ekanya ya Mbumu sebeli yabeeka mukaci, mane sebeli acila onene,
2.10: kono elingeloi sebeli lyaamba kwa onyene nji, “Mulese kucila! kakuli komumone, kame nina militele eliywi no kuwaba eyo salilite oku wabelelwa no kuneneba oko sakwiiye kwaanu onje.
2.11: Balelo na mu leyelwe Omuyoyisi mu mulenen̄i wa Dabida, yokame Kilesite Ombumu.
2.12: Cwale eso sasitende esisupo kwaanyi sino, mba mukawana olukeke ona tingiwa etinyambi mi kame alangekilwe mu silyelo.”
2.13: Cwale ababo sebeli kwiiya empi na ku wilu no kupula, sebeli iiya ni lingeloi, ni kulumbeka Nyambe nji,
2.14: “Ekanya iikale kwa Nyambe mu mawilu na ku wilu, ni banji ni kozo iikale mu litunga mwaanu awo sa shemubiwe!”
2.15: Cwale amangeloi aba ana kwasiya okuukela ku wilu, alisana sebeli akwambisa omujili ku munjili nji, “Twendeni ku Betelehema tu kamone etaba eyo ineeyi, eyo ana tu simwete Ombumu.”
2.16: Cwale sebeli atako mu kuleluba, mi sebeli akawana Maliya ni Josefa, ni lukeke ona langekilwe mu silyelo.
2.17: Cwale aba ana kumana okumona, sebeli ata alimukisa okwamba etaba eyo anambelwe no mwana.
2.18: Mi onje awo ana kwiyupa, sebeli akomoka etaba eyo ambeliwa kwa alisana.
2.19: Kono Maliya sebeli oteula eyo inu yonje, ni kwimamela mu mucima waye.
2.20: Cwale alisana sebeli auka alemine okukanyisa ni kulumbeka Nyambe kweyo ana yupu neyo ana mono, kanyi omo ana yambelelwe. Jesu yo Beekiwa Elitina
2.21: Cwale ku mamaneneno no maywaa atanu naatu, aba ana kubeekiwa ku mupato, sebeli amubeeka elitina lya Jesu, elyo ana ku biwa ku lingeloi yo kasi kushimba kale. Jesu yo Litiwa mu Keleke
2.22: Mi cwale enako aba ina kukwana no ku kenisiwa okukumanena ku mulawo wa Mushe, sebeli akambamiseta Jesu ku Jelusalema oka mu monahaza kwa Mbumu,
2.23: kanyi omo ku n̄olelwe mu mulawo wa Mbumu nji, “Omwana no mweeli yonje kame saisanwe nji wa kukena kwa Mbumu.”
2.24: Cwale sebeli ata okaba esitabelo okukumanena mu mulawo wa Mbumu amakwici ayiili simba otwana no tunkwilimba twiili.
2.25: Cwale kame kuna kwikalanga omulume mu Jelusalema no litina lya Simoni, mi woyo mulume neli wa kuluka ni kucila Nyambe, yo tatelele omuyoyisi no Isilaele, mi Emebo No Kukena na ikwikala mwa yonyene
2.26: mi kame ana kusepisiwa ku Mebo No Kukena nji katamba oku mona elifu yo kasi mona kale Kilesite Ombumu.
2.27: Cwale sebeli osusuweziwa ku Mebo okwiiya mu Ndoo ya Nyambe. Mi cwale ashemi aba ana kulita omwana yonyene Jesu, nji ku tendahale kwa yonyene okuta mu sizo no mulawo,
2.28: Simoni sebeli omubeeka mu maoko aye ni ku lumbeka Nyambe nji,
2.29: “Mbumu, cwale olukulule omubika wowe afunduke mu kozo, okukumanena ku liywi lyowe,
2.30: Kakuli amiyo ange na mono oku yoyisa kowe,
2.31: oko ona lukisa balubala no aanu onje,
2.32: Eliseli limonisa asimacaba ni ku lita ekanya kwaanu owe no Isilaele.”
2.33: Sitaye ni inawaye sebeli okomokisiwa kweyo ana kwambiwa mulibaka lyaye.
2.34: Cwale Simoni sebeli waafuyola ni kwamba kwa Maliya inawaye nji, “Komone, wuyu mwana na beekelwe okufa ni kuyoya kwano kupula no Isilaele. Aikale kanyi esisupo eso sasi kananiwe
2.35: mi omukwale mba ukuyaa mu mooyo wowe, nji emihupulo itunda mu micima no kupula imonahale.”
2.36: Cwale kame kuna kwikala omunuhi no mukati no litina lya Anna, omwana Faniwelu no mukatana no lusika lwa Asele. Kame ana ku kulubala onene mi na kuyoya ni mbumwaye emyaka itanu ni yaatu oku tunda ba walanjo waye.
2.37: Yoli ombakati konji aba ana ku keela ba myaka makumi atanu ni aatu ni inee (84). Kasi kutunda mu Ndoo ya Nyambe, oku sebeleza Nyambe, ouku yumena eilya ni kulapela ousiku ni munji.
2.38: Mi sebeli oiya ba nako eyeyo nuukutumela kwa Nyambe ni kwamba ya Jesu kwaanu onje awo ana ku tatelela oku liululwa no Jelusalema. Okuuka ku Nazaleta
2.39: Cwale aba ana kumanenena einu yonje okukumanena ku mulawo wa Mbumu, sebeli aukela mu Galileya ku Nazaleta omulenen̄i woo luli.
2.40: Mi omwana sebeli okula ni koongola, ni kwiiyala okushangama, ni sishemo sa Nyambe kame sina kwikala beulu yaye. Ondumbana Jesu yoli mu Keleke
2.41: Cwale ashemi aye kame ana ku taanga ku Jelusalema mu mwaka ni mwaka ku mukiti no Paseka.
2.42: Cwale Jesu aba ana ku kwanisa emyaka likumi ni yiili (12) sebeli akambamenako okukumanena ku sizo.
2.43: Cwale omukiti aba ona kubwa sebeli aukela kwaawo, ondumbana Jesu sebeli osiyalela mu Jelusalema. Ashemi aye kasi kulimuka eyo,
2.44: kono mu kupuluka nji ni yonyene na kwikala mu sikwata, sebeli aenda eliywaa lyonje mi sebeli amu saela kwaboo ni kwawo aku limuka noo.
2.45: Mi cwale aba ana kuulwa oku mu wana, sebeli aukela ku Jelusalema oka mu saela.
2.46: Munyima no maywaa aatu, sebeli amuwana mu Ndoo ya Nyambe, yo ikalile mukaci no aiyeti, okwa teeteta ni kwa ibanguta etipuzo.
2.47: Cwale onje awo ana ku muyupa sebeli akomoka mu ku yupisisa kwaye ni tikalabo taye.
2.48: Cwale aba ana ku mu mona sebeli akomoka onene, mi inawaye sebeli omwibnguta nji, “Mwanange, iikene ona tu tendele ngeeso? Komone, sitowe ni mene kame tu lemine oukusaela kame tu ziyelehile.”
2.49: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji. “Iikene mu ni saelela? Kamu limukile nji kame ni fanena okwikala mu ndoo ya Sitange?”
2.50: Mi onyene kasi ku yupisisa etaba ana kwamba kwa onyene.
2.51: Cwale sebeli oshetumuka noo ni kwiiya ku Nazaleta, kame anoku kokobeza kwa onyene, cwale inawaye sebeli oteula einu eyi yonje mu mucima waye.
2.52: Cwale Jesu sebeli wekeza mu kushangama ni mu kukula, ni mu ku wabelisa Nyambe naanu.

3.1: Mu mwaka no likumi ni mutanu mu puzo ya Tibele Sesale, Ponse Pilato abo yooli omubusisi no Judeya, Heloda neli omwendisi no Galileya, minaye Filipi yooli omwendisi no naha ya Ituliya ni Tilakonita, mi Lisanyasi neli omwendisi no Abilene,
3.2: mi Annasi ni Kayafasi ali apulisita akulu, eliywi lya Nyambe sebeli liiya kwa Jowani omwana Zakaliya mu lihalaupa.
3.3: Cwale sebeli ota mu naha yonje eyo ikubapile ni Jodani yo kutaza ekolobezo no kubaka nji eibi ilemenwe.
3.4: Kanyi omo ku n̄olelwe mu buka no maywi a Isaya omunuhi wa Nyambe nji, “Eliywi no munjili kame likuweleza mu lihalaupa eli lyaamba nji, mu lukise endila no Mbumu, mubakenye endila yaye nji yoloke!
3.5: Omusindi onje mba wiyala, mi akalundu ni lilundu mbei ulululiwa. mi eyi ibetile mbei oloka, ni tindila no ku tengama mbati lukisiwa.
3.6: Mi omunu yonje mba mono okuyoyisa kwa Nyambe!’ ”
3.7: Cwalehe sebeli wambela aanu no kupula awo ana kwiiya ku kukolobeziwa kwa yonyene nji, “Anyi aana no tinyoka! Anyine ona milemusa okucila okutweba oko kwiiya?
3.8: Mu beeke etimbuya eto tifanena nji na mubaka. Mi mulese oku tangisa okwamba mukaci kenu nji, ‘Sitetu ni Abulahama.” Kakuli kame ni myambela nji Nyambe kame atwesa oku shimba amawee aa okwaatenda aana a Abulahama!
3.9: Simba abano esamu kame si beekilwe ba mibisi no itondo, mi cwale esitondo sonje eso suulwa oku beeka embuya no kuwaba kame sitemiwa ni ku siyumbela mu mulilo.”
3.10: Cwale enyangela sebeli imwibanguta nji, “Iikene cwale sa tutende?”
3.11: Jowani sebeli waatambula nji, “Woyo yonje okwite eikumango yiili, aku tabele ni woyo waakwite, ni woyo okwite esilya, atende ngeeso ni yonyene.”
3.12: Atelisi nonyene sebeli aiiya kwa Jowani mu kukolobeziwa, sebeli amwibanguta nji, “Mwiyeti, iikene sa tutende?”
3.13: Cwale sebeli waambela nji, “Mulese okutelisa oku bitelela eso mu nalaelelwe.
3.14: Amasole nonyene sebeli amwibanguta nji, “Cwale aci iikene sa tutende?” Cwale sebeli waambela nji, “Mulese okwitela omunu mu kukandimeka simba oku mubyangula, mi musepe etituwelo tenu.”
3.15: Aanu atatelele, mi onje kame ano kwibanguta mu micima yoo nji mwendi Jowani yokame Kilesite.
3.16: Jowani sebeli waatambula onje nji, “Mene, kame ni mikolobeza ni meyi, kono woyo onibita ku maata kame akeile, simba etikwele no tinjangwa taye sitwese okuti nungutula, yonyene kame sa mikobeze ni Mebo No Kukena ni mulilo.
3.17: Enumbi yaye kame ili mu lyoko lyaye, mi kame sa fefule oubeke ba patelo niku ungeka ouloto waya mu sishete, kono omuuku kame sa ucin̄iwe mu mulilo no kwaabwa.”
3.18: Cwale mu tindila tinjili no kupula, kame ana ku kutaza amaywi no kuwaba kwaanu.
3.19: Kono Ombumu Heloda, sebeli onyaziwa kwa Jowani mu taba no Helodiyasi omukataa minaye, ni mu inu yonje no kwiiba eyo ana ku tenda.
3.20: Cwale Heloda sebeli oekeza kweyo yonje no kwiiba mu kwingenyeka Jowani mu tolongo. Ekolobezo ya Jesu (Mateu3.13-17; Maleka1.9-11)
3.21: Cwale onje aanu aba ana ku kolobeziwa, ni Jesu ni yonyene sebeli okolobeziwa. Yo lapela, eliwilu sebeli liyatuluka,
3.22: mi Emebo No Kukena sebeli ishetumuka beulu yaye mu siumbiwa sikufeka kanyi elikwici, mi eliywi sebeli litunda ku wilu eli lyaamba nji, “Yawene mwanange woyo osingiwa, ni kukatelwa.” Olusika lwa Jesu
3.23: Jesu aba ana ku tangisa omusebezi waye yoli ni myaka makumi aatu. Yoli omwana, kanyi omo kuna kutendahalela, nji wa Josefa, omwana Heli,
3.24: omwana Matate, omwana Lebi, omwana Meleki, omwana Janai, omwana Josefa,
3.25: omwana Matatiyasi, omwana Amosi, omwana Nahumi, omwana Eseli, omwana Nagayi,
3.26: omwana Maate, omwana Matatiyasi, omwana Semeini, omwana Joseke, omwana Juda
3.27: omwana Joanani, omwana Lesa, omwana Zalubabele, omwana Shealutiele, omwana Neli,
3.28: omwana Meleki, omwana Adi, omwana Kosamu, omwana Elimadamu, omwana Ele,
3.29: omwana Joshuwa, omwana Eliezele, omwana Julimu, omwana Matate, omwana Libi,
3.30: omwana Simioni, omwana Juda mwana Josefa, omwana Jonami, omwana Eliyakimi,
3.31: omwana Meleya, omwana Mena, omwana Matasa, omwana Nasani, omwana Dabida,
3.32: omwana Jese, omwana Obedi, omwana Bowasi, omwana Salumoni, omwana Nashoni,
3.33: omwana Aminadabi, omwana Adamini, omwana Alini, omwana Heziloni, omwana Pelezi, omwana Juda,
3.34: omwana Jakobo, omwana Isaka, omwana Abulahama, omwana Tela, omwana Naholi,
3.35: omwana Selugi, omwana Leu, omwana Paleki, omwana Ebele, omwana Shela,
3.36: omwana Kainani, omwana Alifakasadi, omwana Sema, omwana Nuwe, omwana Lameke,
3.37: omwana Metusela, omwana Enoki, omwana Jalidi, omwana Mahalaele, omwana Kainani
3.38: omwana Enosi, omwana Seta, omwana Adama, omwana Nyambe.

4.1: Cwale Jesu aba ana kwiyala Emebo No Kukena, sebeli ouka ku Jodani, mi sebeli otwaliwa ku Mebo ku lihaupa,
4.2: sebeli oka ikalamo mu lihalaupa amaywaa makumi anee, yo etekiwa kwa Diyabulosi. Kasi kulya esilya mu maywaa awo, amaywaa awo aba ana kubwa, sebeli oyomba.
4.3: Odiyabulozi sebeli wamba kwa Jesu nji, “Nji uli mwana Nyambe, olaele amawee aa nji afutuke esinkwa.”
4.4: Cwale Jesu sebeli omutambula nji, “Kame ku n̄olilwe nji, ‘Omunu katamba kuyoya ba sinkwa feela.’ ”
4.5: Cwale Diyabulozi sebeli omutwala aba kulumbiile niku mumonisa emibuso yonje no litunga mu nako eyeyo.
4.6: Odiyabulozi sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Kwa wene kame sa ni kube amaata onje ni kanya yawo yonje, kakuli yonje eye kame ina ibiwi, mi kame niiba kwa woyo ni singa.
4.7: Nji wene, cwale, kame soni lapele, yonje kame saitende yowe.”
4.8: Cwale Jesu sebeli omutambula nji, “Kame ku n̄olilwe nji, ‘Olapele Mbumu Nyambe wowe ni ku sebeleza yonyene feela!’ ”
4.9: Kame sebeli omutwala mu Jelusalema nuukamu beeka ba monngola no Ndoo ya Nyambe, ni kwamba kwa yonyene nji, “Nji uli Mwana Nyambe, oku kondele banji wenyene okutunda bano,
4.10: kakuli kame ku n̄olilwe nji, ‘Nyambe mba laele amangeloi aye nji aku sileleze.’
4.11: Mi ‘Ba maoko oo mba kwakele nji cwale amakondo owe aulwe oukulemeka ku liwee.’ ”
4.12: Cwale Jesu sebeli omutambula nji, “Kame ku n̄olilwe nji, ‘Ku twese okweteka Ombumu Nyambe wowe.’ ”
4.13: Cwale Diyabulosi aba ana kumana oku mweteka mu mikwa yonje, sebeli otunda kwa yonyene, oku twala ba nako injili. Jesu yo Tateka Omusebezi Waye mu Galileya (Mateu4.12-17; Maleka1.14-15)
4.14: Cwale Jesu sebeli oukela ku Galileya mu maata no Mebo, mi elibubo lyaye sebeli lita okakeela mu maneku onje no naha.
4.15: Cwale sebeli oiyeta mu tindoo too no milapelo ni kububekwa ku munu yonje. Jesu yo Kaniwa mu Nazaleta (Mateu13.53-58; Maleka6.1-6)
4.16: Cwale sebeli oiya mu Nazaleta, omu ana kulitiwa, mi sebeli ota mu ndoo no milapelo kanyi omo ana kwikalela omukwa waye ba liywaa no Pumulo. Sebeli oimana okubala
4.17: mi omo sebeli obiwa ebuka no munuhi Isaya. Yonyene sebeli ofukula ebuka ni kuwana aba ku n̄olilwe nji,
4.18: “Emebo ya Mbumu kame ili beulu yange, kakuli nani kete oku kutaza eliywi no kuwaba kwaa ashebile. Kame anani tumu oku kutaza etukuluho no awo ali mu ukoba ni kubalisa amiyo no ibofu, ni kulukulula awo ayandisiwa
4.19: mi naambe omwaka ona kupumenenwa wa Mbumu.”
4.20: Cwale Jesu sebeli ofuka ebuka, ni ku yuusa ku mubika, mi sebeli oikala banji. Amiyo no awo onje ana kwikala mu ndoo no milapelo sebeli amwaliketa.
4.21: Cwale sebeli otangisa okwamba kwa onyene nji, “Balelo elin̄olo eli nali iyatetetwa, me mu kuyupela.”
4.22: Cwale onje sebeli aamba wino eyaye, ni ku komoka amaywi aye no musa ana ku tunda mu kanwa kaye, sebeli aamba nji, “Kana wuyu, kasa yokame Mwana Josefa?”
4.23: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Luli mba mu nambele enguli eyi, ‘Onganga, oku balise wenyene.’ Eyo tuna yupu ona tende mu kapenauma, witende ngeeso ni muno mu naha yowe.
4.24: Cwale sebeli wamba nji, “Niti luli kame nimyambela nji, kakwisa omunuhi okutekiwa mu naha yaye.
4.25: Kono niti luli, kame nimyambela nji kame kuna kwikalanga ambakati no kupula mu Isilaele mu maywaa a Eliya, abo eliwilu aba lina ku fukiwa mu myaka yaatu ni tikweti mutanu ni kamweya, mi kame kuna kwikala elishebo linene mu naha yonje.
4.26: Cwale Eliya kasiku tumiwa ku munu yonje kono konji feela kwa Zalefasi, mu naha no Sidoni ku mukati no mbakati.
4.27: Mi kame kuna kwikalanga asimbingwa no kupula mu Isilaele mu nako ya munuhi Elisha, mi kakwisa woyo ona kubalisiwa, kono konji feela Naamani Omusiliya.”
4.28: Cwale aba ana kuyupa eyi, onje mu ndoo no milapelo sebeli atweba.
4.29: Cwale sebeli aimana ni ku mucita mu mulenen̄i, ni ku mutwala ba lin̄ope no lilundu elyo ana ku yakela omulenen̄i woo, nji amu kwisete kunji.
4.30: Kono sebeli waabita mukaci koo nuukutela. Omulume ona Kwikala ni Mebo no Kwiiba (Maleka1.21-28)
4.31: Cwale Jesu sebeli ota ku Kapenauma, omulenen̄i no Galileya, mi na kwaaiyeta ba liywaa no Pumulo.
4.32: Cwale kame ana ku komoka onene etuto yaye, kakuli amaywi aye kame ana kwikala ni maata.
4.33: Mi mu ndoo no milapelo kame kuna kwikala omulume osi mebo no kwiiba, cwale sebeli okuwa ni liywi no kuneneba nji,
4.34: “Etaba yetu ni wene ibine, Jesu no Nazaleta? Kame oneeyi muku tusinya? niku limukile nji tiwe anyine, tiwe no Kukena wa Nyambe!”
4.35: Kono Jesu sebeli omukalimela nji, “Ondoka, mi otunde mwa yonyene!” Mi cwale emebo aba inaku mukwiseta banji mukaci no aanu, cwale sebeli itunda mwa yonyene eyulwile okumutenda esi no kwiiba.
4.36: Cwale onje sebeli akomoka nuukwambisa omunjili ku munjili nji, “Eliywi eli libine? Kame ali ni tukelo ni maata no ku laelela emebo no kwakena, mi kame itunda!”
4.37: Cwale elibubo lyaye sebeli lita mu ibaka yonje itingulukile enaha eyo. Jesu yo Balisa Aanu no Kupula (Mateu8.14-17; Maleka1.29-34)
4.38: Jesu sebeli otunda mu ndoo no milapelo, ni kwingena mu ndoo ya Simoni. Njemunwa Simoni yo langanine yotomine onene elitomapa, mi sebeli aamba eyaye kwa Jesu.
4.39: Cwale Jesu sebeli oimana ku nyonga yaye ni ku kalimela litomapa, mi sebeli litunda mwa yonyene, cwale ababo sebeli oinguka ni kwaa sebeleza.
4.40: Cwale eliywaa aba lina kwiika, onje awo ana kwikalanga naanu no meeti no oukusiya-siya sebeli aalita kwa Jesu, mi sebeli wabeeka amaoko aye beulu ni kwaabalisa.
4.41: Cwale emebo no kupula no kwiiba sebeli itunda, eyi kuwa nji, “Tiwe Mwana Nyambe!” Kono Jesu sebeli oikalimela, ni kwilaela nji ilese okwamba, kakuli naiku limuka nji yokame Kilesite. Jesu yo Kutaza mu Tindoo no Milapelo (Maleka1.35-39)
4.42: Cwale eliywaa aba lina kupa, Jesu sebeli ofunduka ni kuta okaikala mu sibaka yomboci. Mi aanu sebeli amusaela ni kwiiya kwa yonyene nji amu kanise okwasiya.
4.43: Kono sebeli waatambula nji,“Kame nifanena okakutaza eliywi no kuwaba no mubuso wa Nyambe mu milenen̄i injili ngeeso, kakuli sokame eso ina tumenwe.”
4.44: Cwale sebeli okutaza mu tindoo no milapelo mu Judeya.

5.1: Jesu yoli ba likamba no lisa lya Genesaleta, aanu sebeli amusheeteta onene nji ayupe eliywi lya Nyambe.
5.2: Cwale sebeli omona amato ayiili mu lisa, kono ayambi natundumo mi alemine oku yowisanga otunyandi too.
5.3: Jesu sebeli oingena mu wato omunjili wa Simoni, sebeli omwambela nji aufule kanyonyo okutunda ba likamba. Cwale sebeli oikala banji ni kwiyeta aanu no kupula yoli mu wato.
5.4: Cwale aba ana kumana okwamba sebeli wambela Simoni nji, “Obeeke aba no kutunga onene mi oyambe otunyandi towe.”
5.5: Cwale Simoni sebeli otambula nji, “Molyange, natu yamba ousiku wonje kono kakwisa esi tuna wana. Kono okuta mu liywii lyowe kame niyamba otunyandi.”
5.6: Cwale aba ana kutenda ngeeso, sebeli akuuya elibunda linene no tindi, mane akanyandi sebeli ka kauka.
5.7: Cwale sebeli akobeta alikani oo nji aiye mukwaatusa. Cwale sebeli aiya ni kwiiyata amato ayiili mane sebeli atateka okutika.
5.8: Kono Simoni Pitolosi abana kumona ngeeso, sebeli okukwiseta banji ni manwi aye kwa Jesu ni kwamba nji, “Otunde kwa mene, kakuli mene kame nili osiku tenda eibi, Mbumu!”
5.9: Mulibaka elyo kame ana kukomoka onene naawo ana kwikala naye ba ku mona okupula no tindi anaku kuuya.
5.10: Cwale sebeli ku tendahala ngeeso ni kwa Jacobo ni Jowani aana a Zebedeya, alikani a Simoni, mi Jesu sebeli wambakwa Simoni nji “Olese ku cila, okutunda bano mbuyamba aanu.”
5.11: Cwale aba ana kulita amato oo ku likamba, sebeli asiya einu yonje ni ku mukon̄a Jesu yo Balisa Omulume (Mateu8.1-4; Maleka1.40-45)
5.12: Jesu yoli mu mulenen̄i munjili, sebeli kwiiya omulume osi kutoma embingwa, mi aba ana kumona Jesu, sebeli okwela banji ni lubala lwaye ni kwamba nji, “Mbumu, nji kame osinga, kame otwesa okuni balisa!”
5.13: Cwale Jesu sebeli oolola elyoko lyaye ni ku mulema ni kwamba nji, “Nisinga, obale!” Mi ababo embingwa sebeli ibwa.
5.14: Cwale sebeli omulaelela nji alese okwambela omunu, “Kono ote oka kumonahalise kwa mupulisita, mi olite enubu no ku balisiwa kanyi omu ana ku laelela Mushe, itende oupaki kwaanu.”
5.15: Kono cwale elibubo lyaye sebeli lihasana, mi aanu no kupula sebeli aungana oku muteeteteta ni ku balisiwa ku meeti oo.
5.16: Kono sebeli ota mu lihalaupa oka lapela. Jesu yo Balisa osi Lun̄an̄ali (Mateu9.1-8; Maleka2.1-12)
5.17: Ba liywaa elinjili yo iyeta, kame kuna kwikala Afalisi na iyeti no mulawo awo nakwiiya okutunda mu mindi yonje no Galileya ni Judeya ni mu Jelusalema, mi amaata a Mbumu kame ana kwikala kwa yonyene oku balisa aanu.
5.18: Komumone, sebeli kwiiya alume ashimbile omulume ba saala osi lun̄an̄ali, mi sebeli akumbela oku mwingenyika mukaci ni ku mu langeka ba lubala lwa Jesu.
5.19: Kono kasi kuwana esibaka no kwingena, mulibaka no aanu okupula, sebeli atina ba lituwa no ndoo ni ku mu shulumukiseta ni saala saye mukaci no aanu balubala lwa Jesu.
5.20: Cwale Jesu aba ana kumona etumelo yoo, sebeli wamba nji, “Mulume, eibi yowe na wilemenwe.”
5.21: Cwale aiyeti no mulawo na Falisi sebeli atangisa okwibanguta aamba nji, “Anyine wuyu mulume woyo wamba mu malimbuluti? Woyo so twesa okulemena eibi konji feela konji Nyambe yomboci.”
5.22: Cwale Jesu aba ana kulimuka etipuzo too, sebeli waatambula nji, “Ngasibine aba mukwibanguta mu micima yenu?
5.23: Sibine esi sootobile, okwamba nji, ‘Eibi yowe nwilemenwe,’ ni kwamba nji, ‘Oimane mi weende?’
5.24: Kono nji mulimuke nji Omwana no munu kame akwite etukelo no kulemena eibi bano banji.” sebeli wambela omulume osi lun̄an̄ali nji, “Kame nikwambela nji, oimane, oshimbe oulangano wowe mi ote ku mundi!”
5.25: Cwale ababo sebeli oimana ba lubala loo onje, ni ku shimba oulangano waye, ni kuta ku mundi waye yo yeema Nyambe.
5.26: Sebeli akomoka onene onje, ni ku yeema Nyambe mane sebeli aiyala okucila aamba nji, “Balelo na tumono einu indina no ku komokisa!” Jesu yo Isana Lebi (Mateu9.9-13; Maleka2.13-17)
5.27: Eyo aba ina kubwa, Jesu sebeli otundamo, mi sebeli omona Lebi omutelisi yo ikalile ba ofisi no mutelo, mi sebeli omwambela nji, “Onikon̄e.”
5.28: Cwale Lebi sebeli osiya einu yonje, ni ku mu kon̄a
5.29: Cwale Lebi sebeli otendeliwa omukiti no kuneneba mu ndoo yaye, mi kame kuna kwikala atelisi anjili no kupula naanjili ana kwikala noo ku tafule.
5.30: Cwale Afalisi naa iyeti no mulawo sebeli an̄un̄uta ni kwambela aiyetwa aye nji, “Iikene aba mulya ni kunwa na telisi na sikutenda eibi?”
5.31: Cwale Jesu sebeli waatambula nji, “Aanu awo ayoya wino kasaele onganga, kono awo atomine okame amusaela.
5.32: Kani siiya mu kwisana awo alukile, kono awo asikutenda eibi nji abake.” Epuzo kweyo no ouku Yumena Eilya (Mateu9.14-17; Maleka2.18-22)
5.33: Cwale aanu sebeli aamba kwa Jesu nji, “Aiyetwa a Jowani aka no kupula kame aku yumenanga eilya mi kame alapelanga, na iyetwa no Afalisi kame atendanga ngeeso, kono aiyetwa owe kame alya ni kunwa.”
5.34: Cwale Jesu sebeli waambela nji, “Kame ku twesahala nji alikani no mukwati aku yumene eilya omukwati yoli noo?
5.35: Amaywaa mba iiyi omukwati aba sa tundisiwe kwa onyene, mi cwale kame saaku yumene eilya mu maywaa awo.”
5.36: Jesu kame sebeli waambela enguli injili nji, “Kakwisa omunu otwesa oku tundisa esimanahanyi ba sikumango no ubya nji asi beeke ba sikumango no ku kulubala. Nji atende ngeeso, mba kaula esikumango no ubya, mi esimanahanyi no ubya kasi tamba oku lumelelana ni sikumango noku kulubala.
5.37: Kakwisa omunu otwesa oku beeka ewaine no ubya mu sindunga no ku umbiwa ba itumba no ku kulubala, nji atende ngeeso, ewaine no ubya mbai kaula eitumba mane ni kwiteka, ni itumba mbai sinyehe.
5.38: Kono ewaine no ubya kame ifanena okwibeeka mu indunga no kuumbiwa ba itumba no ubya.
5.39: Cwale kakwisa omunu so tateka okunwa ewaine no kale nji asinge eyi no ubya, kakuli kame saambe nji, ‘Ewaine no kale ya kuwaba okubita eyi no ubya.”

6.1: Ba liywaa linjili no Pumulo, Jesu yo bita mu matema no ubeke, aiyetwa aye sebeli ayangula amakunka no ubeke, ni kwapolola mu maoko oo ni kulya oubeke.
6.2: Kono anjili no Afalisi sebeli aamba nji, “Iikene aba mutenda eyi no kwafanena ba liywaa no Pumulo?”
6.3: Cwale Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Kamwa sikubala eyo ana ku tenda Dabida yo yombile, yonyene naawo ana kwikala naye?
6.4: Omo ana kwingenena mu ndoo ya Nyambe, noomo ana kushimbela ni kulya esinkwa sina ku lukisetwa Nyambe, eyo nakwafanena okuliwa ku munu yonje konji apulisita, mi sebeli obako nawo ana kwikala naye.”
6.5: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Omwana no Munu ni Mbumu no Pumulo.” Omulume osi Lyoko no Lun̄an̄ali (Mateu12.9-14; Maleka3.1-6)
6.6: Ba liywaa elinjili no Pumulo, Jesu aba ana kwingena mu ndoo no milapelo ni kwiyetamo, na ku kwikala omulume osi ku kukutela olun̄an̄ali ku lyooko no silyo.
6.7: Afalisi anjili na iyeti no mulawo sebeli aaliketa Jesu oku mona nji mba balisa omunu ba liywaa no Pumulo, nji cwale awane elibaka no kumununga eyambo.
6.8: Kono Jesu sebeli olimuka emihupulo yoo, mi sebeli wamba ku mulume osiku kukutela elyoko nji, “Wiiye wimane bano.” Cwale sebeli oimana ni kuta ba lubala no aanu.
6.9: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Kame nimi ibanguta nji, kakufanene eli no Pumulo okutenda eyi no kuwaba simba okutenda ouyi? Oku yoyisa omooyo nji okuusinya?”
6.10: Cwale sebeli waaliketa onje ni kwambela woyo mulume nji, “Oolole elyooko lyowe.” Mi sebeli otenda ngeeso, cwale elyoko lyaye sebeli libala.
6.11: Kono sebeli aiyala okutweba nuukwambisa mukaci koo eso sa fanene okutenda kwa Jesu. Jesu yo Keta Atumiwa Aye no kukwana Likumi ni Twiili (12) (Mateu10.1-4; Maleka3.13-19)
6.12: Mu maywaa aa Jesu sebeli ota ku lilundu oka lapela, mi usiku onje yotwalelela okulapela kwa Nyambe.
6.13: Cwale aba lina kupa eliywaa, sebeli oisana aiyetwa aye, ni kuketa mwa onyene aa no kukwana likumi na yiili, awo ana kubeekiwa nji atumiwa.
6.14: Simoni, ana kubeeka elitina lya Pitolosi, ni Adiliyasi minaye, Jakobo, ni Jowani, ni Filipi, ni Batolome,
6.15: ni Mateu, ni Tomasi ni Jakobo omwana Alufeya, ni Simoni wisanwa nji Zeloti,
6.16: ni Judasi Mwana Jakobo, ni Judasi Isikaliota, omubeteki. Jesu yo Iyeta ni ku Balisa (Mateu4.23-25)
6.17: Cwale sebeli oshetumuka noo ni kwimana ba saana, ni kupula no aiyetwa aye naanu no kupula ana ku tunda mu Judeya monje ni mu Jelusalema ni ba likamba lya Tile ni Sidoni, ana kwiiya mu kumuteeteta ni ku balisiwa ku meeti oo,
6.18: naawo ana ku ziyeleha ku mebo no kwiiba naku balisiwa.
6.19: Cwale oundi no aanu sebeli ayeya nji amuleme, kakuli amaata kame ana kutunda kwa yonyene ni kwaa balisa onje. Oku Wabelelwa ni Kweena (Mateu5.1-12)
6.20: Cwale sebeli waliketa aiyetwa aye ni kwamba nji, “Embuyoti ni yenu anyi mushebile, kakuli omubuso wa Nyambe ni wenu!
6.21: Embuyoti ni yenu anyi mu yombile bano, kakuli mba mwikuta! Embuyoti ni yenu anyi mu lila bano, kakuli mba musheke!
6.22: “Embuyoti ni yenu aba mutimbiwa kwaanu, naaba amicita, naaba amyangola, ni kukana elitina lyenu kanyi lyakwiiba, mulibaka lya Mwana no Munu!
6.23: Mu wabelelwe mu liywaa elyo, mu nenge mu ku nyakalala, kakuli komone, omupuzo wenu ni wakuneneba ku wilu, kakuli anjekulyenu naaku tenda ngeeso kwa nuhi a Nyambe.
6.24: “Kono oumai ni wenu asikufuma, kakuli na mu tambula omooyo no kotoba!
6.25: Oumai ni wenu anyi mwiikutile bano, kakuli mba muyombo! Oumai ni wenu anyi musheka bano, kakuli mbamweene ni ku lila.
6.26: “Oumai ni wenu, abo aanu onje aba aamba ouwa wenu, kakuli anjekulyoo kame ana kutenda ngeeso kwa nuhi no mapwa. Elilato ku Iila (Mateu5.38-48; 7.12a)
6.27: “Kono kame namba kwaanyi muyupa, mu singe eila yenu, mu tende wino kwawo ami timbile,
6.28: mu fuyole awo amikuta, mu lapelele awo ami timbile.
6.29: Woyo okufula ku litama limweya omube akufule kame ku litama linjili, mi omunu nji aku byangule ebaki yowe omube mane ni hembe yowe.
6.30: Obe woyo okumbela kwa wene, ni woyo oshimba einu yowe olese ku mubyangulayo kame.
6.31: Cwale omu musingela nji aanu ami tendele, naanyi mutende ngeeso kwa onyene.
6.32: “Nji kame musinga awo ami singa, kawitumelo sa mu mone? Kakuli simba asikutenda eibi kame asinga awo aasinga!
6.33: Cwale nji otenda ouwa kwaawo atenda ouwa kwa wene, ka witumelo sau mone? kakuli simba nonyene asi kutenda eibi mwatendela ngeeso!
6.34: Cwale nji kame mukalima awo mu sepile nji mba myusete, ka witumelo sa mu mone? Simba asiku tenda eibi, kame akalimana nawo atenda eibi, nji ausetwe mukupula ngeeso.
6.35: Kono mu singe eila yenu, mwaa tende wino, mwaa kolotise me mwabilaele nji muusetwe esinjili, mi omupuzo wenu kame saunenebe, mi kame sa mu tende aana a Nyambe Oli Beulu, kakuli yonyene niwa sishemo kwaawo no kwaku tumela naawo akusinga onyene.
6.36: Mwikale ni makeke kanyi Sitenu aba ali ni makeke. Okwatula Akwenu (Mateu7.1-5)
6.37: “Mu lese kwatula nji naanyi muulwe okwatuliwa, mu lese oku nyaza nji naanyi muulwe oku nyaziwa, mu lemene akwenu nji naanyi mu lemenwe.
6.38: Mube, nji naanyi mubiwe, niti luli kame sa mu tambule empo no utokwa eyo saibeekwe mu makaa enu. Kakuli esikala no kuwaba, mwetela banji mane mwinyunge bamweya, mwituke beulu mi mbaibekiwa ba yeelo yenu. Kakuli esikala muba kwa kwenu, naanyi sokame eso sa muwane.”
6.39: Kame Jesu sebeli waambela enguli nji, “Kana esibofu kame sitwesa oku twaletela esibofu sinjili? Yonje kaitamba okukwela mu wina?”
6.40: Omwiyetwa katwese okubitelela omwiyeti waye, kono omunu yonje aba ana mana okwiyetiwa kame safeke kanyi omwiyeti waye.
6.41: Ngasibine waliketa esoopu sili mu litiyo no mwabowe, kono wene kumono omusumo oli mu litiyo lyowe?
6.42: Simba nji ngasibine so twesete okwambela omwabowe nji, ‘Mwabange, tumone ni kutundise esoopu sili mu litiyo lyowe,’ abo weene kumono omusumo owo oli mu litiyo lyowe? Wene osikukuba, oweli otundise omusumo oli mu litiyo lyowe, okubinda cwale somone wino oku tundisa esoopu sili mu litiyo no mwabowe. Esitondo ni Mbuya Yaso (Mateu7.16-20; 12.33-35)
6.43: “Kakuli kakwisa esitondo no kuwaba sibeeke embuya no kwiiba, simba nji kame esitondo no kwiiba sibeeke embuya no kuwaba.
6.44: Mulibaka elyo esitondo sonje kame silimukelwa ku mbuya yaso sibeeka, kakuli etifeiga kati yangulwa ku mikakani, simba esisansa no beine kasi yangulwa ku mukona.
6.45: Omunu no kuwaba kame atundisa eyi no kuwaba mu sitewelo na mu mucima waye, mi omunu no kwiiba kame atundisa eyi no kwiiba mu sitewelo saye no kwiiba, kakuli akanwa no munu kame kaamba eso siiyalile mu mucima waye. Ayaki Ayiili no Ndoo (Mateu7.24-27)
6.46: “Ngasibine aba mu niisana nji ‘Mbumu, Mbumu,’ mi ka mutende eso ni myambela?
6.47: Omunu yonje woyo wiiya kwa mene ni ku teeteta ku maywi ange ni kwasebelisa, mbimi simwete eso aku fekile naso.
6.48: Kame aku fekile kanyi omulume oyaka endoo yaye, woyo ona kutungisa onene bakutombola, ni kuyaka omutomo waye ba liwee, mi cwale omuunda aba wiiya, ameyi aba afula onene ba ndoo, mi katwese okunyanganyisa endoo eyo, kakuli kame iyakilwe wino.
6.49: Kono woyo oyupa amaywi ange mi kaasebelisa, kame akufekile kanyi omulume oyaka endoo yaye ba mumbu feela aba nambulwa omutomo, mi ameyi aba afulabo onene ababo kame ikwa, mi oku sinyeha no ndoo eyo kame sakutende oku no kuneneba onene!”

7.1: Cwale Jesu aba ana kumana okwambela aanu sebeli oingena mu Kapenauma.
7.2: Cwale omukulu no masole kame ana kwikalanga ni mubika waye ona ku singiwangwa onene, ona ku tomanga mi kame ana kwikala abeebi ni kufa.
7.3: Cwale aba ana kuyupa eya Jesu, sebeli omutumena akulu no Majuda oka mukumbela nji aiye mu kubalisa omubika waye.
7.4: Mi cwale awo aba ana kwiiya kwa Jesu, sebeli amu kumbela onene mu likute aamba nji, “Kame ku fanena nji wene omutendele eyi ngeeso.
7.5: Kakuli kame asinga aanu etu, mane na tuyakele endoo no milapelo.”
7.6: Cwale Jesu sebeli ota noo. Abana ka keela ku nyonga no ndoo, omukulu no masole sebeli omutumena alikani, sebeli aiya mukwamba kwa yonyene nji, “Mbumu olese oku kataza kakuli silukele nji wene wingene munji no lituwa no ndoo yange,
7.7: bokame nina ku mona nji simba oukumonahaza kwa wene sifanene. Kono waambe eliywi mi omubika wange mba bala.
7.8: Kakuli mene naba nili munji no maata no akwange, kame nili ni masole ange, mi aba naamba ku munjili nji, ‘Ote!’ kame ata, ni ku munjili nji, ‘Wiiye!’ kame aiya, ni ku mubika wange aba naamba nji, ‘Otende esi!’ mi kame asi tenda.”
7.9: Cwale Jesu aba ana kuyupa eyi sebeli okomoka, niku siulukela kwaanu ana ku mukon̄a ni kwaambela nji, “Kame ni myambela, simba mu Isilaele kani siwana etumelo iku fekile kanyi eyi!”
7.10: Mi cwale awo ana ku tumiwa aba ana kuukela ku ndoo, sebeli aka wana omubika yooli wino. Jesu yo Ingula Omwana no Mbakati
7.11: Munyima nweyo, Jesu sebeli ota mu mulenen̄i wisanwa Naine, na iyetwa aye ni undi no aanu sebeli ata naye.
7.12: Ababo yo keela feela ba mwelo no mulenen̄i, sebeli okwangana naanu ashimbile omufu, neli mwana mumweya no ndumbana kwa inawaye mi neli mbakati, naanu no kupula ana ku tunda mu mulenen̄i aenda naye.
7.13: Cwale Ombumu aba ana kumona omukati woyo, sebeli omuyupela amakeke ni ku mwambela nji, “Olese ku lila”
7.14: Cwale sebeli wiiya ni ku lema ba lukutu, mi awo ana ku lushimba sebeli aimana. Cwale sebeli wamba nji, “Ndumbana, kame naamba kwa wene nji, inguka!”
7.15: Cwale omunu ona kufa sebeli oimana ni kutangisa okwamba, mi Jesu sebeli omuusa kwa inawaye.
7.16: Cwale onje sebeli aingenwa okucila, ni kuyeema Nyambe aamba nji, “Omunuhi munene wa Nyambe na monahala mukaci ketu!” mi “Nyambe na potele aanu aye!”
7.17: Cwale elibubo lyaye sebeli lihasana mu naha yonje no Judeya ni mu tinaha tonje tiku bapile nayo. Elin̄usa Okutunda kwa Jowani Omukolobezi (Mateu11.2-19)
7.18: Aiyetwa a Jowani sebeli amwambela einu yonje.
7.19: Cwale Jowani sebeli oisana aiyetwa aye ayiili, ni kwatuma kwa Mbumu nji akaibangute nji, “Kana yawene woyo fanene okwiiya, nji tu tatelele omunjili?”
7.20: Cwale alume awo aba ana kukeela kwa Jesu, sebeli aamba nji, “Jowani Omukolobezi natu tumu kwa wene mukwibanguta nji yawene onafanene okwiiya, nji tutalele omunjili?’ ”
7.21: Mu nako eyo Jesu na kubalisa aanu no kupula ku meeti oo ni iyanga ni mebo no kwiiba, ni ibofu no kupula sebeli oimonisa.
7.22: Cwale Jesu sebeli waatambula nji, “Mute mi mukambele Jowani eyi muna mono neyi muna yupu, eibofu kame imona, eiyanga kame yeenda, asi mbingwa kame akenisiwa, aafu kame aingulwa, mi aa ashebile kame aambelwa eliywi no kuwaba.
7.23: Cwale embuyoti niya woyo oulwa oku sitatala kwa mene!”
7.24: Cwale awo ana kutumiwa kwa Jowani aba ana kuuka, Jesu sebeli otangisa okwamba eyi ya Jowani kwaanu no kupula nji, “Iikene muno kamona aba muna kuta mu lihaupa, neli olutaka luna ku nyanganyisiwa ku mebo?
7.25: Iikene cwale muna kutela oka mona? Nji neli omunu ona kukufuka eikumango no kotoba? Komumone, awo aku fukile eyi no kubenya ni ku yoya wino kame ali mu tindoo no Ambumu!
7.26: Cwale iikene muna kutela oka mona? Neli omunuhi wa Nyambe? Ee, kame nimyambela nji, mane okubitelela omunuhi wa Nyambe.
7.27: Eyi yokame eyaye in̄olilwe nji, ‘Komumone, kame nituma onumwana wange ba lubala no lubala lowe yokame solukisa endila yowe balubala lowe.’
7.28: Kame ni myambela nji, “Kwaaawo ana leiwa kwaakati kakwisa woyo no kuneneba kwa Jowani, kono woyo no kucaniba mu mubuso wa Nyambe yo munene okubita Jowani.”
7.29: Aanu onje aba ana kumuyupa na telisi sebeli ayeema Nyambe ni ku kolobeziwa mu kolobezo ya Jowani omukolobezi.
7.30: Kono Afalisi na iyeti no mulawo sebeli akana omulelo wa Nyambe mu kukolobeziwa mu kolobezo ya Jowani.
7.31: Cwale aanu no lusika olu kame sana fanikete ni siikene? Mi iikene aku fekile nayo?
7.32: Kame aku fekile kanyi anukana awo aikalile mu sibaka no musika akwisana omunjili ku munjili nji, ‘Natu mipetele, kono kamwa sinenga! Natu miimbele etindimo no malilo kono kamwa silila!
7.33: Kakuli Jowani nakwiiya yo kali esinkwa ni kunwa ewaine, mi kame mwamba nji, ‘Kame akwete emebo no kwiiba!’
7.34: Omwana no Munu kame aneeyi yoolya ni kunwa, mi kame mwamba nji, ‘Komumone, kame alya ni kunwa, omulikani no atelisi na sikutenda eibi!’
7.35: Kono oku shangama na kukenisetwe anaye onje.” Jesu yoli ku Ndoo ya Simoni Omufalisi
7.36: Omujili no Afalisi sebeli okumbela Jesu nji akalye naye, mane sebeli ota mu ndoo no mufalisi nukekala ba tafule.
7.37: Mi omukati na mu mulenen̄i, osi kutenda eibi aba ana kuyupa nji Jesu kame ali mu ndoo no Mufalisi, sebeli olita esitewelo no maati siisaniwa alabasita
7.38: ni kwimana ku nyonga ya Jesu ku makondo aye, sebeli olila ni kombisa amakondo a Jesu ni myooti yaye. Cwale sebeli otundisa emyooti ni tin̄uki na ku mutwi waye, ni kwatubeta, okwawaa ni maati.
7.39: Cwale Omufalisi woyo ona ku mwisana aba ana ku mona eyo, sebeli okwambisa yomboci nji, “Kambe wuyu mulume munuhi wa Nyambe luli, kambe kame amulikile wuyu mukati omulema ni ku limuka eyi atenda nji osiku tenda eibi!”
7.40: Cwale Jesu sebeli otambula ni kwamba kwa yonyene nji, “Simoni, kwasili eso ni singa okwamba kwa wene.” Mi sebeli otambula nji, “Iikene eyo, Mwiyeti?”
7.41: Omunu munjili kame ana ku kolotisa alume ayiili amali, omunjili sebeli omukolotisa amali no ku kwana ba myaanda itanu, mi omunjili kame sebeli omuba makumi atanu.
7.42: Cwale aba ana ku kwangwa oku teneka sebeli walemena onje. Cwale kwaawo ayiili anyine somu singa onene?”
7.43: Simoni sebeli otambula nji, “Kame ni kakanya nji woyo ona lemeniwa onene.” Cwale Jesu sebeli omwambela nji, “Nu atula wino.”
7.44: Cwale Jesu sebeli ofutukela ku mukati ni kwamba kwa Simoni nji, “Omwine wuyu mukati, ine ingene mu ndoo yowe, kausiniba ameyi no ukuyowa ku makondo ange, kono wuyu mukati na ombisa amakondo ange ni myooti yaye ni kwitundisa ni tin̄uki taye.
7.45: Kawasi nitubeta, kono oku tunda ba nako ina ingene muno, kasi lesela oku tubeta amakondo ange.
7.46: Kausi waa omutwi wange ni maati, kono yonyene na waa amaati ku makondo ange.
7.47: Cwalehe kame ni kwambela nji, eibi yaye eyo itendile nji yakupula, nai lemenwe kakuli kame anisinga onene, kono woyo olemeniwa mbicani kame asinga mbicani.”
7.48: Cwale Jesu sebeli wambela omukati nji, “Eibi yowe nwilemenwe.”
7.49: Cwale awo ana kwikala naye ku tafule sebeli atangisa okwambisa mu micima yoo nji, “Anyine wuyu, wuyu otwesa simba oku lemena eibi?”
7.50: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba ku mukati nji, “Etumelo yowe naiku yoyisa, weende mu kozo.”

8.1: Munyima no eyo Jesu sebeli ota mu milenen̄i ni mu mindi yo iyeta Eliywi no kuwaba no mubuso wa Nyambe. Aiyetwa aye no ku kwana likumi na yiili aali naye
8.2: nakati ngeeso ana ku balisiwa ku mebo no kwiiba ni ku meeti. Maliya ona kwiisaniwa nji Magadalena woyo ona ku tundisiwa emebo no kwiiba itanu ni yiili (7),
8.3: ni Joana omoywa Chuza, esikombwa sa Heloda, ni Suzana, nanjili ngeeso ano kupula, ana ku sebeleza Jesu ni ufumu woo. Enguli no Mukuni (Mateu13.1-9; Maleka4.1-9)
8.4: Cwale oundi no aanu aba ona kumana oukuwana, naanu ana ku tunda mu titolopo tonje sebeli aiya kwa Jesu, sebeli waambela enguli nji,
8.5: “Omukuni nakuta muku kuna embuto yaye, mi yo lemine okukuna ngeeso, injili embuto sebeli ikwela mu ndila, mi sebeli ilyatangiwa ni makondo, mi otuyunyi na mu wilu sebeli iilya.
8.6: Injili sebeli ikwela ba mawee, eikula sebeli iletuka, kakuli kakwa sikwikala omukamo.
8.7: Cwale einjili sebeli ikwela mu mikakani, mi emikakani aba ina kukulelela bamweya sebeli iyowelisa embuto.
8.8: Cwale injili mbuto sebeli ikwela mu mumbu no kuwaba niku kula wino ni kubeeka omwaanda no etimbuto.” Yo amba ngeeso, sebeli okuweleza nji, “Woyo oli ni matwi no ku yupisa, ayupe!” Etuso no Tinguli (Mateu13.10-17; Maleka4.10-12)
8.9: Cwale aiyetwa aye aba ana ku mwibanguta etaluso no nguli eyo,
8.10: sebeli wamba nji, “Anyi na mubiwi oku limuka etikunutu no mubuso wa Nyambe, kono anjili kame atalusetwa mu tinguli, nji cwale oku mona kame amona kono kayupisisa. Jesu yo Talusa Enguli no Mukuni (Mateu13.18-23; Maleka4.13-20)
8.11: Cwale enguli kame italusa ngeesi nji, embuto eliywi lya Nyambe.
8.12: Embuto ina ku kwela mu ndila okame awo ana yupu eliywi, cwale Diyabulosi aba aiya kame atundisa eliywi ana yupu mu micima yoo nji alese oku pumena ni ku yoyisiwa.
8.13: Embuto eyo ili ba liwee okame awo, aba amana okuyupa eliywi, kame alitambula mu kuwabelelwa, kono kakwite emibisi mi kame alitambula mu nako icana feela, cwale emiliko aba iiya kame akwa.
8.14: Mi kweyo ina kwele mu mikona, okame awo ayupa eliywi, kono aba ata mu ndila yoo kame akeshebiswa ni tipilaelo ni ufumu, ni myelembo no mooyo, mi embuya yoo kayiimbi.
8.15: Mi kweyo mbuto ili mu mumbu no kuwaba, okame awo ayupa eliywi ni ku litambula muwangu ni mu ku sepahala ni micima no kuwaba, ni ku beeka embuya mu ku tundamena. Elambi munji no Siwana (Maleka4.21-25)
8.16: Kakwisa omunu otwesa oku monyeka elambi ni kwifukela munji no siwana, simba okwibeeka munji no mumbeta, kono ibeekiwe ba lutala nji omunu aba aingena amone eliseli.
8.17: Kakuli kakwisa eso sishweekiwa eso sasi ulwe oku shootolwa, simba esi sili kuuwi sasi ulwe oku limukiwa ni kwiiya ba liseli.
8.18: Cwale mumamele omu muyupela, kakuli woyo okwite eso ali naso, mba beekelwa, kono awo aulwile esinjiili, simba eso apuluka nji kame ali naso mbasi byanguliwa.” Inawaye Jesu na Inaaye (Mateu12.46-50; Maleka3.31-35)
8.19: Cwale inawaye Jesu na inaaye sebeli aiya kwa yonyene, kono kasi ku twesa okukeela ku nyonga yaye, mulibaka no kupula no aanu.
8.20: Cwale Jesu sebeli wambeliwa nji, “Inaowe na inoowe kame aimanine bandee, kame ashukele oukumona.”
8.21: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Inawange na inaange okame awo ayupa eliywi lya Nyambe niku libelekisa.” Jesu yo Ondota Elin̄ungwa (Mateu8.23-27; Maleka4.35-41)
8.22: Eliywaa linjili Jesu sebeli okulonga na iyetwa aye mu wato ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, “Tu lutelenyi mu linjaliya no lisa.” Cwale sebeli afuula.
8.23: Alemine okuluta ngeeso, Jesu sebeli olangana okutela ba tulo. Cwale emebo no lin̄ungwa sebeli iinguka ba lisa, mane sebeli asinga okutika ku meyi mi kame ana kwikala mu utata no kuneneba.
8.24: Aiyetwa sebeli ata kwa Jesu oka mwingula aamba nji, “Molyetu, Molyetu! kame tufa!” Mi Jesu sebeli oinguka ni ku kalimela elin̄ungwa ni mandinda, mi sebeli iimana ni kondoka tuu.
8.25: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa iyetwa aye nji, “Etumelo yenu ibine?” Mi sebeli acila ni ku komoka nuukwambisa omunjili ku munjili nji, “Anyine cwale wuyu mulume? Nji mane kame alaela emebo ni meyi, mi kame imukuteka!” Jesu yo Balisa Omulume no Mebo no Kwiiba (Mateu8.28-34; Maleka5.1-20)
8.26: Cwale Jesu na iyetwa aye sebeli aka fuweka mu naha no Magelasenesi, eyo ikubapile ni Galileya.
8.27: Cwale Jesu yosi longoka feela okuta ba likamba, sebeli okwangana ni mulume ona ku tunda mu mulenen̄i osi mebo no kwiiba, ba nako no kuleba kasi kumanganga eikumango mane kasi ku yoyanga mu ndoo, kono mu mayumbelo.
8.28: Cwale omulume woyo aba ana kumona Jesu, sebeli okuweleza ni liywi no kuneneba ni ku mukubamena balubala lwaye ni kwamba niliywi linene nji, “Iikene osaela oku tenda ni mene, Jesu Mwana Nyambe OMWAMBAKANI oli beulu? Kame niku kumbela, olese oku ni yandisa!”
8.29: Kakuli Jesu kame ana ku laela emebo no kwiiba oku tunda mwa woyo mulume. Kakuli mu tinako no kupula kame ina ku katazanga onene, mane kame ana ku babalelwangwa yo nungilwe ni tungongolo, ni yoondo ku makondo, kono kame ana kucola otungongolo, mi emebo no kwiiba sebeli imu twala mu lihalaupa.
8.30: Jesu cwale sebeli omwibanguta nji, “Tiwe anyine elitina?” Mi sebeli otambula nji, “Time empi,’ ” kakuli emebo no kupula no kwiiba kame ina ku mwingena.
8.31: Cwale emebo no kwiiba sebeli ikumbela Jesu nji alese okwilaela nji ite mu wina.
8.32: Cwale omulaka no kuneneba no angulube kame ona ku lyelanga ba lilundu, mi cwale emebo no kwiiba sebeli ikumbela Jesu nji iingene mu tingulube, sebeli oipumenena okaingenamo.
8.33: Cwale emebo no kwiiba sebeli itunda ku mulume nukaingena mu tingulube, mi omulaka sebeli witukela mu lin̄ope no lisa ni ku mina ameyi.
8.34: Cwale aanu aba ana kumona eyo ina tendahala, sebeli acila nuukabiha etaba eyo mu mulenen̄i ni mu naha.
8.35: Cwale aanu sebeli ata oka mona eyo ina tendahala, mi sebeli aiya kwa Jesu nuukawana omulume ona ku tundisiwa emebo no kwiiba yo ikalile ba makondo a Jesu, yo ku fukile yo ku ketile wino ni tingana taye, cwale sebeli acila.
8.36: Cwale awo ana ku mona eyo sebeli aambela aanu omu ana ku yandisetwa ku mebo no kwiiba nomo ana balisetwe.
8.37: Cwale aanu onje na mu manyonga no naha no Magelesani sebeli akumbela Jesu nji aasiye kakuli kame ana ku lemiwa ku kucila onene, mi sebeli oingena mu wato ni kuuka.
8.38: Omulume woyo ona ku tundisiwa emebo no kwiiba sebeli okumbela Jesu nji ate naye, Kono Jesu sebeli omulukulula nji akutele ni ku mwamba nji,
8.39: “Ouke ku mundi wowe, mi okaambe einu no kuneneba ana tende Nyambe kwa wene.” Mi woyo mulume sebeli okutela okaamba eyo inene ana tendelwe kwa Jesu mu mulenen̄i monje. Omwana Jailosi no Mukatana ni mukati ona ku Lema Jesu ku Mukanjo (Mateu9.18-26; Maleka5.21-43)
8.40: Cwale Jesu aba ana kuuka, oundi no aanu sebeli omu tambula, kakuli onje kame ana ku mu tatelela.
8.41: Cwale sebeli kwiiya omulume no litina lya Jailasi, omwendisi no ndoo no milapelo, ni ku kwela ku makondo a Jesu, mi sebeli omu kumbela nji ate ku ndoo yaye,
8.42: kakuli kame ana kwikalanga ni mwana mumweya no mukatana, osi myaka likumi ni yiili, mi kame ana kwiikala beebi ni kufa. Cwale Jesu yo seenda, aanu sebeli amuumbelela.
8.43: Cwale omukati ona ku tomanga oweeti no mweeya mu myaka likumi ni yiili, kasi ku twesahala oku balisiwa ku munu,
8.44: sebeli wiiya munyima ya Jesu, ni kulema ku mungundo no mukanjo waye, mi ababo sebeli obala ku weeti waye no mweeya.
8.45: Cwale Jesu sebeli oibanguta nji, “Anyini ona nileme?” Cwale aanu onje sebeli akana, mi Pitolosi sebeli wamba nji, “Molyange, oundi no aanu akuumbelele, mi kame aku sinanisa.”
8.46: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba nji, “Omunjili nani leme, kakuli kame ni lemuha nji amaata anjili naabu mwa mene.”
8.47: Cwale omukati abana kumona nji katwese oukushweeka, sebeli oiya kwa Jesu yo cilile, ni ku mukubamena ni kwamba balubala no aanu eso ana ku mulemena noomo ana balele muwangu-wangu.
8.48: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Mwanange, etumelo yowe naiku yoyisa. Ote mu kozo.”
8.49: Jesu yo saamba, sebeli kwiiya omulume ona ku tundelela ku ndoo no mwendisi ni kwamba nji, “Mwanowe nafu, olese oku kataza Omwiyeti.”
8.50: Kono Jesu aba ana kuyupa ngeeso, sebeli wambela Jailosi nji, “Olese ku cila, opumene feela, mi mwanowe mba yoyisiwa.”
8.51: Cwale aba ana ku keela ku ndoo, kasi ku pumenena omunu okwingena mu ndoo, konji Pitolosi, ni Jowani, ni Jakobo, sitaye ni inawaye omwanukana.
8.52: Cwale onje aanu kame anaku lilanga ni ku musilisa, kono Jesu sebeli waambela nji, “Mulese kulila, omwanukana kasifa, kono kame alanganine feela!”
8.53: Cwale onje sebeli asheka Jesu, muku limuka nji omwanukana nafu.
8.54: Jesu sebeli omulema ku lyooko ni ku mwisana nji, “Mwanukana, inguka!”
8.55: Cwale emebo yaye sebeli yukela mwa yonyene, mi ababo omwanukana sebeli oinguka, cwale Jesu sebeli olaela nji omwanukana alukisetwe esi no kulya nji alye.
8.56: Cwale ashemi aye sebeli akomoka, kono Jesu sebeli waalaelela nji alese okwambela omunu eyo ina tendahala.

9.1: Cwale sebeli oisana aiyetwa no kukwana likumi ni twiili bamweya mi sebeli waaba amaata ni tukelo beulu no mandimona onje mane ni ku balisa ameeti.
9.2: Cwale Jesu sebeli waatuma nji akaiyete eino mubuso wa Nyambe mane nuka balisa awo akola ameeti,
9.3: mi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mulese okushimba esinu sinjili ba mwendo, simba olusata, simba esipaupau, simba esinkwa, simba amali, mane mulese okushimba etihembe timbili.
9.4: Endoo yonje mwingena mi kame amitambula, mwikalemo okubitela abo samutunde mu mulenen̄i omo,
9.5: mi oko konje samwingene nji kamitambula, aba mutunda mu tolopo omo, mutotomone amaluli na kumakondo enu nji atende oupaki kwa onyene.”
9.6: Aiyetwa sebeli ata mu mindi yonje aka iyete eliywi ni kubalisa asikutoma ameeti mu ibaka yonje. Okulyangana kwa Heloda (Mateu14.1-12; Maleka6.14-29)
9.7: Cwale Heloda, omubusisi abana kuyupa eyo ina kutendahala yonje, sebeli okomoka onene kakuli anjili kame ana kwambanga nji Jowani omukolobezi nainguka kwaafu.
9.8: Anjili kame ana kwambanga nji Eliya wamonahala kale, mi anjili kame ana kwambanga nji omunjili no anuhi a Nyambe nakukale nainguka.
9.9: Heloda sebeli wamba nji, “Jowani woyo nina kupatula omutwi, kono anyine woyo niyupa eyaye?” Mi sebeli osaela okumona Jesu. Jesu yo Fepa Aanu no kukwana Eikitti Mutanu (Mateu14.13-21; Maleka6.30-44; Jowani6.1-14)
9.10: Atumiwa aba ana kuuka sebeli ambela Jesu einu yonje ana tende. Cwale sebeli washimba ni kuta noo ku mulenen̄i oisaniwa Betisaida.
9.11: Cwale aanu no kupula aba ana kuyupa ngeeso, sebeli amukon̄a mi sebeli waatambula wino ni kwamba kwa onyene eyo no mubuso wa Nyambe mane sebeli obalisa awo ana kusinga okublisiwa.
9.12: Abo eliywaa elita mu kwiika, atumiwa no kukwana elikumi na yiili sebeli aiya kwa Jesu ni kwamba nji, “Ouse aanu nji akutele mu mindi ni mwilalanda monje ili beebi nji aka kusaelele oko sakalangane neso no kulya kakuli muno tuli ni mu sibaka sikushweekile.”
9.13: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Anyi luli mwaabe eyi no kulya.” Cwale sebeli atambula nji, “Kame tuli feela ni inkwa itanu ni tindi timbili, konji aba satute nji tukaa ulele eino kulya onje.
9.14: Oko kame kuna kwikalanga alume no kukwana eikiti itanu (5;000) Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa iyetwa aye nji, “Mwambele aanu aikale banji mu ikwata akwanine eititi makumi atanu mu sikwata ni sikwata (50).”
9.15: Cwale sebeli atenda ngeeso mane ni kwikala mu ikwata ni kwikala onje banji,
9.16: cwale Jesu sebeli olonda einkwa itanu ni tindi timbili, sebeli waliketa kuwilu ni kuba etumbo mane ni kwipatola ni kwiiba kwa iyetwa aye nji atabele aanu.
9.17: Cwale onje sebeli alya ni kwikuta, mane sebeli atolabo amatanda no kukwana likumi ni twiili no ubulumusi onaku siyalako. Pitolosi yo Amba eyi ya Jesu (Mateu6.13-19; Maleka8.27-29)
9.18: Cwale Jesu yoli yomboci yolapela aiyetwa sebeli aiya kwa yonyene mi sebeli waibanguta nji, “Kandi aanu kame aamba nji time anyine?”
9.19: Mi sebeli atambula nji, “Kame aamba nji tiwe Jowani omukolobezi, aanjili nji tiwe Eliya, mi anjili kame aamba nji omunjili no anuhi naku kale nainguka.”
9.20: Cwale Jesu sebeli waibanguta nji, “Cwale anyi kame mwamba nji time anyine?” Mi Pitolosi sebeli otambula nji, “Tiwe Kilesite wa Nyambe.” Jesu yo Amba eyi no Mayando ni lifu Lyaye (Mateu16.20-28; Maleka9.1)
9.21: Kono cwale Jesu sebeli waaba emamela nji alese okwambela omunu yonje
9.22: nji, “Omwana no munu kame afanena okuyanda einu no kupula, mi akaniwe kwa kulu ni kwa kulu no apulisita mane na sikun̄ola, mi aibaiwe mane nji ba liywa no waatu aingulwe kwaafu.”
9.23: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Omunu yonje woyo osaela oku nikon̄a akutobohe yonyene mi akutweke esifapano saye mu maywaa onje cwale anikon̄e.
9.24: Abo kwa woyo osaela okuyoyisa omooyo waye mbau taukelwe, mi woyo otaukelwa omooyo waye mulibaka lyange mba yoyisiwa.
9.25: Siikene sawane omunu aba amuna elitunga lyonje, ni kutaukelwa omooyo waye simba okukomiwa?
9.26: Woyo yonje soni enene mane ni maywi ange, ni yonyene Omwana no munu mba mwenene aba saiye mu kanya yaye ni mu kanya ya sitaye neyi no mangeloi no kukena.
9.27: Kono kame ni myambela eniti luli nji kwaali anjili aimanine bano awo katamba okufa akasi mona kale omubuso wa Nyambe.” Okufutuka kwa Jesu (Mateu17.1-8; Maleka9.2-8)
9.28: Munyima no maywaa atanu naatu Jesu aba ana kumana okwamba eyi sebeli oshimba Pitolosi, Jowani ni Jakobo ni kuta noo ba lilundu okalapela.
9.29: Jesu yo lapela, sebeli omonahala olutu ni ikumango yaye okufutuka mane sebeli itenda eyi no likena too onene.
9.30: Ababo sebeli kumonahala alume ayiili aambola ni Jesu. Awo neli Mushe ni Eliya
9.31: awo ana kumonahala mu kanya aamba eyi no kuta kwaye eyo ana kufanena oka manenena ku Jelusalema.
9.32: Cwale Pitolosi nawo ana kwikala noo kame nalangananga onene ba tolo, cwale aba ana kwinguka sebeli amona ekanya ya Jesu na lume ayiili awo ana kwimananga naye.
9.33: Cwale alume aba ana kusiya Jesu, Pitolosi sebeli wamba kwa Jesu nji, “Molyange, nikwakuwaba ngasibine nji twikale feela bano! Tuyake eikun̄wa yaatu, esinjili sitende sowe, esinjili sa Mushe mane esinjili sitende sa Eliya.” Mukwalimuka eso ana kwamba.
9.34: Abo yo amba eyo, sebeli kwiiya elikumbi ni kwafuka, mi sebeli acila aba ana kufukiwa ku likumbi.
9.35: Cwale eliywi sebeli litunda mu likumbi eli lyamba nji, “Wuyu ya Mwanange woyo ni nakete, mumuyupe!”
9.36: Cwale eliywi aba lina kumana okwamba, Jesu sebeli okumona nji kame ali yomboci. Aiyetwa sebeli aondoka feela nambulwa okwambela omunu kweyi ana mono. Jesu yo Balisa Ondumbana no Mebo no Kwiiba (Mateu17.14-18; Maleka9.14-27)
9.37: Eliywaa linaku tatamako Jesu na iyetwa aatu aba ana kushetumuka okutunda ba lilundu, cwale aanu no kupula sebeli akuwana ni Jesu.
9.38: Cwale komumone, omulume sebeli okuwa okutunda mwaanu no kupula nji, “Mwiyeti! Kame ni kukumbela nji oni monene mwanange, kakuli yomwanange nili naye nisepile yomboci!
9.39: Cwale komumone emebo no kwiiba kame imulemanga muwanguwangu ni kulila onene ni kumoowa okutwala abo sakatundele olufulo ku kanwa mane ni kumukwiseta banji yonyakola eyisi mulemine.
9.40: Cwale kame nina kumbele aiyetwa owe nji aitundise kono nakwangwa.”
9.41: Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Anyi aanu nakwapumena ni lusika nakwayupa! Ba nako no kukuma babine saniikale naanyi? Ba nako no kukuma babine sani miiyete? Kolite mwanowe kuno.”
9.42: Ababo ondumbana yokeyile, emebo no kwiba sebeli ingena mwayonyene okumulyanganisa. Kono Jesu sebeli olaela emebo no kwiiba, sebeli obalisa ondumbana ni kumuba kwa sitaye.
9.43: Mi onje kame ana kukomoka amaata no kuneneba a Nyambe. Jesu yo Amba kame eyi no Lifu Lyaye (Mateu17.22-23; Maleka9.30-32) Kono abo aanu asikomokile kweyo yonje anatende, sebeli wamba kwa iyetwa aye nji,
9.44: “Muteetete wino ku maywi awo sanambe bano, Omwana no munu mbabeekiwa mu maoko no aanu.
9.45: Kono kasi kuyupisisa omwambelo ou, kakuli kame ona kushwekiwa kwa onyene, nji alese okuyupisisa wino mi kame ana kucilanga okumwibanguta etaluso no mwambelo owo. Anyine No Kuneneba Onene? (Mateu18.1-5; Maleka9.33-37)
9.46: Cwale etin̄ananyi sebeli tiinguka mukaci koo nji anyine no kuneneba mukaci koo.
9.47: Kono Jesu aba ana kumona emihupulo eli mu micima yoo, sebeli oshimba omwanuke ni kumwimeka kunyonga yaye,
9.48: cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Woyo yonje sotambula wuyu mwanuke mu litina lyange natambula mene, mi woyo yonje sotambula mene natambula woyo ona nitumu. Mi cwale woyo no mamaneneno mukaci kenu yo munene kwaanyi.” Omunu yonje nji Kakulwisi kame Ali ni Wene (Maleka9.39-40)
9.49: Jowani sebeli otambula nji, “Molyange, natumono omulume woyo otundisa amandimona mu litina lyowe natu mukanisa, kakuli kasa wetu.
9.50: Kono cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Mulese okumu kanisa kakuli nji omunu kakulwisi woyo kame ali kwa wene.”
9.51: Cwale amaywaa aba ana kusheeteta abeebi nji atambuliwe ku wilu, sebeli okutukiseta okuta ku Jelusalema.
9.52: Cwale sebeli otuma atumiwa balubala mu mundi wisaniwa nji Samalitani nji aka mulukisete einu.
9.53: Kono aanu kasiku mutambula kakuli olubala lwaye kame luna kulukisetwa okuta ku Jelusalema.
9.54: Mi cwale aiyetwa aye Jakobo ni Jowani aba ana kumona ngeeso, sebeli aamba nji, “Mbumu, kame usinga nji aci tukumbele omulilo okutunda ku wilu nji wiiye mukwa cin̄a?
9.55: Kono Jesu sebeli ofutuka ni kwakalimela.
9.56: Cwale sebeli aekeza okuta mu mundi munjili. Awo Afanena Okutenda Akon̄eleli a Jesu (Mateu8.19-22)
9.57: Cwale akatile ngeseo mu mweendo woo, omulume munjili sebeli wamba kwa Jesu nji, “Kame sani kukon̄e oko konje soote.”
9.58: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Aluwawa kame akwite emina, mi otuyunyi oto tutuka mu mebo kame tukwite eiyaleto, kono Omwana no munu kakwite naba no kusama omutwi waye.”
9.59: Ku munjili sebeli wamba nji, “Onikon̄e.” Kono sebeli wamba nji, “Mbumu oweli nite nika pumbeke sitange.”
9.60: Cwale Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Mulesele aafu apumbeke aafu oo, cwale kono wene ote oka iyete eyi no mubuso wa Nyambe.”
9.61: Kame omunjili kwa onyene sebeli wambela Jesu nji, “Mbi kukon̄o, kono oweli nite nikalaane asi ndoo yange.”
9.62: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Kakwisa omunu olemine ku sikekele ni kwaliketa kunyima woyo kafanene mu mubuso wa Nyambe.”

10.1: Munyima noeyi, Ombumu sebeli oketa ano kukwana makumi atanu nayili naanu ayiili, mane ni kwatuma balubala lwaye ayiili mu milenen̄i yonje ni mu sibaka eso afanena yonyene okuta.
10.2: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Kame kuli ekutulo inene kono asi kuyangula acana, mulapele nji Ombumu no kuyangula atume asikuyangula mu iyangulo yaye.
10.3: Mute cwale! Komumone kame ni mituma kanyi emikoko mukaci no andiwi.
10.4: Mulese okushimba esikwama no mali, simba esipaupau, simba etinjatangwa mi mulese kwimana nji mukeete omunu mu ndila.
10.5: Endoo samwingene yonje, oweli mwambe nji, ‘Ekozo iikale mu ndoo muno.’
10.6: Cwale nji omunu woyo osinga ekozo mwaali mwa onyene cwale ekozo yenu mbaiikala noo, kono nji kasamo ekozo yenu mbayuuku kwaanyi.
10.7: Cwale mwikale mu ndoo eyo mulye mane ni kunwa eyo samubiwe kakuli omubeleki kame afanena okubiwa okutenikiwa kwaye, mulese kuta endoo ni ndoo.
10.8: Aba mwingena mu tolopo mi kame amitambula, mulye eso samubiwe,
10.9: mubalise asikutoma omo mu ndoo mi mwambe kwa onyene nji, ‘ Omubuso wa Nyambe nawiyi abeebi kwaanyi.’
10.10: Kono aba mwingena mu tolopo nji kamitambula, mute mu mikwakwa yayo mi mwambe nji,
10.11: ‘Simba eliluli na mu tolopo yenu elyo lina kakatele ku tinjatangwa tetu, kame tumi totomonena lyo, kono cwale mulimuke nji omubuso wa Nyambe nawiyi abeebi!’
10.12: Kame nimyambela nji, ba liywaa no katulo, Nyambe mba monisa esishemo ku mulenen̄i no Sodoma okubita etolopo iya!
10.13: Oumai niwenu Asikolazini! Oumai niwenu kame asi Besesaida! Abo kambe etimakazo tina kutendiwa mwaanyi kambe nati kutendiwa mu Tile ni Sidoni, kambe naakubaka kale mane ni kukumanga eikumango no masaka ni kulangana ba mute!
10.14: Kono Nyambe mba monisa esishemo onene mu katulo no Tile ni Sidoni okubita aanyi.
10.15: Mane ni wene Kapenauma kame solumbekwe ku wilu? mbu kwisetwe banji mu lyangalilo.
10.16: “Cwale omunu yonje woyo omiyupa kame ayupa mene, mi kame woyo omikana kame akana mene, mi woyo okana mene kame akana ni woyo ona nitumu.” Okuuka kwawo no kukwana Makumi Atanu na Yiili naanu Ayiili (72)
10.17: Ano kukwana makumi atanu na yiili naanu ayiili sebeli akauka awabelelwe onene, ni kwambela Jesu nji, “Mbumu, simba amadimona kame atuyupa aba twa kalimela mu litina lyowe!”
10.18: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Kame nina mono Satani yokwa okutunda ku wilu kanyi olumonyi no mbula.
10.19: Komumone! Kame nina mibi amaata no kwenda ba tinyoka ni tubanse, mane ni maata onje beulu no ila, mi cwale kakwisa eso sasi milemeke.
10.20: Kono simba kuli ngeeso mulese kuwabelelwa mwesi nji abo emebo kame imiyupa, kono muwabelelwe nji amatina enu nan̄oliwa mu wilu.” Jesu yo Wabelelwa (Mateu11.25-27; 13.16; 17)
10.21: Mu hola eyeyo luli Jesu sebeli owabelelwa mu Mebo No Kukena ni kwamba nji, “Kame ni kutumela kwa wene Sitange, Ombumu no liwilu ni litunga, kakuli namushweeke eyi inu kwawo no kushangama na sikukwiyeta mi namwi shootwele anuke acana. Eee, Sitange, kakuli mona kusingela nji kutendahalele.
10.22: “Einu yonje nai kubiwa kwa mene okutunda kwa Sitange. Mi kakwisa woyo olimukile Omwana konji Sitaye, simba woyo olimukile Sitaye konji Omwana, simba awo anakete Omwana okwaa shotwela Sitaye.”
10.23: Cwale Jesu sebeli osiulukela kwa iyetwa aye kunyonga ni kwamba nji, “Embuyoti niyawo amiyo awo amona eyi mumona!
10.24: Kono kame nimyambela nji, Anuhi no kupula na mbumu nashukele okumona eyi mumona, kono kasiimona, mane ni kuyupa eyi muyupa, kono kasiiyupa. Enguli no Musamaliya no Musa
10.25: Cwale komumone! omwiyeti no mulawo sebeli oimana ni kweteka okulema Jesu mukwamba nji, “Mwiyeti,” ngasibine sanitende nji nikaingene mu mooyo no kwaabwa?
10.26: Cwale Jesu sebeli omutambula nji, “Siikene sin̄olilwe mu mulawo? Ngasibine mubalanga?”
10.27: Cwale sebeli otambula nji, “Osinge Mbumu, Nyambe wowe ni mucima wowe wonje, ni mooyo wowe wonje, ni maata owe onje, ni tingana towe tonje, mi osinge awo oyakile noo kanyi omo okusingela wenyene.”
10.28: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Nwaamba eniti,” “Otende ngeeso mi mbuyoyo.”
10.29: Kono yonyene omulume woyo nakushukela oukukenisa yonyene sebeli wambela Jesu nji, “Anyine woyo ni yakile naye kunyonga?”
10.30: Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Omulume kame ana kuta ku Jeliko okutunda ku Jelusalema, mi ababo sebeli okuwana na mbuyi sebeli amubyangula eikumango ni kumufula mane sebeli akutela okumusiya yo langanine mu mandingwe no lifu.
10.31: Cwale omupulisita sebeli obita endila eyo, mi aba naku mumona sebeli oyauka ni kumusiya.
10.32: Mu mukwa mumweya owo, omulebi ni yonyene sebeli obita endila eyo mi sebeli omumona mi ni yonyene sebeli oyauka ni kumubitelela.
10.33: Kono Omusamaliya yo enda mu ndila eyo sebeli okeela abo ana kwikala omulume woyo ona kulemekiwa, aba ana kumumona omo aikalele, sebeli omufela amakeke.
10.34: Seli osheeteta kwa yonyene ni kwitela amaati ni waine ba itombo yaye mane ni kunungabo, mi sebeli omubeeka ba mbongolo yaye mane ni kumutwala ku ndoo no angenda oko ano kamu babalela.
10.35: Cwale eliywaa lina kutatamako sebeli olita amali no muwayawaya no silibela, ni kwaaba kwa babaleli ni kwamba nji, ‘Mubabalele wuyu munu, mi mbi miteneke kweyo samu sinyehelwe aba saniuke oku nikatile.’ ”
10.36: Cwale Jesu sebeli omana mukwamba nji, “Anyine mu waatu woo, woyo ona monisa nji mwabaye woyo mulume onaku fuliwa kwa mbuyi?”
10.37: Omwiyeti no mulawo sebeli otambula nji, “Woyo ona monisa amakeke kwa yonyene.” mi Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Ote mi okatende ngeeso.” Jesu yo Singula Maleta ni Maliya
10.38: Cwale ababo Jesu na iyetwa aye aba ana kutaanga mu ndila yoo, sebeli aingena mu mundi omunjili mi omukati oisaniwa Maleta sebeli omutambula mu ndoo yaye.
10.39: Cwale kame ana kwikalanga ni minaye no litina lya Maliya woyo ona kwikala ku makondo a Mbumu okuteeteta ku kutazo yaye.
10.40: Kono Maleta yonyene kame ana kupatehanga okulukisa eyi no kulya, cwale sebeli ota kwa Jesu oka mwambela nji, “Mbumu, kumwine nji Maliya nanisiyi memboci okulukisa eyi no kulya? Omwambele nji aiye anituse!”
10.41: Kono Ombumu sebeli omutambula nji, “Maleta, Maleta! Kame unyolelwe ni kushupiwa kwiinu no kupula,
10.42: esinu simweya kame sisaeliwa. Maliya nakete esinu simweya no kuwaba eso kasitamba kubyanguliwa kwa yonyene.”

11.1: Kame ana kulapelelanga mu sibaka sinjili, mi aba ana kumana, omunjili no aiyetwa aye sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Mbumu, otwiyete okulapela kanyi Jowani aba ana kwiyeta aiyetwa aye.”
11.2: Cwale Jesu sebeli waambela nji, “Aba mulapela, mwambe nji, ‘Sitetu, elitina lyowe liikale eli no kukena, kwiiye omubuso wowe.
11.3: Otube balelo esilyanu setu omo otubelanga mu liywaa ni liywaa.
11.4: Otu lemene emibonda yetu kanyi omo tulemenanga akwetu awo atu foseza. Ole kutu leselela okwingena mu miliko.’ ”
11.5: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Anyine kwaanyi woyo otwesa okuta kwa mulikani waye bakaci no usiku nuka mwambela nji, ‘Mulikani, onibeko einkwa yaatu.
11.6: Omulikani wange naiyi mi sikwite esi no kumuyumbula.
11.7: Cwale kame satambule yoli mukaci nji, ‘Ole kunikataza esaandi nasi yatiliwa kale, mene na naange twalangana kale mi sitwese okwinguka okukuba eso osaela.’
11.8: Kame nimyambela nji, simba nji katamba okwiinguka okumuba eso asaela kakuli mulikani waye, kono mbainguka mane nikukuba eyo asaela yonje kakuli kaene okutwalelela okukumbela.
11.9: Cwale kame nimyambela nji, mukumbele mi mba mubiwi, musaele mi mba muwana, mungongote mi mba muyatulelwa.
11.10: Kwa woyo yonje okumbela mba biwi, woyo osaela mbawana mi woyo ongongota mba yatulelwa.
11.11: Anyine omushemi mukaci kenu, nji mwanaye kame akumbela ondi, kana kame atwesa okumuba enyoka okubita ondi?
11.12: Simba nji kame akumbela eliki kame otwesa okumuba esoowa?
11.13: Cwale nji anyi no kwiiba mulimukile okuba anenu eyi no kuwaba aba amikumbela, cwale mbakwikala ngasibine kwa Sitetu nakuwilu kwawo amukumbela Emebo No Kukena!” Jesu ni Beluzibule (Mateu12.22-30; Maleka3.20-27)
11.14: Cwale Jesu kame ana kutundisanga esidimona no umumu, cwale esindimona aba sina kutunda, omulume no simumu sebeli otateka okwamba mi aanu sebeli akomoka,
11.15: kono aanu anjili sebeli aamba nji, “Kame atundisa amadimona mulibaka lya Beluzibule, omukulu no madimona.”
11.16: Cwale anjili sebeli amweteka muku kumbela esisupo okutunda kuwilu.
11.17: Kono Jesu sebeli olimuka eyo ana nahananga, sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Omubuso wonje owo okutabile wonyene, kame osinyeha, mi nji endoo kame ikutaba bakaci kame ikwa.
11.18: Mi cwale nji Satani kame akutabile yonyene, ngasibine sawongolele omubuso waye? Anyi kame mwamba nji kame nitundisa amadimona mulibaka lya Beluzibule.
11.19: Mi nji kame nitundisa amadimona mulibaka lya Beuzibule, cwale anenu kame tundisanga amadimona mulibaka lyaanyine? Abo cwale mbatende aatuli enu.
11.20: Kono nji ni mulibaka no munwe wa Nyambe aba nitundisa amadimona, cwale omubuso wa Nyambe nawiyi kwaanyi.
11.21: Cwale omulume no koongola okutukisete okumamela endoo yaye, eibyana yaye mbaikala mu kozo.
11.22: Kono cwale nji omulume no koongola okumubita aba aiya niku mukoma, kame atundisa eilwiso yaye eyo asepile ni kutaba oufumu waye.
11.23: “Woyo kasa kwa mene kame anilwisa, mi nji omunu kakuwana ni mene kame ashandola. Okuuka kwa Mebo no Kwiiba (Mateu12.43-45)
11.24: “Cwale emebo no kwakena aba ina tundu ku munu, kame ibita mu ibaka nambulwa meyi okusaela esibaka no kwikala. Nji kaiwana cwale kame yamba nji, ‘Mbiuku mu ndoo yange omo nina tundu ni kayoyemo.’
11.25: Cwale aba iiya sebeli iwana nji nai fiyeliwa ni kubeeka einu wino.
11.26: Cwale kame ita okashimba kame injili no kwiiba okubita ni yonyene no kukwana itanu ni yiili, mi kame iiya ni kuyoya mo. Cwale aba iyoya mo yonje omwikalelo wa woyo munu kame sawiibe onene okubita ba weli.” Okuwabelelwa no niti
11.27: Jesu aba ana kwambanga ngeeso, omukati sebeli otumuka mukaci no aanu yokuweleza ni liywi no kuneneba ni kwamba nji, “Embuyoti niya lipumo elyo linaku kuleya mane ni maele owo ona kuyamwa!”
11.28: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba nji, “Embuyoti cwale niyawo ayupa eliywi lya Nyambe ni kuliteula!” Oku Kumbela Emakazo (Mateu12.38-42)
11.29: Cwale oundi no aanu aba ona kwekezeha, sebeli otateka okwamba nji, “Olusika olu nilwa kwiiba, kame akumbele emakazo kono kakwisa emakazo saibiwe kwa onyene konji feela emakazo ya Jonasi.
11.30: Kanyi Jona omo ana kutendela emakazo kwaanu a Nenibe, cwale ni Mwana no munu mba tende emakazo ku lusika olu.
11.31: Ombumu no mukati naku mutulo mba imana ba katulo na lume no lusika olu nik wanyaza, kakuli kame ana kutunda ku mamaneneno no litunga mukuteeteta okushangama kwa Solomoni, mi komumone esinjili no kubitelela Solomoni sino sokame.
11.32: Alume no Nenibe mba inguka ba katulo ni lusika olu ni kulunyaza, kakuli nakubaka ba kutazo ya Jonasi, mi cwale komumone esinu no kuneneba okubitelela Jona sino sokame. Elisebeli no lutu (Mateu5.15; 6.22-23)
11.33: “Kakwisa omunu woyo otumbula elambi ni kwibeeka munji no tafule simba okwishweeka, kono kame aibeeka beulu nji cwale awo aingena amone eliseli.
11.34: Amiyo enu eliseli no lutu lwenu, cwale amiyo enu nji kame amona wino, olutu lwenu lonje kame lwiyalile eliseli kono cwale nji amiyo enu kamono wino, olutu lwenu kame lwiyalile ouwi.
11.35: Cwalehe mumamele nji eliseli lyenu lilese okufutuka ouwi.
11.36: Nji cwale olutu lwenu lonje kame lwiyalile eliseli mi kalukwite esilama no uwi, kame salubenye kanyi abo elambi aba iba eliseli.” Jesu yo Kandimeka Afalisi na Iyeti no Mulawo (Mateu23.1-36; Maleka12.38-40)
11.37: Ababo yo sambola, Omulume no Mufalisi sebeli omukumbela nji alye naye, abo sebeli oingena nukekala ku tafule.
11.38: Omufalisi sebeli okomoka onene okumona nji Jesu kasiku kuyowa ku makaa aye yokasilya kale.
11.39: Abo Ombumu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Cwale bano, anyi Afalisi kame muyowisa bandee no komoki yenu ni siwana, kono mukaci kenu kame kwiyalile ouyi ni ufokoli.
11.40: Anyi aelo! Kasa nji Nyambe woyo ona kuumba bandee yona kutenda ni mukaci kame?
11.41: Kono mube awo ashebile eyo inu ili mukaci, cwale komumone, einu yonje yakukena kwaanyi.
