11.42: “Kono oumai niwenu Afalisi! Kakuli kame muba Nyambe esino likumi eso no Minta ni Lue ni miloho yonye ni kusheununa eniti ni lilato lya Nyambe eyi yamuna kufanena okutenda okuulwile okusheununa akwenu.
11.43: Oumai ni wenu Afalisi! Kakuli kame musinga eipula no utokwa mu tindoo no milapelo mane ni kuba elikute mu ibaka no misika.
11.44: Oumai ni wenu! Kakuli kame mukufekile kanyi amayumbelo no kwamoniwa mi aanu kame aenda beulu wawo nambulwa kulimukiwa.
11.45: Omunjili no mwimaneni no mulawo sebeli otambula nji, “Mwiyeti, mu kwamba ngeeso kame otwangula kame!”
11.46: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba nji, “Oumayi ni wenu aimaneni no mulawo! Kakuli kame mushimbisa aanu ashimbo no kulema kono aanyi kame mukwangwa okushimba emishimbo yenu simba ni minwe.
11.47: Oumai ni wenu! Kakuli kame muyaka amayumbelo no anuhi a Nyambe awo ana kwibaiwa kwa njekulyenu.
11.48: Abo kame muli apaki naikaleli ku tikezo ta njekulyenu, kakuli naakwaibaa mi anyi kame muyaka amayumbelo oo.
11.49: Abo cwale kame okushangama kwa Nyambe kame kwamba nji, ‘Mbi atumene anuhi ni atumiwa, anjili kwa onyene mbaa ibaa mane ni kwayandisa.’
11.50: Abo cwale olusika olu mba lubalelwe emibonda no ashemi oo no kwibaa anuhi okutunda ku matatekelo no litunga,
11.51: okutunda ku unyinga wa Abele okutwala ku unyinga wa Zakaliya, woyo ona kwibaelwa mukaci no aletale ni sibaka no kukena. Eee kame nimyambela nji olusika olu mba lubalelwe emibonda eyi yonje.
11.52: “Oumai ni wenu aimaneni no mulawo kakuli namushimbi etinotolo no tingana. Kamusi kwingenamo kono kame muna kukwangwesa awo ana kusinga okwingenamo!”
11.53: Abo Jesu yositunda abo, aiyeti no mulawo na Falisi sebeli amukandimeka ni kumutinisa nji aambe einu no kupula,
11.54: okumu tatelela nji aleme einu saambe.

12.1: Mu nako icana abo aanu no kukwana eikiti no lule aba anoukuwana bamweya akulyatangela omunjili ku munjili, Jesu sebeli otateka okwamba kwa iyetwa aye oweli nji, “Mumamele omumena no Afalisi, owo oli asikukuba.
12.2: Kakwisa eso sifukilwe eso sasiulwe okumonahala, simba eso sishweekilwe sasiulwe okulimukiwa.
12.3: Cwalehe eso sonje munaamba mu uwi mba siyupiwa mu liseli, mane neso muna obo ku kuuwi mu musiyo mba sambiwa beulu no ndoo. Anyine otwesiwa Okuciliwa (Mateu10.28-31)
12.4: “Abaange kame nimyambela nji, mulese okucila woyo oibaa olutu, kono munyima katwese okutenda esinjili kame.
12.5: Kono mbi milemusa woyo mufanena okucila. Mucile woyo munyima no kwibaa kakuli kame akwite amaata no kumi kondela mu lyangalilo. Eee kame ni myambela nji mumucile!
12.6: Kana kasa nji otutaha atanu kame tuuliwa etipene timbili? Mi kakwisa simba kamweya ako katwesiwa okupulamiwa kwa Nyambe.
12.7: Ngasibine cwale nji simba etin̄uki tenu naku mutwi wenu tonje titwesiwa okubaiwa. Cwale mulese kucila, anyi kame muli ano utokwa onene okubita otutaha no kupula. Okupumena ni Kukana Kilesite (Mateu10.32-33; 12.32; 10.19-20)
12.8: Cwale kame nimyambela nji, omunu yonje woyo sotambula mene balubala no aanu, Omwana no munu niyonyene mbaka mutambula balubala no mangeloi a Nyambe.
12.9: Kono omunu yonje oni kana balubala no aanu, mbaka kaniwa niyonyene balubala no mangeloi a Nyambe.
12.10: Mi omunu yonje woyo wamba eliywi okulwisa Omwana no munu mba lemenwe, kono woyo so nyefula ba Mebo No Kukena katamba kulemenwa.
12.11: “Cwale aba amilita balubala no tindoo no milapelo, simba kwabusisi ni kwasi milawo, mulese kubilaela kweso sa mutambule simba eso samwambe.
12.12: Kakuli Emebo No Kukena mbai miiyete eyo mufanena okwamba ba nako eyeyo.” Enguli no Mufumi no Mwelo
12.13: Omunjili kwawo no kupula sebeli wamba kwa Jesu nji, “Mwiyeti, wambele mukulwange nji tukutabele oufumu ana kusiya ashemi etu.”
12.14: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Mulume, anyine ona nitende omwatuli simba omutabi mwaanyi?”
12.15: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene onje nji, “Mutokomele mi mukubabalele mu titakazo no ufumu kakuli omooyo no munu aukutingile feela ba sifumu saye.”
12.16: Cwale sebeli waambela enguli nji, “Omumbu no mulume no kufuma kame ona kumulitela esifumu no kupula.
12.17: Mi sebeli onahana yonyene nji, ‘Cwale iikene sani tende, kakuli sikwite omo no kutewela etimbuto tange?
12.18: Cwale sebeli wamba nji, ‘Kame sani shandole eishete yange ni kuyaka eyino kuneneba mane nibeekemo embuto ni ibyana yange.
12.19: Mi mbi aamba ku Mooyo wange nji, mooyo, kame ukwite oufumu no kupula ubeekelwe ba myaka no kupula, okukete mu mooyo, olye, onwe mi owabelelwe!’
12.20: Kono Nyambe sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Wene omwelo! Ouno ousiku omooyo wowe mba utundisiwamo mwa wene. Cwale eyo ona kutukisete yaanyine?’ ”
12.21: Cwale kame kukufekile kanyi omunu woyo oli ni ufumu waye , kono cwale kasifuma ba miyo a Nyambe. Okusepa mwa Nyambe (Mateu6.25-34)
12.22: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa iyetwa aye nji, “Cwalehe kame nimyambela nji mulese kubilaela kweyi no mooyo wenu, eso sa mulye simba olutu lwenu eso samukumange.
12.23: Kakuli omooyo niwa utokwa okubita esilya, mane ni lutu nilwa utokwa okubita eikumango.
12.24: Kamumone aman̄walala, kakunu mane ni kuyangula, kakwite endoo noku tewela simba esishete, kono cwale Nyambe kame aababalela. Cwale anyi kame muli ano utokwa okubita otuyunyi!
12.25: Cwale anyine mwaanyi mukubilaela woyo otwesa okwekeza ku nako yaye no kuyoya?
12.26: Nji cwale kutwese okutenda ngeeso kusinu simba sinyonyo, iikene aba obilaela kwiinu yonje?
12.27: Komumone amapalisa omo akulela, katingi owanda simba okutenda eikumango. Kono cwale kame nimyambela, simba Solomoni mu kanya yaye yonje kasiku kufuka kanyi imweya no tipalisa eti.
12.28: Kono nji cwale Nyambe kame afuka omoopu owo uyoya mu litema balelo mi byuunda kame uyumbeliwa mu mulilo okuucin̄a, cwale anyi tunjinga samifuke. Anyi alume no tumelo icana!
12.29: “Cwale mulese kusaela eyi samulye neyi samunwe simba okubilaela mu minahano.
12.30: Kakuli aanu onje namu litunga kame asaelanga einu eyi, mi Sitenu kame alimukile nji kame mwisaela.
12.31: Kono musaele oweli Omubuso waye mi cwale einu yonje eyi mba itende yenu. Oufumu na Kuwilu (Mateu6.19-21)
12.32: “Anyi omutapi mucana, mulese kucila, kakuli Sitenu naku wilu kame awabelelwe okumiba Omubuso.
12.33: Muulise oufumu wenu wonje mi mutabele nawo ashebile, mi mukuunganyekele oufumu owo nakwa kulubala, ni ufumu naku wilu owo nakwa kwangwa, oko kakwisa ombuyi so wiita mane kakwisa ni munu sou sinya.
12.34: Kakuli oko kuli oufumu wowe ni mucima wowe kooli. Abika no Kutatelela
12.36: Cwale mufeke kanyi alume atatelele omolyoo okutunda ku mukiti no likwala. Nji cwale atwese oku muyatulwela aba saiiye mukungongota.
12.37: Embuyoti niyawo abika sawaniwe kwa molyoo atona aba saiiye. Niti luli kame nimyambela nji, mba kunungu ni kwaikata ba tafule mane mbaiyi kwa onyene mukwabelekela.
12.38: Nji aba aiya akano wiili simba aka no waatu nikwawana asitona ngeeso, embuyoti niyoo awo abika!
12.39: Kono mulimuke eyi, kambe omunya ndoo nakulimuka enako ana kwiiya ombuyi, kambe kasi kusiya endoo yaye nji aitemo.
12.40: Naanyi mutatelele ngeeso kakuli Omwana no munu kame akeile mu nako no kwalimikiwa.” Omubika no Kusepahala simba no Kwasepahala (Mateu24.45-51)
12.41: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli oibanguta nji, “Mbumu, enguli eyi kame oyambela aci nji kwanu onje?”
12.42: Cwale Ombumu sebeli wamba nji, “Anyine cwale omubika no kusepahala ni kushangama woyo ombumu waye mbamubeeke ba ndoo yaye ni kumuba esemba saye no ilya ba nako no kufanena.
12.43: Embuyoti niya woyo omubika nji ombumu waye aba sauke mba muwana yotenda eyo ana ku musiyele nji atende.
12.44: Niti luli kame nimyambela nji, ombumu mba mubeeke okumamela esifumu saye sonje.
12.45: Kono cwale nji omubika woyo amba yonyene nji omolyange naliyehe okwiiya, ni kutateka okufula abika no alume naakati ni kulya ni kunwa mane ni kukoliwa,
12.46: cwale molyaye aba saiye ba liywaa elyo no kwalimukiwa nji kame aiya ba nako nokwa limukiwa kame samube omubonda bamweya nawo no kwasepahala.
12.47: Cwale omubika woyo ona kulimuka eso asaela molyaye, kono kasiku tukiseta mane nikutenda okukumanena nomo asingela molyaye mba shapiwa onene.
12.48: Kono woyo omubika ona kuulwa okulimuka kono sebeli otenda mukucila okufuliwa kame safuliwe kanyonyo. Omunu yonje ona biwi onene kwa yonyene mbaku saeliwa onene kwa yonyene. Cwale woyo ona siyeliwa einu no kupula kame saku saeliwe onene kwa yonyene. Jesu Yonaliti Etifapahano (Mateu10.34-36)
12.49: “Kame nineyi muku beeka omulilo ba litunga, cwale iikene nisi saela kame omulilo owatumbuka kale!
12.50: Kame nili ni kolobezo eyo nifanena okukolobezwa nayo, cwale kame nishukelwe nji itendahale!
12.51: Kame muyambuta nji kame nineyi okulita ekozo bano ba litunga? Kokuulwa, kasa ekozo kono etifapahano.
12.52: Kakuli okutunda bano mu ndoo imweya kame sakutabe atanu, aatu kame salwise ayiili mane ayiili kame salwise aatu.
12.53: Kame sakwikale oukutaba omushemi no mulume mba kulwisa ni mwanaye no ndumbana mane omushemi no mukati mba kulwisi ni mwanaye no mukatana, onjemunwa no mukati mba kulwisi ni njemunwaye no mukati.” Okuyupisisa Enako (Mateu16.2-3)
12.54: Jesu sebeli wamba kame kwaanu no kupula nji, “Aba mumona elikumbi eliyaluka okutunda mu wiko, mwambe bamweya nji ombula mbaloko, mi kame kutendahala ngeeso.
12.55: Cwale aba mumona emebo namu mbowela aba ifuka, kame mwambanga nji mbakwikala okwenya onene, mi kame kutendahala ngeeso.
12.56: Anyi asikukuba! kame mutwesa okutoloka omo limonahalela elitunga ni liwilu, kono cwale iikene aba kamwatwese okutoloka eyi itendahala ba nako ino? Mukuuse nawo Amilwisa (Mateu5.25-26)
12.57: “Cwale iikene aba mukwangwa oukuketa mwenyene okutenda eino kuluka?
12.58: Nji kame mukutwala ku kuta ni woyo ona foseze balubala no mwatuli, mweteke oukweleza mwenyene mu ndila yokasiku kutwala kale baubala no mwatuli mi omwatuli mba kubeeke mu maata no mubeleki no muuso mi omubeleki no muuso kame sakutwale ku tolongo.
12.59: Kame nikwambela nji kutamba kutunda mo konji aba sotenekelele omubonda no mamaneneno.”

13.1: Ba nako eyo kame kuna kwikalanga aanu awo ana kwambela Jesu eyi no Magalileya awo ounyinga woo Piloto kame ana kuwaneka ni matabelo.
13.2: Cwale Jesu sebeli watambula nji, “Anyi kame munahana nji Amangalileya aa ana kutenda esibi esinene okubita Amangalileya onje, mulibaka lya eyo ina kutendahala kwa onyene?
13.3: Kame ni myambela nji, kokuulwa, kono konji aba samubake, monje mba mufi kanyi onyene omo ana kufela.
13.4: Simba aanu awo no kukwana likumi ni atanu ni twaatu (18) na mu Siloamu ana kukweliwa ku tawala ni kwaaibaa, kame munahana nji onyene ni asikutenda ouyi no kuneneba okubita awo ana kuyoya mu Jelusalema?
13.5: Kame nimyambela nji kokuulwa, kono konji aba sa mubake nji kasa ngeseo mba mufi moonje kanyi onyene.” Enguli no Sitondo no Feiga esi no Kwabeeka Embuya.
13.6: Cwale Jesu sebeli waambela enguli eyi nji, “Omulume kame ana kwikalanga ni sitondo no feiga eso ana kukuna mu litema lyaye, cwale sebeli ota nji aka shimbeko eilya kono kasi ukawanako simba simweya.
13.7: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa asikubabalela elitema nji, ‘Esitondo esi sebeli myaka yaatu me niiya muku saelako eilya, kono Siwanako cwale bano musiteme feela! Iikene aba sikutusisa feela omumbu?’
13.8: Cwale osikubabalela elitema sebeli omutambula nji, ‘Musisiye feela mu mwaka uno mumweya nji nitomboleko nji mane ni beekeko omununo,
13.9: Mi cwale nji mbasibeeke embuya omwaka wiiya kwakuwaba, kono cwale nji kasitamba kubeeka okubinda satu sipatule.’ ” Jesu Yobalisa Omukati no Siyanga ba Liywaa no Pumulo
13.10: Cwale Jesu kame ana kwiyetanga mu ndoo injili no milapelo ba liywaa no Pumulo.
13.11: Mukaci kame kuna kwikalanga omukati no siyanga ba myaka no kukwana likumi ni atanu ni twaatu (18), kame anaku kupunganga mane kasi kutwesanga okooloka.
13.12: Cwale Jesu aba ana kumumona sebeli omwisana ni kwamba kwa yonyene nji, “Mukati, nulukululwa ku weeti wowe!”
13.13: Cwale Jesu sebeli obeeka amaoko aye beulu no mukati, mi ababo sebeli ooloka mane sebeli oyeema Nyambe.
13.14: Kono omubusisi no ndoo no milapelo sebeli otina onene kakuli Jesu nakubalisa omunu ba liywaa no Pumulo, mi sebeli wamba kwaanu nji, “Kame tuli ni maywaa atanu ni kamweya (6) awo ana pumenenwe okutenda emisebezi, cwale mwiiye mu maywaa awo nji mubalisiwe, cwale kasa ba liywaa no Pumulo!”
13.15: Cwale Ombumu sebeli omutambula nji, “Anyi asikukuba! Kana omunjili kwaanyi nji kame afumine amapulu simba ombongolo katwese oku munungutula ni kumutwala mukunwa ameyi ba liywaa no Pumulo?
13.16: Cwale uno yo mwanaye Abulahama no mukati woyo ona kunungiwa kwa satani ba myaka no kukwana likumi ni itanu ni yaatu (18) cwale katwese okulukululwa mukunungiwa oku ba liywaa no Pumulo?”
13.17: Mukwamba ngeeso, eila yaye yonje sebeli yeena, mi aanu onje sebeli awabelelwa kwiinu eyo ana tende Jesu. Enguli no Mbuto no Masitete (Mateu13.31-32; Maleka4.30-32)
13.18: Cwalehe sebeli wamba nji, “Kana omubuso wa Nyambe kame okufekile niikene? Mi siikene saniubapise ni onyene?
13.19: Cwale kame ukufekile kanyi embuto no Masitete eyo ana shimbi omulume ni kuka kuna mu litema lyaye, mi sebeli ikula ni kutenda esitondo sinene, mi otuyunyi na mu mebo kame tutenda eiyaleto ku mitayi yaso.” Enguli no Mumena (Mateu13.33)
13.20: Jesu kame sebeli wamba nji, siikene sani bapise ni Mubuso wa Nyambe?
13.21: Kame ukufekile kanyi omumena owo ana kushimba omukati nukaushweka mu ipimo yaatu eyi no unga no fulawa konji aba una kumenena wonje.” Omwelo no Kukumbana (Mateu7.13; Mateu14; Mateu7.21-23)
13.22: Jesu sebeli okutela mu milenen̄i ni mu mindi yo iyeta mane ni kwenda emyendo mu Jelusalema.
13.23: Cwale omunu munjili sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Mbumu, kana mba kuyoyisiwa felea aanu anyonyo?” Mi sebeli waatambula nji,
13.24: “Mweteke omo mutweseta monje okwingena ni mwelo no kukumbana, kame nimyambela kakuli aanu no kupula mba eteke nji aingene kono katamba kutwesa.
13.25: Cwale abo omunya ndoo aba sainguke ni kuyatila emyelo, mba mutateke okwimana ni kungongota ba sandi ni kwamba nji, ‘Mbumu otu yatulwele!’ Cwale yonyene mba tambula nji, ‘Simiyii, kubine mukatundelele!’
13.26: Cwale mba mutateke okwamba nji, ‘Natu kunwa ni kulya ba lubala lowe, mi nau kwiyetanga mu titolopo tetu!’
13.27: Kono mbaamba kame nji, ‘Kame ni myambela nji siyii oko mutunda kamutunde kwa meene anyi asikutenda ouyi!’
13.28: Oko mbamu lili ni ku kweca amaeo aba sa mumone Abulahama ni Isaka ni Jakobo mane na nuhi onje mu Mubuso wa Nyambe mi anyi mba muyumbelwe kundee.
13.29: Aanu mbaiyi okutunda ku upa ni ku wiko, simba ku mutulo ni ku mbowela okwikala ba tafule mu mubuso wa Nyambe.
13.30: Kamumone, anjili ali balubala mbatende ana munyima, mi aali munyima mbatende ana balubala.” Elilato lya Jesu ku Jelusalema (Mateu23.37-39)
13.31: Ba nako eyeyo, Afalisi anjili sebeli aiya ni kwamba kwa yonyene nji, “Otunde bano kakuli Heloda kame asinga nji aibae wene.”
13.32: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mute mukambele oluwawa olo nji, ‘Kamumone, kame nitundisa amadimona mane ni kutenda etimakazo no kubalisa balelo ni byuunda mane mu liywaa no waatu mbi mana omusebezi wange.’
13.33: Simba ngeeso kame nifanena okuta mu mweendo wange kakuli kakufanene nji omunuhi wa Nyambe aibaelwe ku ndina okubita mu Jelusalema.
13.34: Jelusalema, Jelusalema, okwibaa anuhi a Nyambe ni kupwacaula ni mawee awo ana tumiwa kwa wene! Tunjinga ni na kuwaneka anowe kanyi onasikuku woyo owaneka anaye munji no maando aye, kono kawasi nipumenena!
13.35: Komone, endoo yowe kame ikaninwe! Mi kame nikwambela nji, kutamba kunimona konji aba sowambe nji, ‘Embuyoti niya woyo oiya mu litina lya Mbumu!’ ”

14.1: Eliywaa linjili no Pumulo abo Jesu aba ana kuta mu ndoo no mubusisi no Afalisi okalya esinkwa, onje amwalikete.
14.2: Kamumone, sebeli kwiiya kwa yonyene omulume woyo ona kutimbanga amakondo ni makaa.
14.3: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa simulawo na Falisi nji, “Kana kame kufanena okubalisa eli no Pumulo?
14.4: Kono onyene sebeli aondoka feela. Cwale Jesu sebeli oshimba omulume woyo ni kumu balisa mane ni kumu lukulula nji akutele.
14.5: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Cwale anyine kwaanyi woyo okwite mwanaye simba opulu waye ona kwele mu wina woyo sokwangwa okumu tundisamo eli no Pumulo?”
14.6: Kono kasi kutwesa oku mutambula epuzo yaye eyo. Okukokobeza ni Kamuhelo
14.7: Cwale sebeli wambela awo ana kwisaniwa ku mukiti enguli nji, aba ana kumona omo ana kukuketela eibaka no kukutekeha, sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji,
14.8: “Nji kame ona memiwa ku mukiti no likwala, olese okwikala esipula no kukutekeha. Kakuli kame kutwesahala nji mwendi omunu no utokwa okubita wena ni yonyene namemiwa,
14.9: mi cwale woyo ona mimeme monje mbaiyi ni kwamba kwaanyi nji, ‘Mube wuyu mulume esipula esi cwale wene mbweene ba kwikala ba sipula no sibaka na kundi.
14.10: Kono cwale nji numemiwa, okaikale ba sipula na kunji nji cwale omunya mukiti aba saiye kame saambe kwa wene nji, ‘Mulikani ote okaikale ba sipula na balubala,’ mi cwale mbukutekehe mu miyo aawo aikalile onje ba tafule.
14.11: Cwale omunu yonje woyo oku nuneka mba kokobeziwa, mi woyo oku kokobeza mba nunekiwa.
14.12: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba ngeeso ku mulume ona kumumema nji, “Cwale aba uba omukushuko simba omulalelo, olese okumema alikani owe, simba abowe, mane simba awo oyakile noo ano kufuma, kakuli nonyene mbaa kumeme eliywaa linjili muku kuuseta mi watenekiwa kale.
14.13: Kono cwale aba otenda omukiti, omeme awo ashebile, eiyanga, eihole mane ni ibofu,
14.14: cwale mukutenda ngeeso mbu fuyauliwa, kakuli katwese oukuuseta. Mi mbu tenekiwa mu niti ba liywaa no kwinguka no aafu.” Enguli no Mukiti no Kuneneba (Mateu22.1-10)
14.15: Omunjili kwawo ana kwikala naye ba tafule sebeli oyupa eyi, mi sebeli wamba kwa Jesu nji, “Embuyoti niya woyo sokalya esinkwa mu mubuso wa Nyambe!”
14.16: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Kame kuna kwikalanga omulume woyo ona kutenda omukiti no kuneneba, mi sebeli omema aanu no kupula.
14.17: Cwale enako no mukiti aba inaku keela sebeli otuma omubika waye okambela awo onje ana kwisaniwa nji, ‘Komwiye cwale einu yonje yaluka kale!’
14.18: Kono cwale onje sebeli atateka okuba amabaka. Woyo no weli sebeli wamba ku mubika nji, ‘Kame nina ulu elitema mi kame nisinga nji nite ni kalimone, kame ni lapela nji munilemene.’
14.19: Omunjili ni yonyene sebeli wamba nji, ‘Kame nina ulu eipani no mapulu no kukwana itanu mi kame nisinga nji ni kayeteke, cwale muyupe okukumbela kwange.’
14.20: Omunjili kame sebeli wamba nji, ‘Abano okubinda ni kwate, mulibaka elyo sitwese okwiiya.
14.21: Cwale omubika sebeli oukamo nukambele molyaye. Cwale omolyaye sebeli ofilikana ni kwambela omubika waye nji, ‘Kandi cwale olelube ote mu makululu mane ni misika mi okashimbe ano kusheeba, eiyanga, eihole mane nawo no kwa mona aiye ku mukiti.’
14.22: Cwale omubika sebeli wamba nji, ‘Molyange eyi ona nambele naitendahala kono kame kusisiyalile esibaka.’
14.23: Cwale omolyaye sebeli wamba ku mubika waye nji, ‘Ote mu mikwakwa ni mu mikulo okandimeke aanu aiye mukwingena, nji endoo yange iiyale.
14.24: Kakuli kame ni kwambela nji kakwisa kwaawo aanu nina kumema oweli awo saiye mukulya ku silya sange!’ ”
14.25: Cwale enyangela sebeli imukon̄a mi Jesu sebeli ofutukela kwaanu ni kwamba nji,
14.26: “Nji omunu kame aiya kwa mene mi katimbi sitaye, inawaye, mukataye, anaye mane nainaye nakulwaye, ee simba mane ni mooyo waye, katamba kutenda omwiyetwa wange.
14.27: Nji omunu yonje kashimbi esifapahano saye ni kuni kon̄a katamba kutenda omwiyetwa wange.
14.28: Cwale anyine mukaci kenu woyo otwesa okuyaka etawala yokasiikala banji nji amone etisinyehelo taye eto satitwese okumana omusebezi waye?
14.29: Kono cwale aba abeeka amatatekelo no muyako, mi katwese oku umanenena, awo onje aumona kame atateka oku musheka.
14.30: Mbaamba nji, ‘Wuyu mulume nakutateka okuyaka kono kame ana kwangwa okumanenena.
14.31: Simba anyine ombumu woyo ota okalwisa omukwaye woyo nokwatwesa okwikala banji ni kunahana nji kana kame atwesa okalwa ni sikwata saye no kukwana eikiti likumi nji aka kuwane ni woyo okwite esikwata no kukwana eikiti makumi ayiili.
14.32: Cwale nji otwesa abo omunjili yonyene kame amubita, mba tumu ondumeleti okakumbela ekozo asili kule.
14.33: Cwalehe omunu yonje kwaanyi kakutoboha oufumu waye katamba okutenda omwiyetwa waye. Omungwa no Kwamuba (Mateu5.13; Maleka9.50)
14.34: “Omungwa ni wakuwaba, kono nji waamuba kale, cwale ngasibine sausetwe nji mungwa kame?
14.35: Kaukwite etuso ku mumbu simba ku mununo, aanu kame auyumba. Cwale woyo okwite amatwi ayupe.”

15.1: Cwale atelisi nasi kutenda eibi onje sebeli asheeteta abeebi okuteeteta Jesu.
15.2: Cwale Afalisi na iyeti no mulawo sebeli akushobotela aamba nji, “Wuyu mulume kame atambulanga asikutenda esibi mane ni kulya noo!”
15.3: Cwale Jesu sebeli waambela enguli eyi nji
15.4: “Cwale ngasine sakwikale nji omunjili kwaanyi kame akwite emikoko no kukwana omwanda nji nakutauka mumweya, kana katwese okusiya emikoko no kukwana makumi atanu nanee ni mutanu ni tunee (99) mu lihalaupa ni kuta okasaela owo ona tauka okubitela abo sakauwanene?
15.5: Cwale aba auwana kame aubeeka ba mafuti yo wabelelwe,
15.6: mi aba akeela ku mundi kame aisana alikani aye bamweya nawo ayakile naye, ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, ‘Kamuwabelelwe ni mene kakuli inawana omukoko wange owo ona kutauka!’
15.7: Mukutenda ngeeso kame nimyambela nji mba kwikala okuwabelelwa kunene mu wilu abo osikutenda ouyi mumweya aba afutuka okubaka okubita awo no kukwana makumi atanu nanee ni mutanu ni tunee (99) awo nokwabaka. Omuwayawaya no Kutauka
15.8: “Simba abo omukati woyo okwite emiwayawaya no kukwana likumi mi sebeli bataukabo kamweya, kana katwese okutumbula elambi ni kufiyela mu ndoo okusaela akamuwayawaya kamweya okutwala abo sakakawanene?
15.9: Cwale aba amana oukawana, sebeli oisana alikani aye nawo ayakile naye ni kwamba nji, ‘Muwabelelwe ni mene kakuli inawana akamuwayawaya kange kana kutauka.’
15.10: Mukutenda ngeeso kame nimyambela nji kame kuli okuwabelelwa balubala no mangeloiloi a Nyambe abo osikutenda ouyi mumweya ona baka.” Omwana no Ndumbana no Kutauka
15.11: Cwale Jesu sebeli otwalelela okwamba nji, “Kame kuna kwikalanga omulume woyo ona kwikalanga naana no andumbana ayili.
15.12: Cwale omwanukana bo sebeli wambela sitaye nji, ‘Sitange, mene munibeko ekabelo yange kweyo muluwile.’ Cwale omulume sebeli waatabela oufumu waye.
15.13: Cwale munyima no maywaa feela acana, woyo mwanaye no mwanukana sebeli oungeka bamweya eyo ana kubiwa ni kwingena enaha muule mane oko sebeli oka kandakanda oufumu waye mukuyoya no kwiiba.
15.14: Cwale munyima no kumana oufumu waye onje, elishebo no kuneneba sebeli liingena omo mu naha, mi sebeli otateka okusaela omo sayoyele.
15.15: Ababo sebeli ota okaingena omusebezi ku mulume woyo ona kwikalanga omomo mu naha mi sebeli oka mutwala mu litema lyaye nuka muba omusebezi no kulisa angulube.
15.16: Mu mukwa no lishebo cwale sebeli olakaza fela okulya ku ilya no angulube, kono kakwisa simba mumweya woyo ona kumuba esi no kulya.
15.17: Kono cwale aba nausa etingana taye sebeli wamba nji, ‘Kandi anjinga abika a sitange awo akwite esinkwa simba esi no kulya mane kame ateulanga, kono kame nifa elishebo kuno!
15.18: Mbani inguka eliywaa linjili ni kuta kwa sitange nukamba nji, “Sitange, kame ina tende ouyi balubala lwa Nyambe mane ni balubala lowe.
15.19: Cwale sifanene okuniisana mwanowe bano, kono oniisane kanyi omunjili no abika owe.’
15.20: Eliywaa linjili sebeli oinguka ni kuuka kwa sitaye. “Cwale yo sili kule sitaye sebeli omumona ni kumulimuka mane ni kumufela amakeke, sebeli omwitukela oka mukwela musaali ni kumu tubeta.
15.21: Cwale omwana sebeli wamba kwa sitaye nji, ‘Sitange, kame ina foso balubala lwa Nyambe mane ni balubala lowe, cwale sifanene okwiisanwa mwanowe.’
15.22: Kono sitaye sebeli wambela abika aye nji, ‘Mulite muwangu wangu olwambi no kuwaba mu mumangeke mane mumubeeke elisala naku munwe naku lyooko mane ni tinjatangwa ku makondo.
15.23: Cwale mulite olilole no kusuwa mwiibae nji tutende omukiti tuwabelelwe!
15.24: Kakuli wuyu mwanange kame ana kufa mi nayoyo kame, na kutauka cwale na waniwa, mi ababo sebeli atateka omukiti.
15.25: Cwale omwanaye no mukulu kame ana kwikalanga ku matema. Cwale aba ana kusheeteta abeebi ni ndoo sebeli oyupa etindimo ni kunenga.
15.26: Cwale sebeli oisana omunjili no abika ni kumwibanguta nji, ‘Siikene sitendahala?’
15.27: Cwale sebeli omutambula nji, ‘Minowe naiyi,’ mi sitowe naibaa olilole no kusuwa kakuli namu tambula wino mi yokwanine.’
15.28: Kono cwale yonyene sebeli otina ni kukana okwingena, ababo sitaye sebeli oiya ni kumususuweza nji aingene.
15.29: Kono mwana sebeli otambula sitaye nji, ‘Mumone, nani mibelekele ba myaka no kupula nambulwa okwakuteka emilawo yenu, kono kamwa siniba elilole nji nitende omukiti na likani ange!
15.30: Kono cwale wuyu mwanenu woyo ona kuta mukulya ekalulo no ufumu wenu ni mahule aba aneeyi, namu mwibaele olilole no kusuwa!’
15.31: Cwale sitaye sebeli wamba kwa mwanaye nji, ‘Mwanange enako yonje kame uli ni mene, mi eyo niluwile yonje yowe.
15.32: Cwale kame kulukela nji nitendele wuyu minowe omukiti mi owabelelwe, kakuli wuyu minowe nakufa mi nayoyo, mane naku tauka, kono cwale bano na waniwa.’ ”

16.1: Jesu sebeli wamba kame kwa iyetwa nji, “Kame kuna kwikala omulume no kufuma ona kwikala ni mubika waye. Cwale epiho sebeli iiya kwa yonyene nji omunu woyo kame ana kusinya esifumu saye,
16.2: mi sebeli omwisana ni kwamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Iikene eyi niyupa mulibaka lyowe? Otunde ba sipula sowe no ubika kakuli kufanene okutenda omubika wange.’
16.3: Cwale omubika sebeli okwambisa yomboci nji, ‘Iikene sani tende kakuli molyange nani tundisa ba ubika? Songolile onene okutombola mi kame neena okukumbela.
16.4: Kame niyii esi sanitende! Nji cwale aanu ani tambule mu tindoo too aba ina tundu ba musebezi wange.’
16.5: Cwale sebeli oisana awo ana kukolotela molyaye omunjili ni munjili. Sebeli oibanguta woyo no weli nji, ‘Bukai ona kolotele molyange?’
16.6: Sebeli otambula nji, ‘Omwanda no sipimo no oli,’ cwale sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Oshimbe esikoloti sowe mi oikale banji muwangu on̄ole nji makumi atanu 50.’
16.7: Cwale sebeli wamba ku munjili nji, ‘Bukai ona koloto?’ Sebeli wamba nji, ‘Masaka akwana omwanda no uloto,’ Sebeli omwambela nji, ‘Oitundise mi on̄ole makumi atanu naatu (80).’
16.8: Molyaye sebeli onyaza omubika mulibaka no kwasepahala kwaye kakuli aanu no litunga lino kame amonahala okutenda wino eyi no lusika loo feela okubita aanu no liseli.
16.9: Cwale kame nimyambela nji, “Mukutende oulikani mwenyene mulibaka no kwaluka, nji cwale aba sai kwangwe kame samitambule mu mundi no kuta oku no kwaabwa.
16.10: Woyo no kusepahala kweyi no kucaniba mba sepahala kweyi no kupula, mi woyo no kwasepahala kweyi no kucaniba katamba kusepahala ngeeso kweyi no kupula.
16.11: Nji cwale kamusi sepahala mu inu no kwaluka, anyine so misepa mu ufumu no niti?
16.12: Cwale nji kamusi sepahala mu sinu no mukowe, anyine sokuba eso sili senu?
16.13: Kakwisa omubika otwesa okusebeleza ambumu ayiili, kakuli mbu timbibo mumweya ni kusingabo munjili simba oukubeeka onene kumumweya ni kukana omunjili. Kutwese okusebeleza Nyambe ni mali.” Emyambelo Injili ya Jesu (Mateu11.12,13; 5.31,32; Maleka10.11,12)
16.14: Afalisi awo ana kusinganga amali aba ana kuyupa eyi, cwale sebeli atimba Jesu.
16.15: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Anyi mukuyeema mwenyene balubala no aanu, kono Nyambe kame ayii emicima yenu kakuli eyo itendile eyi no utokwa mukaci no aanu akwiiba mu miyo ya Nyambe.
16.16: “Omulawo na nuhi konji ba nako ya Jowani okutunda abo cwale eliywi no kuwaba no mubuso wa Nyambe aba lina kukutaziwa, mi omunu yonje sebeli weteka onene okwingenamo.
16.17: Kono kwakotoba eliwilu ni litunga nji ibwe okubita enombolo imweya no mulawo nji ibwe.
16.18: “Munu yonje woyo olukulula mukataye ni kukwata omunjili kame abuka mane ni woyo okwata omukati ona lukululwa kwa mbumwaye kame abuka. Omulume no Kufuma ni Lazalo
16.19: “Kame kuna kwikalanga omulume no kufuma ona kukumanganga eikumango no undilu ona kulyanga eilya no kuwaba ba liywaa ni liywaa.
16.20: Cwale ba mweelo waye kame kuna kulangananga omulume no kusheba no litina lya Lazalo ona kwikalanga ni itombo olutu lonje,
16.21: woyo ona kulakazanga okulya eyo ina kukwanga ku tafule no mulume no kufuma, cwale ambwa sebeli aiya ni kulasa ba itombo yaye.
16.22: Omulume no kusheba sebeli ofa mi amangeloi sebeli amushimbela kwa Abulahama mu saali saye. Omulume no mufumi ni yonyene sebeli ofa mane sebeli oteuliwa,
16.23: mi mu lyangalilo, yoli mu mayando sebeli waliketa ni kumona Abulahama aba no kuleba mane Lazalo yoli mu saali saye.
16.24: Cwale sebeli okuwa nji, ‘Sitange Abulahama! Onifele amakeke, mi otume Lazalo acupwe amamaneneno no munwe waye mu meyi nji aombote olulimi lwange, kakuli kame nili mu utata onene muno mu mulilo!’
16.25: Kono Abulahama sebeli omutambula nji, ‘Mwanange opuluke nji mu nako no kuyoya kowe nukutambulanga einu no kuwaba, mi Lazalo kasi kwikalanga ni inu no kuwaba. Kono bano kame ali wino kuno, mi wene kame oli mu utata.
16.26: Cwale okwekeza kweeyi, mukaci ketu ni wene kame kuli owina no kuneneba onene, nji cwale awo ali muno katwese okwiiya kwa wene mane kakwisa woyo sotwesa okuta okutunda omo okwiiya kwaaci.’
16.27: Cwale omufumi sebeli wamba kwa Abulahama nji, ‘Kame ni kukumbela, sitange, otume Lazalo ku ndoo ya sitange,
16.28: kakuli kame nikwite ainange atanu nji cwale akaalemuse nji alese okwiiya mu sibaka sino no mayando.’
16.29: Kono Abulahama sebeli wamba nji, ‘Kame akwite Mushe na nuhi a Nyambe cwale walesele aayupe.’
16.30: Cwale omufumi sebeli wamba nji, ‘Kokuulwa, sitange Abulahama! Kono nji kute omunjili kwa onyene ona tundu kwaafu, mba baka.’
16.31: Cwale Abulahama sebeli wambela omufumi nji, ‘Nji katamba okuyupa Mushe na nuhi a Nyambe, katamba okuyupa simba woyo soingulwa okutunda kwaafu.’ ”

17.1: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa iyetwa aye nji emiliko ku kutenda esibi mu niti ikeeyile, kono oumai ni kwa woyo ikeyele!
17.2: Nikwa kuwaba kambe kame sa nungelelwe eliwee linene mu ndingo yaye niku muyumbela mu liwate, okubita nji asaitete anyonyo okutenda esibi.
17.3: Cwale mu kumamele mukaci kenu, nji omwabowe kame atenda esibi omukalimele, mi nji na baka omulemene.
17.4: Cwale nji kame ana kufoseze katanu ni twiili mu liywaa limweya, mi ni kwaliketa kwa wene katanu ni twiili ni kwamba nji, ‘Nabaka kale,’ kame ofanena oku mulemena.” Etumelo
17.5: Atumiwa sebeli aamba kwa Mbumu nji, “Otwekeleze ku tumelo yetu.”
17.6: Cwale Ombumu sebeli wamba nji, “Kambe kame mukwite etumelo no okufeka kanyi oubeke no mbuto no masitete, kambe kame mutwesa okwambela esitondo no molobeni nji okutule mi okakunwe mu liwate, mi mbasi mikuteke. Omusebezi no Mubika
17.7: Anyine mukaci kenu woyo okwite omubika olima simba okubabalela omukoko, so amba kwa yonyene aba atunda mu litema nji, ‘Oiye muwangu kuno tulye ba tafule?’
17.8: Katamba kwamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Oni lukisete omulalelo, okuyumene mi oni sebeleze, konji aba sa nilyele ni kunwa mi munyima bosolye ni kunwa.’
17.9: Kana mba kutumele ku mubika ba kutenda eso anambeliwa?
17.10: Naanyi yongeso nji aba mutenda yonje mu nalaelwa, mwambe nji, ‘Tuli abika awo no kwafanena, kame tuna tende eyo tufanena okuteda.’ ” Jesu yo Balisa Alume no kukwana Likumi (10)
17.11: Jesu abana kuta ku Jelusalema, sebeli weenda mu museto mukaci no Samaliya ni Galileya.
17.12: Cwale abana kwingena mu mundi, sebeli okwangana ni aanu no kukwana likumi asikutoma embingwa, aimanine kule,
17.13: cwale sebeli akuweleza ni kwamba nji, “Jesu, Molyetu! Otufele amakeke!”
17.14: Cwale aba ana kwamona sebeli waambela nji, “Mute muka kumonahaze kwa pulisita aka mitatube.” Ba ndila alemine okuta, sebeli abala.
17.15: Cwale mumweya kwa onyene aba ana kumona nji nabala, sebeli ouka ni kulumbeka Nyambe ni liywi linene.
17.16: Cwale sebeli okwela banji ni lubala ku makondo a Jesu nuukutumela. Omulume woyo neli Musamaliya.
17.17: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba nji, “Kasa likumi awo ana balisiwa? Kanti kubine ali awo akwana atanu nanee?
17.18: Ngasibine kasiuka nji alumbeke Nyambe konji wuyu osi mushobo mundina?
17.19: Cwale sebeli omwambela nji, “Oimane okutele etumelo yowe nai kuyoyisa.”
17.20: Afalisi aba ana ku mwibanguta nji omubuso na kuwilu kamwaka sawiye. Sebeli waatambula nji, “Omubuso wa Nyambe kautamba kwiiya ni imoniso.
17.21: Kautamba kwambiwa nji, ‘Komumone, kuno kwauli, simba nji, Uya baya, kakuli omubuso wa Nyambe kame uli mukaci kenu.”
17.22: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa iyetwa aye nji, “Amaywaa akeyile abo samushukele okumona limweya eliywaa no Mwana no Munu, kono kamutamba kulimona.
17.23: Mi kame saambe kwanyi nji, ‘Komumone uno kuno, simba nji, ‘Komumone, uya kuya! Mulese kuta simba okwakon̄a.
17.24: Kanyi olumonyi aba lumonyeka ni kutumbuka mu liwilu ku maneku ayiili, mwasa kukaikalele mu liywaa no Mwana no Munu.
17.25: Kono ayande oweli kwiinu no kupula mane ni kukaniwa ni lusika olu.
17.26: Kanyi mu maywaa a Nuwe mwasa kuka ikalele ni mu liywaa no Mwana no munu.
17.27: Kame ana kulya, ni kunwa, ni kukwata, ni kukwalisa konji mane ba liywaa elyo Nuwe aba ana kwingena mu wato no aleka, mi ameyi no kupula sebeli aiya ni kwayundisa onje.
17.28: Kanyi kame omo kuna kwikalela mu maywaa a Lota, kame ana kulya, ni kunwa, kame ana kuulanga ni kuulisa, kame ana kukunanga ni kuyaka.
17.29: kono ba liywaa ana kutunda Lota mu sondoma omulilo ni silufula sebeli iloka ku wilu ni kwaibaa onje.
17.30: Cwale mwasa kukaikalele ni mu liywaa no Mwana no munu aba sa monahale.
17.31: Ba liywaa elyo woyo oli ba situwa no ndoo, ni ibyana yaye mu ndoo alese kutuluka nji aishimbe, mi kame ni woyo oli mu litema alese okuuka ku mundi.
17.33: Woyo yonje okununeka omooyo waye mba utaukelwe, kono woyo otaukelwa omooyo waye mba yoyisiwa.
17.34: Kame ni myambela nji mu usiku owo kame sakwikale ayiili ba mumbeta, mumweya mba shimbiwa omunjili mba siiwa.
17.35: Akati ayiili satwe mu sinu simweya, mumweya mba shimbiwa omunjili mba siiwa
17.36: Alume ayiili awo sa ikale mu litema, omunjili mba shimbiwa munjili mba siiwa.
17.37: Cwale sebeli aamba kwa yonyene nji, “Mbumu, kubine oko?” Jesu sebeli waambela nji, “Oko kuli olutu ni manon̄u kwa sa kaungane bamweya.”

18.1: Cwale Jesu sebeli waambela enguli nji atundamene mu kulapela mi alese kuzwafa.
18.2: Sebeli waambela nji, “Mu mulenen̄i munjili kame kuna kwikalanga omwatuli woyo kasi kucilanga Nyambe simba aanu.
18.3: Cwale kame kuna kwikalanga ni mbakati woyo ona kwiyanga kwa yonyene ni ku mwambelanga nji, ‘Onituse kwa wuyu oni zekisa!’
18.4: Omwatuli sebeli okana ba nako no kuleba, kono munyima sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Simba nji sicili Nyambe simba okukuteka omunu,
18.5: ee kakuli wuyu mbakati kame ani bilaeza, kame sani mutuse nji alese okuni kataza okuni iyelanga!’ ”
18.6: Cwale Ombumu sebeli wamba nji, “Muyupe eyo amba omwatuli nambulwa niti.
18.7: Cwale Nyambe katamba okutusa aketwa aye, awo alila kwa yonyene ousiku ni munji? Kana mba liyehe mukaci koo?
18.8: Kame ni myambela nji, kame saatuse muwangu, simbangeeso, Omwana no munu aba saiye mbawana etumelo ba litunga?”
18.9: Jesu sebeli wamba enguli eyi kwa njili awo ana kukusepa onyene nji akukena mane ni kushendaula akoo.
18.10: “Alume ayiili sebeli ata mu ndoo ya Nyambe okalapela, mumweya neli Mufalisi omunjili neli mutelisi.
18.11: Omufalisi sebeli oimana niku lapela nji, ‘Nyambe kame ni kutumela kwa wene kakuli mene sikufekile kanyi aanu anjili asikuyumena, nawo no kwa sepahala, asikubuka, simba mane kanyi wuyu mutelisi.
18.12: Kame niku yumenanga eyi no kulya twiili mu sunda, kame nibanga esi no likumi kweyo ni wananga.’
18.13: “Kono omutelisi yoimanine oku no kuleba mane kasikutwesa okwinula amiyo aye okwaliketa ku wilu, kono sebeli ofula ba saali saye nikwamba nji, ‘Nyambe, onifele amakeke mene osikutenda eibi!’
18.14: Kame nimyambela nji,” “Wuyu mulume kame ana uku ku ndoo yaye yo lukile okubita omukwaye. Kakuli omunu yonje woyo okununeka yonyene mba kokobeziwa, kono woyo oku kokobeza mba nunekiwa.” Jesu yo Fuyola Anukana
18.15: Cwale sebeli amulitela anuke nji aaleme amaka aye beulu. Cwale aiyetwa aye aba ana kumona ngeeso sebeli aayuta.
18.16: Kono Jesu sebeli waisanena kwa yonyene ni kwambela nji, “Mulesele anuke aiye kwa mene, mi mulese okwakanisa kakuli omubuso wa Nyambe niwoo.
18.17: Niti luli kame nimyambela! Omunu yonje nji katambula omubuso wa Nyambe kanyi mwanuke katamba kwingena mo.” Omulume no Kufuma (Mateu19.16-30; Maleka10.17-31)
18.18: Cwale omubusisi sebeli oibanguta Jesu nji, “Omwiyeti no kuwaba, siikene sa nitende nji nika yole omooyo na kwaabwa?”
18.19: “Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Iikene abonisana nji nili muwa?” Kakwisa muwa konji Nyambe yomboci.
18.20: Oyii etitaelo, ‘Mulese okubuka, Mulese kwibaa, Mulese kwiita, Mulese kuba oupaki no mapwa, Mukuteke asitenu na inawenu.’ ”
18.21: Mi sebeli wamba nji, “Yonje eyi ina imamela okutunda ku wanuke wange.”
18.22: Cwale Jesu abana kuyupa ngeeso sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Kwasili esinu simweya eso ulwile. Oulise einu yowe yonje okwite mi otabele awo ashebile, mi mbu wana esifumu na kuwilu, cwale oiye oni kon̄e.”
18.23: Kono abana kuyupa eyi, sebeli weena, kakuli neli wakufuma onene.
18.24: Jesu sebeli omwaliketa ni kwamba nji, “Ngasibine kubambabile nji awo akwite esifumu akaingene mu mubuso wa Nyambe!
18.25: Kono ni kwa kotoba ekamele okwingena mu litiyo no ndonga kasanji omufumi okwingena mu mubuso wa Nyambe.”
18.26: Awo ana kwiyupa sebeli amba nji, “Cwale anyine so kayoyisiwa?”
18.27: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba nji, “Eso sibambabile kwaanu ni sakotoba kwa Nyambe.”
18.28: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli wamba nji, “Komone! natusiyi etindoo tetu nuukukon̄a.”
18.29: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Niti luli kame nimyambela nji, “Kakwisa omulume ona siyi endoo simba omukati simba mukulwaye simba ashemyaye simba anaye mulibaka no mubuso wa Nyambe,
18.30: awo aulwile okuwana onene ba nako ino, mi ba nako no mamaneneno mbawana omooyo no kwabwa. Jesu yo Amba aka no Waatu eyi no Lifu Lyaye (Mateu20.17-19; Maleka10.32-34)
18.31: Cwale Jesu sebeli oshimba aiyetwa aye no kukwana elikumi ni twiili (12), ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, “Muteetete, kame tukatile ku Jelusalema, mi eyo yonje ina kun̄oliwa eyi no Mwana no munu kwa nuhi a Nyambe mba iyatetetwe.
18.32: Kakuli kame sa biwe kwa simacaba, mi kame sa shendaulwe mane ni ku yandisiwa no kwenisa mane ni kumu sibwela amate.
18.33: Kame sa mufule ni kumwibaa, mi ba liywaa no waatu mba inguka.”
18.34: Kono aiyetwa kasi kuyupa simba simweya kweyo ana kwamba, omwambelo ou kame una ku shweekiwa kwa onyene mi kasi kulimuka eyo Jesu ana kwamba. Jesu yo Balisa Esibofu sina ku Kumbelanga (Mateu20.29-34; Maleka10.46-52)
18.35: Abo Jesu yoli beebi ni Jeliko, kame kuna kwikalanga esibofu no mulume sina kwikalanga ku nyonga no ndila, esikumbelanga
18.36: Cwale aba ana kuyupa aanu no kupula abita, sebeli oibanguta nji, “Siikene esi?”
18.37: Sebeli amwambela nji, “Jesu no Nazaleta yokame woyo obita”
18.38: Cwale sebeli okuwa nji, “Jesu! Omwana Dabida! Onifele amakeke!”
18.39: Cwale awo ana kwikala balubala sebeli amukalimela nji aondoke. Kono sebeli okuwa onene nji, “Omwana Dabida oni yupele amakeke!”
18.40: Cwale Jesu sebeli oimana niku laela nji amulite kwa yonyene mi aba ana kukeela abeebi, sebeli omwibanguta nji,
18.41: “Iikene osaela nji niku tendele?” Sebeli otambula nji, “Mbumu, kame ni singa okumona.”
18.42: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Omone! Etumelo yowe naiku yoyisa.”
18.43: Cwale ababo sebeli omona niku mukon̄a yo kanyisa Nyambe, mi aanu onje aba ana kumona eyi, sebeli alumbeka Nyambe.

19.1: Jesu sebeli oingena mu Jeliko mi kame ana kubita feela.
19.2: Cwale kame kuna kwikalanga omulume no litina lya Zakiyasi, neli omukulu no mutelisi ni kufuma.
19.3: Cwale sebeli osaela nji amone Jesu nji anyine, kono sebeli okwanggwa mulibaka no aanu no kupula ni kwibiba ku siyema saye.
19.4: Cwale sebeli oitukela balubala nuukatina ku sitondo no sikamole nji amumone, kakuli Jesu nakubita endila eyo.
19.5: Cwale Jesu aba ana kukeela ba sibaka eso, sebeli waliketa ku wilu ni kwamba kwa yonyene nji, “Zakiyasi otuluke muwanguwangu kakuli kame nifanena okwikala mu ndoo yowe balelo.”
19.6: Cwale Zakiyasi sebeli oleluba ni kutulukela banji ni ku mutambula mu kuwabelelwa onene.
19.7: Cwale aanu aba ana kumona ngeeso sebeli an̄un̄uta nji, “Kame anati okatenda ongenda no mulume osikutenda eibi!”
19.8: Cwale Zakiyasi sebeli oimana ni kwamba kwa Mbumu nji, “Komone, Mbumu, elicika no ufumu wange kame niba kwa sikusheba, nji kame nina byangula omunu esinu saye, kame nimuuseta etitikanyo no kukwana tinee.”
19.9: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Balelo okuyoyisiwa na kwiiyi muno mu ndoo, kakuli ni yonyene mwana a Abulahama.
19.10: Kakuli Omwana no munu neeyi muku saela ni kuyoyisa eso sinatauka.”
19.11: Aba ana kuyupa einu eyi, Jesu sebeli otwalelela okwaambela enguli. Kakuli kame ana kwikala beebi ni Jelusalema, mi kakuli kame ana ku yambuta nji omubuso wa Nyambe kame uli beebi oku monahala ababo.
19.12: Cwale Jesu ababo sebeli wamba nji, “Omulume no ku kutekeha sebeli ota ku naha oko no kuleba akatambula omubuso mi cwale sebeli ouka.
19.13: Sebeli oisana abika aye no kukwana likumi ni kwaaba etipondo likumi ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, ‘Mu fundote amali aa okutwala abo sanika ukele.’
19.14: Kono aanu aye naku mutimba mane sebeli atuma onumwana munyima yaye okaamba nji, ‘Ka tusingi wuyu mulume nji atubuse.’
19.15: Aba ana kuuka munyima no katambula omubuso sebeli olaela abika aye awo ana kuba amali nji aiye kwa yonyene nji alimuke eso anawana mukuulisa koo.
19.16: Ono weli sebeli oiya ba lubala lwaye ni kwamba nji, Molyange, epondo yowe naini wanene etipondo likumi beulu.’
19.17: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Nutende wino, wene omubika no kuwaba! Kakuli nusepahala kwicana onene, mbu busu emilenen̄i no kukwana likumi.’
19.18: Omubika no wiili sebeli oiya ni kwamba nji, ‘Molyange, epondo yowe ina wanenebo etipondo titanu kame.’
19.19: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Cwale mbu busu milenen̄i itanu.’
19.20: Cwale omubika munjili sebeli oiya ni kwamba nji, ‘Molyange, ino yokame epondo yowe eyo nina kupungelanga mu lwambi.
19.21: Kakuli kame nina kucilanga wene kakuli uli munu no kubambaba. Kame oshimba omo kausi beeka mane kame okutula omo kausi kuna.’
19.22: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Kame sani kwatule kweyo itunda mu kanw kowe! Wene omubika no kububa! Kame ona kulimuka nji mene nili omunu no kubambaba mene nishimba omo kanisibeeka mane niku kutula omo kani sikukuna.
19.23: Cwale iikene aba wasikubeeka amali ange mu panga? Cwale bakwiya kwange kambe kame nina ishimbi ni n̄ambeko yayo.’
19.24: Cwale sebeli wamba kwawo ana kwimana naye kunyonga nji, ‘Mushimbe epondo kwa yonyene mi mwiibe woyo okwite etipondo likumi.’
19.25: Cwale sebeli aamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Mbumu kame akwite etipondo likumi!’
19.26: ‘Kame ni myambela nji, ‘Omunu yonje woyo okwite mbabiwi onene, kono kwa woyo oulwile simba neso akwite mba byanguliwa.
19.27: Kono kanyi kwiila yange awo ka sikusinga nji nabuse, mwalite kuno nikwaibaele balubala wange!” ’ Jesu aba ana Kwingena mu Jelusalema mu Umbumu (Mateu21.1-11; Maleka11.1-11; Jowani12.12-19)
19.28: Cwale Jesu aba ana kumana okwamba eyi, sebeli wekeza okuta ku Jelusalema.
19.29: Cwale aba ana kukeela ku nyonga no Betefage ni Betani ku lilundu elyo liisaniwa nji Olibeti, sebeli otuma aiyetwa aye ayiili balubala,
19.30: ni kwambela nji, “Mute mu mundi oli balubala lwenu, abasa mwingenemo mba muwana akana no mbongolo kanungilwe ako kaka sitiniwa kale ku munu. Mu kanungutule mi mukalite kuno.
19.31: Nji omunu kame sami ibangute nji, ‘Iikene aba muka fungutula,’ mu mwambele nji, ‘Ombumu kame aka saela.’ ”
19.32: Cwale awo ana kutumiwa sebeli ata nukawana akambongolo kanyi omo ana kwaambela Jesu.
19.33: Cwale alemine oku fungutula akambongolo, omunyako sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji. “Iikene aba mu fungutula akambongolo?”
19.34: Cwale sebeli aamba nji, “Ombumu kame aka saela,”
19.35: Cwale sebeli alita akambongolo kwa Jesu, ni kuyala eikumango yoo beulu no kambongolo ni kwikatabo Jesu.
19.36: Cwale yoenda, sebeli ayala eikumango yoo mu ndila.
19.37: Cwale aba ana kukeela abeebi ni Jelusalema, ba ndila ishetumuka ba liundu no Olibe, okupula no aiyetwa sebeli atateka okuwabelelwa ni kuyeema Nyambe ni liywi no kuneneba mullibaka no musebezi no kuneneba ana mono.
19.38: aamba nji, “Embuyoti ni yawoyo oiya mu litina lya Mbumu! Ekozo iikaleko mu wilu ni kanya mu liwilu.
19.39: Cwale Afalisi anjili mu kupula sebeli aamba nji, “Mwiyeti,” okalimele aiyetwa owe!”
19.40: Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Kame ni myambela nji, aa nji aondoke, amawee mba kuwu.” Jesu abana Lilela Jelusalema
19.41: Cwale aba ana kusheeteta abeebi ni mulenen̄i no Jelusalema sebeli oulilela,
19.42: ni kwamba nji, “Kambe na mukulimuka mu liywaa na balelo einu itenda ekozo! Kono cwale kame ishweekilwe ku miyo enu!
19.43: Kakuli amaywaa mbaiyi kwa wene abo eila yowe mbai kutinguluka ni lukwakwa no kwambeka ikuyatilele ku maneku onje.
19.44: Cwale kame sa kukwisete banji wene bamweya naanowe, mi katamba kusiya eliwee limweya beulu no likwayo mwa wene, kakuli kusilimuka enako ona poteliwa!” Jesu Yota ku Ndoo ya Nyambe (Mateu21.12-17; Maleka11.15-19; Jowani2.13-22)
19.45: Cwale Jesu sebeli oingena mu Ndoo ya Nyambe ni kutateka okucita awo ana kuulisangamo,
19.46: ni wamba kwa onyene nji, “Kame kun̄olilwe nji, ‘Endoo yange kame saitende eyi no tapelo.’ Kono aanyi namwifutula omo akushweeka ambuyi!”
19.47: Cwale Jesu nakwiyetanga mu Ndoo ya Nyambe amaaywaa onje. Apulisita akulu na n̄oli, ni manduna no sicaba sebeli alela okumwibaa,
19.48: kono kasi kuwana esinjili eso ana kufanena okutenda, kakuli aanu onje kame ana ku teetetanga ku maywi aye.

20.1: Eliywaa linjili Jesu yoiyeta ni kukutaza eliywi kwaanu mu Ndoo ya Nyambe, apulisita akulu na n̄oli bamweya na kulu sebeli aiya,
20.2: ni kwamba kwa yonyene nji, “Otwambele, ka maata awo otendisa einu eyi, simba anyini ona kubi woo.”
20.3: Jesu sebeli waatambula nji, “Ni mene kame sani mibangute epuzo nji munambele,
20.4: kana ekolobezo ya Jowani kame ina kutunda ku wilu nji neli kwaanu?”
20.5: Cwale sebeli akwambota mukaci koo, ni kwamba nji, “Aba satwambe nji, ‘Kame itunda kuwilu,’ kame saambe nji, ‘Cwale iikene kamwa sikumupumena?’
20.6: Kono aba satwambe nji, ‘Niya aanu feela, aanu onje kame satu pwacaule ni mawee, kakuli kame apumena nji Jowani neli munuhi.”
20.7: Cwale sebeli atambula nji, “Katuyii oko ina kutunda.”
20.8: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Ni mene simyambele amaata ni kutusisa okutenda einu eyi.” Enguli no Abeleki na mu Litema (Mateu21.33-46; Maleka12.1-12)
20.9: Cwale Jesu sebeli otateka okwambela aanu enguli eyi nji, “Omulume kame ana kukuna elitema no beine ni kulisiya mu maoko no abeleki, mi sebeli ota mu naha indina ba nako no kuleba.
20.10: Cwale enako aba ina kukwana, sebeli otuma omubika kwa beleki nji amube ku mbuya na mu litema no beine. Kono abeleki sebeli amufula ni kumuusa nambulwa esi ana kushimba.
20.11: Mi kame sebeli otuma omubika munjili, kono abeleki sebeli amufula ni yonyene ni ku muyandisa mu mukwa no kwenisa mane ni kumuusa nambulwa esi ana kushimba.
20.12: Cwale sebeli otuma woyo no waatu, woyo sebeli amulemeka ni kumuyumbela kundee.
20.13: Cwale omunya litema sebeli wamba nji, ‘Cwale iikene sanitende? Mbi tumu mwanange woyo nisinga onene, mwendi mba ka mukuteke!’
20.14: Kono cwale abeleki abana ku mumona, sebeli akwambota mukaci koo nji, ‘Woyo yokame shwana twendenyi tu mwibae, nji cwale aci tu kayole esifumu!’
20.15: Cwale sebeli amuyumbela kundee no litema no beine niku mwibaa. “Cwale siikene satende omunya litema kwa onyene?
20.16: “Kame saiye mukusinya abeleki ni kuba anjili.” Cwale aanu aba ana kuyupa ngeeso sebeli aamba nji, “Nyambe otulemene!”
20.17: Kono Jesu sebeli waaliketa ni kwamba nji, “Iikene cwale eyo in̄olilwe? ‘Eliwee elyo lina kukaniwa kwayaki kame lina futuka omusumo no utokwa namu lilulu.’
20.18: Omunu yonje woyo so kwelabo mba patuka otubindi-bindi, kono cwale nji eliwee elyo likwele omunu mba limulemeke.” Epuzo mulibaka no Kuteneka Imitelo (Mateu22.15-22; Maleka12.13-17)
20.19: Aiyeti no mulawo na pulisita akulu sebeli aeteka oku beeka amaoko oo beulu ya Jesu ba nako eyeyo, kono sebeli acila aanu kakuli kame ana lemuha nji naambele enguli eyo yalwisa.
20.20: Cwale sebeli amwaliketa, ni kutumena amatwela awo ana kukumonahalisa nji akuluka, nji ayupe eyo saambe, nji amube mu maata ni mupuso no mubusisi.
20.21: Cwale amatwela sebeli aibanguta Jesu nji, “Mwiyeti, kame tuyii nji kame wamba ni kwiyeta wino mane kukwite esishweka, kono kame wiyeta endila ya Nyambe mu niti.
20.22: Kame tulukeele aci okuba omutelo kwa Sesale nji katulukeele?”
20.23: Kono Jesu sebeli omona etingana too ni kwamba kwa onyene nji,
20.24: “Komunimonise omuwayawaya. Sanyine esifateho neyi ina n̄oliwabo?” Sebeli aamba nji, “Ya Sesale.”
20.25: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Cwale mube Sesale eso sili sa Sesale, mi mube Nyambe eso sili sa Nyambe.
20.26: Cwale sebeli akwangwa mukaci no aanu okulema eso ana kwamba, kono sebeli akomoka ekalabo yaye, mi sebeli aondoka feela. Epuzo Okukumanena eyi no Kwinguka Kwaafu (Mateu22.23-33; Maleka12.18-27)
20.27: Cwale sebeli kwiiya Aduki anjili kwa Jesu awo ana kwamba nji kakwisa okwinguka kwaafu,
20.28: mi sebeli amwibanguta nji, “Mwiyeti, Mushe kame ana kutun̄olela omulawo owo wamba nji mukulwaye munu nafi yo kwite omukati kono kakwite omwana, minaye kame afanena okukwata woyo mukati nji alitele mukulwaye aana.’
20.29: Cwale kame kuna kwikalanga alume atanu na yiili, wuyu no weli sebeli okwata omukati kono sebeli ofa nambulwa kuleyelako omwana.
20.31: mane wuyu no waatu sebeli omushimba. Mi onje atanu na yiili sebeli aafa nambulwa kusiya aana.
20.32: Cwale munyima yoo ni mukati sebeli ofa.
20.33: Cwalehe mukwinguka kwaafu anyine sotenda omunya mukati? Kakuli onje kame naku mukwatanga.”
20.34: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Aana namu nako ino kame akwata ni kukwaliwa,
20.35: kono awo sa biwe etukelo no kumona elitunga na kulubala ni kwinguka no aafu awo katamba kukwata ni kukwaliwa.
20.36: Cwale katamba kufa kame, kakuli kame afekile kanyi mangeloi mi aana a Nyambe, atendile aana no kwinguka.
20.37: Kono nji aafu mba inguka, simba Mushe ni yonyene na kwamba ngeeso ku liputa lina kutumbuka aba ana kwisana Mbumu nji Nyambe wa Abulahama, ni Nyambe wa Isaka mane ni Nyambe wa Jakobo.
20.38: Cwale ka Nyambe waa no kufa, kono wawo no kuyoya, kakuli kwa yonyene onje kame ayoya.”
20.39: Cwale an̄oli anjili sebeli aamba nji, “Mwiyeti nwamba wino!”
20.40: Kakuli kame ana kucila oku mwibanguta epuzo injili kame. Epuzo mulibaka lya Jesu (Mateu22.41-46; Maleka12.35-37)
20.41: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Ngasibine aba aamba nji Kilesite ni Mwana Dabida?
20.42: Kakuli Dabida yonyene kame ana kwamba mu buka no Lisamu nji, ‘Ombumu naamba kwa Mbumu wange nji, Oikale ku lyooko lyange no silyo
20.43: okutwala abo sani tendele eila yowe eipula no kulyatabo makondo owe.
20.44: Dabida kame amwisana nji Mbumu, cwale ngasibine omo satendele nji mwanaye? Jesu yoba Emamela kwa Iyeti no Mulawo (Mateu23.1-36; Maleka12.38-40)
20.45: Jesu sebeli wambela aiyetwa aye aanu onje ateetete.
20.46: Mucile an̄oli awo asinga oukumanga mu ikumango no kuleba mane ni kusinga okupota mu ibaka no misika ni kwikala mu ipula no utokwa mu tindoo no milapelo ni mu ibaka no kukutekeha ku mikiti.
20.47: Kame amana eiluwo no akati no ambakati aatendela etitapelo no kuleba! Awo kame sabiwe ekoto no kubambaba onene ni kubitelela!”

21.1: Jesu sebeli waliketa ni kumona awo no kufuma abeeka etimpo too mu sitewelo,
21.2: cwale sebeli omona ombakati no kusheba yo beeka otumiwayawaya twiili.
21.3: Cwale sebeli wamba nji, “Niti luli kame nimyambela nji wuyu mbakati na beeke amali no kupula okubita aanu onje.
21.4: Kakulii onje kame ana tundisa aba no kupula, kono yonyene mukusheba kwaye nabeeke eso ana kwikalanga naso sonje eso ana kufanena nji ayoyelebo.” Jesu yo Amba eyi no Kusinya Endoo ya Nyambe (Mateu24.1-2; Maleka13.1-2)
21.5: Cwale anjili alemine okwamba eyi no Ndoo ya Nyambe omo ina kuyakelwa wino ni mawee no kuwaba mane ni tinubu, sebeli wamba nji,
21.6: “Kanyi einu yonje eyi mumona, enako mba ikwana abo kakwisa eliwee elyo lishangamine ba linjili elyo salikwangwe oku kwisetwa banji.” Amatata ni Mayando (Mateu24.3-14; Maleka13.3-13)
21.7: Cwale sebeli amwibanguta nji, “Mwiyeti, kaliywaa sa itendahale eyi? Mi kasisupo eso sasi monise nji abano okutwa itendahala?
21.8: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba nji, “Mumamele nji mulese okoongiwa kakuli ano kupula mbaiyi mu litina lyange ni kwamba nji, ‘Yamene Jesu!’ mi ‘Enako naikwana!’ Kono mulese kwa kon̄a
21.9: Mulese kucila aba sa muyupe etindwa ni tizikinyeho kakuli eyi kame ifanena okutendahala oweli, kono kasanji amamaneneno kame ali beebi.”
21.10: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Amatunga kame saku futukele oukulwisa, mi emibuso kame sai kufutukele oukulwisa.
21.11: Kame sakwikale etizikinyeho tinene mane mu maneku no kupula kame sakwikale elishebo ni mafu mane kame sakutunde einu no kucilisa kuwilu
21.12: Kono eyi yonje eyakasitendahala kale, kame sa mileme ni makaa oo mane amiyandise ni ku mitwala mu tindoo no milapelo ni mu titolongo mane niku mitwala balubala no ambumu mane na busisi mulibaka no litina lyange.
21.13: Eyo kame saimiiyele nji mube oupaki wange.
21.14: Mukukete mu micima yenu nji mulese kubilaele eyo samwambe.
21.15: Kakuli kame sanimibe eyi no kwamba mane ni kushangama nji kakwisa kwawo amitimbile satwese oku kanana naanyi.
21.16: Kame samubetekiwe simba kwa shemyenu, kwabeenu, asi mukowa wenu mane na likani enu mi anjili kwaanyi kame saibaiwe.
21.17: Aanu onje kame samitimbe mulibaka no litina lyange.
21.18: Kono kakwisa simba oluuki naku mutwi wenu salu sinyehe.
21.19: Mukukoongota kwenu mbamu kawana okuyoyisiwa. Jesu Yoamba oku Sinyiha kwa Jelusalema (Mateu24.15-21; Maleka13.14-19)
21.20: “Kono abasa mumone nji Jelusalema kame atingulukilwe ku masole mulimuke nji oku sinyeha kwaye kame kuli beebi.
21.21: Cwale awo ali mu Judeya ashotokele ku malundu, mi awo ali mukaci no mulenen̄i atundemo, mi awo ali kundee no naha alese kwingena kame.
21.22: Kakuli aa amaywaa no mayando, okwiyateteta eyo yonje ina kun̄oliwa.
21.23: Oumai kwawo saikale naana mane nawo sayamwisa mu maywaa awo! Kakuli outata unene kame sawikaleko mu litunga mi okutweba kame sakwikale kwanuu aa.
21.24: Anjili mbaibaiwa ni kutweba no mukwale mi kame sa komiwe ni kutwaliwa mukaci no asimacaba onje mi Jelusalema kame sa lyatangiwe okubitela abo enako no asimacaba aba saiyatetetwe. Okwiiya kwa Mwana no munu (Mateu24.29-31; Maleka13.24-27)
21.25: “Cwale kame sakwikale esisupo ba liywaa ni kweti ni titungweti, mi ba litunga etinaha kame sati cile ni milumo no mawate ni mandinda.
21.26: Alume kame sa welele mukucila mukumona eyo ikeyile ba litunga, kakuli amaata no liwilu kame sa nyanganyisiwe.
21.27: Cwale kame sa mone Omwana no munu yokeyile mu likumbi ni maata ni kanya inene.
21.28: Cwale einu eyi aba saitangise okutendahala, mwalikete kuwilu mi mwinule emitwi yenu kakuli okuliululwa kwenu sebeli kuli beebi. Etuto no sitondo no Feiga (Mateu24.32-35; Maleka13.28-31)
21.29: Cwale Jesu sebeli waambela enguli nji, “Komumone ku esitondo no Feiga ni itondo injili yonje.
21.30: Aba itangisa okumena amamuna, kame mu mona mwenyene mane ni kulimuka nji embumbi sebeli ili beebi.
21.31: Cwale naanyi ngeeso aba mumona einu eyi eitendahala, mulimuke nji omubuso wa Nyambe sebeli oli beebi.
21.32: Niti luli kame nimwyambela nji olu lusika kalutamba kubwa konji yonje yatendahala kale.
21.33: Eliwilu ni litunga mba ibwi kono eliywi lyange kalitamba kubwa. Outokwa no Kutatelela
21.34: “Cwale mumamele nji emicima yenu ilese oku kandakandiwa ni mikiti ni kunwa ni tinongosi no litunga kakuli elyo eliywaa kame saaliye mukwa limukiwa.
21.35: Kakuli kame saaliyele aanu onje awo ayoya ba litunga lyonje.
21.36: Kono mutone enako yonje memu lapela nji muwane amaata no ka banduka einu eyi saitendahale mane ni kwimana balubala no Mwana no munu.”
21.37: Cwale Jesu amaywaa onje kame ana kwiyetanga mu Ndoo ya Nyambe, kono ousiku sebeli ota okalangana ba lilundu no itondo no olibe,
21.38: Amasikusiku onje aanu kame ana kutanga ku Ndoo ya Nyambe oka muteeteta

22.1: Cwale enako no mukiti no inkwa nambulwa omumena aba ina kusheeteta owo wisaniwa nji Paseka.
22.2: Cwale akulu no apulisita na n̄oli sebeli asaelanga omo saibaele Jesu kakuli kame ana kucila aanu. Judasi abana Kupumena Okubeteka Jesu (Mateu26.14-16; Maleka14.10,11)
22.3: Cwale Satani sebeli oingena mwa Judasi woyo oisaniwa nji Isikaliota, woyo ona kutenda omunjili kwawo no kukwana likumi na yiili.
22.4: Cwale Judasi sebeli ota nu kakwambota na pulisita akulu na endisi omo sa twesete okumubeteka kwa onyene.
22.5: Mi sebeli awabelelwa nji mane kame atwesa okumuba amali.
22.6: Cwale Judasi sebeli opumena nji awane ekolo no kumubeteka oku nambulwa aanu no kupula. Jesu yo Kutukiseta Okalya Omulalelo no Paseka (Mateu26.17-25; Maleka14.12-21; Jowani13.21-30)
22.7: Cwale eliywaa no mukiti no lin̄ende nambulwa omumena abo cwale omukoko no sitabelo aba sina kufanena okutendahala.
22.8: Cwale Jesu sebeli otuma Pitolosi ni Jowani ni kwamba nji, “Mute mi mukalukise esibaka oko satukalyele omulalelo no Paseka.
22.9: Sebeli aamba kwa yonyene nji, “Cwale kubine satu kakulukisete?”
22.10: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Komumone, aba sa mwingene mu mulenen̄i mbamu kuwana ni mulume woyo oshimbile ekomoki no meyi mi mumukon̄e mu ndoo eyo sakaingene,
22.11: cwale mwambele omunya ndoo nji, ‘Omwiyeti kame aamba kwa wene nji, kubine oko kuli omusiyo no angenda oko sa nilyele epaseka na iyetwa ange?’
22.12: Cwale mbami monise omusiyo munene na kuwilu ona wabisiwa wino oko cwale mukalukise einu yonje.”
22.13: Cwale sebeli aata nukawana kanyi omo ana ambelele Jesu, mi sebeli alukisa eilya no paseka. Omulalelo wa Mbumu (Mateu26.26-30; Maleka14.22-26; 1 Makolinte11.23-25)
22.14: Cwale enako aba ina kukwana sebeli oikala ku tafuke na tumiwa aye.
22.15: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Kame niwabelelwe onene okulya epaseka eyi naanyi abo me kani siyanda kale.
22.16: Kakuli kame nimyambela nji sitamba kuulya kame konji aba saiiyatetetwe mu muboso wa Nyambe.”
22.17: Cwale Jesu sebeli oshimba ekomoki, mi aba ana kumana oukutumela sebeli wamba nji, “Mushimbe esi mi mu kutabele mukaci kenu,
22.18: kakuli kame nimyambela nji okutunda balelo sitamba kunwa embuya no waine konji omubuso wa Nyambe aba sa ukeyele.”
22.19: Cwale Jesu sebeli oshimba esinkwa mi abana mana oukutumela sebeli osipatola ni kusiba kwa onyene mane ni kwamba nji, “Olu ni lutu lwange luna biwi kwaanyi. Mutende esi memu ni puluka.”
22.20: Mi kame mundila imweya sebeli waba ekomoki munyima no mulalelo ni kwamba nji, “Eyi ekomoki no unyinga wange ina itelelwe aanyi ni ulikani no ubya.
22.21: Kono komumone elyoko lya woyo oni beteka kame lili ni mene ba tafule.
22.22: Kakuli Omwana no munu kame ata kanyi omo kun̄olelwe, kono oumai niwa woyo omubeteka.
22.23: Cwale sebeli atangisa okwibanguta mukaci koo nji anyine mukaci ketu woyo ofanena okutenda eyi. Etin̄ananyi nji Woyo no Kuneneba Anyine
22.24: Etin̄ananyi sebeli tiinguka mukaci koo nji omunene nanyine.
22.25: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Ambumu no asimacaba kame akubabaza nji kame akwite amaata mukaci koo, mi abusisi kame aku babaza nji alikani no aanu.’
22.26: Kono kasangeeso kwaanyi, cwale aanyi mulesele awo no kuneneba mukaci kenu atende kanyi anyonyo, mane omwendisi kanyi woyo wasebeleza.
22.27: Cwale omunene naanyine woyo oikalile ba tafule simba nji woyo wabelekela? Kana kasa nji woyo oikalile ba tafule, kono kame nili naanyi kanyi woyo omi belekela.
22.28: “Anyi kame muli awo ana kwikala nange mu miliko yange,
22.29: mi cwale kame ni mituma kanyi sitange omo ana ku nitumena mu litunga.
22.30: Kame sa mulye mane ni kunwa ba tafule mu mubuso wange, mane ni kwikala ba lubona lwange okwatula amasika likumi na yiili no Isilaele. Jesu aba Namba Eyi no Kukana kwa Pitolosi (Mateu26.31-35; Maleka14.27-31; Jowani13.36-38)
22.31: “Simoni, Simon! Komone! Satani nai saele nji amyuuluse kanyi uloto.
22.32: Kono kame nina milapelele nji etumelo yenu ilese kubwa. Mi cwale abasa mwiye kwa mene mongote abeenu.
22.33: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mbumu, kame nikutukisite okuta nowe mu tolongo mane ni ku lifu.
22.34: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba nji, “Kame ni kwambela Pitolosi nji omukombwe kautamba kukuwa balelo lino mbu nikana twaatu.” Esipusu, Esipaupau, ni Mukwale
22.35: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, Cwale aba nina kumituma oku nambulwa esikwama simba esipaupau simba etinjatangwa siikene muna kuulwa? Seli amba nji “Kakwisa.”
22.36: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Woyo okwite esipusu asishimbe mane ngeeso ni woyo okwite esipaupau ashimbe mi woyo wakwite omukwale aulise esikumango saye aule mumweya.
22.37: Kakuli kame nimyambela nji elin̄olo eli kame lifanena okwiiyatetetwa mwa mene elyo lyamba nji, ‘Kame ana balelwe kwiisinyi, Kakuli eyange eyo ina n̄oliwa sebeli ikwiyateteta.”
22.38: Cwale sebeli aamba nji, “Omone! Mbumu, ino emikwale yiili!” Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Naku kwana!” Jesu yo Lapela ba Lilundu no Itondo no Olibe (Mateu26.36-46; Maleka14.32-42)
22.39: Cwale Jesu sebeli otunda, ni kuta kanyi omo kuna kutendela nji omukwa waye, ku lilundu no itondo no Olibe, aiyetwa aye sebeli amukon̄a
22.40: Cwale aba ana kukeela ba sibaka Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mulapele nji cwale mulese okwingena mu miliko.”
22.41: Cwale sebeli osheeta okutunda kwa onyene esibaka sikwana ba myeendo no liwee aba likondiwa ni kukubama banji ni manwi sebeli olapela nji,
22.42: “Sitange,” nji kame osinga, otundise esinweno esi kwa mene, kulese okutendiwa eso sisingwa kwa mene, kono eso sisingwa kwa wene.”
22.43: Cwale elingeloi sebeli liiya okutunda ku wilu mukumoongota.
22.44: Cwale yoli mu n̄alelwa no kuneneba sebeli otwalelela okulapela onene, mane esitukutuku saye sebeli sitenda kanyi ounyinga wooyela banji.
22.45: Cwale aba ana kumana okulapela, sebeli oiya kwa iyetwa aye nu kawana alanganine mulibaka no kweena.
22.46: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Iikene aba mulanganine? Mwinguke mulapele nji mulese okwingena mu miliko.” Okunungiwa kwa Jesu (Mateu26.47-56; Maleka14.43-50; Jowani18.3-11)
22.47: Abo yo silemine okwamba sebeli kwiiya enyangela no aanu ni mulume oisaniwa nji Judasi mumweya nwawo no kukwana likumi na yiili, yoatwaletete. Cwale sebeli osheeteta abeebi kwa Jesu ni kumutubeta.
22.48: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Judasi iikene aba obeteka Omwana no munu okumutubeta?”
22.49: Cwale awo ana kwikala naye aba ana kumona eyo ina kutendahala, sebeli amba nji, “Mbumu tulwe ni mikwale yetu?”
22.50: Cwale omunjili mwa onyene sebeli oyaa omubika no mupulisita omukulu niku mupatula elitwi lyaye no silyo.
22.51: Kono Jesu sebeli wamba nji, “Kulese kame okutendahala ngeesi! Cwale sebeli olema elitwi lyaye ni ku mubalisa.
22.52: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa pulisita akulu na endisi no ndoo ya Nyambe na kulu awo ana kwiiya muku mulwisa nji, “Kame muneeyi kanyi kame mulwisa ombuyi ni mikwale mane ni milamu?
22.53: Kono aba nina kwikalanga naanyi amaywaa onje mu Ndoo ya Nyambe, kamu si kunilemanga. Kono ino enako yenu, ni maata no woyo no osiuwi. Pitolosi yo Kana Jesu (Mateu26.57-58; 26.69-75; Maleka14.53-54; 14.66-72; Jowani18.12-18; 18.25-27)
22.54: Cwale sebeli anunga Jesu ni kumutwala mu ndoo no mupulisita omukulu. Pitolosi yo mukon̄a munyima abano kuleba.
22.55: Cwale abana mana okutumbula omulilo mu lilapa no kuta ni kwikala banji bamweya, Pititolosi sebeli oikala mukaci koo.
22.56: Cwale omubeleki no mukati aba ana kumona yo ikalile mu liseli, sebeli omwaliketa ni kwamba nji, “Wuyu mulume ni yonyene mumweya wa Jesu!”
22.57: Kono sebeli okana ni kwamba nji, “Wene wo mukati, mene si muyii!”
22.58: Aba kuna kubita enako icana omunu munjili sebeli omumona ni kwamba nji, “Ni wene kame oli mumweya wa onyene!” Kono Pitolosi sebeli wamba nji, “Wene we mulume, kasa mene!”
22.59: Aba kuna kubita enakao icana omunji kame sebeli oongoteta okwamba nji, “Ni yonyene wuyu mulume mumweya waye, kakuli ni yonyene, Mugalileya!”
22.60: Kono Pitolosi sebeli wamba nji, “Wene we mulume, siyii eso wamba!” Cwale ababo yo samba omukombwe sebeli okuwa.
22.61: Cwale Jesu sebeli okusetuka ni kwaliketa Pitolosi, cwale Pitolosi sebeli opuluka amaywi ana kwamba Jesu kwa yonyene nji, “Omukombe owakasikuwa kale balelo mbuni kana twaatu.”
22.62: Cwale sebeli ota kundee nu kalila onene. Jesu yo Shubaulwa ni Kufuliwa (Mateu26.67-68; Maleka14.65)
22.63: Cwale alume awo ana kulema Jesu sebeli amuyandisa mane ni kumufula.
22.64: Cwale sebeli amununga ku miyo ni ku mwibanguta nji, “Onuhe! anyine ona kufulu?”
22.65: Cwale sebeli aamba amaywi anjili no kupula no kashwau kwa yonyene oku munyefula. Jesu yo Litiwa balubala no Kuta (Mateu26.59-66; Maleka14.55-64; Jowani18.19-24)
22.66: Cwale eliywaa aba lina kukeela omukopano no akulu no apulisita na n̄oli sebeli akuwana bamweya. cwale sebeli atwala Jesu ba kuta yoo ni kwamba nji,
22.67: “Nji ya wene Kilesite, otwambele?” Kono Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Nji ni myambele, kamutamba kupumena,
22.68: cwale nji ni mibangute ka mutamba ku ni tambula.
22.69: Kono okutunda bano Omwana no munu kame saikale ku lyoko no silyo no maata a Nyambe.”
22.70: Cwale onje sebeli aamba nji, “Ya wene cwale Omwana Nyambe? Mi Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Na mwamba ya mene.”
22.71: Cwale sebeli aamba nji, “Ka upaki tusi saela kame! Natu kuyupele twenyene okutunda mu kanwa kaye!”

23.1: Cwale esikwata sonje sebeli siimana ni kutwala Jesu kwa Pilato.
23.2: Cwale sebeli atateka oku mukandimeka aamba nji, “Kame tuna wana wuyu mulume yo yaulula aanu ni kutukanisa nji tulese okuba omutelo kwa Sesale mane ni kwamba nji yonyene yokame Kilesite Ombumu.”
23.3: Cwale Pilalto sebeli omwibanguta nji, “Kana ya wene Ombumu no Majuda? Cwale Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Nwaamba.”
23.4: Cwale Pilato sebeli wamba kwa Pulisita akulu naanu no kupula nji, “Kanisiwana omubonda mwa wuyu omulume.”
23.5: Kono sebeli aongoteta okwamba nji, “Kame afilikanya aanau yo iyeta mu Judeya monje, okutunda mu Galileya mane ni kukeela kuno ku sibaka.” Jesu yo Tumenwa kwa Heloda
23.6: Cwale Pilato aba ana kuyupa eyi, sebeli oibanguta nji, “Wuyu mulume neli Mugalileya?”
23.7: Cwale abana kuyupa nji Jesu kame atunda mu mubuso wa Heloda, sebeli omutumena kwa Heloda ona kwikalanga mu Jelusalema ba nako eyo.
23.8: Cwale Heloda aba ana kumona Jesu sebeli owabelelwa onene kakuli kame ana kushukelanga onenene oku mumona, kakuli na kuyupa eyaye mi kame ana kusepa nji atende emakazo injili.
23.9: Cwale Heloda sebeli oibanguta Jesu etipuzo no kupula, kono yonyene kasi kutambula.
23.10: Akulu no apulisita na n̄oli sebeli aimana balubala lwa Jesu niku mukandimeka.
23.11: Heloda ni maslole aye sebeli ayandisa Jesu ni ku mushubaula mane ni kumufuka olwambi no kubenya ni kumuusa kwa Pilato.
23.12: Okutunda ba liywaa elyo Heloda ni Pilato sebeli akulema oulikani, naba ano kutimbanga onene kunyima. Jesu yo Atulelwa Elifu (Mateu27.15-26; Maleka15.6-15; Jowani18.39; 19.16)
23.13: Pilato cwale sebeli oisana bamweya apulisita akulu na busisi naanu,
23.14: ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, “Kame muna liti wuyu mulume ni kwamba nji kame ayembulula aanu. Cwale aba nina mwibanguta balubala lwenu esawana omubonda mu yaambo yenu mumu kandimeka.
23.15: Simba Heloda ni yonyene namono ngeeso, sana muusete kwaaci. Komumone, kakwisa omubonda ana tende owo ofanena elifu.
23.16: Cwale kame sa ni mufule ni ku mu lukuluka.”
23.17: Kakuli Pilato na kufanena okwa lukulwela omunjili ba nako no mukiti.
23.18: Kono onje sebeli akuwa nji, Aibaiwe! Otulukulwele Banabasi!”
23.19: (Omulume ona kubeekiwa mu tolongo mulibaka no mifilifili ana kwingula mu mulenen̄i ni kwibaa.)
23.20: Pilato sebeli wamba noo kame, mukusinga nji alukulule Jesu.
23.21: Kono sebeli akuweleza onene nji, “Angongoteliwe! Angongoteliwe!”
23.22: Sebeli kame wamba noo aka no waatu nji, “Iikene, eso no kwiiba ana tende? siikene esiyi eso ana tende? Mene kakwisa omubonda nina wana mwa yonyene owo ofanena elifu, kame sani mufule ni ku mulukulula.”
23.23: Kono onje sebeli amba mu kukuweleza nji angongoteliwe, mi okusinga koo sebeli kwiyatetetwa.
23.24: Cwale Pilato sebeli watula nji kutendiwe omo mu singela.
23.25: Cwale sebeli olukuluka omulume ona kubekiwa mu tolongo mulibaka no mifilifili ni kwibaa, woyo ana kukumbela, kono sebeli waaba Jesu mukusinga koo. Jesu yo Ngongotelwa (Mateu27.32-44; Maleka15.21-32; Jowani19.17-27)
23.26: Cwale aka mutwalile sebeli alema Simoni na ku Sillene, woyo ona kwiiya okutunda ku naha indina. Sebeli amushimbisa esifapano munyima ya Jesu.
23.27: Aanu no kupula sebeli amukon̄anga munyima na akati alila nukufula ba saali mulibaka lyaye.
23.28: Kono Jesu sebeli okutemuna ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, “Aana no akati no Jelusalema, mulese ku lila mene, kono mukulile mwenyene naanenu.
23.29: Kakuli komumone amaywaa akeyile abo aanu saambe nji, ‘Embuyoti yawo akati no kwaleye, ni mapumo awo nokwa kushimba mane ni maele awo no kwayamwisa!’
23.30: Cwale kame satateke okwamba ku malundu nji, ‘Mutukwele beulu!’ mane ni ku tulundu tucana nji, ‘Mutufuke!’
23.31: Kakuli nji atende eyi abo eitondo esili eyi no kuyuba, ngasibine saku tendahale aba saikukute?”
23.32: Eikebenga yiili no alume sebeli aishimba bamweya naye nji akaibae ni Jesu.
23.33: Cwale abana kukeela ba sibaka siisaniwa nji Katendele ababo sebeli amungongotela bamweya ni ikebenga yiili. Mi esikebenga esinjili ku lineku no silyo esinjili ku simoo.
23.34: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba nji, Sitange, waa lemene, kakuli kayii eso atenda.” Cwale sebeli akutabela eibyana yaye mu kushebuluka.
23.35: Cwale aanu sebeli aimana aalikete. Kono abusisi sebeli anyefula Jesu ni kwamba nji, “Kame ana ku yoyisanga aanu cwale akuyoyise yonyene nji ya Kilesite wa Nyambe, woyo ana kuketa!”
23.36: Amasole nonyene sebeli amuyandisa ni kwiiya kwa yonyene ni kumuba ebeine,
23.37: ni kwamba nji, “Nji yawene Ombumu no Majuda okuyoyise wenyene!”
23.38: Mi beulu yaye kame kuna kun̄oliwa elin̄olo nji, “Wuyu ya Mbumu no Majuda,”
23.39: Esinjili no sikebanga eso sina kungongoteliwa ni Jesu sebeli saamba nji, “Kawene Kilesite? Okuyoyise mane naaci otuyoyise!”
23.40: Kono esinjili sebeli simukalimela ni kwamba nji, “Kucili Nyambe, kakuli wene kame oli mu katulo imweya no kufanena okufa.
23.41: Cwale kame tufanena kakuli kame tutambula omupuzo no eyi tunatende, kono wuyu mulume kasitenda esi no kwiiba.”
23.42: Cwale sebeli wamba nji, “Jesu oka nipuluke abo so kaingene mu mubuso wowe!”
23.43: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Niti luli kame ni kwambela nji balelo kame so kaikale ni mene mu Paladaisi.” Elifu lya Jesu (Mateu27.45-56; Maleka15.33-41; Jowani19.28-30)
23.44: Kame ina ku kwana enako no munji mi ouwi sebeli ufuka enaha yonje mane konji okakeela ba hola no utanu ni tunee (9)
23.45: mi eliywaa sebeli liilola, cwale olwambi luna ku tulekiwangwa mu keleke sebeli lukauka bakaci.
23.46: Cwale Jesu abana mana okulila ni mulumo munene sebeli wamba nji, “Tate mu maoko owe mwa nibeeka emebo yange!” Cwale abana mana okwamba eyo, sebeli ooyela aka no mamaneneno.
23.47: Cwale omutateleli abana kumona eso sina tendahala sebeli oyeema Nyambe ni kwamba nji, “Niti luli wuyu mulume muwa kakwite omubonda!”
23.48: Cwale oundi ona kuungana ba sibaka aba ona kumona eso sina kutendahala, cwale sebeli auka ku mindi alemine ba yaali aenine onene.
23.49: Cwale onje awo ana kulimukanga Jesu nakati ana kumukon̄a okutunda ku Galileya sebeli aimana oku no kuleba alikete einu eyi. Okupumbekwa kwa Jesu (Mateu27.57-61; Maleka15.42-47; Jowani19.38-42)
23.50: Cwale kame kuna kwikalanga omulume no litina lya Josefa na ku Alimateya etolopo no Mujuda. Neli omunjili no manduna no Kuta, omulume no kuluka ni uwaa,
23.51: woyo kasi kutenda esi no kwiiba, kono kame ana kusaelanga omubuso wa Nyambe.
23.52: Woyo mulume sebeli ota kwa Pilato nuka kumbela olutu lwa Jesu.
23.53: Cwale sebeli oshimba olutu lwa Jesu ni ku lupungela mu lwambi no likena ni kumubeeka mu liyumbelo omo kaku sikupumbekiwamo kale omunu.
23.54: Mi neli eliywaa no ukutukiseta omukiti no Pumulo nji otateke.
23.55: Akati ana kumukon̄a Jesu okutunda ku Galileya sebeli amona eliyumbelo omo ana kulangeka Jesu.
23.56: Cwale sebeli auka okalukisa emitondo ni maati no kumuwaa ba lutu. Ba liywaa no Pumulo sebeli apumula okukumanena ni mulawo.

24.1: Kono cwale ba liywaa no matatekelo no sunda amasikusiku akati sebeli ata ku liyumbelo, okutwala emitondo ana kuula.
24.2: Cwale sebeli akawana eliwee nali tundisiwa ba liyumbelo,
24.3: kono aba ana kwingena mu liyumbelo kasi kuwana olutu lwaye.
24.4: Asikomokile eyo sebeli amona alume ayiili aimanine aku mangile eikumango no kumyamyata.
24.5: Cwale asikomokike ni kwinamena etimala banji, alume sebeli amba kwa onyene nji, “Iikene aba musaela wuyu no kuyoya kwaafu?
24.6: Kamupuluke eyo ana kumyambela Jesu yosili mu Galileya.
24.7: ‘Nji Omwana no munu kame sabeekiwe mu maoko no aanu asikutenda esibi, mane angongoteliwe, mi liywaa no waatu ainguke.’ ”
24.8: Cwale akati awo sebeli apuluka amaywi aye,
24.9: mi aba ana kuuka okutunda ku liyumbelo sebeli ambela ano kukwana likumi ni mumweya ni kwaanu onje eyo ina tendahala.
24.10: Cwale neli Maliya Magdalena ni Jo-anna ni Maliya inawaye Jakobo na njili akati sebeli aamba eyi kwa tumiwa.
24.11: Kono amaywi aa kame ana kumonahala kwa onyene nji matangu mi kasi kwapumena.
24.12: Kono Pitolosi sebeli oimana ni kwitukela ku liyumbelo aka nangelamo, kono sebeli okawana feela olwambi ana kupungeliwamo mi Jesu kasamo. Sebeli ouka yo komokile esi sina tendahala. Omwendo no Kuta ku Imause (Maleka16.12,13)
24.13: Ba liywaa elyo ayiili kwawo ana ku kon̄anga Jesu sebeli ata ku mundi wisaniwa nji Emausi ibima ikwana itanu ni yiili okutunda ku Jelusalema,
24.14: alemine okwambota kwiinu yonje eyo ina tendahala.
24.15: Alemine okwamba nu kwambota bamweya, Jesu ni yonyene sebeli osheeteta ni kuta noo.
24.16: Kono amiyo oo sebeli akwangwwa oku mulimuka,
24.17: Jesu sebeli wamba nji, “Iikene mukwambota me mweenda?” Cwale sebeli aimana ni kumonahala okweena.
24.18: Cwale omunjili mukaci koo, osilitina lya Kileopasi sebeli otambula Jesu nji, “Wene wemboci feela ongenda nokwalimuka eyo ina tendahala mu Jelusalema mu maywaa ano?”
24.19: Jeau sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Iikene einu eyo? mi sebeli aamba nji, “Okukumanena neyi ya Jesu no Nazaleta,” woyo ona kutendanga omunuhi wa Nyambe mu musebezi ni liywii balubala wa Nyambe naanu onje.
24.20: Omo apulisita etu no akulu na busisi omo ana kumutwalela nji aibaiwe ni kungongoteliwa.
24.21: Kono kame tuna kusepa nji yoso yoyisa Isilaele! Ee, mi komone munyima no eyi, sebeli maywaa aatu okutunda abo ina kutendahalela eyi.
24.22: Cwale akati no sikwata setu nakutu komokisa, kakuli kame ana kwikala ku liyumbelo amasiku-siku.
24.23: Kono kasi kuwana olutu lwaye, cwale sebeli auka aamba nji kono kame ana kumona epono no mangeloi awo ana kwamba nji kame ayoya.
24.24: Mu sikwata setu anjili sebeli ata ku liyumbelo nu kawana kanyi eso ana kwamba akati, kono yonyene kasi kumumona.”
24.25: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Anyi alume no aelo no micima no kwapumena wangu yonje eyo ana kwamba anuhi a Nyambe!
24.26: Kana kasi kulukela nji Kilesite ayandele einu ni kwingena mu kanya yaye?”
24.27: Cwale okutateka kwa Mushe nanuhi onje a Nyambe na kwatolokela mu man̄olo onje okukumanena ni Jesu.
24.28: Cwale aba ana kusheeteta abeebi ni mundi ana kuta, Jesu sebeli omonahala yoli balubala loo,
24.29: kono sebeli amuusa ni kwamba nji, “oikale naaci kakuli sebeli mangolwaa mi eliywaa lyaika kale.” Cwale sebeli ota okaikala noo.
24.30: Cwale yoli noo ba tafule sebeli oshimba esinkwa ni kusifuyola ni kusipatoola mane ni kwaaba.
24.31: Cwale amiyo oo sebeli atona ni kumulimuka nji ya Jesu, kono sebeli opicuka mukaci koo.
24.32: Cwale sebeli akwambota mukaci koo nji, “Kandi ngasibine emicima yetu kai simatuka aba ana mbanga naaci mu ndila, abo mane yo tubalela aman̄olo?”
24.33: Cwale sebeli aimana mu nako eyeyo ni kuuka ku Jelusalema, nukawana ano kukwana likumi ni mumweya aunganine bamweya nawo ana kwikalanga noo,
24.34: ona kwamba nji, “Ombumu nainguka luli mi namonahala kwa Simoni!”
24.35: Cwale sebeli aamba eyo ina tendahala mu ndila, mane nomo ana kumu limukela ba kupatoola esinkwa. Jesu yo Kumonahaza kwa Iyetwa aye (Mateu28.16-20; Maleka16.14-18; Jowani20.19-23; Tikezo1.6-8)
24.36: Asilemine okwamba eyi, Jesu yonyene sebeli oimana mukaci koo.
24.37: Sebeli acila onene oku yambuta nji mwendi silumba ana mono.
24.38: Sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Iikene eyo mukukataleza mane nuukwibanguta etipuzo mu micima yenu.?
24.39: Komumone amaoko ni makondo nji yamene, komuni leme kakuli esilumba kasikwite olutu simba eifuba kakuli mene mumwine nji nikwite.”
24.40: Kame ana kwamba eyi ni kwamonisa amakaa aye ni makondo aye.
24.41: Asiulwile okupumena, mulibaka no ku wabelelwa, ni kukomoka, sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mukwite esi no kulya?”
24.42: Sebeli amuba eseemba no ndi no kukon̄ela,
24.43: mi sebeli oshimba ni kulya balubala woo amwine.
24.44: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Aa amaywi ange awo nina kwamba kwaanyi meni sili nenu nji yonje eyo in̄olilwe mu mulawo wa Mushe nanuhi a Nyambe ni mu lisamu iiyatetetwe.”
24.45: Cwale Jesu sebeli oyatulula etingana too nji ayupisise aman̄olo,
24.46: cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Esi sokame sin̄olilwe nji Kilesite afanene okuyanda nji eli no waatu ainguke kwaafu,
24.47: mi nji okubaka ni kulemeniwa eibi iyitiwe mu litina lyaye mu tinaha tonje okutateka mu Julusalema.
24.48: Aanyi muli apaki no inu eyi.
24.49: Cwale komumone, kame nituma esepiso ya sitange kwaanyi, kono mwikale mu mulenen̄i okutwala abo samu katambulele amaata atunda ku wilu. Jesu yo Shimbelwa Kuwilu (Maleka16.19-20; Tikezo1.9-11)
24.50: Cwale Jesu sebeli washimba ni kuta ku Betaniya, cwale sebeli oimeka amakaa aye ni kwa fuyola.
24.51: Ababo yo lemine okwa fuyola sebeli waasiya ni ku shimbelwa kuwilu.
24.52: Cwale sebeli auka ku Jelusalema awabelelwe onene,
24.53: cwale sebeli atwalelela mu Ndoo ya Nyambe alumbeka Nyambe.

1.1: Ku simuluho kame kuna kwikala Eliywi, mi Eliywi kame lina kwikala ni Nyambe, mi Eliywi neeli Nyambe.
1.2: Kame ana kwikala ku simuluho ni Nyambe.
1.3: Einu yonje kame ina tendiwa mwa yonyene, mi kweyi ina tendiwa kakwisa esinu no kwaa tendiwa yonyene.
1.4: Mwa yonyene kame kuna kwikala omooyo, mi omooyo neli eliseli no aanu onje.
1.5: Eliseli kame libenya mu uwi, mi ouwi kawasikoma eliseli.
1.6: Kame kuna kwikala omunu ona ku tumiwa okutunda kwa Nyambe, mi elitina lyaye neli Jowani.
1.7: Kame ana kwiyela oupaki, mukupaka eyi no liseli, nji mwa yonyene aanu onje apumene.
1.8: Kasa nji yokame eliseli kono kame ana kwiiya mu kupaka eino liseli.
1.9: Neli eliseli no niti elyo limonyekela omunu yonje woyo oiya mu litunga.
1.10: Na kwikala mu litunga, mi elitunga kame lina tendiwa mwa yonyene, mi elitunga kalisi ku mulimuka kale.
1.11: Kame ana kwiiya ku naha yaye, mi aanu aye kasi kumu tambula.
1.12: Kono kwa onyene onje ana kumu tambula, awo ana kupumena mu litina lyaye, kame anaabi amaata no kutenda aana a Nyambe.
1.13: Awo na kwa leiwa ku unyinga, simba etakazo no unu, simba oku singa kwa munu, kono oku singa kwa Nyambe.
1.14: Cwale Eliywi sebeli litendiwa omunu ni kuyaka mwaaci, yo iyalile esishemo ni niti, mi kame tuna kubuha ekanya yaye, eili ekanya eyi ilukela Omwana no libanda woyo otunda kwa Sitange.
1.15: Jowani kame ana ku paka eyaye niku kuweleza nji, “Yokame woyo nina kwamba nji, ‘Woyo oniiya munyima kame anibita, kakuli kame ana kwikalako oweli kwa mene.’ ”
1.16: Cwale mu kwiyala kwaye kame tuna wana tonje, esishemo esi siekeza ba sishemo.
1.17: Kakuli omulawo na ukwiiya mu libaka lya Mushe, esishemo ni niti kame ineeyi mu libaka lya Jesu Kilesite.
1.18: Kakwisa omunu onaku monabo Nyambe. Konji Omwana feela, woyo oli ba saali sa Sitaye, yo kame woyo ona mutende nji alimukiwe. Elin̄usa lya Jowani Omukolobezi
1.19: Cwale uno oupaki wa Jowani, aendisi no Majuda aba ana kutuma apulisita ni Malebi okutunda ku Jelusalema okwiiya muku mwibanguta nji, “Tiwe anyine?”
1.20: Jowani sebeli opumena, kasikukana, kono sebeli wamba nji, “Kasa mene Kilesite.”
