15.5: Time ebeine, anyi kame muli emitayi. Woyo okubeeka mwa mene, ni mene kame nili mwa yonyene, yokame woyo obeeka embuya onene, kakuli nji sisako ka mutwese okutenda esinjili.
15.6: Nji omunu kakubeeke mwa mene, kame akoliwa kanyi omutayi ni kukukuta, mi emitayi kame yungekiwa ni kukondelwa mu mulilo mane ni kubya.
15.7: Nji kame mukubekile mwa mene mane amaywi ange kame ali mwaanyi, mukumbele eso sonje musinga mi mbamu sitendelwe.
15.8: Ba kutenda ngeso Sitange mba kanyisiwa nji kame mubeeka onene embuya, mi bokame aba samutende aiyetwa ange.
15.9: Kanyi Sitange aba ana nisingi ni mene kame nimi singa ngeso, mu yoye mu lilato lyange.
15.10: Nji kame muteula etitaelo tange, kame sa mwikale mu lilato lyange, kanyi aba nina mamele etitaelo ta Sitange mane kame niikalile mu lilato lyaye.
15.11: Kame nina myambele eyo nji okuwabelelwa kwange kwikale mwaanyi nji cwale okuwabelelwa kwenu kwiyale.
15.12: Etaelo yange ninji muku singe omunjili ku munjili, kanyi aba nina misingi.
15.13: Kakwisa omunu woyo oli ni lilato no kuneneba okubitelela eli, konji omunu okutoboha omoyo waye mulibaka no alikani aye.
15.14: Kame muli alikani ange nji kame mutenda eyo nimi laelela.
15.15: Sitamba oku miisana nji muli abika, kakuli omubika ka limuka eso atenda Molyaye. Kono kame nimiisana alikani ange, kakuli kame nina misimwete eyi nina yupu yonje kwa Sitange.
15.16: Kasa anyi muna nikete, kono time nina mikete ni kumi tuma nji mute mane muka beeke embuya onene. Cwale embuya yenu iikalelele, nji cwale esi sonje samu kumbele kwa Sitange mu litina lyange amibe so.
15.17: Esi nimi laela ninji, muku singe omunjili ku munjili. Olutimbo no Litunga
15.18: Nji elitunga kame limi timbile, mulimuke nji kame lina tateke okutimba mene oweli ekalya sitimba anyi.
15.19: Kambe kame muli asi litunga, elitunga kame lisinga esi sili salyo. Kono kakuli kasa muli ano litunga, kono kame nina mikete mu litunga, bokame abo elitunga aba limi timbile.
15.20: Mu puluke eliywi elyo nina kumyambele nji, ‘Omubika kasa wakuneneba okubitelela Molyaye.’ Nji kame ani yandisa, mba mi yandisa naanyi, nji kame ana mamele eliywi lyange, mba mamele ngeso ni lyenu.
15.21: Kono kame sami tende eyo yonje mulibaka lyange, kakuli kayii woyo ona ni tumu.
15.22: Kambe kani siiya mu kwaambela kambe kakwite esibi, kono cwale kaku tatula ku sibi soo.
15.23: Woyo onitimbile kame atimbile ngeso ni Sitange.
15.24: Kambe ka ni sitenda mukaci koo emisebezi eyo kakwisa omunu ona itende, kambe kakwite esibi kono cwale kame ana mono, mane kame atimbile mene bamweya ni Sitange.
15.25: Neli okwiyateteta eliywi elyo lina kun̄oliwa mu mulawo woo nji, ‘Kame ani timbile feela okuulwile omubonda.’
15.26: Kono cwale Omombaombi aba saiye, woyo sani tume kwaanyi okutunda kwa Sitange. Simba Emebo no niti eyo saitunde kwa Sitange kame saibe oupaki kwa mene.
15.27: Cwale naanyi mba mwipaka, kakuli namwikala ni mene okutunda ku matatekelo.

16.1: Kame nina myambele eyo nji mulese oku sitatala.
16.2: Mba mitundisa mu tindoo no milapelo mane enako kame iiya eyo omunu yonje oso miibaa, mba yambuta nji kame abelekela Nyambe.
16.3: Cwale mbami tende einu eyo kakuli kasi limuka Sitange simba mene.
16.4: Kono kame nina myambele einu eyi nji cwale enako yoo aba saiye, mba puluka nji kame nina ku myambela einu yoo. Omusebezi no Mebo No Kukena Ka nisi myambela einu eyi mu matangiseto, kakuli kame nina kwikala naanyi.
16.5: Kono cwale kame nita kwa woyo ona kunituma, mi kakwisa kwaanyi woyo soni ibanguta nji kubine ukatile.
16.6: Kono kakuli kame nina myambele einu eyi, elikenyi naliyala mu micima yenu.
16.7: Simbakutendengeso kame nina myambela eniti, kame kumi lukeele aba nita kakuli aba niulwa okuta, Omuombaombi katamba okwiiya kwaanyi. Kono aba nita, mba nimu tumu kwaanyi.
16.8: Cwale aba saiye, mba kolwisa elitunga mulibaka no sibi, okuluka mane ni katulo.
16.9: Okukumanena ni sibi kakuli ka pumene mwa mene,
16.10: okukumanena ni kuluka kakuli kame nita kwa Sitange, mi kamu tamba kuni mona
16.11: okukumanena ni katulo, kakuli omubusi no litunga lino na atuliwa.
16.12: Ni sili neyi no kupula no kumyambela, kono kamu twese okwiyupisisa bano.
16.13: Emebo no niti aba saiye, kame sa mi twale mu niti yonje kakuli ka tamba okwambela yonyene, kono mba myambele eyi ana yupu yonje mane ami lemuse neyi isiiya.
16.14: Mba nikanyisa, kakuli mba shimbi kweyi ili yange, mi mba myambele yo.
16.15: Esi sonje ali naso Sitange sange, cwalehe kame ninaamba nji mba shimbi kwesi sili esange, mi kame sami limukise so. Okweena ni Kuwabelelwa kwa luli
16.16: Kwesili enakoicana, mi ka mu tamba kuni mona, mi kame enakoicana mba muni mono.
16.17: Anjili kwa iyetwa aye sebeli akwambota omunjili ku munjili nji, “Iikene eyi aamba wuyu kwaaci? Nji mu nako icana feela kamutamba kuni mona, mi mu nako icala kame mbamu nimono ni kwamba nji, ‘Kame nita kwa Sitange.’
16.18: Seli aamba nji iikene aba aamba nji, ‘Mu nako icana feela?’ Katuyii esi atalusa.”
16.19: Jesu muku limuka nji kame asinga okumwibanguta, cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Esi sokame mukwibanguta mukaci kenu nji ‘Mu nako icana feela kamutamba kunimona, mi mu nako icana kame mbamu nimono’?
16.20: Niti luli kame ni myambela nji mba mu lili, mane kame sa mu bokolole, mi elitunga mba linyakalala. Mba mweene, kono okweena kwenu mba kufutuka okuwabelelwa.
16.21: Omukati aba aleya kame akukalelwa, kakuli enako yaye na ikeela, kono aba amana okuleya omwana, ka puluka en̄alelwa yaye, mulibaka no kuwabelelwa nji omwana na leiwa mu litunga.
16.22: Naanyi ngeso, kame muli mu likenyi bano, kono mba nimi mono kame emicima yenu mba iwabelelwa. Mi kakwisa omunu so mi byangula okuwabelelwa kwenu.
16.23: Ba liywaa elyo kamu tamba kuni ibanguta simweya. Niti luli kame ni myambela nji eso sonje sa mukumbele kwa Sitange, mba mibi so mu litina lyange.
16.24: Kubitela bano ka mu sikumbela simweya mu Litina lyange. Mu kumbele mi mba musi biwi, nji okuwabelelwa kwenu kutende okuno kwiyala. Okukoma Elitunga
16.25: “Kame nina myambele eyi mu tinguli. Kono enako kame iiya, eyi sa ni lesele okwamba naanyi mu tinguli, ni myambele eniti eyi ya Sitange.
16.26: Eliywaa elyo, kame sa mu kumbele mu Litina lyange, mi ka naamba nji mbani mi lapelele kwa Sitange.
16.27: Kakuli Sitange yonyene kame amisinga, kakuli namu nisingi, mi kame muna pumene nji kame nina tundu kwa Sitange.
16.28: Kame nina tundu kwa Sitange, mi kame ni neeyi mu litunga kono cwale kame ni siya elitunga okuuka okuta kwa Sitange.”
16.29: Aiyetwa aye sebeli aamba kwa yonyene nji, “Omone, cwale kame wamba wino, kasa okwamba mu tinguli.
16.30: Cwale na tu lemuha nji kame ulimuka einu yonje, mi ku saele nji omunu a kwibangute. Mumukwanongeso, kame tu pumena nji kame utunda kwa Nyambe.”
16.31: Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Cwale bano kame mu pumena?
16.32: Enako kame ikeyile, mane naikeela, eyi sa muhasane, munu ni munu ku ndoo yaye mi mba mu ni siyi memboci. Kono ka nili memboci, kakuli Sitange kame ali ni mene.
16.33: Kame nina myambele eyo nji mwamene mwikale ni kozo mu micima mulibaka lyange. Kame sa muyandisiwe mu litunga kono mongole emicima, kame nina komo elitunga.”

17.1: Cwale Jesu aba ana kumana okwamba amaywi awo, sebeli waliketa amiyo aye ku wilu ni kwamba nji, “Sitange, enako naikeela. Okanyise Mwanowe nji Omwana aku kanyise.
17.2: Kakuli kame ona mubi amaata beulu no aanu onje, okuba omoyo no kwaabwa kwa woyo yonje ona mubi.
17.3: Uno omoyo no kwaabwa, nji aku limuke, wene Nyambe no niti ni Jesu Kilesite woyo ona kutuma.
17.4: Kame ni kukanyisa mu litunga, mukumana omusebezi ona kuniba mu litunga nji ni utende.
17.5: Cwale bano Sitange, onikanyise ba lubala lowe ni kanya iya nina kwikala nayo ni weene abo elitunga ekalya sumbiwa kale.” Jesu yo Lapelela Aiyetwa Aye
17.6: “Kame nina limukisa elitina lyowe kwaanu ona nibi mu litunga. Kame ali kwa wene mi nonibi woo mane na mamele eliywi lyowe,
17.7: cwale kame alimukile nji esinu sonje eso ona nibi, kame situnda kwa wene.
17.8: Kakuli kame ninaabi amaywi ona nibi, mi kame anaa tambula mane na limuka muniti nji kame ninatundu kwa wene, mi na pumene nji kame ona nitumu.”
17.9: Kame na lapelela. Silapelele elitunga kono kame nilapelela awo ona nibi, kakuli owe.
17.10: Yonje eyo nili nayo yowe, mi yowe yange, mi kame ni kanyisiwa mwa onyene.
17.11: Cwale bano silimo mu litunga, kono onyene kame ali mu litunga mi mene kame ni keyile kwa wene. Sitange No Kukena, wateule mu litina lyowe, elyo onanibi wene nji atende amweya kanyi aci.
17.12: Abo meni sili noo, kame nina kwateula mu litina lyowe, awo ona kuniba, mi kame nina kwa sileleza mi kwa onyene kakwisa woyo ona tauka, konji woyo anakulimuka nji mbatauka, nji elin̄olo liiyatetetwe.
17.13: Kono bano kame ni iiya kwa wene, mi einu eyi naamba mu litunga, nji cwale aikale ni kuwabelelwa kwange nji iiyatetetwe mwa onyene.
17.14: Kame ninaambele eliywi lyowe, mi elitunga kame lyatimbile kakuli onyene kaa ano litunga, kanyi mene aba ka nili osi litunga.
17.15: Ka niku lapelele nji wa tundise mu litunga, kono nji wa sileleze kwa woyo no kwiiba.
17.16: Kasa ano litunga lino, kanyi mene aba ka nili osi litunga.
17.17: Wakenise mu niti yowe kakuli eliywi lyowe lyokame eniti.
17.18: Kanyi aba ona nitumu mu litunga, cwale ni mene kame ninaa tumu mu litunga.
17.19: Mi mulibaka lyoo kame ni kukenisa menyene, nji nonyene abiwe okukenisa mu yonyene eniti. Jesu yo Lapelela Alupumena Onje
17.20: “Ka nilapelele onyene feela, kono kame ni lapelela ngeso nawo sa pumene mwa mene mu liywi lyoo.
17.21: Nji onje atende mumweya, kanyi wene Sitange aba uli kwa mene, ni mene kwa wene. Nonyene ngeso atende mumweya kwaaci, nji elitunga li pumene nji tiwe ona nitumu.
17.22: Ekanya eyo ona nibi kame ninaibi kwa onyene nji atende amweya kanyi aci aba tuli mumweya.
17.23: Mene, ni ikale kwa onyene, ni wene kwa mene, nji atendiwe asi kupetahala mu umweya, mi elitunga li limuke nji tiwe onani tumu, ninji kame onaa singi kanyi omu ona nisingele.
17.24: “Sitange, kame ni lakaza nji awo onanibi aikale ni mene omo nili, nji amone ekanya yange eyo onakuniba kakuli kame ona kunisinga elitunga eka lyasitendiwa kale.
17.25: Wene Sitange no kuluka! Elitunga kalikuyii, kono mene nikuyii, mi nonyene kame ayii nji nauni tumu.
17.26: Kame ninaa simwete elitina lyowe, mi mba na simweta lyo, kakuli elilato ona nisingi liikale mwa onyene, mane nimene niikale mwa onyene.”

18.1: Cwale Jesu aba ana kumana okwamba amaywi aa, sebeli ota naiyetwa aye mu linjaliya no Kasindi no Kediloni, omo kuna kwikala elitema, mi sebeli oingenamo na iyetwa aye.
18.2: Cwale Judasi woyo ona kumu beteka, kame ana kulimuka esibaka eso, kakuli Jesu mwana ku kuwanenanga na iyetwa aye aka no kupula.
18.3: Cwale Judasi sebeli oshimba esikwata no Masole ni tinumwana eti titunda kwa pulisita akulu nafalisi, sebeli ata mu litema ni tilambi ni mamonyi, mane neyi no kulwisa.
18.4: Cwale Jesu muku limuka eso sasi mwiyele, sebeli wiiya kwa onyene ni kwamba nji, “Anyine musaela?”
18.5: Seli amutambula nji, “Jesu no Nazaleta,” Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Yamene.” Judasi, ona kumubeteka, yo imanine noo.
18.6: Aba ana kwaambela nji , mene uno, sebeli auka ngombemongo, ni kukwela banji.
18.7: Jesu sebeli waibanguta kame nji, “Anyine mu saela?” Seli aamba nji, “Jesu no Nazaleta.”
18.8: Jesu sebeli waatambula nji, “Kame nina myambele nji, yamene uno,” “Nji kame mu saela mene, mu lesele aa alume akutele.”
18.9: Neli nji kwiyatetetwe eliywi eli ana kwamba nji, “Ka nisi taukelwa omunu simba mumweya, kwawo ona nibi.”
18.10: Cwale Simoni Pitolosi ona kulema omukwale, sebeli oushomona ni kuuyaa omubika no mupulisita omukulu, mi sebeli omu patula elitwi no silyo, Omubika woyo kame ana kwisaniwa nji Malukuse.
18.11: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa Pitolosi nji, “Ouse omukwale mu sipusu sao. Ninji nikwangwe okunwa mu sinweno esi ana nibi Sitange?” Jesu yoli ba Lubala lwa Anasi
18.12: Cwale esikwata no masole ni mwendisi waso ni tinumwana naendisi no Majuda, sebeli alema Jesu ni kumu nunga,
18.13: mi sebeli amu twala oweli kwa Anasi, kakuli neli njemunwaye Kayafa woyo ona kutendanga omupulisita mukulu mu mwaka owo.
18.14: Kayafa yokame ona kweleza aendisi no Majuda nji kame kufanena nji omunu mumweya afela aanu. Pitolosi yo Kana Jesu (Mateu26.69-70; Maleka14.66-68; Luka22.55-57)
18.15: Simoni Pitolosi kame ana kukon̄anga Jesu, bamweya ni mwiyetwa munjili. Omwiyetwa woyo kame ana kulimukiwa kwa mupulisita mukulu, cwale sebeli oingena bamweya ni Jesu mu lilapa no mupulisita mukulu,
18.16: ababo Pitolosi yo imanine kundee ba mweelo. Cwale omwiyetwa munjili woyo ona kulimukiwa kwa mupulisita mukulu sebeli obanena kundee nukaamba ni mutateleli naba mweelo, mi sebeli oingenyeka Pitolosi mu lilapa.
18.17: Cwale omutateleli naba mwelo sebeli wamba kwa Pitolosi nji, “Kana ni wene kame uli omunjili nwaa iyetwa no munu wuyu?” Pitolosi sebeli otambula nji, “Kokuulwa, kasa mene.”
18.18: Cwale abika ni tinumwana tina kwikala omo sebeli atumbula omulilo, kakuli kame kuna kombola mi kame ana kwimana ayota omulilo. Ni yonyene Pitolosi na kwikala noo yoimanine okuyota omulilo. Omupulisita mukulu yo Ibanguta Jesu (Mateu26.59-66; Maleka14.55-64; Luka22.66-71)
18.19: Omupulisita omukulu sebeli oibanguta Jesu mulibaka no aiyetwa aye ni tuto yaye.
18.20: Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Kame ninaamba aba no kukena kwaanu, aka no kupula kame nina kwa iyeta mu tindoo no milapelo, omo anaku kuwanenanga Amajuda onje, mi kanasi kwamba esinjili ku nyonga.
18.21: Iikene aba oni ibanguta? Oibangute awo ana niyupu esi ninaamba kwa onyene kame ayii eyi naamba.”
18.22: Cwale Jesu aba ana kumana okwamba eyi, omunjili no atateleli ona kwimana abeebi ni yonyene, sebeli omu fula ni lyoko lyaye ni kwamba nji, “Mokame omo otambulela omupulisita mukulu!”
18.23: Jesu sebeli omu tambula nji, “Nji kani saamba wino, otaluse eso sinaibi, kono nji kame ninaamba wino, siikene eso oni fulela?”
18.24: Cwale Anasi sebeli omu tumena kwa Kayafa omupulisita omukulu yo nungilwe. Pitolosi yo Kana Jesu Kame (Mateu26.71-75; Maleka14.69-72; Luka22.58-62)
18.25: Cwale Simoni Pitolosi yo imanine okututumuna ku mulilo. Seli aamba kwa yonyene nji, “Kasanji ni wene kame uli omunjili no aiyetwa aye?” Pitolosi sebeli okana ni kwamba nji, “Kokuulwa kasa mene.”
18.26: Omunjili kwabika no mupulisita omukulu, omwabaye woyo ona ku patuliwa elitwi kwa Pitolosi, sebeli omwibanguta nji, “Kanisi ku kumona ni yonyene mu litema?”
18.27: Pitolosi sebeli okana kame mi ababo, omukombwe sebeli olila. Jesu Yoli ba Lubala lwa Pilato (Mateu27.1; 2; 11.14; Maleka15.1-5; Luka23.1-5)
18.28: Cwale sebeli atundisa Jesu mu ndoo ya Kefasi okumutwala ku kuta, neli amasiku. Kono onyene kasikwingena mu Kuta, nji cwale onyene aulwe ouku silafaza, kono atwese okulya Epaseka.
18.29: Cwale Pilato sebeli obanena kwa onyene ni kwaibanguta nji, “Iikene mu mukandimeka wuyu mulume?”
18.30: Sebeli amutambula nji, “Nji wuyu mulume kasitenda eyi no kwiiba, kambe katusi mulita kwa wene.”
18.31: Pilato sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mu mushimbe anyi, mi mu mwatule ni mulawo wenu.” Aendisi no Majuda sebeli amu tambula nji, “Kasa etukelo yetu nji twibae omunu.” (
18.32: Esi neli okwiyateteta eliywi elyo ana kwamba Jesu okumonisa elifu safe.)
18.33: Cwale Pilato sebeli oingena mu Kuta kame ni kwisana Jesu ni kumwibanguta nji, “Tiwe Ombumu no Majuda?”
18.34: Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Kana kame okwambela feela mu maata owe nji anjili onakwambele yo mulibaka lyange?”
18.35: Pilato sebeli otambula nji, “Kana mene kame nili Omujuda? Aanu owe napulisita akulu kame ana kuliti kwa mene. Iikene ona tende?”
18.36: Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Omubuso wange kasa no litunga lino, kambe omubuso wange neli ouno litunga lino, kambe abika ange kame alwa ni kuulwa kuniba kwa endisi no Majuda. Kono cwale omubuso wange kasa wa litunga lino!”
18.37: Pilato sebeli oibanguta Jesu nji, “Kame uli Ombumu?” Jesu sebeli otambula nji, “Kame wamba nji kame nili Ombumu. Sokame esi nina leyelwe, mane sokame nina iyele mu litunga nji nipake eniti. Omunu yonje woyo oli no niti kame ayupa eliywi lyange.”
18.38: Pilato sebeli omwibanguta nji, “Cwale eniti niikene?” Jesu yo Atulelwa Elifu (Mateu27.15-31; Maleka15.6-20; Luka23.13-25) Munyima no kwamba eyi sebeli obanena kame ku Majuda ni kwaambela nji, “Kani siwana omubonda mwa yonyene.
18.39: Kono kame muli ni sizo senu nji kame nifanena okumi lukulwela omunu mumweya ba Paseka. Kame muni pumena nji nimi lukulwele Ombumu no Majuda?”
18.40: Cwale sebeli akuwa kame nji, “Kokuulwa kasa wuyu mulume! Kono Banabasi!” Mi abo Banabasi neli sisinyi.

19.1: Cwale Pilato sebeli oshimba Jesu ni kumushapa.
19.2: Mi amasole sebeli atinga en̄ata no myunguya ikufekile kanyi omushukwe ni kwibeeka ku mutwi wa Jesu mane sebeli amufuka esikumango no undilu
19.3: cwale sebeli asheteta kwa yonyene ni kwamba nji, “Yoosho, Ombumu no Majuda!” Mi alemine oku mufula ni maoko oo.
19.4: Pilato sebeli obana kame ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, “Komumone kame ni mulita kwaanyi cwale mulimuke nji kanisiwana omubonda mwa yonyene.”
19.5: Cwale Jesu sebeli obana, yo ku fukile omushukwe no myunguya, ni sikumango no undilu. Pilato sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Komumone wuyu munu!”
19.6: Cwale apulisita akulu naanu oo, aba ana kumumona, sebeli akuwa nji, “Omungongotele! Omungongotele!” Pilato sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mu mushimbe anyi, mi mumu ngongotele, kakuli kani siwana omubonda mwa yonyene.”
19.7: Aendisi no Majuda sebeli amu tambula nji, “Kame tuli ni mulawo, mi mu mulawo wetu kame afanena okufa, kakuli kame ana kwamba nji Mwana Nyambe.”
19.8: Cwale Pilato aba ana kuyupa amaywi awo, sebeli ocila onene.
19.9: Seli oingena kame mu Kuta, mi sebeli oibanguta Jesu nji, “Kubine uka tundile?” Kono Jesu kasiku mutambula.
19.10: Pilato sebeli wamba kwa Jesu nji, “Iikene aba ka wamba nange? Ka uyii nji kame nili ni maata no kuku lukulula, ni maata no kuku ngongotela ba sifapano.”
19.11: Jesu sebeli omutambula nji, “Kaukwite amaata beulu yange konji na wabiwi okutunda ku wilu, cwalehe woyo ona kubi mene kwa wene yokwite esibi no kuneneba.”
19.12: Mukuyupa amaywi awo, Pilato sebeli osinga oku mulukulula. Kono aendisi no Majuda sebeli akuwa nji, “Nji kame omu lukulula, kau sepahala kwa Sesale kakuli omunu yonje aba akutenda Oumbumu, kame alwisa Sesale!”
19.13: Cwale Pilato aba ana kuyupa amaywi aa, sebeli otwala Jesu kundee, ni kwikala ba sipula no katulo, mu sibaka si isaniwa nji “Liwee limakilwe.” Mi mu Sihebelu kame italusa nji “Gabata.”
19.14: Cwale neli eliywaa no ukutukiseta Epaseka, mi kame ina ku singa okutenda enako no kamwii luli likumi ni twiili, (12 okuloko). Mi Pilato sebeli wamba kwa endisi no Majuda nji, “Komumone, Ombumu wenu uno!”
19.15: Kono onyene kame ana kukuwa, nji, “Atwaliwe! Atwaliwe! Omungongotele!” Pilato sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Ni ngongotele Ombumu wenu?” Kono apulisita akulu sebeli atambula nji, “Ka tukwite Ombumu mundina, konji Sesale!”
19.16: Cwale Pilato sebeli waaba Jesu nji angongoteliwe ba sifapano. Jesu aba ana Kungongoteliwa ba Sifapano. Mi sebeli ashimba Jesu, ni kuta naye.
19.17: Cwale sebeli ashimba Jesu ni kushimbisa esifapano saye nikuta ku sibaka siisaniwa nji Katendele, eso siisaniwa nji Gologota mu Sihebelu.
19.18: Abo sebeli amu ngongotela ba sifapano, nanjili ayiili, omunjili kweeli elineku, omunjili kweeli elineku, Jesu yoli mukaci koo.
19.19: Pilato sebeli on̄ola elin̄olo no kulimukisa ni kulituleka ba sifapano. Kame kuna kun̄oliwa nji, “Jesu no Nazaleta, Ombumu no Majuda.”
19.20: Amajuda no kupula sebeli abala beulu no sifapano abo, kakuli esibaka ana ku ngongotelwa Jesu ba sifapano, kame sina kwikala abeebi ni mulenen̄i. Beulu kame kuna kun̄oliwa mu Sihebelu, mu Siloma, ni mu Singelike.
19.21: Apulisita akulu no Majuda sebeli aiya mu kwambela Pilato nji, “Olese okun̄ola nji, ‘Ombumu no Majuda,’ kono on̄ole nji, ‘Yonyene ona kukwamba nji, Time Ombumu no Majuda.’ ”
19.22: Pilato sebeli otambula nji, “Esi nina n̄olo, na si n̄oliwa.”
19.23: Cwale amasole aba ana kumana oku ngongotela Jesu ba sifapano, sebeli ashimba eikumango yaye, sebeli aitaba etikalulo tinee, nji omunjili ni munjili aikale ni saye. Seli ashimba ni sonyene esikumango na kunji kono esikumango eso kasi sikwikala ni mapeka, kame sina kutungiwa ngeso esinu simweya feela.
19.24: Seli akwambota mukaci koo nji, “Tulese okusikaula, kono tusi shebuluke, tu limuke nji kame sa sitende sa nyine.” Neli nji kutendahale esi sinambiwa mu lin̄olo nji, “Sebeli akutabela eikumango yange mi kame ashebuluka esikumango sange.” Sokame ana tende Amasole.
19.25: Cwale abeebi ni sifapano sa Jesu kame kuna kwikala Inawaye ni minaye Inawaye, Maliya, omoywa Kulopasi, ni Maliya Magadalena.
19.26: Jesu aba ana kumona Inawaye, ni mwiyetwa ana kusinga, aimanine abeebi ni yonyene, sebeli wamba kwa Inawaye nji, “Mukati, omone mwanowe.”
19.27: Cwale Jesu sebeli wamba kwa mwiyetwa nji, “Komone, Inaowe.” Mi okutunda abo, omwiyetwa sebeli omu twala ku lilapa lyaye. Elifu lya Jesu (Mateu27.5-56; Maleka15.33-41; Luka23.44-49)
19.28: Eyo aba ina kubwa, Jesu ba kulimuka nji einu yonje na ipetahala, sebeli wamba nji, elin̄olo liiyatetetwe “Kame nifile elinyotwa.”
19.29: Kame kuna kwikala esindunga sina kwiyala ebenega omo, cwale sebeli abeeka esiponji sina bekiwa mu benega niku sishomeka ku lunupa no hisopa, mi sebeli asi sheeteta ku kanwa kaye.
19.30: Cwale Jesu aba ana kumana okunwa ebenega sebeli wamba nji, “Na kubu!” Cwale sebeli okobeka omutwi mane niku kuba Emebo yaye. Jesu yo Yaiwa Embiinji ku Lubaci
19.31: Kakuli neli eliywaa no Ukutukiseta omukiti no Paseka. Amajuda kasikusinga nji olutu lwikale ba sifapano ba liywaa no Pumulo kakuli Epumulo eyo neli eliywaa no utokwa onene, cwale aendisi no Majuda sebeli akumbela Pilato nji amakondo nwawo ali ba sifapano simba acoka mi mane kame atwesiwa okushimbiwa.
19.32: Cwale amasole sebeli aiya nikucola amakondo no munu no weli ni wuyu no wiili awo ana kungongoteliwa ni Jesu.
19.33: Kono aba ana kukeela kwa Jesu, sebeli amona nji nafu, kasi kucola amakondo aye.
19.34: Kono omunjili no masole sebeli omuyaa ku lubaci ni mbiinji, mi mu wangu sebeli otunda ounyinga ni meyi.
19.35: Mi woyo ona mono eyo ni paki, mi oupaki waye niwa niti, mi kame ayii nji kame aamba eyi no niti, nji naanyi mu pumene.
19.36: Kakuli einu eyi naitendahala nji elin̄olo liiyatetetwe, eli lyaamba nji, “Kakwisa esifuba saye sasi coliwe.”
19.37: Kame elin̄olo linjili kame lyamba nji, “Mba mono woyo ana yaa.” Okupumbekiwa kwa Jesu (Mateu27.57-61; Maleka15.42-47; Luka23.50-56)
19.38: Aba ku nakubwa eyi, Josefa no Alimateya omwiyetwa wa Jesu, kono kunyonga mukucila aendisi no Majuda sebeli okumbela Pilato nji ashimbe olutu lwa Jesu. Mi Pilato sebeli opumena okushimba olutu lwa Jesu.
19.39: Nekudemasi niyonyene ona kwiiya oweli ousiku kwa Jesu, sebeli oiya okulita milasi ni aloye inakuwanekiwa , inakukwana owima ukuma ba mwanda no tipondo.
19.40: Seli ashimba esitupu sa Jesu, ni kusipungela mu lwambi bamweya neyo ina kuwanekiwa, mu mukwa no sizo no Majuda owo anakupumbeka nawo afu.
19.41: Mi mu sibaka ana ku ngongoteliwa kame kuna kwikala elitema, mi mu litema elyo kame kuna kwikala eliyumbelo no ubya, omo mu na kuulwa okupumbeka mo kale omunu.
19.42: Cwale kakuli neli eliywaa no Majuda no Ukutukiseta omukiti no Paseka, mi kakuli eliyumbelo kame lina kwikala abeebi, sebeli apumbekamo Jesu.

20.1: Cwale ba liywaa no weli mu sunda, Maliya Magadalena sebeli omenekela ku liyumbelo kusiilolile mi sebeli omona nji eliwee na litundisiwa ba liyumbelo.
20.2: Cwale sebeli oitukela kwa Simoni Pitolosi ni ku mwiyetwa woyo ona ku singiwa kwa Jesu, ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, “Kame ana tundisa Ombumu mu liyumbelo, mi katuyii oko ana mubeeke!”
20.3: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli oimana ni mwiyetwa omunjili mi bamweya sebeli ata ku liyumbelo.
20.4: Kame ana kwituka onje ayiili, kono omwiyetwa omunjili sebeli oituka okusiya Pitolosi, mane nukakeela oweli ku liyumbelo.
20.5: Cwale sebeli onangelamo nikumona etinyambi ti bekilwe banji, kono kasi kwingena mo.
20.6: Cwale Simoni Pitolosi sebeli okeela ona kumukon̄a, mi sebeli oingena mu liyumbelo. Seli omona etinyambi tibekilwe banji,
20.7: ni lwambi luna kumufuka ku mutwi. Kono lonyene kalusi kubekiwa bamweya ni tinjili, kono lonyene kalu sikuwanekiwa ni tinyambi tinjili kono kame luna kupungiwa lomboci, olu bekilwe kunyonga.
20.8: Cwale omwiyetwa omunjili ona kutateka okakeela ku liyumbelo, sebeli oingena ni yonyene mane nikumona, mi sebeli opumena. (
20.9: Kakuli kasi kuyupisisa kale elin̄olo eli lyamba nji Jesu kame ana kufanena okwinguka kwaafu.)
20.10: Cwale aiyetwa awo, sebeli aukela ku mindi yoo. Jesu yo Kumonahaza kwa Maliya Magadalena (Mateu28.9-10; Maleka16.9-11)
20.11: Kono Maliya sebeli oimana yo lila kundee no liyumbelo. Mi yolila sebeli obama ni kwaliketa mu liyumbelo
20.12: ni kumona amangeloi ayiili akufukile eyi no likena, aikalile omo ana kulangeka olutu lwa Jesu, elinjili ku mutwi elinjili kwilyatiso.
20.13: Mi sebeli amwibanguta nji, “Mukati iikene olila?” Yonyene sebeli otambula nji, “Kakuli kame anashimbi Ombumu wange, mi kani yii omo ana mubeeke!”
20.14: Osamba ngeso sebeli okutemuna ni kumona Jesu yo imanine, kono kasi kulimuka nji neli Jesu.
20.15: Jesu sebeli omwibanguta nji, “Mukati, iikene olila?” “Anyine osaela?” Yonyene ba kuyambuta nji niosi kulima elitema, sebeli wamba nji, “Molyange, nji wene ona mushimbimo, onambele omo ona mubeeke nika mushimbe.”
20.16: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Maliya!” Yonyene sebeli okutemuna ni kwamba kwa yonyene mu Sihebelu nji, “Labboni!” (Okutalusa nji, “Mwiyeti”.)
20.17: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Olese okunilema,” “Kakuli kani siuka kale kwa Sitange. Kono ote kwa singiwa ange okaambele nji, kame nita kwa Sitange yonyene Sitenu, kwa Nyambe wange yonyene Nyambe wenu.”
20.18: Maliya Magadalena sebeli ota nuka simweta aiyetwa nji kame ninamono Ombumu, ni kwaambela nji kame ana mwambele einu eyi. Jesu yo Kumonahaza kwa Iyetwa aye (Mateu28.16-20; Maleka16.14-18; Luka24.36-49)
20.19: Ba mangolwaa no liywaa elyo, eliywaa no matatekelo mu sunda emyelo eyi pakilwe omo ana kwikala aiyetwa okucila aendisi no Majuda, Jesu sebeli oiya mukwimana mukaci koo ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, “Ekozo ikale naanyi.”
20.20: Jesu aba ana kumana okwamba ngeso, sebeli waamonisa amaoko ni lubaci lwaye. Cwale aiyetwa sebeli awabelelwa onene aba ana kumona Ombumu.
20.21: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene kame nji, “Ekozo ikale naanyi. Kanyi omu ana ni tumene Sitange, ni mene kame ni mituma ngeso.”
20.22: Cwale aba ana kumana okwamba eyi, sebeli waoyelela beulu yoo mane nikwamba kwa onyene nji, “Mu tambule Emebo No Kukena.
20.23: Nji kame sa mulemene eibi no munu yonje, kame sa ilemenwe, nji kamwa lemene eibi yoo, katamba okwilemenwa.” Jesu ni Tomasi.
20.24: Cwale Tomasi omunjili no kukwana likumi nayiili, (wisaniwa nji Mbile) ka sikwikala nonyene Jesu aba ana kwiiya.
20.25: Cwale anjili aiyetwa sebeli amwambela nji, “Na tumono Ombumu!” Kono Tomasi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Konji aba sani mone mu maoko aye omo kunakuyaa esipikili mane nibeekemo omunwe wange mu lin̄iba muna kuyaa esipikili ni kulema amaoko ange ku lubaci lwaye, kani tamba kupumena.”
20.26: Munyima no maywaa atanu ni aatu (8) aiyetwa aye aali kame mu ndoo ni Tomasi yoikalile noo. Emyeelo eipakilwe, kono Jesu sebeli okeela ni kwimana mukaci koo ni kwamba nji, “Ekozo ikale naanyi.”
20.27: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa Tomasi nji, “Obeeke omunwe owe muno, omone ni maoko ange oshimbe amaoko owe obeeke ku lubaci lwange cwale olese oku tenda wuyu no kwapumena, kono opumene!”
20.28: Tomasi sebeli otambula nji, “Ombumu wange, ni Nyambe wange!”
20.29: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Nupumene kakuli nu nimono? Embuyoti yawo ana pumene naba kasi mona!” Etuso no Buka Eyi
20.30: Cwale Jesu natende etimakazo no kupula balubala no aiyetwa, eyo kaisi n̄oliwa mu buka eyi.
20.31: Kono eyi nai n̄oliwa nji mupumene nji Jesu yokame Kilesite, Omwana Nyambe, mi cwale okupumena kwenu mwikale ni moyo mu litina lyaye.

21.1: Munyima no eyi, Jesu sebeli oku monahaza kame kwa iyetwa aye, kunyonga no lisa no Tibeliya mi sebeli oku monahaza mu mukwa ou.
21.2: Simoni Pitolosi, Tomasi woyo ona kwisaniwa nji Mbile, Natanaele na mu Kana no Galileya, naana a Zebediya, na njili ayiili no aiyetwa aye kame ano kuwana.
21.3: Simoni Pitolosi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Kame nita mu kuyamba.” Seli aamba kwa yonyene nji, “Naaci kame tuta niwene.” Seli ata mane nukaku longa mu wato, kono ousiku owo kasi kuuya esinjili.
21.4: Aba kuna kupatalala, Jesu sebeli oimana ba likamba, kono aiyetwa kasi kulimuka nji neli Jesu.
21.5: Jesu sebeli waaibanguta nji, “Anukana, kamu kwite ondi simba mumweya?” Seli amu tambula nji, “Ka kwisa.”
21.6: Cwale Jesu sebeli waambela nji, “Muyambe akanyandi ku lineku no silyo no wato, mi mba muwana esinjili.” Seli ayamba, mi sebeli akwangwa okuyambula akanyandi, mulibaka no tindi okupula.
21.7: Cwale omwiyetwa woyo ona kusingiwa kwa Jesu, sebeli wamba kwa Pitolosi nji, “Mbumu wuyu!” Cwale Simoni Pitolosi aba ana kuyupa nji Mbumu wuyu, sebeli okufuka esikumango saye kakuli kame ana kutundisa yo sebeza, ni kumatukela mu liwate.
21.8: Kono aiyetwa anjili sebeli aiya ni wato alemine okuyambula akanyandi akaiyalile etindi. Kakuli kame ana kwikala abeebi kanyonyo ni likamba, neli amatambo no kukwana omwanda mumweya.
21.9: Cwale aba ana kumana okufuweka owato ba likamba, sebeli amona amakala no mulilo abo ni ndi yoboniwabo ni sinkwa.
21.10: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mu lite ku tindi eti muna uyu.”
21.11: Simoni Pitolosi sebeli oingena mu wato nikukokela akanyandi ku likamba aka kaneyala etindi no kuneneba eti tina kukwana omwanda mumweya ni makumi atanu ni twaatu (153) cwale simba nji etindi kame tina kupula ngeso, akanyandi kaka sikukauka.
21.12: Jesu sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mwiiye mulye.” Mi kwa iyetwa ka kwisa wuyu ona kongola oku mwibangute nji, “Tiwe anyine?” Kakuli kame ana kulimuka nji Mbumu.
21.13: Cwale Jesu sebeli oshetetako, ni kushimba esinkwa mane bamweya ni ndi mi sebeli waaba.
21.14: Aka cwale neli aka no waatu ako ana kukumonhaza kwa iyetwa munyima no kwingulwa kwaafu. Jesu ni Pitolosi
21.15: Cwale aba ana kumana okusuka, Jesu sebeli oibanguta Simoni Pitolosi nji, “Simoni Omwana Jowani, kana kame oni singa okubita aa?” Seli otambula nji, “Ee Mbumu, kame uyii nji kame niku singa.” Jesu sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Olise otwana no mikoko yange.”
21.16: Jesu sebeli omwibanguta kame aka no wiili nji, “Simoni mwana Jowani kana kame oni singa?” Seli omu tambula nji, “Ee, Mbumu, kame uyii nji kame niku singa.” Jesu sebeli omwambela nji, “Olise emikoko yange.”
21.17: Jesu sebeli omwibanguta kame aka no waatu nji, “Simoni mwana Jowani, kana kame oni singa?” Pitolosi sebeli weena, kakuli Jesu kame ana ku mwibanguta emyendo yaatu nji, “Kana kame uni singa?” Mi Simoni sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Mbumu kame uyii einu yonje, kame olimukile nji kame niku singa!” Jesu sebeli omwambela nji, ‘Olele emikoko yange.’
21.18: Niti luli kame ni kwambela nji, “Aba ona kwikala osili wuyu no ubya, kame onoku nunga olukanda wenyene, kame ono kwendelanga omu osingela, kono aba so kulubale, kame so olole amaoko, mi omunjili kame sa kununge olukanda, mi kame sa kutwale oko wasingi.”
21.19: Jesu kame ana kwamba ngeso okumonisa Pitolosi elifu safe okukanyisa Nyambe. Munyima no eyi sebeli wamba kwa Pitolosi nji, “Onikon̄e!” Jesu ni Mwiyetwa Woyo Ona Kusingiwa onene kwa Jesu
21.20: Pitolosi sebeli okutemuna, nikumona omwiyetwa ona ku singiwa kwa Jesu ywakon̄a, woyo ona ku shendamena ba saali sa Jesu mu nako no mulalelo, mi yokame woyo onakumwibanguta nji, “Mbumu, anyine woyo so kubeteka?”
21.21: Cwale Pitolosi aba ana ku mumona, sebeli oibanguta Jesu nji, “Mbumu, ngasibine sakwikale kwa wuyu mulume?”
21.22: Jesu sebeli omutambula nji, “Nji kame nisinga nji asiyale okutwala abo sanikaiyele, kwa wene iikene siliko? Onikon̄e!”
21.23: Cwale elibubo sebeli lihasana mu sicaba nji omwiyetwa wuyu katamba okufa. Kono Jesu kasi kumwambela nji katamba okufa. Kono nji nisinge nji aikale okutwala aba sa nikeyele, cwale eso siikene kwa wene?
21.24: Wuyu yokame omwiyetwa woyo opaka etitaba eti, mi yokame ona tin̄olo mi kame tuyii nji oupaki waye niwa niti. Amamaneneno
21.25: Kono kweeli einu injili no kupula eyo ana kutenda Jesu. Kambe yonje nai kun̄oliwa kame nisepa nji elitunga kalitwese okuteula eyo ina n̄oliwa.

1.1: Mutompehi Teofilasi, mu buka no matatekelo, kame nina kun̄ola etingambolo no inu yonje ana ku tenda Jesu ni kwiyeta
1.2: okutwala ba liywaa ana ku shimbelwa ku wilu, aba ana kumana okuba etaelo mu maata no Mebo No Kukena kwaa tumiwa awo ana kuketa.
1.3: Munyima no mayando aye sebeli okumonahaza kwa onyene yo yoya mu ukumonahaza aka no kupula mu maywaa anakukwana makumi anee (40) mi yo lemine okwamba eyi no mubuso wa Nyambe.
1.4: Yo ikalile noo, sebeli waaba etaelo nji mulese okutunda mu Jelusalema, kono mu tatelele esepiso ya Sitange eyo ana kwamba, eyi muna yupu kwa mene.
1.5: Kakuli Jowani naku kolobeza ni meyi, kono kakwisa amaywaa no kupula okutunda abano anyi mba mukolobeziwa ni Mebo No Kukena. Jesu yo shimbelwa ku wilu (Maleka16.19-20; Luka24.50-53)
1.6: Cwale atumiwa aba ana kukuwana ni Jesu, sebeli amwibanguta nji, “Mbumu, ninji ba nako ino kame so usete omubuso kwa Isilaele?”
1.7: Jesu sebeli waatambula nji, “Ka musibiwa okulimuka enako simba emiaka eyo ana beeke sitange mu maata aye.
1.8: Kono mba mutambula amaata aba saiiye Emebo No Kukena baanyi, mi kame samutende etipaki tange mu Jelusalema, ni mu Judeya ni mu Samaliya moonje, ni kutwala ku mamaneneno no litunga.”
1.9: Aba ana kumana okwamba ngeso, sebeli oshimbelwa ku wilu amwalikete, mi elikumbi sebeli limutundisa mu miyo oo.
1.10: Yo katile ku wilu, mi onyene aaliketile ku wilu, ababo alume ayiili akufukile etinyambi no likena, sebeli aiya mukwimana ku nyonga yoo.
1.11: Sebeli aamba nji, “Aanyi alume no Galileya, ngasibine aba mwimanine me mwaliketile ku wilu? Uyu Jesu, ona shimbiwa okuta ku wilu, mbaiyi mundila imweya kanyi omo mumumonena yo katile mu wilu.” Matiyasi aba na Ketiwa nji ayole Judasi (Mateu27.3-10)
1.12: Cwale atumiwa aba ana kuukela ku Jelusalema okutunda ba lilundu no itondo ya Olibe, eli lili beebi ni Jelusalema mi omusipili wateni kame okukumanena ni liywaa no Sabata ba ku weenda.
1.13: Cwale aba ana kwingena mu mulenen̄i, sebeli ata ku musiyo oli kuwilu omo ana kwikalanga Pitolosi, ni Jowani, ni Jakobo, ni Andiliyasi, ni Filipi, ni Tomasi, ni Batolome, ni Mateu, ni Jakobo omwana Alufeya, ni Simoni Zeloti, ni Judasi omwana Jakobo.
1.14: Onje aa muumweya sebeli aongoteteta oku lapela, bamweya naakati, okubekabo ni Maliya inawaye Jesu, na inaaye.
1.15: Mu maywaa awo Pitolosi sebeli oimana mukaci no aasikupumena bamweya naaanu no kupula aa akwana omwaanda naanu makumi ayili (120), ni kwamba nji,
1.16: “Aalikani ange, elin̄olo kame lifanena okwiyatetetwa, elyo ku Mebo No Kukena eli lina kwambiwa kwa Dabida, eli lyaama oku kumanena eya Judasi woyo ona kutwaletela aa ana kununga Jesu.
1.17: Kakuli neli omunjili mwaaci mi kame ana kubiwa ekalulo mu musebezi wetu.” (
1.18: Cwale wuyu mulume sebeli oula elitema ni mupuzo no mali no uyii waye, mi sebeli okwela banji ni kukauka bakaci mi einu na mu lipumo lyaye sebeli itundela bandee.
1.19: Cwale etaba eyi sebeli ilimukiwa kwaanu onje ana kwikala mu Jelusalema, mi elyo litema sebeli liisaniwa nji Hakeludama mu mushobo woo, okutalusa nji, “Elitema no unyinga.”)
1.20: “Kakuli kame ku n̄olilwe mu buka no Lisamu nji, ‘Cwale esibaka saye sifutuke amatota, cwale mi kuulwe omunu so yoya mo.’ Kame kun̄olilwe kame nji, ‘Mi esibaka saye no musebezi sishimbiwe ku munjili.’
1.21: “Abakulingeso, omunjili kwa lume onakwendanga naaci mu nako yonje Mbumu Jesu yoenda naaci,
1.22: okutangisa ba kolobezo ya Jowani okulita ba liywaa ana ku shimbiwa kwaaci, omunjili kwa lume aa kame afanena okutenda opaki naaci ku kwinguka kwaye.”
1.23: Cwale sebeli alita aanu ayili, Josefa osi litina lya Basabasi, (nakwisaniwa kame nji, Jusitasi) ni Matiyasi.
1.24: Cwale sebeli a lapela ni kwamba nji, “Mbumu, weene olimukile emicima no aanu onje, otumonise kwaa ayili anyine ona kete
1.25: nji ashimbe esibaka mu situlo ni muutumiwa owo ana tundu Judasi, ni kuta ku sibaka saye.”
1.26: Cwale sebeli ashebuluka oonje, mi sebeli kulemiwa Matiyasi, woyo ona kwekiziwa kwao atumiwa likumi ni mumweya. (11)

2.1: Cwale eliywaa no Pentakota aba lina ku keela, onje kame ana kuungana mu sibaka simweya.
2.2: Ababo sebeli kuyupahala omulumo ona kutundelela ku wilu kanyi Emebo no lin̄ungwa, mi sebeli iiyala endoo yonje omo ana ikalanga.
2.3: Cwale sebeli ku monahala kwa onyene eso sikufekile kanyi etindimi no mulilo, awo aku tabile mi ni kwiiya mu kwikala beulu yoo ba munjili ni munjili.
2.4: Onje kame ana kwiyala ku Mebo No Kukena mi sebeli atangisa okwamba mu tipuwo tindina, omo Emebo No Kukena ina kwaa bela okwamba.
2.5: Cwale kame kuna kwikalanga aendisi no Majuda mu Jelusalema, awo ana kucilanga Nyambe aa atundelela mu tinaha tonje na mu litunga.
2.6: Cwale omulumo owo aba una kuyupahala aanu no kupula sebeli aunganako, mi kame ana kukomoka, kakuli onje kame ana kwayupa aamba mu tipuwo too.
2.7: Mi onje kame ana kukomoka onene, ni kwamba nji, “Kasa nji aa onje aamba ni Magalileya?
2.8: Cwale iikene aba twaa yupa aamba mutipuwo tetu toonje?
2.9: Aaci Amapanta ni Mamede ni Maelami naa ayakile mu Mesopotoniya, ni mu Judeya ni mu Kapadosiya, mu Ponto ni mu Esiya,
2.10: aa na ku Filikiya ni Panfiliya, Egepita naa ali mu ibaka no Lebiya ikubapile ni Silene naa atunda mu mindi no Loma, oonje Majuda ni mapulosebelite,
2.11: Amakilete ni Maalabe, kame twa yupa aamba mu malimi etu omusebezi no kuwaba wa Nyambe!”
2.12: Mi oonje kame ana kukomoka ni ku hakanyeha, akwambisa oonje nji, “Eyi taba kame italusa iikene?”
2.13: Kono anjili sebeli aasheka okwamba nji, “Kame akolilwe ni waine no ubya!” Elin̄usa lya Pitolosi
2.14: Kono Pitolosi sebeli oimana naa akwana likumi ni mumweya ni kwamba ni liywii no kuyupahala onene nji, “Anyi aanu na mu Judeya naanyi monje muyoya mu Jelusalema, mulimuke etaba eyi, mi muteetete wino ku maywi ange.
2.15: Aa aanu kasikoliwa, omo mu hupulela, kakuli ino isili ehola no (9 okoloko),
2.16: kono esi esi nakwambiwa kwa munuhi wa Nyambe Jowele nji,
2.17: ‘Cwale enako no mamaneneno aba saiye, kame kwamba Nyambe, kame sani itele Emebo yange ba munu yonje. mi aanenu no ashimani naa no akatana kame sa nuhe, mi andumbana enu mba mono etipono, mi naa supali enu mbaa loto etitolo.
2.18: Ee, mi mane naabika ange no alume naa no akati mu maywaa awo, mba na itele Emebo yange mi kame sa nuhe.
2.19: Kame sani tende etimakazo mu wilu neyi saimonahale ba litunga bano banji. ounyinga, ni mulilo, ni wise
2.20: eliywaa kame saali futuke okutenda ouwi okweti afutuke kanyi ounyinga, abo eliywaa lya Mbumu ekalya siiya kale, eliywaa linene eli lilimukiwa.
2.21: Mi cwale ao onje aisana ba litina lya Mbumu kame sayoyisiwe.’
2.22: “Anyi alume no Esilaele, muyupe amaywi aa! Jesu no Nazaleta omulume muna limukisiwa kwa Nyambe ni emisebezi no kongola, ni timakazo, ni tiponiso eyo ana kutenda Nyambe mwa yonyene mukaci kenu, kanyi omo mulimukele naanyi.
2.23: Wuyu Jesu ona kubetekiwa mu muhupulo ni mukulimuka kwa Nyambe, na muku mungongotela ni ku mwibaa ni maoko aawo asiku tenda ouyi.
2.24: Kono Nyambe na ku mwingula kwaafu, okumu lukulula kweeyi no kucilisa no aafu, kakuli ka kwa siku twesahala nji anungiwe ku lufu.
2.25: Kakuli Dabida abaamba okukumanena ni yonyene nji, “Kame ni monanga Ombumu balubala wange enako yonje, kakuli kame ali ku Lyoko lyange no silyo mi kanitamba okunyanganyisiwa.
2.26: cwale abo omucima wange kame onaku wabelelwa, mi olulimi lwange kame lunaku nyakalala. mane ni lutu lwange mba luyoyo mu sepo,
2.27: kakuli kautamba kuleselela Emebo yange mu sibaka no afu, simba nji oleselele woyo no kukena nji aole.
2.28: Kame ona nimonisa endila ita ku moyo, mi okumonahala kowe kame sakuni iyate oku nyakalala.”
2.29: “Abaange, kame ni myambela epatalaza eyi no njekulyetu Dabida nji kame ana kufa ni kupumbekiwa, mi elibita lyaye kwa lisili kwaaci ni balelo lino.
2.30: Mu kutenda omunuhi wa Nyambe, ni mu kulimuka nji Nyambe kame ana musepisa mukweeta kwaye nji kame sakutunde omunjili ku lusika lwaye ni kwikala ba lubona lwaye.
2.31: kame ana kumona eyi nakuuso ni kwamba eyi no kwinguka kwa Kilesite nji, ‘Katamba okuleselelwa musibaka no ao no kufa, simba nji olutu lwaye luole.’
2.32: Yokame Jesu ona ingulwa kwa Nyambe kwaafu, mi mutaba eyo aaci toonje kame tuli etipaki.
2.33: Munyima no kukambamisetwa ku Lyoko no silyo lya Nyambe, mi sebeli otambula Emebo No Kukena ana ku sepisiwa kwa Sitaye, cwale na iitelwe kwaaci yo mumona ni ku yupa.
2.34: Kakuli Dabida kasiku kambamena ku wilu, kono yo kame onamba nji, ‘OMBUMU naamba kwa Mbumu wange, Oikale ku Lyoko lyange no silyo
2.35: konji aba sani tende eila yowe esipula no malyatelo no makondo owe.’
2.36: “Cwale mulesele onje asi ndoo no Isilaele alimuke eniti nji Nyambe na mutende oumbumu ni Kilesite wuyu Jesu woyo munaku ngongotela!”
2.37: Mi cwale aba ana kuyupa eyi, kaa sikukuyupa wino ku micima mi sebeli aamba kwa Pitolosi ni kwa atumiwa onje nji, “Abeetu, ngasibine sa tu tende?”
2.38: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Mubake mi mu kolobeziwe moonje mu litina lya Jesu Kilesite nji mu lemenwe ku ibi yenu, mi mba mu tambula empo no Mebo No Kukena.
2.39: Kakuli esepiso kame ili kwaanyi ni kwaa nenu ni kwao ali oku no kuleba, awo onje sa isaniwe kwa Mbumu Nyambe wetu.
2.40: Pitolosi kame ana kwa kutaza ni maywii amanjili no kupula ana kwa kumbela, yo amba nji, “Mu ku babalele ku lusika olo no kwiiba!”
2.41: Cwale awo ana ku tambula amaywii aye sebeli akolobeziwa, mi kame sebeli kwekeziwa aanu no kukwana eikiti yaatu (3;000) ba liywaa elyo. Oupilo Mukaci no Alumeli
2.42: Mi cwale sebeli aongoteteta onyene mu tuto no atumiwa, ni muukuwana, muukutabela esinkwa ni mu titapelo.
2.43: Mi okucila sebeli kwikala mwaanu onje, mi etimakazo no kupula ni tiponiso na ikutendahala mwa atumiwa.
2.44: Mi asikupumena sebeli aikala bamweya nukutabela einu yoo yonnje.
2.45: Mi kame ana kuulisa amatema oo ni ufumu woo ni ku tabela aanu onje, omo ana kusaelela omunu yonje.
2.46: Mi mu liywaa ni liywaa kame ana kwikalanga bamweya mu ndoo ya Nyambe, nuukutabela esinkwa mu tindoo too, kame ana kulya eilya yoo mu tabo ni micima no kuwabelelwa.
2.47: Aalemine okulumbeka Nyambe ni ku wabelelwa kwaanu onje. Mi mu liywaa ni liywaa Nyambe kame na kuekeza ku palo no awo anakuyoyisiwa.

3.1: Cwale Pitolosi ni Jowani kame ana ku kambemena ku ndoo ya Nyambe ba nako no milapelo, enako no munji eitenda eyi no waatu (15:00 okoloko).
3.2: Mi kame kuna kwikala omulume no siyanga okutunda ba kuleiwa kwaye kame ana kushimbiwangwa, woyo ona kubekiwangwa ba mwelo no limota lya Jeluslema mu liywaa, owo ona kwisaniwa nji wa kuwaba nji akumbele etuso kwaanu awo ana kwingenanga mu ndoo ya Nyambe.
3.3: Cwale aba na kumona Pitolosi ni Jowani aingena, sebeli waakumbela amali.
3.4: Mi Pitolosi sebeli omwaliketa, bamweya ni Jowani ni kwamba nji, “Otwa likete!”
3.5: Cwale yonyene sebeli waaliketa ni ku tatelela okutambula esinjili okutundelela kwa onyene.
3.6: Kono Pitolosi sebeli omwambela nji, “Mene sikwite esilibela ni gauda, kono kame ni kuba esi nikwite, mu litina lya Jesu Kilesite no Nazaleta, oimane wende!”
3.7: Pitolosi sebeli omushimba ni Lyoko no silyo ni ku mwimeka, mi ababo amakondo ni tingongo taye sebeli yongola.
3.8: Mi sebeli omatoka ni kwimana ni kweenda ni kwingena mu lilapa no ndoo ya Nyambe nonyene, yo enda ni ku matoka ni ku lumbeka Nyambe.
3.9: Mi aanu onje sebeli amumona yo enda ni ku lumbeka Nyambe,
3.10: sebeli amulimuka nji yokame osikukumbela etituso ba mweelo no kuwaba no ndoo ya Nyambe, mi kame ana kukomoka onene ni kumakala kweyo ina tendahala kwa yonyene woyo mulume. Pitolosi yo Aamba Kwaanu
3.11: Abo yo situndamene Pitolosi ni Jowani, aanu onje sebeli aitukela kwa onyene mu sibaka no mukunda wa Solomoni, akomokile onene.
3.12: Mi cwale Pitolosi aba na mono ngeso sebeli waambela aanu nji, “Alume no Isilaele, iikene aba mu komoka etaba eyi, simba iikene aba mu twaliketile ngeso, kanyi ni mu maata etu simba ni mu kukuna kwetu kwa Nyambe aba tuna twese wuyu mulume nji aende?
3.13: Nyambe wa Abulahama ni wa Isaka ni wa Jakobo, Onyambe wa anjekulyetu, kame ana kanyisa omubika waye Jesu, woyo muna kuba ni ku mu kana balubala wa Pilato, naba ana kusinga nji amu lukulule.
3.14: Kono kame mu na kukana uyu no kukena ni kuluka, mi kame muna kukumbela omwibai nji alukululwe.
3.15: Namukwibaa omunya moyo, woyo ana kwingula Nyambe kwaafu, mi aaci kame tuli etipaki no taba eyi.
3.16: Mi elitina lyaye, mulibaka no tumelo mu litina lyaye, na li ongota wuyu mulume woyo mu mona ni ku limuka mi ni tumelo mwa Jesu na ibalisa wino wuyu mulume balubala wenu moonje.”
3.17: “Cwale bano, abange, Kame ni limukile nji kame mutenda mukwalimuka, kanyi omo anaku tendala aendisi enu.
3.18: Kono eyo ana kwamba Nyambe ni tunwa no anuhi aye onje, nji Kilesite waye mba yanda, naiyatetetwe cwale.
3.19: Mubake cwale, mi musiuluke kame, nji eibi yenu ilemeniwe, enako eyo sakwiiye okuwetuluka sakutunde kwa Mbumu,
3.20: mi cwale kame sa tume Kilesite ona ketelwe aanyi, yonyene Jesu.
3.21: Woyo eliwilu kame lifanena okutambula okutwala enako eyo einu yonje abasa itendiwe eyino ubya eyo Nyambe ana kwamba ni tunwa no anuhi aye nokukena okutunda ku kale.
3.22: Mushe na kwamba nji, ‘Mbumu Nyambe mba tumu kwaanyi omunuhi okutunda kwaabenu kanyi omo anakuni tumena. Kame samu tetete kwa yonyene mu inu yonje eyo samiambele.
3.23: Mi kame sakutende nji omunu yonje woyo soulwa oku teteta kwa munuhi wa Nyambe mba sinyiwa okutunda kwaanu.’
3.24: Cwale anuhi a Nyambe onje aa anamba elin̄usa, okutunda kwa Samuele naa aneyi munyima, kame ana nuhu etinako eto.
3.25: Kame muli aana no anuhi a Nyambe ni ulikani owo Nyambe ana kuba kwanjekulyenu. Ana kwamba kwa Abulahama nji, ‘cwale mu lusika lowe aanu onje na ba litunga mba fuyauliwa.’
3.26: Nyambe nakutuma omubika waye kwaanyi oweli, okumi fuyola okufutula omunu yonje mwaanyi okutunda kuufokoli wenu.”

4.1: Cwale alemine okwamba kwaanu, apulisita ni omukulu no atateleli no ndoo ya Nyambe na Saduki sebeli aiya kwa onyene.
4.2: Atinine kakuli kame ana kwiyetanga aanu ni kupaka mwa Jesu eyi no kwinguka kwaafu.
4.3: Cwale sebeli aanunga ni kwabeka mu tolongo okutwala ba liywaa linaku tatamako, kakuli neli amangolwaa.
4.4: Kono anokupula anakuyupa eliywi kame anaku pumena, mi epalo no aanu kame inaku kwana eikiti mutanu (5;000).
4.5: Eliywaa linaku tatamako abusisi oo na kulu, na iyeti no mulawo wa Mushe sebeli aungana mu Jelusalema.
4.6: Aali ni Anna omukulu no apulisita ni Kayafa, ni Jowani, ni Alekizanda, nanjili no lubasi no apulisita akulu.
4.7: Cwale aba ana kumana okwaimeka mukaci koo, sebeli aaibanguta nji, “Ka maata simba ka litina lya nyine mukutusisa okutendisa einu eyii?”
4.8: Cwale Pitolosi yo iyalile Emebo No Kukena, sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Abusi no aanu na kulu,
4.9: nji balelo kame twiibangutiwa okukumanena kweyi no kuwaba ina tendiwa ku mulume no sihole ni mumukwa ubine ana balisetwe,
4.10: ilimukiwe kwaanyi moonje naanu onje no Isilaele, nji mu litina lya Jesu Kilesite no Nazaleta, woyo munaku ngongotela ba sifapano, woyo Nyambe ana ingula kwaafu, mwa yonyene uyu mulume kame aimanine wino balubala wenu.
4.11: ‘Eli eliwee muna kukana anyi ayaki kono kame lina futuka omutomo no muyako.’
4.12: Cwale okuyoisisa kakusako ku munu yonje, kakuli kakwisa elitina linjili munji no liwilu eli libilwe kwaanu nji tuyoyiswe mwa lyonyene.”
4.13: Cwale aba ana mona oundume wa Pitolosi ni Jowani sebeli alemuha nji kaasiku kwiyeta, mi neli aanu feela alume no utokwa sebeli akomoka ni lemuha nji kame na kwikalanga ni Jesu.
4.14: Kono ba kumona omulume onaku balisiwa oimanine kunyonga yoo, sebeli aulwa nesi ana kwamba.
4.15: Kono cwale aba ana kumana okwaa laela nji atunde ba kuta, sebeli atangisa okwaambisa mu kaci koo nji,
4.16: “Iikene sa tutende kwaa alume?” Kakuli emakazo eyi ilimukiwa ina tendiwa kwa onyene kame inayupahala kwaanu onje aa ayakile mu Jelusalema, mi katu twese okwilatula.
4.17: Kono nji etaba eyi yulwe oku yupahala kwaanu, twaakanise onene okwamba kame ku munu yonje mu litina lya Jesu.”
4.18: Cwale sebeli aaisana ni kwaambela nji alese okwamba simba okwiyeta kame mu litina lya Jesu.
4.19: Kono Pitolosi ni Jowani sebeli aatambula nji, “Mu kwatule mwenyene nji kame kulukile mu miyo a Nyambe okumikuteka , aanyi mwatule.
4.20: Kakuli aaci katutwese okulesela okwamba eyi tuna mono neyi tuna yupu.”
4.21: Cwale aba ana kumana okwacilisa sebeli aalukulula nji akutele. Kasikuwana oufosi nji aabe ekoto, mulibakano aanu onje kame anaku lumbeka Nyambe kweyo inaku tendahala.
4.22: Kakuli omulume woyo inaku tendahalela emakazo no ku balisiwa kame ana kwikala ni myaka ibitelela makumi anee. Etapelo no Alumeli eyi no Undume
4.23: Cwale aba ana kumana oku lukululwa sebeli ata kwaa likani oo ni kwaambela eyo anaambele apulisita akulu na kulu.
4.24: Cwale aasikupumena aba ana kuyupa eyi, sebeli atumusa ku maywii oo onje oku lapela kwa Nyambe ni kwamba nji, Mbumu, wene ona uumbu eliwilu ni litunga ni liwate neyi ilimo!
4.25: Kame ona kwamba ni kanwa no mushemi wetu Dabida, omubika wowe, okwamba ni meyo no kukena nji, ‘Iikene amacaba aba atwebile, mi aanu ikene alelela eyi na mbulwa tuso?
4.26: aambumu no litunga kame ana lumelelana, na endisi kame aku wanine bamweya okulwisa MBUMU ni ku lwisa Omuwabiwa waye.’
4.27: Niti luli mu mumulenen̄i kame ana kukuwana bamweya okulwisa omubika no kukena woyo ona kuketa, onje Heloda ni Ponse Pilato na simacaba naanu no Isilaele.
4.28: Kame ana tende einu yonje eyi mu maata owe ni mulelo wowe eyo una kulela eyaka sitendahala kale, nji itendahale.
4.29: Cwale bano, Mbumu, omone emihupulo yoo, mi obe abika owe amaata no kwamba eliywi lyowe mu undume.
4.30: Cwale wolole elyoko lyowe oku balisa, mi etiponisa ni timakazo titendiwe mu litina lya Jesu omubika wowe no kukena.”
4.31: Cwale aba ana ku mana oku lapela, esibaka omo ana kukuwanena bamweya sebeli sizikinyeha. Mi oonje sebeli aiyala ni Mebo No kukena ni kwamba amaywi a Nyambe ni undume. Alumeli aba ana kukutabela Einu yoo
4.32: Cwale esikwata no aasikupumena sinakukuwana neli sa mucima ni mebo imweya. Kakwisa mukaci koo ona kwamba nji esinu ali naso nisaye yomboci, kono kame ana kuku tabelanga esinu akwite omukoo onje.
4.33: Cwale mu maata no kuneneba atumiwa ana kupaka onene okwinguka kwa Mbumu Jesu, mi esishemo sinene nasikwikala kwa onyene onje.
4.34: Kakwisa omunu ona kusinga esinjili mwa onyene. kakuli ano kupula awo anakwikala ni matema simba etindoo kame ana kuyulisanga, ni kulita amali nweso sina ulisiwa,
4.35: mi ni kusibeeka ku makondo no atumiwa, mi munu ni munu kame ana kutabelwanga omo asingela.
4.36: Cwale Josefa ona kwisaniwa kwa atumiwa nji Banabasi (okutalusa nji, “Omwana no susuwezo”), neli Mulibi, onaku leyelwa mu Saipulisi,
4.37: sebeli oulisa elitema lyaye, ni ku lita amali, ni kwabeeka ku makondo no atumiwa.

5.1: Kono omulume wiisaniwa Ananiasi ni moywaye Safila sebeli aulisa esemba no litema lyoo.
5.2: Kono mu tingana no moyo waye sebeli oteulako amanjili amali awo anaku ulisako ni kulitako fela amanjili amali ni kwabeeka ku makondo no atumiwa.
5.3: Cwale Pitoosi sebeli wamba nji, “Ananiasi, ikene Satani aba ona mulumelele mu mucima wowe nji woonge Emebo No Kukena okuteulela ku mali ona ulisa elitema?
5.4: Abo owasiku ulisa kale elitema neli lyowe, mi naaba onamana okuli ulisa, amali asitendile owe. Kasa neli omuhupulo wowe? Iikene cwale ona tendele ngesi mu mucima wowe? Kausonga aanu, kono kame onaungo Nyambe!”
5.5: Cwale Ananiasi aba ana kuyupa amaywi aa, sebeli okwela banji ni kufa. Mi aanu onje ana kuyupa etaba eyi sebeli acila onene.
5.6: Andumbana sebeli aiya ni kufuka olutu lwaye ni kumutwala oka mu pumbeka.
5.7: Munyima no nako itenda etihola taatu moywaye sebeli okeela, yo kalimukile eyi ina tendahala.
5.8: Pitolosi sebeli omwibanguta nji, “Ona mbele nji kame muna ulisa elitema amali akuma aba?” Mi sebeli otamula nji, “Ee, banakumu.”
5.9: Kono Pitolosi sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Ngaibi muna lumelelana moonje okweteka Emebo no Mbumu? Omone, amakondo aawo anati muku pumbeka mbumowe aa okame ba mwelo, mi kame saku sakutwale ni wene!”
5.10: Ababo sebeli okwela banji ku makondo aye ni kufa, mi sebeli amushimba nukamu pumbeka ku nyonga ya mbumwaye.
5.11: Cwale okucila kunene sebeli kwingena kwaanu no ndoo ya Nyambe ni kwaanu onje anakuyupa etaba eyi. Etimakazo ni Tiponiso
5.12: Cwale etimakazo ni tiponiso no kupula kame tinaku tendahala kwaanu ni maoko no atumiwa. Mi kame ana kukuwanenga mu sibaka sinjili sa Salomoni siisaniwa nji Kozwana.
5.13: Kakwisa omunu onakutwesa oukuwana noo, kono aanu kame ana kwaalumba onene mulikute.
5.14: Cwale anokupula ana kupumena kwa Mbumu kame anakwekezeha, alume naakati.
5.15: Mane kame kuna litiwa asikutoma mu tindila ni kwalangeka ba mimbeta ni bamiseme nji Pitolosi abasabite anjili kwa onyene afukiwe ku mwinda waye.
5.16: Naanu kame sebeli akuwana okutunda mumindi mu Jelusalema, sebeli alita asikutoma nawo akwite Emebo nokwiiba, onje sebeli abalisiwa. Atumiwa abaana kuyandisiwa
5.17: Kono omupulisita omukulu bamweya nawo akuyupa naye onje na njili no Masaduki, sebeli ayupa omuna.
5.18: sebeli anunga atumiwa ni kwaabeka mu tolongo no sicaba.
5.19: Kono ousiku elin̄eloi lya Mbumu sebeli liiya mukuyatulula emwelo no tolongo nikwatundisamo ni kwamba nji,
5.20: “Mute mi mwimane mu ndoo ya Nyambe mi mwaambe kwaanu amaywi onje no moyo noubya.”
5.21: Mi cwale aba ana kuyupa eyi, sebeli aingena lilapa no ndoo ya Nyambe amasiku ni kwiyeta. Cwale omupulisita omukulu sebeli oiya naawo anakwikalanga naye ni kwisana bamweya ekuta naanu onje no Isilaele, ni kutumena ku tolongo mukwaalita.
5.22: Kono otupaso aba tunakukeela, kasitu kwaawana mu tolongo, mi sebeli tuuka kukuta okabiha,
5.23: “Natuwana etolongo iyatililwe wino natateleli aimanine ba mwelo, kono abatuna iyatulula katusiwanamo omunu mukaci!”
5.24: Cwale onduna no ndoo ya Nyambe napuliisita akulu aba ana kuyupa amaywi aa, sebeli aziyeleha ni kukomoka onene kweyo inatendahala kwa atumiwa, abilaela nji eyi taba ngasibine saitendahale.
5.25: Cwale sebeli kwiiya omunu ni kwaambela nji, “Alume munakubeka mu tolongo kame aimanine mu ndoo ya Nyambe mi kame aiyeta aanu!”
5.26: Cwale onduna ni tupaso sebeli ata okaashimba, kono kasa mukubambaba, kakuli kame ana kucila aanu okwakonda ni mawee.
5.27: Cwale aba anakumana okwaalita, sebeli aabeka balubala no Kuta, mi omukulu no mupulisita sebeli waibanguta nji,
5.28: “Natukumi laelela onene nji mulese okwiyeta mu litina lya Jesu, cwale bano namwiyata Jelusalema ni tuto yenu mi kame musinga okulita ounyinga no munu woyo beulu wetu!”
5.29: Kono Pitolosi naatumiwa sebeli atambula nji, “Kame tufanena okukuteka Nyambe, kasa omunu.
5.30: Onyambe no ashemi etu naingula Jesu kwaafu woyo muna kwibaa okumu ngongotela ba sitondo.
5.31: Nyambe nakumukulisa ni Lyoko lyaye no silyo nji atende omubusi ni muyoisi, woyo oba Isilaele okubaka ni kulemenwa eibi.
5.32: Kame tuli aapaki kwiinu eyi, mi kame tukwite Emebo nokukena eyo anabi Nyambe kwaao amukuteka.”
5.33: Cwale aba ana kuyupa eyi sebeli atina onene nikusinga okwaibaa.
5.34: Kono omufalisi munjili onakwisaniwa nji Gamaliele, omwiyeti no mulawo woyo olumbiwa ku sicaba sonje, sebeli oimana ni kulaelela nji aatumiwa atundisetwe bandee ba nako icana,
5.35: cwale sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Alume no Isilaele, mutokomele eyi musinga kutenda kwaa alume.
5.36: Kakuli munyima no maywaa aaTeudasi sebeli omonahala, nuukutoya nji nisinu sinene, mi aanu no kukwana emyanda inee sebeli akuwana naye, kono nakwibaiwa nawo onje anakumu kon̄anga sebeli ahasana ni kubwa.
5.37: Munyima ya woyo, Judasi omu Galileya sebeli omonahala mu nako no sipalo mi sebeli okoka aanu no kupula, kono ni yonyene sebeli ofa, mi naawo anakumu kon̄anga sebeli ahasana.
5.38: Cwalehe mu taba eyi, kame ni myambela nji, mutundeko kwalume aa mi mwasiye omboci, nji ni mulelo simba omusebezi otunda kwaanu, mbaukwangwa,
5.39: kono nji kame itunda kwa Nyambe, kamutamba okwatwesa. mba mumonahala nji naanyi kame mulwisa Nyambe.
5.40: Cwale sebeli asitokomela ekelezo yaye, mi cwale abana mana okwisana atumiwa, sebeli aashapa ni kwaalaela nji alese okuukela okwiyeta aanu mu Litina lya Jesu, sebeli aalukulula nji akutele.
5.41: Cwale sebeli asiya esibaka no Kuta awabelelwe, kakuli kame atendilwe aa alukela okwenisiwa mulibaka no Litina lya Jesu.
5.42: Mi amaywaa onje kasi kulesela okwiyeta mu Ndoo ya Nyambe ni mu tindoo nji Jesu yokame Kilesite.

6.1: Cwale mu nako eyo epalo no aiyetwa abainakwekezeha, aendisi no Majuda ao aamba esigelike sebeli atongokela aendisi no Majuda ao aamba esihebelu kakuli neli ambelwa ao kame anakuketululwa abaku biwa eilya no liywaa ni liywaa.
6.2: Cwale atumiwa likumi nayili sebeli aisana aiyetwa onje ni kwaambela nji, “Kakulukele nji tulese okwiyeta eliywi lya Nyambe nji tube eiyi no kulya ba titafule.
6.3: Abetu, abakulingeso, mukete alume mutanu nayili mwaanyi aa asepahala aa aiyalile Emebo niku shangama, mi twabeke mu musebezi ou.
6.4: Kono aci mbatukongota muku lapela ni mu sebelezo no Liywi.”
6.5: Mi etaba eyo ana kwamba esikwata sonje sebeli siwabelelwa, mi sebeli aketa Setefani, omulume onaiyala etumelo ni Mebo No Kukena ni Filipi, ni Polokolasi, ni Nikolasi ni Timoni, ni Pamena, ni Nikolasi omupolosebelite na mu Antiyoke.
6.6: Esikwata esi sebeli asiimeka balubala no Atumiwa, sebeli alapela ni kwabeka amaoko oo beulu woo.
6.7: Cwale eliywi lya Nyambe sebeli lyekezeha okwambiwa, ni palo no aiyetwa sebeli yekezeha onene mu Jelusalema, mane ni palo no kupula no apulisita sebeli akubeeka ku tumelo. Okunungiwa kwa Setefani
6.8: Setefani ona kwiyala esishemo ni maata, sebeli otenda etimakazo ni tiponiso no kupula mu sicaba.
6.9: Cwale aanu anjili no ndoo no milapelo eyi isaniwa nji no alukuluhi, naa naku Sileni, naa naku Alekizandiya, naa naku tolopo no Silisia ni ku Asiya sebeli atangisa okukanana ni Setefani.
6.10: Kono sebeli akwangwa okukanana okushangama kwaye ni mebo eyo ana kwamba nayo.
6.11: Cwale sebeli ashonga alume anjili anakwamba nji, “Natumuyupu yo amba amaywi noku nyefula Mushe ni Nyambe!”
6.12: Sebeli asusuweza ngeso esicaba nakulu, naiyeti no mulawo wa Mushe, mi sebeli amupatisa okumulema niku mulita balubala no Kuta.
6.13: Sebeli alita apaki no mapwa ana kwamba nji, “Uyu mulume kalesele okwamba eyambo no ku nyefula endoo ya Nyambe ni mulawo wa Mushe.
6.14: Kakuli natumu yupu yo amba nji Jesu no Nazaleta wuyu mba sinyi esibaka eso, afutule ni mikwa no sizo eyi tunabiwi kwa Mushe!”
6.15: Aanu onje aa anakwikala ba Kuta aba ana kumulubukela, sebeli amona olubala lwaye nji kame lukufekile kanyi olubala no lin̄eloi.

7.1: Omupulisita omukulu sebeli wibanguta nji, “Etaba eyo kana moikalele?”
7.2: Setefani sebeli otambula nji, “Abaange, naanyi asitange, muyupetete kwa mene! Nyambe no kanya nakumonahaza kwa sitetu Abulahama abo yosiikala mu Mesopotamiya yokasita kale okaikala mu Halani,
7.3: mi sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Osiye esibaka sowe ni lusika lowe mi ote mu sibaka saniku monise.’
7.4: Cwale sebelli otunda mu naha no Makaladeya ni kuta okaikala mu Halani. Munyima ya sitaye Abulahama okufa, Nyambe sebeli omutundisamo niku mulita mu naha ino muyoya nibalelo lino.
7.5: Ka simuba esanda omo, simba esibaka no kulyata elikondo, kono sebeli omusepisa nji yonyene ni masika aye mbaabiwa esibaka simba nji kakwite omwana.
7.6: Cwale Nyambe sebeli omwambela nji, ‘Aikulyowe mba kayoyo mu naha no akoo omo sakaikale mu ukoba niku yandisiwa mu myaka nokukwana emyanda inee. (400)
7.7: Kono kame sani atule aanu saabeeke mu ubika Nyambe sebeli wamba, mi munyima nweyo kame satundemo ni kwiya mukuni lumbekela muno mu sibaka.’
7.8: Cwale Nyambe sebeli omuba oulikani no mupato. Mi cwale Abulahama sebeli oleya Isaka, ni kumubeeka ku mupato ba liywaa no mutanu ni twaatu, mi Isaka sebeli oleya Jakobo, Jakobo sebeli oleya anjekulyetu nokukwana likumi ni twiili.
7.9: Kakuli anjekulyetu kame ana kufela minoo Josefa omuna niku muulisa mu Engepita, kono Nyambe nakwikala naye,
7.10: mi sebeli omulamulela mu mayando aye onje niku muba okukateleha ni kushangama, balubala wa Falo Ombumu no Engepita woyo onaku muba oubusisi no Engepita ni beulu no asindoo yaye yonje.
7.11: Cwale sebeli kwiiya olukupwe munaha yonje no Engepita ni mu Kanana, ni mayando manene mane na shemi etu sebeli akwangwa oku wana eilya.
7.12: Kono cwale Jakobo aba ana kuyupa eyo nji kame kuli eilya mu Engepita, sebeli otumako anjekulyetu akano weli.
7.13: Ba musipili no wiili Josefa sebeli okulimukisa kwakulwaye, mi olusika lwa Josefa sebeli lulimukiwa kwa Falo
7.14: Cwale Josefa sebeli otuma aanu okashimba sitaye Jokobo ni lusika lwaye lonje, anakukwana makumi mutanu na yili naanu mutanu (75).
7.15: Cwale Jakobo sebeli ota ku Engepita, nukafelako yonyene na njekulyetu.
7.16: Eitupu yoo kame inaku twaliwa mu Shekemu nukateuliwa mu libita anaku ula Abulahama ni mali kwaana aa Homoli namu Shekemu.
7.17: “Kono enako no sepiso aba inaku sheteta, eyo Nyambe anaku sepisa Abulahama epalo no aanu mu Egepita sebeli yekezeha onene.
7.18: Mane sebeli kuyola Ombumu munjili mu Engepita woyo nokwa limuka Josefa.
7.19: Woyo sebeli otenda omushobo wetu mu kushangama no kwiiba, na kuyandisa anjekulyetu, sebeli wataukisa anoo nji alese okupula afee.
7.20: Munako eyi Mushe sebeli oleiwa, neli omwana no kuwaba onene balubala wa Nyambe. Mi kame anaku litiwa ba tikweti taatu mu ndoo ya sitaye,
7.21: mi ababo yosi limukiwa fela, mwanaye Falo no musizana sebeli okutolelaye, ni ukukuliseta ye nji atende mwanaye luli.
7.22: Cwale Mushe sebeli oiyetiwa okushangama konje no Aengepita mi sebeli oikala ni maata mu kwamba ni mu misebezi.
7.23: “Cwale aba ana kukwanisa emyaka makumi anee (40), sebeli oiyelwa etakazo mu mucima waye nokuta oka potela abaye aana no Isilaele.
7.24: Cwale sebeli omona omunjili no abaye yo tendiwa ouyi, sebeli omulwela, okumu lamulela mukwibaa Omuegepita.
7.25: Nakuyambuta nji abaye kame sa yupisise nji Nyambe kame saayoyise mulibaka no Lyoko lyaye, kono kaasikuyupisisa.
7.26: Cwale liywaa linaku tatamako sebeli omumonahaza kwaonyene aalwa mi sebeli waaeleza nji, ‘Alume, kame muli omwabaye munu, iikene aba mukulwisa?’
7.27: Kono omulume woyo onakutenda omukwaye ouyi sebeli okasha Mushe, ni kumwibanguta nji, ‘Anyine onaku beeke omubusisi ni mwatuli wetu?’
7.28: ‘Kame usinga okunibaa kanyi omo unakwibaela Omuegepita bingolwa?’
7.29: Mulibaka no liywi elyo, Mushe sebeli otunda mu Engepita okuta mu naha no Mindiyani, omo anokaleyelamo aana ayili.
7.30: Cwale aba kuna mana emyaka makumi anee (40), elin̄eloi sebeli likumonahaza kwa Mushe mu lihalaupa no lilundu no Sinai, mu lulimi no mulilo mu liputa.
7.31: Cwale Mushe aba anakumona ngeso sebeli okomoka, abana shetetako nji amonisise, sebeli oyupa eliywi lya Mbumu elyamba nji,
7.32: ‘Time Nyambe wa njekulyowe, Nyambe wa Abulahama Nyambe wa Isaka ni wa Jakobo.’ Cwale Mushe sebeli ocila ni kukwangwa okwaliketako.
7.33: Cwale MBUMU sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, ‘Otundise etinjangwa towe ku makondo, kakuli esibaka wimanine ni sakukena.
7.34: Kame ninalikete mi kame nimono amayando no aanu ange mu Egepita mi nuyupu okutonga koo, mi kame nineyi mukwaa lukulula. Cwale wiiye, niku tume ku Egepita.’
7.35: “Mushe woyo ana kukana aamba nji, ‘Anyine ona kubeeke omubusisi ni mwatuli?’ Yokame ana beeke Nyambe omubusisi ni mulukululi woo mulibaka no lingeloi linaku monahala mu liputa.
7.36: Sebeli watundisa mu Egepita, yo tenda etimakazo neyi ikomokisa ni ba liwate no mucaa ni mu lihalaupa emyaka makumi anee (40).
7.37: Mushe yokame onakwambela aana no Isilaele nji, ‘Nyambe wenu mba mi litele omunuhi mukaci no abenu kanyi omo ana kuni beekela.’
7.38: Yokame woyo onakukuwana mu lihalaupa ni lingeloi linakwamba kwa yonyene ku lilundu lya Sinai, yoli na njekulyetu, ni ku tambula amaywi a yoyisa nji atube oo.
7.39: Kono anjekulyetu sebeli akana okumukuteka, kono sebeli amukuteka ku nyonga mu micima yoo ni kuukela ku Engepita.
7.40: Cwale sebeli aamba kwa Aluni nji,‘Otutendele emilimu eyi itwenda ku lubala, kanyi Mushe woyo onaku tutwaletela okutunda mu naha no Egepita, katu limukile esi sinamwiyele.’
7.41: Cwale mu maywaa awo sebeli aumba onamani, ni kutundiseta etinubu esiswaniso eso ni ku wabelelwa mu misebezi no maoko oo.
7.42: Kono Nyambe sebeli wafutukela ni kwaaba oku lapelela empi nakuwilu, kanyi omo kun̄olelwe mu buka no anuhi nji, ‘Anyi asi ndoo no Isilaele, ninji kame munaku nilitela eiyamana no kuyonda ni matabelo, emyaka inee mu lihalaupa.
7.43: Cwale kame munakushimba Endoo ya Nyambe ya Muloke, ni lutungweti lwa Nyambe Lefani, neli amaswaniso munakukuketela okulapelela Cwale kame sanimitundise mu Babilona.’
7.44: “Anjekulyetu nakwikala ni tabanakele no upaki mu lihalaupa, simba kanyi woyo ona kwamba kwa Mushe nakumu laelela yonyene ona kwitenda, kanyi esiswaniso eso anaku mona.
7.45: Munyima anjekulyetu sebeli aiya mu naha ni Joshuwa ku sicaba anakucita Nyambe balubala wa anjekulyetu. Sebeli iikalamo okutwala ba maywaa a Dabida.
7.46: Dabida naku wana esishemo kwa Nyambe mi sebeli okumbela nji awanene Nyambe wa Jakobo esibaka.
7.47: Kono neli Solomoni ona kumuyakela endoo.
7.48: Kono Nyambe Omwambakani ka ikala mu tindoo tina yakiwa ni maoko, kanyi omunuhi aba anakwamba nji,
7.49: ‘Eliwilu lyokame olubona lwange, mi elitunga lyokame esipula nilyatile amakondo ange Mufuta ubine no ndoo muniyakela, kame kwamba MBUMU, kamba kasibaka eso ni fanena oku pumulela?
7.50: Kasanji amaoko ange kasikuyaka einu yonje eyi?’
7.51: “Anyi anu no tindingo tisatalalile, aa ulwile okwingenyeka emicima ni matwi yenu mu mupato, enako yonje kame mukanisa Emebo No Kukena! Kanyi omo ana kwikalela anjekulyenu, naanyi momwikalele.
7.52: Anyine omunuhi wasiku yandisiwa kwa njekulyenu? mane kame anakwibaa awo anakwamba baweli nji kame sakwiye woyo no kuluka. Cwale woyo muna kubeteka niku mwibaa.
7.53: Aanyi munaku tambula omulawo wa Nyambe onaku lukululwa ku mangeloi kono kamusi kuuteula. Okupwacauliwa kwa Setefani
7.54: Cwale aba ana kuyupa einu eyi sebeli atina, ni kukweca amaeo okumu lwisa.
7.55: Kono Setefani, yo iyalile Emebo No Kukena, sebeli omona ekanya ya Nyambe ni Jesu yoimanine ku Lyoko no silyo lya Nyambe.
7.56: Cwale sebeli wamba nji, “Komumone, kame nimona eliwilu eli liyatulukile ni Mwana no munu yoimanine kweli no silyo lya Nyambe!”
7.57: Cwale sebeli akuwa ni liywi linene ni kutika amatwi oo ni kwitukela kwa yonyene onje,
7.58: niku mukokela kundee no mulenen̄i niku mupwacula ni mawee. Etipaki sebeli abeeka eikumango yoo banji, ba makondo no ndumbana wisaniwa Saule.
7.59: Cwale alemine okupwacaula Setefani, sebeli olapela nji, “Mbumu Jesu otambule Emebo yange!”
7.60: Cwale sebeli okubama ni kukuwa ni liywi linene nji, “Mbumu, olese okwahupulela esibi sino!” Aba ana mana ngeso, sebeli okulanganena.

8.1: Saule naku pumena olufu lwa Setefani. Saule yo yandisa Ekeleke Cwale ba liywaa elyo sebeli kwinguka okuyandisiwa kunene mu Ndoo ya Nyambe mu Jelusalema, mi onje kame anakuhasanela mu naha no Judeya ni Samaliya sebeli kusiyala fela Atumiwa omboci.
8.2: Alume anjili no aasikupumena sebeli ata oka pumbeka Setefani, niku mulila onene.
8.3: Kono Saule sebeli otateka okusisinya Endoo ya Nyambe, ni kwingena mu tindoo okukokamo alume na kati ni kwaaingenyeka mu tolongo. Eliywi no Kuwaba sebeli likutaziwa mu Samaliya
8.4: Cwale awo anaku hasanyiwa sebeli ata alemine okukutaza eliywi.
8.5: Filipi sebeli ota mu mulenen̄i no Samaliya, nukaamba eyi ya Kilesite kwa onyene.
8.6: Aanu nokupula sebeli aikala ni mucima mumweya okutambula eyo anakwamba Filipi, Cwale sebeli amuyupa nikumona etimakazo ana kutende.
8.7: Kakuli Emebo no kwiiba sebeli inakutunda mwaanu nokupula awo anakwingeniwa yolemine okukuwa ni liywi linene, naanu asikukutela olun̄an̄ali ni iyanga no makondo sebeli abalisiwa.
8.8: Cwale okuwabelelwa noku neneba sebeli kwikalamo omo mu mulenen̄i. Simoni onganga
8.9: Kono oweli kame kunakwikala omulume onakwisaniwa Simoni onakutendanga amabibo mu tolopo no Samaliya onaku komokisanga esicaba, yonyene kame ana kukyemanga nji munu nokuneneba,
8.10: mi onje kame anaku mukutekanga, okutangisa ku mwanukana okutwala ku mukulu, sebeli aamba nji, “Uyu mulume ni maata a Nyambe awo aisanwa nji, ‘Amaata no kuneneba.’ ”
8.11: Kame anaku mukolwa kakuli naku tangisa kale okwakomokisa ni mabibo aye.
8.12: Kono aba anaku pumena Filipi aba anakwaambela eliywi no kuwaba no muboso wa Nyambe ni litina lya Jesu Kilesite onje alume nakati sebeli akolobeziwa.
8.13: Simba yonyene Simoni naku pumena, mi munyima no ku kolobeziwa sebeli okumalela Filipi, mi aba mona etimakazo neyi ikomokisa, sebeli okomoka.
8.14: Cwale atumiwa ku Jelusalema abaana kuyupa nji amasamaliya kame anatambula eliywi lya Nyambe, sebeli atuma Pitolosi ni Jowani.
8.15: Awo abaana kukeela sebeli aalapelela nji abiwe Emebo No Kukena.
8.16: Kakuli Emebo No Kukena kaya siku shulumukela simba ku mumweya kwa onyene, kono kame anaku kolobeziwa fela mu litina lya Mbumu Jesu.
8.17: Cewale sebeli abeka amaoko oo beulu yoo mi sbeli atambula Emebo No Kukena.
8.18: Cwale Simoni aba aaku mona nji Emebo kame inabiwi mukubeka amaoko no atumiwa, sebeli waasepisa okwaba amali,
8.19: ni kwamba nji, “Munibe ku maata awo, nji omunu yonje sanibeeke amaoko mba tambula Emebo No Kukenaa.”
8.20: Kono Pitolosi sebeli omwambela nji, “Amali owe ofe nawo, kakuli kame onahana nji kame ofanena okula empo ya Nyambe ni mali!
8.21: Kakwisa esi sobiwe simba esemba, mu taba eyo, kakuli omucima wowe kausiluka mu miyo a Nyambe.
8.22: Obake mu uyi wowe, mi olapele Nyambe, mwendi mbufanene okulemenwa omuhupulo oli mu mucima wowe.
8.23: Kakuli kame ni mona nji kame oli mu mioti no kulula onene ni mu tolongo no sibi.”
8.24: Simoni sebeli otambula nji, “Muni lapelele kwa Nyambe, nji kakwisa esinjili kweyo mu naamba sasini kwele.”
8.25: Cwale aba anakumana okupaka eliywi lya Nyambe, sebeli aukela ku Jelusalema, okakutaza eliywi no kuwaba kwaanu no kupula no masamaya. Filipi ni Nduna no Muisopiya
8.26: Kono elin̄eloi lya Mbumu sebeli lyambela Filipi nji, “Oimane mi ote ku Mbowela, ku ndila ishetumuka ku Jelusalema okuta ku Gaza, no lihalaupa, eyo nokwa endiwangwa.”
8.27: Cwale sebeli oimana ni kutako, sebeli omona omulume no muisopiya, neli muumba, esikombwa sinene sa Kandasi, Ombumu no mukati no isopiya, neli omubabaleli no ufumu waye onje, neyi mu Jelusalema muku lapela
8.28: mi muku ukela kwaawo yoikalile mu koloi yaye yo lemine okubala mu buka no munuhi Isaya
8.29: Emebo No Kukena sebeli yamba kwa Filipi nji, “Otwalelelele, oshetete ku koloi eyi.”
8.30: Cwale Filipi sebeli oitukela kwa yonyene, niku muyupa yobala mu buka no munuhi Isaya, ni kumwibanguta nji, “Kame uyupa eyo olemine okubala?”
8.31: Onduna sebeli otambula nji, “Ngasibine sani yupisise, okuulwile omunu onisimweta?” mi sebeli omema Filipi okutina nji aikale naye.
8.32: Cwale ekalulo no lin̄olo anaku bala neli eyi, “Kanyi omukoko utwaliwa mukwiibaiwa simba akana no mukoko nokwalila owoya wako aba upatuliwa, kasi yaamisa akanwa kaye.
8.33: Mu kwenisiwa, mi ekatulo yaye sebeli iimekiwa. Anyine sotwesa okwa olusika lwaye, kakuli omoyo waye nautundisiwa mu litunga.”
8.34: Cwale onduna sebeli oibanguta Filipi nji, “Onambele, kame ni kulapela, omunuhi aba aamba eyi, kame akwamba yonyene nji kame aamba omunjili?”
8.35: Cwale Filipi sebeli oyamisa akanwa kaye ni kutangisa nelyo elin̄olo okumwambela amaywi no kuwaba a Jesu.
8.36: Cwale alemine okuta mu ndila sebeli awana abakuli ameyi, mi onduna sebeliwamba nji, “Omone, bano kame kuli ameyi. sikene esi sasini kanise oku kolobeziwa?”
8.37: Filipi sebeli wamba nji, “Nji kame opumena ni mucima wowe wonje, kame kukonahala. Nduna sebeli otambula nji, Kame ni pumena nji Jesu Kilesite ni Mwanaa Nyambe.”
8.38: Onduna sebeli olaelela ekoloi okwimana, onje Filipi ni Nduna sebeli aingena mu meyi, mi Filipi sebeli kolobeza onduna.
8.39: Cwale aba anakutunda mu meyi, Emebo ya Nyambe sebeli ishimba Filipi, mi onduna nakuulwa okumona Filipi kame, cwale sebeli otwalelela mu mwendo waye yo wabelelwe.
8.40: Kono Filipi nokakuwana mu Azoto, yo twalelela okukutaza eliywi no kuwaba mu titolopo tonje mane sebeli okakeela ku Sizeliya.

9.1: Kono Saule yosi tukufalile okufumbela okwibaa aiyetwa no Mbumu, sebeli ota ku mupulisita omukulu
9.2: oka kumbela kwa yonyene aman̄olo no kuta nawo mu tindoo no milapelo naku Damaseka, nji abasa kawane anjili asi Ndila eyo, alume simba akati, aanunge ni kwalita mu Jelusalema.
9.3: Cwale Saule yo atumele okukeela ku Damaseka, ababo olumonyi lunaku tunda ku wilu sebeli lumubeeka mukaci.
9.4: Cwale sebeli okwela banji ni kuyupa eliywi elyaamba kwa yonyene nji, “Saule, Saule, iikene oniyandiseta?”
9.5: Sebeli oibaguta nji, “Tiwe anyine, Mbumu?” Mbumu sebeli wamba nji, “Time Jesu woyo oyandisa.”
9.6: “Cwale winguke oingene mu mulenen̄i, mi mbuka simwetiwamo eyo so fanene okutenda.”
9.7: Alume anakwenda naye kame anakwimana ni kukomoka, kakuli kame anaku yupa eliywi kono kaasiku mona omunu.
9.8: Saule sebeli oinguka banji mi cwale amiyo aye abaana kutona nakukwangwa okumona omunu, cwale sebeli amulema ku Lyoko niku mulita mu Damaseka.
9.9: Mu maywaa aatu yoka mono, ni kulya simba okunwa.
9.10: Cwale kame kuna kwikala omwiyetwa mu Damaseka no litina lya Ananiasi. Ombumu sebeli omwambela mu pono nji, “Ananiasi.” mi sebeli otambula nji, “Yamene yauno, Mbumu.”
9.11: Ombumu sebeli omwambela nji, “Oimane mi ote mu ndila isaniwa nji eyi noku luka, okasaele mu ndoo ya Judasi omulume naku Tasusi no litina lya Saule. Kakuli kame alapela,
9.12: mi ni yonyene namono omulume wisaniwa Ananiasi mu pono yoiya niku beeka amaoko aye beulu yaya nji cwale amone kame.”
9.13: Kono Ananiasi sebeli otambula nji, “Mbumu, kame nina yupu ya uyu omulume kwaanu nokupula eyi ana tende, omo ana yandisete ouyi aasikupumena owe mu Jelusalema.
9.14: Naaba aneyi kuno, kame ana biwi amaata okutunda kwa apulisita akulu ni kununga onje aa alapela elitina lyowe.”
9.15: Kono Ombumu sebeli omwambela nji, “Ote, kakuli kame ninamukete okutenda esibelekiso sange nji atwale Elitina lyange kwaa simacaba na Mbumu naana no Isilaele.
9.16: Cwale kame sanimu simwete okuneneba no kukola oko sayupe mulibaka no kuyandisa elitina lyange.”
9.17: Cwale Ananiyasi sebeli ota nuka ingena mu ndoo ni kubeeka amaoko aye beulu yaye ni kwamba nji, “Minange Saule, Ombumu onaku monahaza kwa wene mu ndila nani tumu, yonyene Jesu nji omone kame mi wiyale Emebo No Kukena.”
9.18: Cwale ababo esinu sikufekile kanyi amayayu sebeli situnda mu miyo aye ni kumona kame. Cwale sebeli oimana ni kukolobeziwa.
9.19: Cwale sebeli olya ni kuukeliwa amaata Saule yo Kutaza mu Damaseka Saule sebeli oikala naiyetwa mu Damaseka amaywaa acana.
9.20: Mu ndoo no milapelo ababo sebeli okutaza nji Jesu ni Mwanaa Nyambe.
9.21: Onje anaku muyupa sebeli akomoka ni kwibanguta nji, “Kasa yokame onaku yandisanga ouyi anaku isananga ba litina Jesu mu Jelusalema? mane mulibaka elyo bokame aba aneyi kuno, mukwaanunga ni kwatwala kwa apulisita akulu?”
9.22: Kono Saule sebeli oekeza onene mu kongola kwaye, ni kukoma aendisi no Majuda okwamonisa nji Jesu yokame Kilesite.
9.23: Cwale amaywaa nokupula abaanakubwa, amajuda sebeli asinganyeka okwibaa Saule,
9.24: kono Saule sebeli olimuka omulelo woo. kame anaku mundamenanga munji ni ousiku ku myelo nji amwibae.
9.25: Kono aiyetwa aye sebeli amushimba ousiku oku mumatukiseta ba limota, amubekile mu litanda. Saule yoli mu Jelusalema
9.26: Saule aba ana kukeela mu Jelusalema sebeli weteka nji akuwane naiyetwa, mi onje kame anaku mucila, kakuli kasiku pumena nji niyonyene neli omwiyetwa.
9.27: Kono Banabasi sebeli omushimba, ni kumu twala kwa atumiwa, ni kwataluseta omo anaku monena Ombumu mu ndila, woyo ona kwamba naye, nomo ana kutaleze ni maata mu Damaseka mu litina lya Jesu.
9.28: Cwale Saule sebeli oyoya noo mane nikukwendela oomo anakusingela mu Jelusalema,
9.29: yo kutaza mukuzwafisa mu litina lya Mbumu, ni kwamba muku kanana ni Majuda ao aamba esi Gelike onyene aafumba okumwibaa.
9.30: Cwale abaye aba anakuyupa eyo, sebeli alita Saule kwa Sesaaliya, ni kumu fundula okuta ku Tasusi.
9.31: Cwale etikeleke monje mu Judeya ni mu Galileya ni mu Samaliya sebeli tiikala mu kozo, ni kweenda mu kucila kwa Mbumu, mi kame tina kukula ni kususeziwa mu tuso no Mebo No Kukena. Pitolosi yoli mu Lida ni mu Joppa
9.32: Pitolosi yo lemine okupotela eibaka yonje no naha, sebeli oiya ni kwa asikupumena aa ayakile mu Lida.
9.33: Omo sebeli okawana omulume no Litina lya Aneya, woyo onaku langana ba mumbeta yokola oweti no lun̄an̄ali mu myaka mutanu ni twaatu (8).
9.34: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli wamba kwa yonyene nji, “Aneya, Jesu Kilesite kame akubalisa, oshimbe oulangano wowe.” Ababo Aneya sebeli oinguka.
9.35: Onje aa ayakile mu Lida ni Shaloni naku mumona, mi sebeli asiulukela kwa Mbumu.
9.36: Mu Jopa kame kuna kwikala omuiyetwa no mukati elitina lyaye neli Tabita, (okutalusa nji Dokasi) Kame ana kutendanga emisebezi no kuwaba ni tituso.
9.37: Mu maywaa ao sebeli okola ni kufa. Cwale aba anakumana okumu yowisa, sebeli akamu beeka mu musiyo na kuwilu.
9.38: Lida kakuli kame ina kwikala beebi ni Jopa, aiyetwa sebeli ayupa nji Pitolosi kwaali, sebeli atuma alume ayili okamu kumbela nji, “Shangwe, ulese ku liyeha wiye kwaaci.”
9.39: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli oinguka nikuta noo. Aba anaku keela, sebeli amutwala ku musiyo na kuwilu, etimbelwa tonje sebeli tiimana ku nyonga yaye alemine okulila, nikumu monisa eikumango ni misisi anaku tendanga Dokasi yo siyoya noo.
9.40: Kono Pitolosi sebeli watundiseta bandee onje, sebeli okubama ni manwi banji ni kulapela, cwale nikusiulukela ku situpu ni kwamba nji, “Tabita, oinguke!” sebeli otona, mi aba anaku mona Pitolosi sebeli oikala.
9.41: Pitolosi sebeli omulema ku Lyoko okumwimeka. Cwale sebeli oisana etimbelwa naa asikupumena ni kwaaba Tabita yo yoya.
9.42: Etaba eyo sebeli ilimukiwa kwaanu onje mu Jopa, mi anokupula sebeli apumena kwa Mbumu.
9.43: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli oikala mu Jopa amaywaa nokupula ku mulume oisaniwa Simoni, omusuhi no itumba.

10.1: Mu Sesaaliya, kame kuna kwikala omulume no litina lya Koneliyasi, omukulu no masole, no mpi iisaniwa nji, “Italiya.”
10.2: Neli omunu ona kukubeeka ni kucila Nyambe nia sindoo yaye onje, kame ana kutusanga onene anokusheba mi kame ana kulapelanga enako yonje kwa Nyambe.
10.3: Ba nako no waatu omunji sebeli omona wino mu pono elin̄eloi lya Nyambe eliiya kwa yonyene ni kwamba nji, “Koneliyasi!”
10.4: Cwale Koneliyasi sebeli waliketa elin̄eloi mukucila ni kwamba nji, “Etaba ni ibine, Mbumu?” Elin̄eloi sebeli limu tambula nji, “Etitapelo ni tituso towe kwawo ashebile nati kambamene kwa Nyambe, mi natipulukiwa.
10.5: Cwale otume alume ku Jopa akashimbe Simoni woyo oisaniwa Pitolosi.
10.6: Kame ali ni Simoni omusuhi no itumba, endoo yaye kame ikubapile ni liwate.”
10.7: Cwale elin̄eloi lina kwamba naye aba linakuta, sebeli oisana abika aye ayili ni musole mumweya woyo ona kukubeeka kwa Nyambe kwawo ana ku mutatelelanga.
10.8: Munyima ya Koneliyasi okwaambela eyi inatendahala yonje sebeli waatuma ku Jopa. Epono ya Pitolosi
10.9: Eliywaa linaku tatamako, awo asili mu ndila, aali beebi ni Jopa, Pitolosi sebeli otina ba situwa no ndoo oka lapela, ba nako aba ina kukwana likumi ni twiili (12) omunji.
10.10: Pitolosi sebeli oyomba ni kusaela esino kulya, aasilemine okumu lukiseta eilya, sebeli omona epono.
10.11: Cwale sebeli omona eliwilu liyatuluka ni sinu siiya banji kanyi olwambi lunene lunungilwe ku mamaneneno yalo anee.
10.12: Mukaci yalo kame kuna kwikala emifuta yonje no iyamana neyi yenda ni mapumo ni tuyunyi na kuwilu.
10.13: Cwale eliywi sebeli liiya kwa yoyene lyaamba nji, “Imana, Pitolosi, wibae mi olye!”
10.14: Kono Pitolosi sebeli wamba nji, “Kokulwa, Mbumu, kakuli kanisilya kale esinu sonje no kwakena neyo no litilo.”
10.15: Eliywi sebeli liiya kwa yonyene kame akano wili nji, “Esi sikenisitwe kwa Nyambe, olese okwamba nji nisaalitilo.”
10.16: Nakuku tendahala ngeso twaatu, esinu eso sebeli susetwa ku wilu.
10.17: Pitolosi yosi nahana epono ana mono nji iikene, komumone, alume ana tumiwa kwa Koneliyasi munyima no kwibanguta ku ndoo ya Simoni sebeli akeela ni kwimana ba mwelo.
10.18: Cwale sebeli aisana ni kwibanguta nji, “Kana mokame muno ana tibelele Simoni wisaniwa Pitolosi?”
