10.19: Pitolosi yo sinahana eyi no pono eyo, Emebo sebeli yamba kwa yonyene nji, “Omone, alume aatu kame akusaela.
10.20: Wimane mi oshetumuke, ote noo oulwile oku lindalinda, kakuli time ninaa tumu.”
10.21: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli oshetumukela kwaao alume ana tumeniwa kwa yonyene ni kwamba nji, “Yamene mu saela. Mulibaka libine aba muneeyi?”
10.22: Cwale sebeli atambula nji, “Koneliyasi, omukulu no masole, kuluka, woyo ocila Nyambe ni kukutekiwa ku sicaba sonje no Majuda. Kame ana laeliwa ku lingeloi no kukena okwisanena ku ndoo yaye, nji ayupe eyo so wambe.”
10.23: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli waatambula ni kwaingenyeka mu ndoo. Pitolosi ku ndoo ya Koneliyasi Eliywaa linaku tatamako Pitolosi sebeli ota noo, nanjili abaye namu Jopa sebeli ata naye.
10.24: Kweeli linaku tatamako eliywaa sebeli aingena mu Sesaaliya. Koneliyasi kame anakwa atatelela, mane kame anakwisana bamweya aa asinga onene naabaye.
10.25: Cwale Pitolosi aba anakwingena, Koneliyasi sebeli omuwaniketa niku kwela banji ni manwi ku makondo aye niku mukubamena.
10.26: Kono Pitolosi sebeli omwimeka ni kwamba nji, “Imana,” “Nimene, kame nili omunu fela.”
10.27: Pitolosi yo ambola ni Koneliyasi, sebeli aingena mu ndoo ni kuwanamo aanu nokupula aunganine.
10.28: Pitolosi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Aanyi kame mulimukile nji ni kulwisa omulawo omunu kakuli o Mujuda kalukele okuwana nasimacaba andina simba okulekula omunjili kwa yonyene. Kono Nyambe nanikete nji nilese okwaliketa omunu yonje nji kame aiyalile elitilo kasikena.
10.29: Cwale aba nina kutumeniwa, kame nineyi nambulwa mukwakana. Cwale kame nimi ibanguta nji, iikene munani isanene?”
10.30: Koneliyasi sebeli otambula nji, “Kwabita kale amaywaa anee, Kame naikalanga mundoo yange me nilapela omunji ba nako no waatu (15:00) mi sebeli nimona omulume onaku manga eikumango no kubenya yo imanine balubala wange
10.31: ni kwamba nji, ‘Koneliyasi okulapela kowe naku yupahala mi ni tituso towe na tihupuliwa kwa Nyambe.
10.32: Cwale otumene ku Jopa mi okaisane Simoni no litina lya Pitolosi, kame ali mu ndoo ya Simoni osikusuha eitumba, eyi ili beebi ni liwate.’
10.33: Cwale bokame aba nina leluba ookutumena, mi nutende wino aba uneyi. Cwale tonje kame tuli bamweya balubala wa Nyambe, oku yupa eyo ona laelwe yonje kwa Mbumu okutwambela.” Engambolo Ya Pitolosi
10.34: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli oyatulula akanwa kaye ni kwamba nji, “Niti luli kame nilemuha nji Nyambe kakete omunu omo aikalele.
10.35: Kono mu sicaba ni sicaba munu yonje woyo omucila ni kutenda eyi ilukile, kame alumelelwa kwa yonyene.
10.36: Kame mulimukile elin̄usa anaku tuma kwaana a Isilaele, okwa kutaza eliywi no kuwaba no kozo ya Jesu Kilesite Ombumu no aanu onje.
10.37: Kame mulimukile eyo ineyi mu Judeya monje eyi inaku tangisa mu Galileya munyima ya Jowani oku kutaza ei no kolobezo.
10.38: Kame mulimukile Nyambe omo anaku wabela Jesu wa Nazaleta ni Mebo no Kukena ni maata, ao anaku tendisa einu no kuwaba niku balisa aanu onje awo anakwi kalanga munji no maata a Satani, kakuli Nyambe kame ana kwikala naye.
10.39: Cwale kame tuli apaki kwiinu yonje anaku tenda bamweya mu naha no Majuda ni mu Jelusalema. Kame ana mwibaa, okumu tuleka.
10.40: Kono Nyambe naku mwingula ba liywaa no waatu ni kumuba oku monahala,
10.41: kasa kwaanu onje kono kwaaci anaku yulekiwa kwa Nyambe okutenda apaki, awo anakulya ni kunwa naye munyima no kwinguka kwaafu.
10.42: Kame ana tulaelele okukutaza kwaanu ni kupaka nji yokame ona ketiwa kwa Nyambe oku tenda omwatuli no asikuyoya naa sikufa.
10.43: Kwayonyene anuhi a Nyambe onje kame apaka nji munu yonje so pumena kwa yonyene kame sa tambule okulemenwa eibi mu litina lyaye.” Asimacaba aba anaku tambula Emebo no Kukena
10.44: Abo Pitolosi yo saamba eyi, Emebo No Kukena sebeli ishetumuka beulu no aanu onje awo ana yupu eliywi.
10.45: Aasikupumena mwa onyene asimupato ana kwiiya ni Pitolosi sebeli akomoka, kakuli empo no Mebo No Kukena naitelwe simba kwaa siacaba.
10.46: Kakuli kame ana kwayupa aamba mu tipuo tindina oku lumbeka Nyambe. Cwale Pitolosi sebeli wamba nji,
10.47: “Kana kame kuli omunu so kanena aa aanu oku kolobeziwa ni meyi aa ana tambula Emebo No Kukena kanyi aaci?”
10.48: Cwale sebeli waalaela nji akolobeziwe mu litina lya Jesu Kilesite. Sebeli amukumbela okwikala noo amaywaa acana.

11.1: Cwale Atumiwa naaasikupumena awo ali mu Judeya sebeli ayupa nji asimacaba nonyene kame ana tambula eliywi lya Nyambe.
11.2: Cwale Pitolosi aba nata ku Jelusalema, onyene asimupato sebeli amuzekisa nji,
11.3: “Iikene aba onati kwaalume aa kasita ku mupato ni kulya noo!”
11.4: Kono Pitolosi sebei otangisa okwaataluseta mu utungi nji,
11.5: “Kame nina kwikala mu mulenen̄i wa Jopa meni lapela, mi muku hapiwa sebeli ni mona epono no sinu simonahala okwiiya banji kanyi olwambi no kuneneba olu lunungilwe ku mamaneneno anee, mane ni kwiiya kwa mene.
11.6: Aba nishetetako okwaliketa, sebeli ni mona eiyamana ni ibatana neyi yeenda ni mapumo ni iyunyi naku wilu.
11.7: Cwale sebeli ni yupa eliywi elyamba kwa mene nji, ‘Oimane, Pitolosi, oibae mi olye!’
11.8: Kono sebeli naamba nji, ‘Kokuulwa Mbumu! Kakuli asimbakwatanga kakwisa esi no matilo simba nokwakena esi sina ingene mu kanwa kange.’
11.9: Kono eliywi sebeli litambula aka no wiili okutunda ku wilu nji, ‘Eso ana kenisa Nyambe kaufanene okusi isana nji litilo.’
11.10: Esi kame sinaku tendahala kaatu, mi einu eyo yonje sebeli yukela ku wilu.
11.11: Ba nako eyo alume aatu sebeli akeela ku ndoo omo tuna kwikala, anaku tumenwa kwa mene okutunda kwa Sesaaliya.
11.12: Cwale Emebo sebeli inambela nji nite noo, okuulwile okuba elibaka. Abaange mutanu ni mumweya sebeli ata nange, mi nuukaingena mu ndoo no mulume woyo.
11.13: Cwale sebeli otwambela omo ana kumonena elin̄eloi eli imanine mu ndoo yaye ni kwamba nji, ‘Waatume ku Jopa mi akalonde Simoni woyo oisaniwa Pitolosi.
11.14: Kame saambe kwa wene elin̄usa elyo saaliku yoyise, wene naasindoo yowe onje.’
11.15: Nji ni tangise okwamba, Emebo No Kukena sebeli ishulumukela beulu yoo kanyi omo ina kwiyela kwaaci ku matatekelo.
11.16: Cwale sebeli ni puluka eliywi lya Mbumu, omo ana kwambela nji, ‘Jowani naku kolobeza ni meyi, kono anyi mbamu kolobeziwa ni Mebo No Kukena.’
11.17: Nji cwale Nyambe nakwaaba etimpo no kukufeka kanyi eto anakutuba aba tuna kupumena mwa Jesu Kilesite time anyine cwale nji nikanene Nyambe!”
11.18: Cwale aba anaku yupa eyi, sebeli akwa emicima ni ku kanyisa Nyambe aamba nji, “Cwale kwa simacaba Nyambe naabi ngeeso okubaka no moyo.” Ekeleke mu Antiyoki
11.19: Cwale awo anaku hasana mulibaka no mayando ana kwiiya ba nako ana kweenda Setefani okakeela ku Foenisiya ni ku Sipulasi ni ku Antiyoki, aulwile okwamba eliywi kumunu yonje konji ku Majuda omboci.
11.20: Kono kame kuna kwikala anjili kwa onyene, alume naku Sipulasi ni ku Sileni nakwiiyanga ku Antiyoki mu kwambola ni Mangelike, oku kutaza eliywi lya Mbumu Jesu kwa onyene.
11.21: Amaata a Mbumu na kwikala noo, mi ni palo no kupula awo ana kupumena sebeli asiulukela kwa Mbumu.
11.22: Elin̄usa no eyi sebeli liiya mukuyupahala mu Ndoo ya Nyambe na mu Jelusalema, mi sebeli atuma Banabasi ku Antiyoki.
11.23: Cwale aba ana kukeela ni kumona esishemo sa Nyambe, sebeli owabelelwa ni kwasusueza onje nji aongotete kwa Mbumu ni mucima no ku tundamena.
11.24: Kakuli neli mulume no kuwaba, nokwiyala Emebo no Kukena ni tumelo. Cwale aanu no kupula sebeli aekezeha kwa Mbumu.
11.25: Cwale Banabasi sebeli ota kwa Tesasi oka saela Saule.
11.26: Cwale aba anaku muwana, sebeli omulita ku Antiyoki. Kame ana kwikalamo omwaka aakuwana ni Ndoo ya Nyambe ni kwiyeta aanu no kupula onene. Mu Antiyoki aiyetwa neli ano weli okwisaniwa nji aasikupumena.
11.27: Cwale mu maywaa aa, anuhi a Nyambe sebeli aiya okutunda ku Jelusalema okuta ku Antiyoki.
11.28: Cwale omunjili mwa onyene ona kwisaniwa nji Angabusi sebeli wimana ni kwamba ni Mebo nji kame sakwikale elishebo linene mu litunga lyonje, mi eyi kame inaku tendahala mu nako ya Kilaundiyasi.
11.29: Aiyetwa sebeli alela oku twalela aasikupumena ayakile mu Judeya etituso omunu ni munu oku tundisa omwa tweseta monje.
11.30: Cwale sebeli atenda ngeso, mi niku tumena akulu no Ndoo ya Nyambe , mu maoko a Banabasi ni Saule.

12.1: Mu nako eyo Ombumu Heloda sebeli otangisa oku yandisa anjili no Ndoo ya Nyambe.
12.2: Sebeli oibaa Jakobo minaye Jowani ni sabule.
12.3: Cwale aba ana kumona nji aendisi no Majuda na wabelelwa, sebeli wekeza okununga ni yonyene Pitolosi. Eyi neli mu maywaa no inkwa na mbulwa omumena.
12.4: Cwale aba ana kumana okumununga, sebeli omu beeka mu tolongo ni kumuba mu maoko no ikwata inee no masole, mi kame ana kulela oku mubeeka balubala noanu munyima no Paseka.
12.5: Cwale Pitolosi kame ana kuteulwa mu tolongo, kono Endoo ya Nyambe kaisiku lesele oku mulapelela mukusepahala kwa Nyambe. Pitolosi aba nalukululwa mu Tolongo
12.6: Ousiku owo luli abo Heloda yo hupula nji amulite bandee kwaanu, Pitolosi kame nalangananga mukaci no masole ayili yo nungilwe amawenge ayili, mi atateleli ayili aali ba mwelo no tolongo.
12.7: Cwale komumone, elin̄eloi lya Mbumu sebeli limonahala, mi eliseli sebeli limonahala mu tolongo, mi sebeli likuba Pitolosi ku timaci ni kumwingula okumwambela nji, “Oinguke mu wangu.” Amawenge sebeli akwa ku maoko aye.
12.8: Cwale elin̄eloi sebeli limwambela nji, “Okufuke mi okumange amakatulo owe.” mi sebeli otenda ngeso, elin̄eloi sebeli limwambela nji, “Okufuke omukanjo wowe mi onikon̄e.”
12.9: Cwale sebeli obana ni kukon̄a elin̄eloi, kasiku limuka nji elin̄eloi eyi litenda niya luli, kono yonyene kame anaku nahana nji kame amona epono.
12.10: Cwale aba anakusiya omutateleli no weli ni uyu no wili, sebeli akeela ba mweelo no sondo ou ota mu mulenen̄i. Omweelo sebeli oku yatulula wenyene kwa onyene, mi sebeli atundamo ni kwenda mu ndila, cwale ababo elin̄eloi sebeli limusiya.
12.11: Cwale Pitolosi sebeli olemuha yonyene ni kwamba nji, “Bano cwale kame ni yii nji ni niti! Mbumu na tumu elingeloi lyaye oku nilukulula mu maoko a Heloda ni kweyo yonje ana kutatelela aanu no Majuda.”
12.12: Cwale aba anaku lemuha sebeli ota ku ndoo ya Maliya, inawaye Jowani no litina linjili lya Maleka, omo ana kuungana ano kupula alemine okulapela.
12.13: Cwale abana kokota ba saandi no mweelo, omubika oisaniwa Loda sebeli oiya mukutambula.
12.14: Aba ana kulimuka eliywi lya Pitolosi, yo wabelelwe kasiku yatulula omweelo kono sebeli oituka okuta mukaci okaamba nji Pitolosi uno, kame aimanine ba mweelo.
12.15: Sebeli aamba kwa yonyene nji, “Kame otakana!” Kono yonyene sebeli ongoteta nji yokame. Sebeli aamba nji, “Ni lingeloi lyaye.”
12.16: Kono Pitolosi sebeli otwalelela okukokota, mi aba anaku yatulula sebeli amumona mi sebeli akomoka.
12.17: Kono sebeli waakobeta ni Lyoko nji aondoke, mi sebeli waatolokela omo ana mutundisete Mbumu mu tolongo. Mi sebeli wamba nji, “Mu simwete Jakobo naaasikupumena etaba eyi.” Cwale sebeli waasiya ni kuta ku sibaka sinjili.
12.18: Cwale aba kunakupa, sebeli kwikala omufilifili munene mukaci no masole kweeyo ina tendahala kwa Pitolosi.
12.19: Cwale Heloda aba ana kumusaela mi sebeli okwangwa okumuwana, sebeli ozekisa aatateleli ni kulaela nji kame afanena okufa. Cwale Heloda sebeli otunda mu Judeya okuta mu Sesaaliya oka ikalamo. Elifu lya Heloda
12.20: Cwale Heloda onaku tinena aanu namu Tile ni Sidoni, cwale sebeli aiya kwa yonyene aali muumweya onje mi aba anaku twesa okususueza Bulasitasi esikombwa sa Mbumu, sebeli akumbela ekozo. Kakuli eilya yoo kame inakutundanga mu naha ya Mbumu.
12.21: Ba liywaa linaku ketiwa Heloda sebeli okufuka eikumango no umbumu ni kwikala mu lubona lwaye, mi sebeli wamba kwaanu mu umbumu.
12.22: Aanu sebeli akuweleza nji, “Eliywi eli lya mulimu, kasa lya munu.”
12.23: Ababo elin̄eloi lya Nyambe sebeli limufula, kakuli kasiku kanyisa Nyambe, sebeli oliwa ku mibila ni kufa.
12.24: Kono eliywi lya Nyambe sebeli likula ni kwekezeha.
12.25: Cwale Banabasi ni Saule sebeli auka ku Jelusalema aba anakumana okwiyateteta omusebezi woo, sebeli aiya ni Jowani no litina linjiili lya Maleka.

13.1: Cwale mu Ndoo ya Nyambe namu Antiyoki kame kuna kwikala aanuhi naaiyeti, Banabasi, Simyoni ona kwisaniwa Nija, Lusiusi namu Sileni ni Manaeni omunjili no manduna no kuta ya Heloda omubusisi ni Saule.
13.2: Abo alemine oku kubamena Ombumu ni kukuyumena eilya, Emebo No Kukena sebeli yaamba nji, “Muni ketele Banabasi ni Saule atende omusebezi owo ninaa isanene.”
13.3: Cwale aba ana kumana okuuyumena eilya ni kulapela sebeli abeeka amaoko woo beulu yoo ni kwaafundula Mu Sipulasi
13.4: Cwale, bakutumiwa ku Mebo No Kukena sebeli ata ku Selusia, mi okutunda abo sebeli alutela mu Sipulasi.
13.5: Cwale aba anoka keela mu Salamisi, sebeli aaka kutaza eliywi lya Nyambe mu tindoo no ilapelo no Majuda. Kame ana kweenda ni Jowani ona kwaatusanga.
13.6: Cwale aba anaende mu sooli mane okakeela ku Pafosi, sebeli akuwana ni mulume no mabibo, omunuhi no mapwa no Majuda no Litina lya Bal-Jesu.
13.7: Kame ana kwikalanga ku mubusisi Selgiusi Paulusi, omulume no kushangama. Woyo sebeli oisana Banabasi ni Saule na kulakaza okuyupa eliywi lya Nyambe.
13.8: Kono Elimasi no mabibo (kakuli neli yonyene etaluso no litina lyaye) sebeli wahanyeza, ni kweteka okukanisa omubusisi nji alese okupumena.
13.9: Kono Saule, woyo wisaniwa kame nji Paulusi, sebeli wiyala ni Mebo No Kukena mi sebeli omwaliketa
13.10: ni kwamba nji, “Weene omwana no kwiiba, wene esila no inu yonje nokuluka, wene wiyalile ouyi onje, kaulesele okusinya endila no kooloka ya Mbumu!
13.11: Cwale omone, elyoko lya Mbumu kame lili beulu yowe, kame sotende esibofu mi uulwe okumona eliywaa ba nako icana.” Ababo okwilola ni uwi sebeli ifuka amiyo aye, mi sebeli osaela omunu no kumwendisa ni Lyoko.
13.12: Cwale omubusisi sebeli opumena aba ana kumona esi sineeyi, kakuli kame ana kukomokisiwa ku tuto ya Mbumu. Mu Antiyoki namu Pisidiya
13.13: Cwale Paulusi naa ana kwenda noo sebeli atunda mu Pafosi ni kuta okakeela ni ku Pega namu Pamfiliya. Mi Jowani sebeli waasiya ni kuuka ku Jelusalema.
13.14: Kono onyene sebeli atunda mu Pega nuuka keela mu Antiyoki namu Pisidiya, mi ba liywaa no Pumulo sebeli aingena mu ndoo no milapelo nuu ka ikala banji.
13.15: Munyima no ku bala omulawo naanuhi a Nyambe, aendisi no ndoo no milapelo sebeli aatumena omunu ona kwamba nji, “Abaange, nji kame muli ni liywi no kususuweza aanu, mu lyaambe.”
13.16: Cwale Paulusi sebeli oimana, mi yo kobetite ni Lyoko, sebeli wamba nji, “Alume no Isilaele, naanyi mucila Nyambe, komuteetete!
13.17: Nyambe no aanu aa no Isilaele kame ana kukuketela asitetu ni kwaakulisa asiikalile mu naha no Engepita, ni Lyoko no kwimana sebeli waatundisamo,
13.18: cwale mu myaka no kukwana makumi anee (40) sebeli oyanda noo mu lihalaupa.
13.19: Cwale aba ana kumana okuyundisa amasika mutanu naayili mu naha no Kanana, mi sebeli waaba enaha yoo kanyi ayooli.
13.20: Cwale munyima nweeyo, Sebeli waaba aatuli okutwala ba nako no munuhi wa Nyambe Samwele, mi kame sina kushimba emyaka ina kukwana emwenda inee ni makumi atanu (450).
13.21: Cwale aba anaku kumbela nji abiwe ombumu, Nyambe sebeli waaba Saule omwana Kishi, omulume no lusika lwa Benjamine, ni kubusa emyaka inakukwana makumi anee (40).
13.22: Cwale aba ana kumana oku mutundisa, sebeli oimeka Dabida okutenda ombumu woo, yonaku pakiwa ni kwamba eyaye nji, ‘Kame nina wana Dabida omwana Jese, omulume woyo okolwisa omucima wange, woyo sotenda eyo nisinga yonje.’
13.23: Mu lusika no mulume uyu Nyambe na liti omuyoyisi no Isilaele, yonyene Jesu, kanyi omo ana kusepiseza.
13.24: Cwale Jesu yo kasiiya kale Jowani yo wakutaza kale ekolobezo no kubaka kwaanu onje no Isilaele.
13.25: Cwale Jowani yoli beebi niku mana omusebezi waye, sebeli nji, ‘Ngasibine muyambuta nji time anyine? Kasa mene yonyene. Kokuulwa, kono munyima yange omunjili okeile, simba etinjatangwa naku makodo aye sitwese okwa nungutula.’
13.26: “Abaange, aanu no lusika lwa Abulahama naanyi monje aa acila Nyambe, kwaaci na kwiiyi elin̄usa no kuyoyisa.
13.27: Kakuli awo ayoya mu Jelusalema naa endisi oo, mulibaka nji kasi limuka Jesu simba okwayupa amaywii no anuhi a Nyambe aa abaliwa ba liywaa ni liywaa eli no Pumulo, naiyateetete eyi no kumwatula.
13.28: Simba nji kasikuwana omubonda owo ofanena elifu, sebeli akumbela Pilato kwalukulwela yonyene nji aibaiwe.
13.29: Cwale aba ana kumana okwiiyateteta eyo inakun̄oliwa eyaye, sebeli amutundisa ba sitondo ni kumu langeka mu libita.
13.31: ni kumoniwa mu maywaa no kupula kwaao ana kwiiya naye okutunda ku Galileya okuta ku Jelusalema, awo atendile cwale apaki aye kwaanu.
13.32: Cwale na tumilitele eliywi no kuwaba elyo Nyambe ana kusepisa kwaa njekulyetu nji,
13.33: esi ana iyatetete mwaaci anoo mu kwingula Jesu, kanyi kame omo kun̄olelwe mu Lismu no wiili nji, ‘Tiwe Mwanange, balelo kame nina kuleye.’
13.34: Cwale esisupo no niti aba ana mwingula kwaafu, nji katamba kuukela okoola, ya naamba Nyambe nji, ‘Kame sa nikube okukena ni timbuyoti no niti tina kusepisiwa kwa Dabida.’
13.35: Cwale ni mu lisamu linjili nakwambiwa nji, ‘Kutamba kupumenena woyo no kukena wowe nji amone okoola.’
13.36: Kakuli Dabida aba ana kumana okusebeza mu maywaa aye eso sina kusaelwa kwa Nyambe, sebeli ofa, ni kulangekwa kwa sitaye, ni kumona okoola.
13.37: Kono woyo anaingula Nyambe, katamba kumona okoola.
13.38: Cwalehe Abange, mu limuke nji, mwa yonyene woyo mulume na mwambeliwa oku lemenwa eibi yenu,
13.39: mwa yonyene omunu yonje woyo opumena kame alukululwa ku inu yonje eyo kamutwese oku lukululwa mu mulawo wa Mushe.
13.40: Mu tokomele nakubu, nji cwale mu lese okwiyelwa kweyo inambiwa kwaanuhi nji,
13.41: ‘Komumone, anyi akamashungu, mu komoke, mi mufe! Kakuli kame ni tenda omusebezi mu maywaa enu, omusebezi samuulwe oku pumena, naba sami talusete woo omunu!’ ”
13.42: Aba ana kusinga okubanamo, aanu sebeli akumbela nji atalusete einu eyo afanena okutalusetwa eli no Pumulo linjili.
13.43: Cwale asi mukopano aba ana kufundulwa, aendisi no Majuda no kupula na pulosebelite awo asebeleza Nyambe sebeli akon̄a Paulusi ni Banabasi, awo sebeli aambola noo, ni kwakutaza okongoteta mu sishemo sa Nyambe.
13.44: Eli no Pumulo lina kutatamako omunu yonje namu mulenen̄i sebeli oiya mukuungana bamweya mukuyupa eliywi lya Nyambe.
13.45: Kono aendisi no Majuda aba ana kumona elikwanamunu, sebeli ayupa omuna, ni ku kanana eyo ina kwambiwa kwa Paulusi, ni ku mushendoola.
13.46: Cwale Paulusi ni Bananbasi sebeli aambela mukwacila nji, “Kame ku lukeele nji eliywi lya Nyambe lyambelwe anyi oweli. Kono aba mulikana kame mukwatula mwenyene nji kamu fanenwe omooyo no kwaabwa, komumone, kame tusiulukela kwa simacaba.
13.47: Kakuli cwale Ombumu natu laelele nji, ‘Kame nina kutumu nji otenda eliseli no asimacaba, nji olita oku yoyisa mu litunga lyonje okutwala ku mamaneneno.’ ”
13.48: Cwale asimacaba aba ana kuyupa ngeso, sebeli awabelelwa, ni kukanyisa eliywi lya Nyambe, mi ano kupula aa ana ketelwe omoyo no kwaabwa, sebeli apumena.
13.49: Cwale eliywi lya Mbumu sebeli lihasana mu silalanda sonje eso.
13.50: Kono aendisi no Majuda sebeli asusueza akati aa aketukiwa naalume abusai no mulenen̄i, ni kwingulela Paulusi ni Banabasi amayando, mi sebeli aacita mu naha yoo.
13.51: Kono onyene sebeli atutula eliluli ku makondo oo, ni kuta ku Ikoniyamu.
13.52: Cwale aiyetwa sebeli aiyala okuwabelelwa ni Mebo no Kukena.

14.1: Cwale mu Ikoniyamu sebeli aingena bamweya mu ndoo no milapelo no Majuda, aba ana kwambamo eliywi, epalo no kupula sebeli ipumena bamweya ku Majuda niku Mangelike
14.2: Kono aendisi no Majuda anokwa pumena sebeli asusueza asimacaba, mi ni kwafilikanya emicima okulwisa aasikupumena.
14.3: Cwale sebeli aikalamo enako no kuleba, aamba eyi no Mbumu mukwacila, awo aaba oupaki ku liywi no sishemo saye, mukutenda eisupo neyi ikomokisa ni maoko oo.
14.4: Kono aanu namu mulenen̄i kame anokutaba, anjili ku lineku no Majuda anjili ku lineku no atumiwa.
14.5: Cwale omufilifili aba una kutendiwa ku Majuda bamweya na asimacaba, naa endisi oo, aba ana kusinga nji akatende asiku pumena ouyi ni kwaafula ni mawee.
14.6: Atumiwa aba anaku lemuha etaba eyo, sebeli acilela ku Lisitila ni ku Deba emulenen̄i namu Likaoniya, ni mu naha ikubapile nayo.
14.7: Omo sebeli akutazamo eliywi. Mu Lisitila
14.8: Cwale mu Lisitila kame kuna kwikalanga omulume onaku leiwa yoli esiyanga no makondo, neli esiyanga okutunda ba kuleiwa kwaye.
14.9: Yonyene kame ana kuteteta Paulusi yo aamba. Paulusi sebeli omwaliketa, mi sebeli omona nji kame ali ni tumelo nji abalisiwe
14.10: cwale sebeli omwambela ni liywi no kuneneba nji, “Oimane ni makondo owe!” mi sebeli omatuka ni kweenda.
14.11: Cwale enyangela aba ina kumona eyo ana kutenda Paulusi, sebeli atangisa okukuwa mu puo no Silikaniya nji, “emilimu kame ineyi kwaaci mu sumbiwa sikufeka kanyi aanu!”
14.12: Banabasi kame anaku mubeeka elitina lya Zeusi, Paulusi neli lya Hemasi, kakuli neli yonyene omukulu ku kwamba.
14.13: Omupulisita, no ndoo ya Zeusi onyambe woo eyo inakwikala balubala no mulenen̄i, sebeli olita amapulu akabisitwe ni tipalisa ba myelo kame anaku singa okutenda esitabelo bamweya naanu.
14.14: Kono atumiwa Banabasi ni Paulusi aba ana kuyupa eyo, sebeli akaola eikumango yoo, mi sebeli aitukela mukaci no aanu no kupula alemine okukuwa nji,
14.15: “Alume, ikene aba mutenda ngesi? naaci tuli alume kanyi aanyi, mi kame tuna militele amaywi no kuwaba, nji kame mufanena okusiuluka okutunda ku inu eyi no mbulwa tuso okuta kuwa Nyambe no kuyoya woyo ona kutenda eliwilu ni litunga, ni liwate, neyo yonje ilimo.
14.16: Mu tinako naku nyima kame ana ku lumelelanga aanu onje okwenda mu mikwa yoo.
14.17: Nabakulingeso, kasikulesela okuba oupaki kakuli kame anatende wino ni kumiba ombula na kuwilu ni tinako no kukutula, okumiba eilya ni kwiiiyata emicima yenu oku wabelelwa.”
14.18: Mu maywi aa kasikutwesa aanu okwakanisa okwatendela eitabelo.
14.19: Kono sebeli kwiiya aendisi no Majuda ana kutunda mu Antiyoki ni mu Ikoniyamu, ni kusususweza aanu, sebeli afula Paulusi ni mawee ni ku mukoka oku mutundisa mu mulenen̄i mu kuhupula nji nafu.
14.20: Kono aiyetwa sebeli amubeeka mukaci mi sebeli oinguka ni kwingena mu mulenen̄i. Ba liywaa linaku tatamako sebeli ota ni Banabasi ku Deba. Okuukela ku Antiyoki mu Siliya
14.21: Cwale aba ana kumana okukutaza eliywi mu mulenen̄i owo, ni kuwana aiyetwa no kupula sebeli aukela ku Lisitila ni ku Ikoniyamu ni ku Antiyoki.
14.22: Kame ana kongota emicima no aiyetwa ni kwaa susuweza nji atundamene mu tumelo, ni kwamba nji kame tufanena okwingena mu mayando no kupula nji twingene mu mubuso wa Nyambe.
14.23: Cwale aba ana kumana okuketa akulu mu keleke ni keleke, ni kulapela nuukuyumena eilya, sebeli aasiya mu sishemo no Mbumu woyo ana ku pumena mwa yonyene.
14.24: Cwale sebeli abita mu naha no Pisidiya ni kuta ku Pamfiliya.
14.25: Cwale aba ana kumana okwamba amaywi mu Pega, sebeli ata ku Ataliya,
14.26: cwale okutunda abo sebeli alutela ku Antiyoki, omo ana kubeekiwa mu sishemo sa Nyambe mu musebezi owo ana kwiyateteta.
14.27: Cwale aba ana kukeela, sebeli awaneka Ekeleke bamweya ni kwamba yonje eyo Nyambe ana tende noo, nomo ana yatulwele omweelo no tumelo no asimacaba.
14.28: Cwale sebeli aikala enako no kuleba naaiyetwa.

15.1: Kono anjili alume ana kwiiya oku tunda mu Judeya sebeli aiyeta aasikupumena nji, “Aba kamwaingene mu mupato okuta mu mulawo wa Mushe, ka mu tamba okuyoisiwa.”
15.2: Cwale Paulusi ni Banabasi abaana kukanana noo onene, Paulusi ni Banabasi naanjili ngeso sebeli ayulekiwa nji ate ku Jelusalema kwaatumiwa naakulu akambole etaba eyo.
15.3: Cwale Endoo ya Nyambe sebeli yaafundula ngeso, sebeli ata endila no kubita mu Foenisiya bamweya ni mu Samaliya, alemine okwamba eyi no ku siuluka no asimacaba, mi sebeli aaba okuwabelelwa no kuneneba kwa asikupumena onje.
15.4: Cwale aba ana kwiiya ku Jelusalema, sebeli atambuliwa kwaatumiwa ni keleke, ni kwaakulu, mi sebeli atalusa yonje eyo ana kutenda Nyambe mwa onyene.
15.5: Kono aasikupumena anjili ao ali ku seemba no Afalisi sebeli aimana ni kwamba nji, “Esi sifanena ni kwatwala ku mupato, ni kwaa laela nji akuteke omulawo wa Mushe.”
15.6: Atumiwa naakulu sebeli akuwana bamweya okutatuba etaba eyi.
15.7: Cwale munyima no kwaambota onene, Pitolosi sebeli oimana nikwamba nji, “Abaange, kame mulimukile nji mu maywaa ana kubwa Nyambe na kuniketa mukaci kenu nji mulibaka no kanwa kange asimacaba kame afanena okuyupa eliywi lya Nyambe ni kupumena.
15.8: Cwale Nyambe woyo olimukile emicima yoo, kame aapaka mu kwaaba Emebo No Kukena kanyi omo ana tendele kwaaci.
15.9: Kasi tenda eshutano mukaci ketu nonyene, kono kame anaakenisa ni tumelo.
15.10: Cwalehe, iikene aba mweteka Nyambe mu kubeeka ecoko mu tindingo no aiyetwa eyo ana kwangwa anjekulyetu simba eyo natukutwesa okushimba?
15.11: Cwale kame tupumena nji kame satu yoyisiwe mu sishemo sa Mbumu Jesu, kanyi omo sayoyisetwe nonyene.”
15.12: Cwale esikwata sonje sebeli sondoka mi kame ana kuyupeteta kwa Banabasi ni Paulusi aba ana kutalusa etiponiso ni timakazo eto Nyambe ana kutenda mwa onyene mukaci no asimacaba.
15.13: Munyima aba ana kumana okwamba, Jakobo sebeli otambula nji, “Abaange muteetete kwa mene!
15.14: Simoni sebeli otalusa omo Nyambe ana ku tangiseta oweli okupotela asimacaba, nji mukaci koo akuketele aanu aa afanena elitina lyaye.
15.15: Eyambo eyi kame ilumelelana ni maywi no anuhi a Nyambe, kanyi omo kun̄olelwe nji,
15.16: ‘Munyima no eyi, kame sa nuuke, mi kame sa ni yake esibaka ana kuyoya Dabida , eso sinakwi Kame sani yake ba matota no kale, mi kame sani wiimeke.
15.17: Nji aanu ana siyalako asaele Mbumu, naa simacaba onje awo ana isaniwa mulibaka no litina lyange.
15.18: Kame kwamba Mbumu, woyo ona kutenda einu eyi nji ilimukiwe okutunda ku matatekelo.’
15.19: Abakulingeso, ekatulo yange ninji, “Katu fanene oku kataza asimacaba awo asiulukela kwa Nyambe.
15.20: Kono kame tufanena okwaan̄olela nji atunde kweyi no litilo no maswaniso, ni kuuhule, ni kweyi no kowiwa, ni ku unyinga.
15.21: Kakuli okutunda ku nako na kukale mu mulenen̄i ni mulenen̄i kame kuli ao akutaza eyi no milao ya Mushe eli no Pumulo neli no Pumulo mu tindoo no milapelo.” Elin̄olo kwaa Simacaba no Alumeli Okutunda ku Kuta
15.22: Cwale kame kuli wino atumiwa naakulu ni keleke yonje, okuketa alume okutunda mwaonyene ni kwaatuma ku Antiyoki bamweya ni Paulusi ni Banabasi. Sebeli atuma Juda woyo oisanwa nji Banabasi, ni Sailasi, alume abusa mukaci no aasikupumena,
15.23: ni kwatumena elin̄olo linjili eli lyamba nji, “Abaange, atumiwa bamweya naakulu, nikwaaasikupumena nwa simacaba mu Antiyoki ni mu Siliya ni mu silisiya, mulumele.
15.24: Kakuli na tuyupu nji aanu anjili ana tundu mwaaci kame ana mishupu ni maywi, oka mifilikanya emicima yenu, simba nji katwasikwa laela ngeso.
15.25: Naku monahala wino mwaaci, aba tuna lumelelana bamweya, okuketa alume okwatuma kwaanyi naa singiwa etu Banabasi ni Paulusi,
15.26: alume ana ku toboha omoyo woo mulibaka lya Mbumu wetu Jesu Kilesite.
15.27: Cwalehe natu mitumene Judasi ni Sailasi, awo onyene mbami talusete einu imweya mu liywi no kanwa.
15.28: Kakuli na kumonahala wino ku Mebo no kukena ni kwaaci okwamibeeka omushimbo no kuneneba okubita eyi einu no utokwa,
15.29: nji mukulya kweyo ina tendiwa esitabelo ku maswaniso neyi itunda ku unyinga ni kweyi no kowiwa neyi itunda mu uhule. Nji kame okuteula wenyene kweeyi, mbu tende wino. Musiyale wino.”
15.30: Cwale aba ana kufundulwa awo, sebeli ata ku Antiyoki, niku waneka bamweya emikopano ni kwaaba elin̄olo.
15.31: Cwale aba ana ku libala, sebeli awabelelwa onene ku maywi alyo no susuezo.
15.32: Cwale Judasi ni Sailasi, awo ana kutenda onyene aanuhi a Nyambe, sebeli asusueza aasikupumena ni maywi no kupula ni kwaaongota.
15.33: Cwale aba ana kwikalamo enako no kuleba, sebeli afundulwa mu kozo kwaaasikupumena awo ana kwafundula.
15.34: Kono Sailasi sebeli osinga oku siyala.
15.35: Kono Paulusi ni Banabasi sebeli asiyala mu Antiyoki, aiyeta ni kukutaza eliywi lya Mbumu, bamweya naanjili ano kupula. Paulusi ni Banabasi aba ano Kutaba
15.36: Cwale munyima no maywaa anjili, Paulusi sebeli wambela Banabasi nji, “Wiiye, tuuke tukapotele aasikupumena mu mulenen̄i ni mulenen̄i omo tuna kwambanga eliywi lya Mbumu, ni kumona omo ayoyela.”
15.37: Cwale Banabasi sebeli osinga okushimba Jowani woyo oisaniwa nji Maleka.
15.38: Kono Paulusi sebeli onahana nji alese okushimba omunu ona kwaasiya asili mu Pamfiliya, mi kasi kuta noo mu musebezi woo.
15.39: Cwale sebeli kwinguka efapano no kuneneba, mane sebeli akutaba, Banabasi sebeli oshimba Maleka ni ku lutela mu Sipulasi,
15.40: kono Paulusi sebeli oketa Sailasi ni ku funduka, yo beekilwe mu sishemo no Mbumu kwaaasikupumena.
15.41: Cwale sebeli ota mu Seliya ni mu Silisiya, yo ongota etikeleke namo.

16.1: Paulusi sebeli wiiya mu Deba ni ku Lisitila. Omo kame ku na kwikalanga omwiyetwa, no litina lya Timoteya. Omwana no mukati no Mujuda omuasikupumena, kono sitaye neli omungelike
16.2: Kame ana kupakiwa wino kwaa asikupumena na mu Lisitila ni mu Ikoniyamu,
16.3: Paulusi kame ana ku saela Timoteya nji amu sindekete, mi sebeli omushimba ni ku mubeeka ku mupato mulibaka no Majuda ana kwiikalanga mu ibaka eyo, kakuli kame ana kulimuka nji sitaye neli mungelike
16.4: Aali mu musipili woo okuta ku milenen̄i, sebeli alaela aaasikupumena nji amamele omulawo ana kubeeka atumiwa naakulu awo ana kwikalnga mu Jelusalema.
16.5: Cwale etikeleke kame tina kongotiwa mu tumelo, ni kwekeza ku palo mu liywaa ni liywaa. Epono ya Paulusi no mulume naku Mesodoniya
16.6: Cwale sebeli ata mu naha no Filinjiya ni mu Galatiya, kakuli Emebo No Kukena kame ina kwaakanisa okwamba amaywi mu Asia.
16.7: Cwale aba ana kwiiya okusheeteta amabapa ni Misiya, sebeli a saela okuta mu Betiniya, kono Emebo ya Jesu kaisikwa alumelela.
16.8: Cwale aba ana kumana okweenda mu naha no Misiya, sebeli ashetumukela ku Tulowasi.
16.9: Paulusi sebeli omona epono mu usiku, omulume naku Mesodoniya yo imanine yo mu kumbela ni kwamba nji, “Wiiye mu Mesodoniya mukututusa.”
16.10: Cwale aba ana kumana okumona epono eyo, Ababo sebeli tuku tukiseta mu wangu okuta ku Mesodoniya, me tunahana nji Nyambe kame ana twisanene oka kutazamo eliywi kwa onyene. Mu Filipi, Okufutuka kwa Lidiya
16.11: Aba tuna kufuula okutunda mu Tulowasi, sebeli tuta ku Samotilasi, eliywaa lina kutatamako sebeli tukafuweka mu Ne-yapolisi.
16.12: Aba tuna kutundamo sebeli tukaingena mu Filipi, omulenen̄i no weli mu sikiliti no Mesodoniya, kame ni koloni no Maloma. Sebeli twiikalamo amaywaa no mupula.
16.13: Cwale ba liywaa no Pumulo sebeli tuta ku nyonga no musindi, oko tuna kuhupula nji kame kuli esibaka no milapelo, mi sebeli twiikala ni kwamba naakati ana ku unganako.
16.14: Omukati omunjili mwa onyene ona kutuyupa neli no litina lya Lidiya, ona kutunda mu mulenen̄i no Tiyatila, omuulisi no ibyana no undilu. Woyo olapela Nyambe, mi Ombumu sebeli oyatulula omucima waye nji atokomele eyo aamba Paulusi.
16.15: Cwale aba ana kumana okukolobeziwa, naasindoo yaye, sebeli otu kumbela nji, “Nji namwaatula nji mbili wa ku sepahala kwa Mbumu, mwiiye mu ndoo yange mwikalemo.” Sebeli otu hapeleza okuta. Mu Tolongo ku Filipi
16.16: Eliywaa linjili kame tuna tanga mu sibaka no milapelo, sebeli tukuwana ni musizana no mubika woyo oli ni mebo no unuhi, naku fumisa onene molyaye mu ku nuha.
16.17: Sebeli okon̄a Paulusi naaci yo kuweleza nji, “Alume aa nabika a Nyambe oli beulu! Kame amyambela endila no mooyo!”
16.18: Eyi kame ana kwitenda mu maywaa no kupula. Kono Paulusi sebeli otina, ni ku futuka ni kwamba ku mebo nji, “Kame ni ku laela mu litina lya Jesu Kilesite otunde mwa yonyene!” Cwale sebeli itunda mwa yonyene ababo ba nako eyeyo.
16.19: Kono aolyaye aba ana kumona nji naabwelwe esepo no ku fuma, sebeli alema Paulusi ni Sailasi ni kwatwala mu sibaka no musika balubala nwaa busisi.
16.20: Cwale aba ana kumana okwaalita bouso nwaatuli, sebeli aamba nji, “Alume aa, Majuda mi kame alyanganisa omulenen̄i wetu.
16.21: Kame aiyeta emikwa eyo no kwafanena nji twiikon̄e ni kwiitambula aaci Amaloma.”
16.22: Enyangela sebeli itateka okwaalwisa, mi aatuli sebeli akaola eikumango yoo ni kuba etaelo nji afuliwe ni pafa.
16.23: Cwale aba ana kumana okwafula emiupa no kupula, sebeli aaingenyeka mu tolongo, ni ku laela omutateleli nji aatatelele onene.
16.24: Woyo aba na laelelwe ngeeso, sebeli waabeeka mu tolongo na mukaci ni kwaabeeka amakondo oo mu itondo.
16.25: Kono ba kaci no usiku Paulusi ni Sailasi sebeli alapela ni kwiimba etindimo kwa Nyambe, mi amapantiti ateeteta.
16.26: Mu nako imweya fela sebeli kwiiya ezikinyeho no litunga, cwale emitomo no tolongo sebeli inyanganya mi ababo emyelo sebeli iyatuluka mi amawenge onje sebeli anungutuka ku munu yonje.
16.27: Cwale omutateleli aba ana kwinguka ni kumona nji emyelo naiyatuluka, sebeli oshomona omukwale waye nji akwibae, ba kuhupula nji mwendi amapantiti onje naatundumo.
16.28: Kono Paulusi sebeli okuwa ni liywi no kuneneba nji, “Olese okwibaa, kakuli tusilimo toonje.”
16.29: Omutateleli aba ana ku kumbela elibona, sebeli witukelamo, mu kucila sebeli okakwela ku makondo a Paulusi ni Sailasi.
16.30: Cwale sebeli waatundiseta ba ndee ni kwamba nji, “Alume, ngasibine sani tende nji ni yoyisiwe?”
16.31: Cwale sebeli aamba nji, “Olumele mwa Mbumu Jesu, mbuyoyisiwa, wene mane naasindoo yowe.”
16.32: Cwale sebeli aamba amaywi no Mbumu kwa yonyene ni kwao onje ana kwikala mu ndoo yaye.
16.33: Sebeli waashimba mu nako eyeyo no usiku, ni kwaayowisa ba miupa-upa yoo, mi sebeli okolobeziwa ababo naasindoo yaye onje.
16.34: Cwale sebeli waalita mu ndoo yaye, ni kwaaba eilya balubala woo, ni ku wabelelwa naa sindoo yaya onje kakuli na lumele mwa Nyambe.
16.35: Kono aba kuna kupa, aatuli sebeli alaela omupolisa, ni kwamba nji, “Waalukulule awo alume akutele.”
16.36: Cwale omupolisa sebeli osimweta Paulusi amaywi awo, ni kwamba nji, “Aatuli nani tumu nji mu lukululwe mu kutele. Cwalehe na mulukululwa, mi mweende mu kozo.”
16.37: Kono Paulusi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Kame ana tufulu balubala nwaanu, kono kasikutwatula oweli, aci tutendile tuli amaloma, mi naatubeeke mu tolongo. Cwale kame asaela oku tu tundisamo ku mukunda? Kokuulwa! Mwaalesele onyene aiye muku tutundisamo.”
16.38: Amapolisa sebeli asimweta aatuli amaywi ao, mi sebeli acila aba ana kuyupa nji neli Maloma.
16.39: Cwale sebeli aiya nuuku kokobeza kwaonyene. Sebeli aatundisamo, ni kwakumbela nji asiye omulenen̄i.
16.40: Cwale aba ana kutunda mu tolongo, sebeli ata kwa Lidiya, mi cwale aba ana kumana okumona naaasikupumena, ni kwaaongota emicima, mi sebeli afunduka.

17.1: Cwale aba ana kubita mu Amfipolisi ni mu Apoloniya, sebeli aiya mu Tesalonika omo kuna kwikala endoo no milapelo no Majuda.
17.2: Paulusi mu mukwa waye sebeli oingena kwa onyene, mi mu tisunda taatu, yo kanana noo okutunda mu man̄olo
17.3: ni kwataluseta ni kwamonisa nji kame kuna kufanena Kilesite oku yupisiwa okukola ni kwinguka kwaafu, ni kwamba nji, “Woyo Jesu nineeyi mu kwamba kwaanyi eyaye, yokame Kilesite.”
17.4: Cwale anjili mukaci koo sebeli asusuezwa, nuukuwana ni Paulusi ni Sailasi bamweya naa nokupula no Mangelike mane naakati no kupula ao akutekiwa.
17.5: Kono aendisi no Majuda kame ana kwafelanga omuna, mi sebeli ashimba aafokoli anjili anatoliwa, ni kwaawaneka okwaatenda esitopa, ni kubeeka omulenen̄i mukaci, okutinguluka endoo ya Njasoni, okwaasaela nji aalite kwaanu.
17.6: Cwale aba na kuulwa okwawana, sebeli akokela Njasoni naanjili aasikupumena balubala no abusisi no mulenen̄i alemine okukuwa nji, “Alume awo ana liti outata mu litunga, kame aneyi ni kuno,
17.7: mi Njasoni naatambula, mi onje kame alwisa emilao ya Sizale aamba nji kame kuli omunjili Ombumu yonyene Jesu.”
17.8: Cwale aanu naabusisi no mulenen̄i sebeli ahakanyeha aba ana kuyupa eyi.
17.9: Cwale aba ana kushimba amali kwa Josani ni kwaanjili, sebeli aalesela nuukutela. Mu Beliya
17.10: Ababo aasikupumena sebeli afundula Paulusi ni Sailasi ousiku okuta ku Beliya, mi aba ana kukeela sebeli aingena mu ndoo no milapelo no Majuda.
17.11: Cwale aendisi no Majuda aa kame ana kwikala ni micima no kuwaba okubita awo na mu Tesalonika, kakuli kame ana tambula eliywi mu kutukufalelwa, ni kusaisisa mu man̄olo mu liywaa ni liywaa okumona nji einu eyi moikalele.
17.12: Ano kupula mwaonyene sebeli apumena, naakati no kukutekeha no Mangelike naalume ngeeso.
17.13: Kono cwale aendisi no Majuda na mu Tesalonika aba ana kuyupa nji eliywi lya Nyambe kame lyambiwa kwa Paulusi mu Beliya, sebeli aiya mo mu kufilikanya esicaba.
17.14: Cwale aasikupumena ababo sebeli afundula Paulusi, okumutwala ku liwate, kono Sailasi ni Timoteya sebeli asiyalamo.
17.15: Awo ana sindeketa Paulusi sebeli akakeela ku Atenesisi, abaana kuuka sebeli aiya ni titaelo okutunda kwa Paulusi nji, Sailasi ni Timoteya ate kwa yonyene muwangu mi ababo sebeli afunduka. Mu Atenesisi
17.16: Ababo Paulusi yosaatatelele mu Atenesi, sebeli otina aba ana kumona nji omulenen̄i kame wiyalile eifekiso no milimu.
17.17: Cwale sebeli okanana ni Majuda mu ndoo no milapelo naanu awo acila Nyambe, sebeli otenda ngeso muliywaa ni liywaa ku munu yonje woyo ona kuwaninga mu musika.
17.18: Cwale a si Epikulini ni sitoiki filosofi sebeli aambola naye. Mi anjili sebeli aamba nji, “Osibuwabuwi uyu iikene aamba?” Anjili sebeli aamba nji, “Kame amonahala kanyi omukutazi no milimu indina.” kakuli kame ana kwaataluseta ya Jesu neyi no kwinguka kwaafu.
17.19: Cwale sebeli amushimba, okuta naye ku Aleopangasi ni kwamba nji, “Kame tusinga okulimuka eyi tuto no ubya eyi wamba iikene italusa?
17.20: Kakuli nuliti eyambo no kwatwaelwa mu matwi etu, cwale kame tusinga okulimuka eyi italusa.”
17.21: Cwale Amaatenesi onje naanu andina ao ayoyanga mo kaasikutenda esindina konji okwamba simba okuyupa eyi no ubya.
17.22: Cwale Paulusi sebeli oimana bakaci nwa Aleopangasi ni kwamba nji, “Anyi alume no Atenesi, kame ni lemuhile nji mu ndila yonje kame muli ni tumelo.
17.23: Kakuli aba ninabiti kame nina mono outokwa wetu noo ku lapela, sebeli ni wana ealetale aba ku n̄olilwe nji, ‘Kwa Nyambe no kwalimukiwa.’ Iikene cwale aba mu lapelela einu no kwalimukiwa, eyi yanamba kwaanyi.
17.24: Nyambe ona ku tenda elitunga niinu yonje ilimo, bakutenda Ombumu no liwilu ni litunga, ka yoyo mu tikeleke ti yakilwe ni maoko nwaanu.
17.25: Simba kame asebelezwa ni maoko nwaanu, kanyi nji kame asaela esinjili, kakuli yonyene kame aba aanu onje ouplo ni kooyela ni inu yonje.
17.26: Cwale kame ana kutenda mumweya mu matunga onje nwaanu oku yoya ba lubala no litunga longe, yokame ona lukisa etinako ni miseto no aanu omo ayayo.
17.27: Cwale nji kame afanena okusaela Nyambe, mu kuyambuta nji mba mubabatele ni ku muwana, mi yonyene kayoyo oku no kuleba naaci.
17.28: kakuli mwa yonyene kame, ‘Tuyoya, ni kweenda, ni kwikala kwetu.’ Sokame anaamba asikuloka anjili nji, ‘Naaci kame tuli anaaye luli.’
17.29: Cwale aba tuli ana a Nyambe, ka tulukele oku yambuta nji Nyambe mba feke kanyi gauda, simba esilibela, simba eliwee, eili eyi imanena esifekiso no mihupulo no munu.
17.30: Mu nako na kunyima Nyambe kame ana kwaliketanga aanu feela, kono bano kame alaela aanu onje okwaali nji abake.
17.31: Kakuli na kubeeka eliywaa elyo saatule elitunga mu niti mu mulume woyo ana kuketa, mi mweesi nabi aanu onje mu kumwingula kwaafu!”
17.32: Cwale aba na kuyupa eyi no kwinguka kwaafu, anjili sebeli asheka kono anjili sebeli aamba nji, “Kame satu kuyupe kame wamba ba tuto eyi.”
17.34: Kono aanu anjili sebeli akon̄a ni ku pumena, mwaonyene Denisi no Aleopangasi ni mukati no litina lya Damalisi naanjili aanu.

18.1: Aba kuna bwi eyo, Paulusi sebeli otunda mu Atenesi okuta ku Kolinte.
18.2: Cwale sebeli okawana Omujuda no litina lya Akila, kakuli Kulaude kame ana ku laela aendisi no Majuda okutunda mu Loma. Cwale sebeli ota okaamona,
18.3: kakuli neli omunu no musebezi umweya nonyene, sebeli oikala noo, mi kame ana ku sebezanga, kakuli neli asiku tenda amatende.
18.4: Cwale kame anakukanananga mu ndoo no milapelo eli no Pumulo lyonje, mi sebeli osusuweza aendisi no Majuda ni Mangelike
18.5: Cwale Sailasi ni Timoteya aba ana kukeela okutunda ku Mesodenia, Paulusi yo patehile ni kukutaza, okuba oupaki ku Majuda nji Kilesite yokame Jesu.
18.6: Cwale aba ana ku mu sheununa, sebeli otutula eikumango yaye ni kwamba nji, “Ounyinga wenu wikale ba mitwi yenu! Mene sikwite omubonda ku onyene. Okutunda bano kame sanite kwaa simacaba.”
18.7: Cwale sebeli otundamo ni kuta ku ndoo ya mulume no litina lya Tite Justusi omulapeli wa Nyambe, endoo yaye kame ina kwikalanga abeebi ni ndoo no milapelo.
18.8: Kilisipo omubusisi no tindoo no milapelo, ona ku pumena mwa Mbumu, bamweya naa sindoo yaye, mi Amakolinte ano kupula ana kuyupa Paulusi sebeli apumena mane niku kolobeziwa.
18.9: Cwale Ombumu sebeli wamba kwa Paulusi mu usiku umweya mu pono nji, “Olese kucila, kono waambe mi olese okondoka,
18.10: kakuli kame nili ni wene, mi kakwisa omunu so kulwisa simba okulemeka, kakuli kame nili naanu no kupula muno mu mulenen̄i.”
18.11: Cwale sebeli oikala omwaka mu mweya ni tikweti mutanu ni kamweya, (6) yo iyeta eliywi lya Nyambe mwaonyene.
18.12: Kono cwale Galiyo yoli omubusisi no Akaya, aendisi no Majuda sebeli akuwana ni ku lwisa Paulusi ni ku mulita balubala no Kuta.
18.13: Sebeli aamba nji, “Wuyu mulume kame asusuweza aanu ku lapele Nyambe mu ndila eyo ilwisa omulawo!”
18.14: Kono Paulusi aba ana kusinga okwamba, Galiyo sebeli wambela aendisi no Majuda nji, “Kambe ni mulibaka no kufosa simba okutenda omubonda, kambe kame kuli elibaka elyo ni twesa oku miyupisisa anyi aendisi no Majuda.
18.15: Kono kakuli ni mulibaka no tipuzo no maywi ni matina ni mulawo wetu, mu kumonene mwenyene. Kame ni kana okwatula eyambo eyi.
18.17: Cwale onje sebeli alema Sosiene, omwendisi no ndoo no milapelo ni ku mufula balubala no Kuta. Kono Galiyo kasi kutwalako omucima. Okuuka ku Antiyoki
18.18: Munyima no eyi, Paulusi sebeli oikala amaywaa no kupula, ni kusiya akwaye ni kulutela ku Siliya, yo enda ni Pulisila ni Akila. Ku Senkiliya, sebeli okukuliwa etin̄uki, kakuli kame ano kununga esinjili.
18.19: Cwale sebeli akeela mu Efese, mi sebeli waasiyamo, kono yonyene sebeli ota mu ndoo no milapelo mu ku kanana ni Majuda.
18.20: Cwale aba ana ku mukumbela nji aikale noo enako no kuleba, sebeli okana.
18.21: Kono aba kwaasiya, sebeli waambela nji, “Kame sani kauke kwaaci nji Nyambe mba singi.” Cwale sebeli oluta okusiya Efese.
18.22: Cwale aba ana kukeela mu Sesaaliya, sebeli ota okakeeta etikeleke mi cwale sebeli oshetumuka ku Antiyoki.
18.23: Munyima no kwikalamo enako, sebeli ota ku sibaka ni sibaka mu naha yonje no Galatiya ni Filigiya yo ongota aiyetwa. Apolosi mu Efese ni mu Kolinte
18.24: Cwale Omujuda onakwisaniwa nji Apolosi, woyo ona kuleyelwa mu Alekizandiliya, sebeli wiiya mu Efese. Neli omulume no kulimuka okwamba wino ona kwiyeta eliywi.
18.25: Kame ana kwiyeta mu ndila ya Mbumu, ni kutenda omubika mu mebo, kame aamba ni kwiyeta wino-wino einu eyi yaama Jesu, kono eyo ana kulimuka yonyene neli kolobezo ya Jowani fela.
18.26: Sebeli otateka okwamba mu undume mu ndoo no milapelo, kono cwale Pulisila ni Akila aba ana ku muyupa, sebeli amutwala ku ndoo ni ku mutaluseta omo aikalele Nyambe wino.
18.27: Cwale aba ana kusinga okuta okulutela ku Akaya, aasikupumena sebeli amususuweza ni kun̄olela aiyetwa nji amutambule. Aba ana kukeela, sebeli otusa onene mu sishemo awo ana ku pumena.
18.28: Kakuli kame ana kutwesa okwambela aendisi no Majuda mu maata no kuneneba mukwamonisa mu man̄olo nji, Kilesite yokame Jesu.

19.1: Apolosi yoli mu Kolinte Paulusi sebeli okaula enaha eyi ilumbile ni kwiiya mu Efese. Omo sebeli owana aiyetwa anjili.
19.2: Cwale sebeli waaibanguta nji, “Na mukutambula Emebo No Kukena aba muna ku pumena?” Mi sebeli atambula nji, “Kokuulwa, katwa siku yupa simba mbicana nji kame kuli Emebo No Kukena.”
19.3: Cwale sebeli waaibanguta nji, “Ka kolobezo mu na kukolobezwa nayo?” Sebeli atambula nji, “Mu kolobezo ya Jowani.”
19.4: Cwale Paulusi sebeli wamba nji, “Jowani kame ana ku kolobeza ni kolobezo no kubaka, okwambela aanu nji apumene kwa woyo soiya munyima yaye, yonyene Jesu.”
19.5: Aba ana kuyupa eyo, sebeli akolobezwa mu litina lya Mbumu Jesu.
19.6: Cwale Paulusi aba anakumana okwabeeka amaoko aye beulu, Emebo No Kukena sebeli yaashulumukela beulu yoo, mi sebeli aamba mu tindimi no kwalimukiwa mane ni kunuha.
19.7: Oonje kame ana kukwana epalo ikuma ba likumi naayili (12).
19.8: Cwale sebeli oingena mu ndoo no milapelo mi mu tikweti taatu yo aamba mu undume, yo kanana noo ni kwakolwisa eyi no mubuso wa Nyambe.
19.9: Kono anjili kame ana kwikala ni mahanyi okwapumena, aamba eyi no kwiiba eyi no Ndila balubala no mukopano, sebeli otunda kwa onyene, ni ku shimba aiyetwa, yo ambola noo mu liywaa ni liywaa mu muyako no ndoo ya Tilanasi.
19.10: Eyo sebeli yekeza mu myaka yiili, nji cwale aanu no Asiya ayupe eliywi lya Mbumu aendisi no Majuda bamweya ni Magelike Aana a Sikeba
19.11: Cwale Nyambe naku tenda etimakazo no ku komokisa mu maoko a Paulusi.
19.12: Etitaulo mane ni tinyambi naiku tundisiwa ba lutu lyaye sebeli ibeekiwa kwaa sikukola, ni meeti sebeli atunda, ni mebo no kwiiba sebeli itunda mwa onyene.
19.13: Cwale anjili no aendisi no Majuda ana kwendanga atundisa Emebo no kwiiba, kame ano kutusisanga okwamba elitina lya Jesu nji, “Kame ni ku laela mu litina lya Jesu, woyo ona kukutaziwa kwa Paulusi.”
19.14: Aana mutanu na yiili no mupulisita mukulu no Majuda no litina lya Sikeba ana kutenda ngeso.
19.15: Kono emebo no kwiiba sebeli yaatambula nji, “Jesu ni muyii, ni Paulusi ni muyii, kono wene tiwe anyine?”
19.16: Cwale omulume woyo ona kwingeniwa ku mebo kwiiba sebeli waamatukela beulu ni kwaakoma, mane sebeli atunda ku ndoo eyo aali njeshe ni ku lemekiwa.
19.17: Cwale eyi yonje sebeli ilimukiwa kwaanu onje na mu Efese, aendisi no Majuda bamweya ni Magelike, mi sebeli aingenenwa okucila onje, mi elitina lya Mbumu Jesu sebeli lilumbiwa onene.
19.18: Aasikupumena no kupula kwaao ana kupumena sebeli aiya, mu kuukunyaza ni shongotola eyo no kwiiba ana kutendanga.
19.19: Cwale epalo nwao ana kutendanga amabibo sebeli alita etibuka too ni kuticin̄a aanu onje amwine, mi sebeli abala eteko no tibuka kame ina kwana eikiti makumi mutanu (50; 000) no muwaya-waya no silibela.
19.20: Cwale eliywi lya Mbumu sebeli liyanduluka ngeso ni kukula. Emifilifili mu Efese
19.21: Cwale eyo aba ina kubwako, Paulusi sebeli olela mu muhupulo no mebo nji abite mu Mesodeniya ni Akaya ni kuta ku Jelusalema, yo aamba nji, “Munyima no kwikala kuya,” sebeli wamba nji, “Kame ni fanena okamona ku Loma.”
19.22: Cwale aba ana kumana otuma aiyetwa aye ayili mu Mesodoniya awo amutusa, Timoteya ni Elasito, yonyene yosili mu Asiya mbicani.
19.23: Kusili mu nako eyo omufilifili no kuneneba sebeli wiiya mulibaka no Ndila.
19.24: Kakuli omulume wisaniwa Demetiliusi, woyo ona kuumbanga endoo no silibela no milimu no Atemisi, kame ana kuluwisa onene abeleki no musebezi owo.
19.25: Cwale sebeli waawaneka bamweya, naawo anjili asebeza omusebezi kanyi woo, ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, “Alume, kame mulimukile nji aba mufuma ni mulibaka no musebezi ou.
19.26: Cwale kame mu mona ni kuyupa nji kasa mu Efese feela kono ni mu naha yonje no Asia Paulusi kame ana susuweze ni kukolwisa epalo no aanu, yo aamba nji, emilimu itendiwa ni maoko kasa emilimu.
19.27: Ekozi eyo iiya, kasa nji omusebezi wetu mbau shwauka, kono ngeso ni ndoo no mulimu mukati otompeha oisniwa nji Atemisi kame saya liketwe kanyi esinu na mbulwa tuso, nji mane niku tompeha kwaye kame saku sinyehe, yonyene woyo olapelelwa mu Asiya ni mu litunga lyonje!”
19.28: Cwale aba ana kuyupa eyo, sebeli atina onene ni kukuwa nji, “Woyo no kuneneba ni Aetemisi no Maifese!”
19.29: Cwale omulenen̄i sebeli wiyala ni ku hakanyeha, mi sebeli aitukela bamweya mu teatele nikulema Gayusi ni Alisitako aanu na mu Mesodoniya awo ana ku sindeketanga Paulusi mu misipili.
19.30: Paulusi kame ana kusinganga oku monahaza kwaanu no kupula, kono aasikupumena kasi ku mulumelelanga.
19.31: Cwale ni manduna anjili na mu Esiya awo anokusinga naye, sebeli amutumena ni ku mukumbela nji alese okumonahaza ba patelo.
19.32: Cwale anjili sebeli akuwa sinu simweya, anjili sinjili kame, kakuli kame ana kuungana mu kuhakanyeha, mi ano kupula kasiku limuka eso ana kuunganena.
19.33: Anjili aanu mu nyangela sebeli atundisa Alekizanda, woyo aendisi no Majuda ana kubeeka kuuso. Cwale Alekizanda sebeli okobeta ni Lyoko nji akutambwele kwaanu.
19.34: Kono aba ana ku lemuha nji neli Mujuda, mu tihola timbili sebeli akuwa onje mu liywi limweya nji, “Ounene ni wa Atemisi no Maifese!”
19.35: Cwale omun̄oli no Kuta no mulenen̄i sebeli ondota enyangela ni kwamba nji, “Aana no Efese!” anyine kwaanu no kwalimuka nji omulenen̄i no Efese omubabaleli no ndoo no mulimu no mukati no kutompeha Atemisi ni wa liwee no sitabelo no kukena sinakwi ku wilu?
19.36: Cwale mumone nji einu eyo kailatulwa, abakulingeso kame mulukela okondoka mi mulese okutenda esinjili mu wangu.
19.37: Kakuli kame munaliti aa alume bano nji kasi sinya endoo no mulimu wetu no mukati simba nji asikunyefula emilimu yetu.
19.38: Cwale nji Demetiliyasi naabeleki ali kwa yonyene nji kame ali ni muzeko ni munu, etikuta kame tiyatulukile, kame kuli nasi kwatula, akutwale ku kuzeka.
19.39: Kono nji kame kuli ni taba indina musaela, kame saiatulwe mu mukopano ofanena.
19.40: Kakuli kame tuli mu utata no ku atulwa mu mufilifili balelo, kakuli katu kwite elibaka satwimane nalyo mulibakano mukopano owo.
19.41: Cwale aba ana kumana okwamba eyo, sebeli olukulula omukopano.

20.1: Cwale omufilifili aba una kubwa, Paulusi sebeli owaneka aiyetwa, okwaasusueza ni kwaalana, niku funduka okuta ku Mesodoniya.
20.2: Cwale aba ana kumana okumona enaha eyo, ni kwaasusuweza onene, sebeli ota mu naha no Magelike
20.3: Omo sebeli okaikalamo etikweti taatu, mi aendisi no Majuda sebeli amukundamena abo anokutukiseta okuta mu Siliya, sebeli onahana okuuka endila no Mesodoniya.
20.4: Sopatele naku Beliya omwana Pilasi sebeli oomu sindeketa, Alisitakasi ni Sekundasi Amatesalonika, ni Gayusi na ku Debe ni Timoteya, naa naku Asiya neli Tikikasi ni Tilofimasi.
20.5: Onyene kame anoku tangeta, sebeli aka twimanena mu Tulowasi.
20.6: Kono aci sebeli tu tunda mu Filipi munyima no mukiti no Inkwa no mbulwa omumena, munyima no amaywaa mutanu, sebeli tu keela mu Tulowasi, omo sebeli twiikalamo amaywaa mutanu naayiili (7). Paulusi aba ana Kupota aka no Mamaneneno ku Tulowasi
20.7: Ba liywaa no weli mu sunda, abo me tukuwanine bamweya okulya esilyela, Paulusi sebeli wamba noo, kakuli kame na kufanena okufunduka amasiku eliywaa linaku tatamako, mi kame ana kwambola noo enako no kuleba mane konji bakaci no usiku.
20.8: Kame kuna kwikala etilambi no kupula mu ndoo na kuwilu omo tu nakukuwanena.
20.9: Cwale ondumbana no litina lya Eutikasi kame ana kwikala mu lihaulo no ndoo, sebeli olangana otulo no kuneneba luli abo Paulusi yo twalelela okwambola ba nako no kuleba, yoli mu tulo, sebeli okwela banji okatunda ku ndoo na kuwilu no waatu. Sebeli ononiwa yo file.
20.10: Kono Paulusi sebeli oshetumukela banji ni kwinamena beulu yaye, ni ku mufumbatela yo aamba nji, “Olese kubilaela, kakuli omoyo waye osili mwa yonyene.”
20.11: Cwale Paulusi aba ana kukambama kame, sebeli okomauna esinkwa, aba ana kumana okulya, sebeli wambola noo enako no kuleba konji amasiku, sebeli ofunduka.
20.12: Ondumbana sebeli amutwala ku mundi yo yoya, mi sebeliaombaombiwa mu micima onene luli. Okutunda mu Tulowasi okuta mu Miletasi
20.13: Kono sebeli tuku tangeta ku sisepe, sebeli tukulongamo ni ku fuula okuta ku Asosi, omo kame tunaku singa okushimba Paulusi, yonyene kame ana kukutukiseta ngeso, kakuli yonyene kame ana kusaela okweenda ni makondo.
20.14: Cwale aba ana ku tuwana ku Asosi, sebeli tu mu longa, ni kuta naye ku Mitileni.
20.15: Aba tuna kufuulamo, eliywaa lina kutatamako sebeli tukeela ba mabapa ni Kiyosi, eli lina kutatamako kame sebeli tukakeela ku Samosi, elinjili kame eliywaa sebeli tukakeela ku Miletasi.
20.16: Kakuli Paulusi kame ana kulela nji alese okufuweka mu Efese, nji cwale alese oku liyehela mu Esiya kakuli kame ano ku tukiseta okaikala mu Jelusalema nji kame kutwesahala, ba liywaa no Pentakota. Okulana kwa Paulusi Kwaakulu no Efese
20.17: Paulusi yoli mu Miletasi, sebeli otumena ku Efese okaisana aakulu no keleke.
20.18: Cwale aba ana kukeela kwa yonyene, sebeli waambela nji, “Kame mulimukile omukwa nina yoyo mukaci kenu enako yonje okutunda ba liywaa no weli elyo nina kukeela mu Asiya.
20.19: Kame nina sebeleze Mbumu mu uku kokobeza konje ni mu myooti ni mu miliko ina kuniyela mu mifumbo no Majuda.
20.20: Omo ka nisi ukela munyima oku myambela esinu sonje eso sina ku fanena oku mitusa, ni ku miiyeta mu sicaba ni mu ndoo ni ndoo.
20.21: Menilemine okupakela aendisi no Majuda bamweya ni Mangelike kweeyi no kubaka kwa Nyambe neyi no tumelo mwa Mbumu wetu Jesu Kilesite.
20.22: Komumone cwale, kame nita ku Jelusalema, meni nungilwe mu mebo, mu kwalimuka eyo saika tendahaleko kwa mene.
20.23: Esi ni limukile ninji mu mulenen̄i ni mulenen̄i Emebo No Kukena kame ina kuni pakela nji okunungiwa ni ku yandisiwa kame initatelele.
20.24: Kono kani bilaele eyo, mi kanibalele omoyo wange nji niwautokwa kwa mene, esi nisinga feela ninji ni manenene omusipili ni musebezi wange ananibi Ombumu Jesu, no kupaka eliywaa no sishemo sa Nyambe.
20.25: Cwale komumone, kame ni limukile nji aanyi monje awo inendele emisipili okumikutaza eyi no mubuso wa Nyambe kamutamba okumona olubala lwange kame.
20.26: Cwalehe kame ni myambela eniti balelo nji, kani kwite omubonda no unyinga wenu moonje.
20.27: Kakuli kani siuka munyima mu kumitaluseta omulelo wonje wa Nyambe.
20.28: Cwale aanyi muku babalele, mi mu lise omutapi mu nabiwi oku ubabalela mu Mebo No Kukena oku babalela Endoo ya Nyambe ya Nyambe eyo ana kuulele ni unyinga wa Mwanaye.
20.29: Kakuli kame ni limukile nji aba sani misiye, kame sakwiiye aandiwi no kucilisa mukaci kenu, awo saulwe okuyupela omutapi amakeke.
20.30: Cwale mukaci kenu luli kame sakutunde alume asaambe einu no mapwa nji aiyetwa aakon̄e.
20.31: Cwalehe mutokomele, muhupule nji mu myaka yaatu kani lesele okweleza ni myooti ousiku ni munji ku munu ni munu.
20.32: Cwalehe bano kame ni mibeeka kwa Nyambe ni ku liywi no sishemo saye, elyo saali miyake ni kumiba esanda naa akenine onje.
20.33: Kanisi lakaza esilibela ni gauda ya munu simba esibyana.
20.34: Aanyi mwenyine kame muyii omo ina belekele ni maoko ange okuwana omu no kuyoyela mane nawo ana kwikalanga nange.
20.35: Mu inu yonje kame nina mi monisa nji mu sebeze ngeso, kame mu fanena okutusa asiku fokola, me muhupula amaywi ana kwamba Jesu nji, ‘Embuyoti kame ili onene mu kuba kasa muku tambula.’ ”
20.36: Cwale aba ana kumana okwamba ngeso, sebeli okubama ni manwi banji ni kulapela noo onje.
20.37: Cwale onje sebeli alila niku kwela mu mbando ya Paulusi ni kumutubeta.
20.38: Kame ana kutomoha onene emicima onje mulibaka no maywi aye ana kwamba nji kaatamba kumona kame olubala lwaye. Cwale sebeli amusindeketa okamukeeta ku sisepe.

21.1: Cwale aba tuna mana oukutaba noo mu ku bambaba feela, sebeli tufuula, mi sebeli tulumba ku Kosi, mi liywaa linakutatamako sebeli tukeela mu Lodesi, okutunda omo sebeli tuta ku Patala.
21.2: Cwale aba tuna kuwana esisepe silumbile ku Foenisiya, sebeli tukulongamo ni kuta.
21.3: Cwale aba tuna keela mu sibaka no Sipulasi, sebeli tusi yupela ku simoo okuta mu Silia, sebeli tuka fuweka mu Tile, kakuli omo esisepe kame sina kulongola etutu.
21.4: Cwale sebeli tuwanamo aiyetwa, ni kwiikala noo amaywaa mutanu ni twiili (7). Mu mebo sebeli aambela Paulusi nji alese okuta ku Jelusalema.
21.5: Cwale amaywaa etu aba ana kubwa, sebeli tu funduka okwekeza omusipili wetu ni kutu sindeketa onje, naa moyo oo naanoo, ni ku tulita konji aba ana kutu siisa omulenen̄i, sebeli tu kubama ni manwi ba likamba okulapela ni ku kulana omnjili ni munjili okuwaba.
21.6: Cwale sebeli tukulonga mu sisepe, onyene sebeli aukela ku mundi.
21.7: Cwale aba tuna kumana omusipil wetu okutunda mu Tile, sebeli tuta ku Tolemaisi ni kukeeta aasikupumena ni kwiikala noo eliywaa limweya.
21.8: Eliywaa lina ku tatamako sebeli tu funduka nuukakeela mu Sesaaliya, mi sebeli twiingena mu ndoo ya Filipi omwaambi no mikopano, woyo ona kutenda omunjili noao mutanu ni twiili (7) ni kwikala kwa yonyene.
21.9: Kame ana kwikala naanaye anee nwa sizana no kwaakwaliwa, ana ku nuhanga.
21.10: Aba tuna kwikalamo amaywaa mbicana, sebeli kwiiya omunuhi no litina lya Agabusi ona ku tunda ku Judeya.
21.11: Cwale aba ana kukeela kwaaci, sebeli okununga olukanda lwa Paulusi ku maoko ni ku makondoo ni kwamba nji, “Eesi, so kame esinaambiwa ku Mebo No Kukena nji, aendisi no Majuda mu Jelusalema mwasanungele omunya lukanda olu, ni ku mubeeka mu maata ano macaba.”
21.12: Cwale aba tuna kuyupa ngeso, aaci naanu sebeli tu mukumbela nji alese okukambama okuta ku Jelusalema.
21.13: Cwale Paulusi sebeli otambula nji, “Iikene aba mulila ni kucola omucima wange? Kakuli mene kame ni kutukisite kasa okwingena mu tolongo feela, kono simba okufa ku Jelusalema mulibaka no litina lya Mbumu Jesu.”
21.14: Sebeli okana okukolwisiwa kwaaci, sebeli toondoka ni kwamba nji, “Ku tendahale eso sisingwa kwa Mbumu.”
21.15: Munyima no maywaa ao, sebeli tuku tukiseta okuta ku Jelusalema.
21.16: Cwale naiyetwa anjili ana ku tunda ku Sesaaliya sebeli ata naaci, oku tutwala ku ndoo ya Nasoni, omwiyetwa no kale na ku Sipulasi, oko tuna ku fanena okwikala. Paulusi yo Potela Jakobo
21.17: Cwale aba tuna ku keela mu Jelusalema, aasikupumena sebeli atu tambula wino mu ku wabelelwa.
21.18: Eliywaa lina ku tatamako Paulusi ota naaci kwa Jakobo, mi onje akulu sebeli aikalako.
21.19: Munyima no kwakeeta, sebeli otalusa wino einu eyo Nyambe ana tende kwaasimacaba mu musebezi waye.
21.20: Cwale aba ana kuyupa eyo, sebeli akanyisa Nyambe. Mi sebeli aamba kwa yonyene nji, “Omwabetu, esi omwine nji, aendisi no Majuda aa ana lumele sebeli eikiti no kupula, mi aanu onje kame atukufalelwe omulawo.
21.21: Kame anaambelwe eyowe nji wene kame wiyeta aendisi no Majuda onje awo ayoya mwano asimacaba nji afulalele Mushe, okwaambela nji alese okutwala anoo ku mupato simba okukuteka eizo yoo.
21.22: Cwale ngasibine saitendahale? Kame saayupe nji nwiyi.
21.23: Otenda eyo tukwambela. Kame tukwite alume anee awo ali munji no sepiso noutokwa.
21.24: Waashimbe aa alume okakukenise noo, mi waatenekele nji cwale aka beulise emitwi yoo. Cwale aanu onje kame saalimuke nji kakwisa esinjili eso ana yupu kweyo inambiwa mulibaka lyowe kono nji ni wene kame oyoya mu ku tokomela omulawo wa Mushe.
21.25: Kono kweeyo no asimacaba ana lumele, kame tunaatumene elin̄olo no mulelo wetu nji kame afanena okukana kweeyo ina tendelwe emilimi, ni ku unyinga, ni kweyo ina owiwa, ni uhule.
21.26: Cwale Paulusi sebeli oshimba aalume awo, mi ba liywaa linaku tatamako sebeli okukenisa noo ni kwingena mu ndoo ya Nyambe, okwamba amaywaa no kukenisa koo aba saiyatetetwe ni nubu nai kubiwa eyi no munu ni munu woo. Okunungiwa Kwa Paulusi mu Ndoo ya Nyambe
21.27: Cwale amaywaa mutanu naayili aba ana kwatumela okubwa, aendisi no Majuda na ku Esiya awo ana kumumona mu ndoo ya Nyambe, sebeli asusuweza enyangela ina kukuwana mu kupula, ni ku mulema.
21.28: Cwale sebeli akuwa nji, “Alume no Isilaele, komutuse! Uno yokame omutu ona kwiiyetanga aanu onje mu ibaka yonje okulwisa aanu ni mulawo ni sibaka sino, abakulingeso osilita kame Amagelike mu ndoo ya Nyambe, mi na silafaza esibaka sino no kukena.
21.29: Kakuli kame ana kumumona oweli yo enda ni Tolofimo Omwiifese mu mulenen̄i, mi sebeli anahana nji Paulusi mwendi namu liti mu ndoo ya Nyambe.
21.30: Cwale omulenen̄i onje sebeli oimana amaefe-efe, mi aanu sebeli aituka ba bamweya, okalema Paulusi ni ku mukoka okumutundisa mu ndoo ya Nyambe mi ababo emyelo sebeli iyatiliwa.
21.31: Cwale aba ana kweteka nji amwibaye, eliywi sebeli liiya ku mwendisi no masole no Maloma nji Jelusalema yonje naimana ni mufilifili.
21.32: Mu nako imweya sebeli oshimba amasole na shebuluki oo, ni kwiitukela kwa onyene, cwale aba anakumona omwendisi ni masole, sebeli alesela okumufula.
21.33: Cwale omwendisi sebeli osheteta ni kulema Paulusi, ni ku laela nji anungiwe ni mawenge ayili. okubinda aibangute eyaye, nji yokame anyine, neeyo ana tende.
21.34: Anjili mu nyangela sebeli akuweleza sinu simweya, anjili sindina, mi sebeli okwangwa okulimukabo eniti mulibaka no lilata, sebeli nji Paulusi atwaliwe mu ndoo no kongola.
21.35: Cwale aba ana kukeela ba matulameno, konji oku shimbiwa ku Masole mulibaka no kutweba no nyangela.
21.36: Kakuli okupula nwaanu kame ana ku mukon̄anga, akuweleza nji, “Aibaiwe!” Paulusi Yoku Sileleza Yonyene
21.37: Paulusi yoli beebi ni kwingenyekwa mu ndoo no kongola, sebeli wamba ku mwendisi no masole nji, “Kame ni kumbela okwamba nowe?” Woyo sebeli omwibanguta nji, “Kame olimukile okwamba Esigelike?”
21.38: Kana kasa wene Omwengepita, uya, ona liti omufilifili mu maywaa aya anabu ni kwetelela aibai alume ana ku kwana eikiti inee (4;000) okuta noo mu lihalaupa?”
21.39: Paulusi sebeli otambula nji, “Mene kame nili Omujuda, okutundelela ku Tasusi mu Silisia, omulenen̄i noutokwa, Kame ni kumbela kwa wene nji naambe kwaanu.”
21.40: Cwale aba ana ku mulumelela, sebeli oimana aba noku tinena, mi sebeli okobeta aanu ni Lyoko, cwale aba kuna kondoka onene tuu, sebeli wamba noo mu puo no Sihebelu nji,

22.1: “Abaange naa sitange, muyupe aba ni kutambwela balubala wenu!”
22.2: Cwale aba ana kuyupa nji kame aambela mu puo no Mahehelu sebeli aondoka onene luli, mi sebeli wamba nji,
22.3: “Kame nili Omujuda, ona leyeliwa ku Tasusi mu Silisiya, kono kame nina kulele omuno mu mulenen̄i ku makondo a Gamaliele, mi kame nina iyetiwa no kupetahala okuta mu mukwa nwaa njekulyetu, ni kutukufalelwa eyi no Nyambe, kanyi omo mwiikalele balelo naanyi.
22.4: Kame nina lwisi onene Endila eyo mane oku twala ku lifu, kame nina kununganga alume bamweya naakati okwaa ingenyeka mu tolongo.
22.5: Omupulisita mukulu ni kuta no akulu onje kame ani paka. kame nina ku shimba aman̄olo okutunda kwaa onyene okutwala kwaabange, mi sebeli ni funduka okuta ku Damaseka nuukashimbamo aawo ana kwikalangamo ni kwaalita mu tololongo mu Jelusalema nji abiwe ekoto. Paulusi Yoamba Einokufuktuka kwaye
22.6: “Cwale abo meni lemine okweenda nji nishetete kunyonga ni Damaseka, omunji ba 12 okolokoluli olumonyi no kuneneba luna kutuda ku wilu ababo sebeli lunifuka.
22.7: Cwale sebeli nikwela banji ni kuyupa eliywi lyaamba kwa mene nji, ‘Suaule, Saule! Iikene oni yandiseta?’
22.8: Sebeli ni tambula nji, ‘Tiwe anyine, Mbumu?’ Cwale sebeli oni tambula nji, ‘Time Jesu no Nazaleta, woyo o yandisa.’
22.9: Cwale awo nina kwikala noo kame ana kumona olumonyi kono kasi kuyupa eliywi lya woyo ona kwamba kwa mene.
22.10: Cwale sebeli naamba nji, ‘Iikene nifanena okutenda, Mbumu?’ Mi Ombumu sebeli onambela nji, ‘Oimane, mi ote mu Damaseka, cwale omo kame soka ambelwe yonje eyo ofanena okutenda.’
22.11: Kakuli cwale kanisiku mona mulibakano kanya no lumonyi olo, kame nina kulemiwa ku Lyoko kwaao nina kweenda nooo okwingena mu Damaseka.
22.12: “Ananiasi, omulume onaku kubeeka kwa Nyambe okuta mu mukwa no mulawo, woyo opakwa kwaanu onje awo ayoyamo.
22.13: Cwale sebeli oiya kwa mene, ni kwiimana kunyonga yange, ni kwamba nji, ‘Saule minange, obiwe okumona kame!’ Mi mu nako eyeyo, sebeli ni mona ni ku mwaliketa.
22.14: Cwale ni kwamba nji, Nyambe nwaa njekulyetu nakukete nji olimuke eso asaela, okumona woyo no kuluka ni kuyupa ku liywi litunda mu kanwa kaye.
22.15: Kakuli kame sotende opaki waye kwaanu onje kweeyo ona mono ni kuyupa.
22.16: Cwale bano siikene osi tatelele? Oimane mi okolobezwe, mi oyowisiwe ku ibi yowe, wisane ba litina lyaye.’ Okwiisanwa kwa Paulusi oka Kutaza Kwaasimacaba
22.17: “Aba nina kumana okuukela ku Jelusalema ababo meni lapela mu ndoo ya Nyambe, sebeli ni mona epono,
22.18: ni ku mona Ombumu yo aamba kwa mene nji, ‘Olelube mi muwangu otunde mu Jelusalema, kakuli katamba ku tambula oupaki so ni pake.’
22.19: Cwale sebeli ni tambula nji, ‘Kame alimukile nji time nina kwiingenyekanga mu tolongo mu ndoo ni ndoo no milapelo ni kufulanga awo ana kupumenanga kwa wene.
22.20: Cwale ababo ounyinga wa Setefani opaki wowe aba ona kwiiteka, kame nina kwikalako, ni kupumena okwiibaiwa kwaye, ni kubabalela eikumango ya awo ana ku mwiibaa.’
22.21: Cwale sebeli wamba kwa mene nji, ‘Ote, kakuli kame sani kutume oku no kuleba kwaasimacaba.’ ” Paulusi Omuloma
22.22: Sebeli amuteeteta okutwala abo ana kwambela eliywi elyo, ababo sebeli atangisa okukuwa ni liywi lili beulu nji, “Omunu nongeso mu mutundise mu litunga, kafanene okuyoya!”
22.23: Sebeli akuwa ni kututula eikumango yoo ni ku tunyisa eliluli mu wilu.
22.24: Omwendisi no masole sebeli olaela nji alitiwe mu ndoo no kongola, nji aka mwibangute yo fuliwa nji alimuke eso amukuwela.
22.25: Kono aba ana kumana okumununga ni mihala no itumba, Paulusi sebeli oibanguta omwendisi ona kwimananga ba nyonga nji, “Kana nitukelo okufula omunu no Muloma, yo kasi atuliwa kale?”
22.26: Cwale onduna aba ana kuyupa ngeso, sebeli ota ku mweendisi no masole ni kwamba kwa onyene nji, “Siikene eso osinga okutenda? Kakuli omunu uyu ni Muloma!”
22.27: Cwale omwendisi no masole sebeli wiiya kwa Paulusi ni kumwibanguta nji, “Onambele, niti luli kame oleilwe ku Maloma?” Paulusi sebeli otambula nji, “Ee.”
22.28: Omwendisi no masole sebeli otambula nji, “Kame nina teneke amali no kupula nji nu kuulele etukelo eyo.” Paulusi sebeli otambula nji, “Kono mene ni mu kuleiwa.”
22.29: Cwale awo ana ku singa oku mufula sebeli amusiya ababo, omwendisi no masole ni yonyene sebeli ocila aba ana kuyupa nji Muloma, kakuli kame ana ku mununga. Paulusi yooli booso no Kuta
22.30: Kono eliywaa aba lina kupa, mu kusinga oku limuka elibaka no niti eyo amuzekiseta aendisi no Majuda, omwendisi no masole sebeli onungutula Paulusi, ni ku laelela apulisita akulu naa sikuta onje nji akuwane, sebeli ota ni Paulusi ni ku mubeeka balubala woo.

23.1: Paulusi yo alikete onene asi Kuta no Majuda sebeli wamba nji, “Abaange, kame ninaende ni lizwalo no kuwaba koonje balubala wa Nyambe, okulita ba liywaa no balelo lino.”
23.2: Cwale Ananiyasi omupulisita mukulu sebeli olaela awo ana kwimananga kunyonga yaye nji amupobole ba kanwa,
23.3: Cwale Paulusi sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Nyambe mba ku pobola, wene elimota libasizwe elikena! Kandi aba oikalile bano ni ku naatula okuta mu mulawo, kandi aba olaela nji nipoboliwe, kame ocola omulawo!”
23.4: Awo ana kwimananga ku nyonga yaye, sebeli aamba nji, “Weene kame okuta omupulisita mukulu wa Nyambe?”
23.5: Paulusi sebeli otambula nji, “Abaange, kanisi limuka nji mupulisita mukulu kakuli kame ku n̄olilwe nji, ‘Olese okwamba eyi no kwiiba ku mwendisi no aanu owe.’ ”
23.6: Cwale Paulusi mu kulimuka nji anjili neli Asaduki mi anjili neli Afalisi, sebeli okuwa mu Kuta nji, “Abaange, mene kame nili omufalisi, o mwana no mufalisi, kame naatulwa mulibakano kwinguka nwaafu kame nili mu muliko!”
23.7: Cwale aba ana kumana okwamba eyo, omufilifili sebeli winguka mukaci no Afalisi naa Saduki, mi esikwata sebeli sikutaba bakaci.
23.8: Kakuli Asaduki kame aamba nji kakwisa okwinguka kwaafu, simba elin̄eloi, simba Emebo, kono Afalisi kame apumena eyo yonje.
23.9: Cwale sebeli kwinguka elilata no kuneneba luli, mi anjili aiyeti no mualao aa aimanena Afalisi, sebeli aimana ni kwamba nji, “Ka tusiwana esi sifosahalile kwa yonyene uyu mulume! Mwendi ni mebo simba elin̄eloi yaamba mwa yonyene!”
23.10: Cwale Omufilifii aba onaku ekezeha, omwendisi no masole sebeli ocila nji Paulusi mba kaolwa mu ibindi kwa onyene, ni ku laela amasole okushetumuka okashimba Paulusi mukaci koo ni ku mulita mu ndoo no kongola.
23.11: Ousiku ona kutatamako Ombumu sebeli oimana kunyonga yaye ni kwamba nji, “Olese kucila, kakuli kanyi aba ona paka eyange mu Jelusalema, cwale ni mu Loma kame ofanena okanipaka ngeso.” Omulelo no Kwibaa Paulusi
23.12: Cwale eliywaa aba lina kupa, Amjuda anjili sebeli akuwana okulela ni kweeta nji katamba kulya simba okunwa konji aba saibae Paulusi.
23.13: Awo ana ku tenda omulelo owo, neli aanu ana kubitelela makumi anee.
23.14: Cwale sebeli ata kwa mupulisita omukulu ni kwaakulu, ni kwamba nji, “Kame tuna kunungu oluci nji ka tutamba kulya esinjili konji aba satwiibae Paulusi oweli.
23.15: Abakulingeso, anyi naasi Kuta mu simwete omwendisi no masole amulite kwaanyi, mi munise kanyi kame musinga okusaisisa etitaba taye. “Cwale aci kame tukutukisite oku mwibaa yo kasikeela kale kwaanyi.”
23.16: Kono omwana mandaye Paulusi no mushimani aba ana kuyupa emifumbo yoo, sebeli ota mu ndoo no kongola okasimweta Paulusi.
23.17: Cwale Paulusi sebeli oisana omunjili no abaleki ni kwamba nji, “Otwale uyu ndumbana ku mwendisi no masole, kakuli kame ali nesi asaela okumwambela.”
23.18: Cwale sebeli omushimba ni kumutwala ku mwendisi no masole ni kwamba nji, “Paulusi omupantiti kame anani isana ni kuni kumbela nji nilite uyu ndumbana kwa wene, kakuli kame kuli eso asaela okwamba kwa wene.”
23.19: Omwendisi no masole sebeli omulema ku Lyoko, ni kuta naye ku nyonga ni ku mwibanguta nji, “Siikene eso osaela oku naambela?”
23.20: Cwale sebeli wamba nji, “aendisi no Majuda kame ana kuyupu nji aku kumbele nji byuunda waalitele Paulusi ku Kuta yoo, atende kanyi kame asaele okusaisisa etaba yaye.
23.21: Kono olese okwaa lumelela, kakuli alume no kubitelela amakumi anee awo ana mukundamene, kame akunungile oluci nji katamba okulya simba oku nwa esinjili koonji aba sa ibae Paulusi oweli. Cwale kame aku tukisite, ni kutatelela esepiso okutunda kwa wene.”
23.22: Cwale omwendisi no masole sebeli ousa ondumbana, ni ku mulaela nji, “Olese okwambela omunu nji nunambele etaba eyi.” Paulusi yo tumiwa kwa Mubusisi Felikisi
23.23: Cwale sebeli oisana aendisi ayiili no masole ni kwamba nji, “Ba nako no 9 okoloko (21) ousiku mu kutukisete mu shimbe amasole akwana emyanda yiili (200) ni timbii makumi mutanu naayili, (70) naalume akwana emyanda yiili (200) asikulwisa etimbi nji ate ku Sesaaliya.
23.24: Mulukise ni tipeleswa eto sa titiniwe kwa Paulusi, mi mumutwale wino kwa Felikisi omubusisi.”
23.25: Cwale sebeli on̄ola elin̄olo eli lyaamba nji,
23.26: “Mene Kilaudiyasi Lisiyasi kwa Felikisi, omubusisi okutekiwa onene, mulumele.
23.27: Omunu woyo kame ana kulemiwa ku Majuda, mi kame ana ku singa oku mwibaa, cwale mukuyupa nji ni muloma sebeli niiya ni masole oku muyoyisa.
23.28: Cwale mu kusinga nji ni limuke eyo amulwiseta, sebeli ni mutwala ku Kuta yoo.
23.29: Omo sebeli ni wana nji kame amu zekisa mu yambo no mulawo woo, kono kakwisa omubonda owo ofanena elifu simba okunungiwa.
23.30: Cwale aba nina kumana okuyupa nji munu woyo kame ana kundamenwa, ababo sebeli ni mutumena kwa wene, mi kame nina laelele awo amuzekisa nji eyo amuzekiseta ailite kwa wene .”
23.31: Cwale amasole, sebeli atenda omo ana laelelwe, okushimba Paulusi ni kumulita ousiku ku Antipatilisi.
23.32: Cwale eliywaa aba lina kupa sebeli aukela ku ndoo no kongola, okusiya asikutina etimbii aata ni Paulusi.
23.33: Cwale aba anaku keela mu Sesaaliya, sebeli aba omubusisi elin̄olo, mane niku lita Paulusi kwa yonyene.
23.34: Omubusisi aba ana kumana okubala elin̄olo, sebeli oibanguta Paulusi nji kame atunda ku tolopo ibine. Cwale aba ana kuyupa nji kame atunda mu Silisiya,
23.35: sebeli wamba nji, “Kame sani yupe eyowe aba sakeele awo akuzekisa.” Cwale sebeli olaela nji atatelelwe mu ndoo ya Heloda.

24.1: Munyima no maywaa mutanu omupulisita mukulu Ananiyasi sebeli oiya nakulu anjili nimutalusi wisanwa Tetulusi. Mi sebeli akumonahaza kwa mubusisi oku talusa eyi ya Paulusi.
24.2: Cwale aba ana ku mwiisana, Tetulusi sebeli otangisa oku muhapeleza okwamba nji, “Aba tu yoya mu kozo no kuneneba ni mwa wene, mu kubiwa kwetu kwa wene, wene Felekisi no kukutekeha, einu no kupula kame itandahala mwa wene muno mu litunga.
24.3: Mundila yonje ni kubine konje kame twiitambula mu witumelo no kuneneba.
24.4: Kono nji nilese oku sinyeza enako, kame niku kumbela mu sishemo sowe otutetete kweyo tu kwambela.
24.5: Kakuli kame tu nawana woyo mulume nji mususwezi omunya tiputeho no Majuda onje mu litunga lyonje, yokame omutwi no tuto no kukeluha no Anazaleta.
24.6: Kame ana eteke mane okusilafaza Endoo ya Nyambe, kono natu muleme.
24.7: Kono omwendisi no masole Lisiasi, sebeli okeela ni ku mushimba mu maata no kuneneba, okutu byangulaye.
24.8: Mu ku mwibanguta mwenyene mba mulimuka okutundelela mwa yonyene einu yonje eyo tu munyaza.”
24.9: aendisi no Majuda noyonyene sebeli apumena nji eyo amunyaza ni yaniti.
24.10: Cwale omubusisi aba ana kwamba kwa yonyene, Paulusi sebeli otambula nji, “Mu ku limuka nji mu myaka no kupula kame ona tende omwatuli no litunga eli, kame ni wabelelwe okuba oupaki wange.
24.11: Kanyi omo olimukele nji kakusibita amaywaa likumi naayiili aba nino katunda ku Jelusalema mu kulaapela.
24.12: Kono kasikuniwana meni kanana naanu simba okususweza esicaba, simba mu keleke, simba mu tindoo no milapelo, simba mu mulenen̄i.
24.13: Simba mane okulita kwa wene esisupo kweeyo aamba eyange.
24.14: Kono kweeyi kame ni pumena kwa wene, nji okukumanena ni Ndila eyo aisaniwa kunyefula, kame ni lapela Nyambe no asitetu ni kupumena einu onje eyo ina lyatisiwa mu mualao simba eyi ina n̄oliwa kwaanuhi a Nyambe.
24.15: Mulibaka nokwikala ni sepo kwa Nyambe neyo nonyene apumena, nji okwinguka kwao no kuluka nawo nakwaluka,
24.16: mi cwale kame netekanga onene nji ni ikale ni lizwalo kuneku la Nyambe ni aanu.
24.17: Aba kuna kubita emyaka sebli ni lita etituso ni timpo ku Jelusalema kwaanu no kusheba.
24.18: Meni lemine okutenda eyi, sebeli aniwana me kenine mu Ndoo ya Nyambe, okuulwile esicaba ni mifilifili. Kono aendisi no Majuda anjili ana kutunda ku Esiya
24.19: kame afanena okukeela kwaanyi nji kame anyaza nji kame kuli esinjili eso nina foso.
24.20: Abakulingeso mu lesele aa alume onyene aambe eso nina kufosa aba nina kwimana balubala no Kuta,
24.21: konji esinu simweya eso nina kwamba meni imanine mukaci koo, ‘Ni ku kuteka okwinguka nwaafu eyo ni zekisiwa mu liywaa no balelo lino.’ ”
24.22: Kono Felekisi woyo ona kulimuka wino Endila, sebeli wamba kwa onyene nji, “Aba sa keele Lisiyasi omendisi, okubinda sani nahane etaba yenu.”
24.23: Cwale sebeli oba etaelo ku mwendisi no masole nji iakale mu kutateleliwa nji mu kulukuluha mi aalikani aye abiwe ekolo no kumulitela eyo asela.
24.24: Munyima no maywaa, Felekisi sebeli oiya ni moyo waye Dulusila ona kutenda Omujuda, mi sebeli otumena Paulusi ni kuyupa yo aamba mu tumelo mwa Jesu Kilesite.
24.25: Yo lemine okwambola eyi no niti neyi no kuluka ni nuukulema mane ni katulo na kuuso, Felekisi yonyene sebeli ocila ni kwamba nji, “Ba nakon ino ote oweli. Cwale aba sani wane esibaka mba ni kwiisana.”
24.26: Ba nako imweya sebeli ohupula nji kame sabiwe amali kwa Paulusi. Cwale sebeli omutumena aka no kupula nikamba kwayonyena.
24.27: Kono aba ina kubwa eilimo yiili, Felekisi kame ana kuyoliwa kwa Polosiusi Festusi, ni ku laekaza okutenda aendisi no Majuda ouwa, Felekisi sebeli osiya Paulusi mu tolongo.

25.1: Cwale Fesitasi aba ana keela aye, munyima no aywaa aatu, sebeli okambamena ku Jelusalema okutunda mu Sesaliya.
25.2: Omupulisita mukulu naakulu no majuda sebeli akumonahaza kwa yonyene, mi sebeli abiha kwayonyene okukumanena neya Paulusi.
25.3: mi sebeli akumbela nji atende mukwaawabelisa nji aatumene Paulusi ku Jelusalema, okulela okumu kundamena nji amwibae ba ndila.
25.4: Fesitusi sebeli otambula nji, Paulusi kame ali mu Sesaaliya, ni kwamba nji ni yonyene okutwa atemo abano.
25.5: Cwale sebeli waamaba nji, “Mu lusele alume aali ni tukelo mukaci kenu ashetumuke ni mene, mi nji kame kuli eso sina fosahala mwa yonyene, aiye mukumuhapeleza.”
25.6: Cwale aba ana ku mana okwikala noo mu maywaa no kwaakwana mutanu ni twaatu simba likumi, sebeli oukela ku Sesaaliya. Ba liywaa lina kutatamako sebeli oikala ba situlo no katulo, mi sebeli olaelela nji Pulusi alitiwe.
25.7: Cwale aba ana kwiiya, aendisi no Majuda ana kutunda ku Jelusalema sebeli amubeeka mukaci, ni ku hapeleza emibonda no kupula eyo akwangwa okulita oupaki wayo.
25.8: Paulusi yonyene sebeli okutambwela nji, “Kanisifoseza omulawo no Majuda, simba Endoo ya Nyambe, simbsa Sesale kanisi mufoseza simba kanyonyo.”
25.9: Kono Fesitusi muku singa oku wabeliswa aendisi no Majuda, sebeli wamba kwa Paulusi nji, “Ninji kame osaela okuta ku Jelusalema, mi omo oka atulwemo eyambo eto balubala wange?”
25.10: Kono Paulusi sebeli wamba nji, “Kame niimanine balubala no Kuta ya Sesale, moni lukela okwatulwela, Ku Majuda kanisifoza simba simyeya, kanyi omo olimukele wino ni wene.
25.11: Nji cwale kame nina matuka omulawo, nikutenda esinjili eso sifanena elifu, sikana okufa, kono nji kakwisa eniti mu yambo eyo aninungelela, kakwisa woyo sonibeeka mu maata oo. Kame niku lilelela kwa Sesale.”
25.12: Cwale Festusi aba ana ku kwaambota nasikuta yaye, sebeli otambula nji, “Kame ona bilaelele kwa Sesale, kame soote kwa Sesale.” Paulusi booso wa Agipa ni Benisi
25.13: Cwale munyima no maywaa acana aba ana kubwa, Aglipa ombumu ni Belunice sebeli akeela mu Sesaaliya mu kutambula Felstusi.
25.14: Cwale aba ana kwikalamo amaywaa no kupula, Festusi sebeli wambela Ombumu eyambo ta Paulusi nji, “Kuno kame kuli omulume ona siiwa mu tolongo kwa Felekisi.
25.15: Aba nina kwikala ku Jelusalema, apulisita akulu naakulu no Majuda kame ana kwiiya kwa mene mukuni simweta eyambo ya Paulusi, ni kukumbela nji aatulelwe elifu.
25.16: Kono sebeli naatambula nji kasa tukelo no sizo no Maloma okulumelela okwatuliwa abo omuzeki ni muzekisi kaasikuwana kale olubala ni lubala mane ni kubiwa okolo noukutambwela mu yambo yaye eyo amuzekisa.
25.17: Cwalehe abo aneeyi bamweya kuno, kanasiku liyeha, kono eliywaa linakutatamako sebeli niikala ba situlo no katulo ni ku laela nji alitiwe balubala no Kuta.
25.18: Cwale azekisi aye aba ana kwiimana, kasaamba esinjili no mibonda yaye eyo ana ku mununga, kanyi eyo nina kutatelela nji niiyupe.
25.19: Kono kame ana kwikala ni ngambolo naye eyi no tumelo yoo neyi no munjili woyo wiisaniwa nji Jesu, woyo ona kufa, kono Paulusi kame aongota nji kame ayoya.
25.20: Mulibaka no kuziyeleha mu yambo no ngeso, sebeli ni mwibanguta nji kautwese okuta ku Jelusalema nji okaatulelweko etaba eyi.
25.21: Kono cwale Paulusi sebeli okumbela nji abekiwe mu sitokisi okutatela ekatulo no Mbumu omukulu, sebeli ni laela nji ababalelwe okubitela aba sanimu tumene kwa Sesale.”
25.22: Cwale Aglipa sebeli wamba kwa Festusi nji, “Kame ni singa okuyupa wkwa woyo mulume.” Festusi sebeli otambula nji, “Mbumumono byuunda,” Paulusi Booso wa Aglipa
25.23: Cwale eliywaa aba lina kupa Aglipa ni Belunice sebeli aiya mu umbumu no kuneneba ni kwiingena mu Kuta aali naendisi no masole, naanu akulu no mulenen̄i. Cwale mu taelo ya Fesitusi, Paulusi sebeli olitiwa.
25.24: Cwale Fesitasi sebeli wamba nji, “Mbumu Aglipa nawo onje aikalile naaci muno, mumumwine omulume woyo aneyele aendisi no Majuda no kupula kwa mene mu ku muzekisa, bamweya mu Jelusalema ni muno, sebeli akuweleza nji kalukeele okuyoya kame.
25.25: Kono kame nina wana nji kakwisa omubonda anatende owo ofanena elifu, yonyene kame ana kubilaeze okuta kwa Sesale, kame ni nawana oku mutumenako.
25.26: Kono sikwite eso ni lukela okun̄olela kwa Sisale eso no niti mu taba yaye. Cwalehe kame nina muliti balubala lwenu, onene balubala lowe wene luli Ombumu Aglipa, nji munyima no kwamba etaba yaye, ni limuke eso sani twese okun̄ola.
25.27: Kakuli kwa mene ni taba nokwa yupahala aba sa ku tumiwe omunu no kunungiwa, ka kumonisiwa eyambo ana zekisiwa.”

26.1: Aglipa sebeli wamba kwa Paulusi nji, “Kame opumenenwe nji waambe.” Cwale Paulusi sebeli olola elikaa lyaye ni kwamba nji,
26.2: “Kame ni kwite etitonolo okwikala balubala lowe wene ombumu Aglipa, mi kame sa nibe oupaki wange wonje ku yambo eto anitamilikeza a majuda.
26.3: Kakuli wene olimukile emilao ni yambo eyo kasingi a majuda, cwale kame ni kukumbela nji oni tetete wino.
26.4: “Omooyo wange okutunda ku wanuke, inaikala okutunda kumatatekelo mu sicaba no abaange mane ni ku Jelusalema, kame a ulimukile oonje a majuda.
26.5: Kakuli kame au limukile, nji kame saela okupaka eniti, nji okukumanena ni ulapeli kame inakuyoya kanyi mufalisi.
26.6: Mi bano kame ni imana kuti ni atulwe mu sepo eyo a na ku sepisa Nyambe kwa sitetu,
26.7: eyo emishobo yetu likumu ni yiili asepile okawana, abo sa lapele mu niti omunji ni usiku, mi musepiso eyi ya ni nyaza nayo aendisi no Majuda.
